description_zh: 铂力特（688333.SH）公司成立于2011年7月，致力于成为全球领先的增材技术解决方案提供商；2019年作为首批25家公司之一登陆科创板。 铂力特是国家级高新技术企业、国家知识产权优势企业、国家级“绿色工厂”，拥有国家企业技术中心、金属增材制造国家地方联合工程研究中心等高水平科研平台；入选国家级首批“千企百城”商标品牌价值提升行动名单；“增材制造大数据深度应用项目”获评工业部工业互联网示范项目。 公司提供金属增材制造设备、打印、原材料、技术等服务，服务于航空航天、能源动力、工业模具、汽车制造、机器人、3C电子、自行车、医疗齿科、科研院所、文化创意等行业。
description_en: Bright Laser Technology (688333.SH), founded in July 2011, is a national high-tech enterprise, national intellectual property advantage enterprise, and national 'green factory'. It operates a National Enterprise Technology Center and a National-Local Joint Engineering Research Center for Metal Additive Manufacturing. Recognized in the national 'Thousand Enterprises, Hundred Cities' trademark brand value enhancement initiative and awarded an industrial internet demonstration project by the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology, the company provides metal additive manufacturing equipment, on-demand printing services, raw materials, and technical support across aerospace, energy power, industrial tooling, automotive manufacturing, robotics, 3C electronics, bicycles, dental and medical devices, research institutions, and cultural-creative industries.

name_zh: 天津镭明激光科技有限公司
name_en: Tianjin LIM Laser Technology Co., Ltd.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备
address_zh: 中国大陆/天津/天津市/天津市西青区中北镇开源路12号C栋
address_en: China/Tianjin/天津市/天津市西青区中北镇开源路12号C栋
description_zh: 天津镭明激光科技有限公司致力于为全球客户提供先进的增材制造装备、配套辅助设备以及3D打印服务，是中国领先的金属3D打印整体解决方案提供商。凭借多年的技术积累和行业摸索，公司自主研发了 LiM-X系列激光选区熔化设备，LiM-S系列同轴送粉设备，LiM-R系列激光熔覆设备等。目前公司的3D打印设备和技术成果已在航空航天、模具、教育、医疗、汽车制造、能源动力、轨道交通等诸多领域广泛应用。未来，镭明激光将继续加强技术储备、深耕技术研发，不断迭代金属增材制造设备，进一步提高设备稳定性、可靠性，助力我国增材制造产业的规模化生产。
description_en: Tianjin LIM Laser Technology Co., Ltd. is a leading Chinese provider of integrated metal additive manufacturing solutions, offering advanced AM equipment—including its proprietary LiM-X series laser powder bed fusion (LPBF) systems, LiM-S series coaxial powder feed systems, and LiM-R series laser cladding systems—as well as auxiliary equipment and 3D printing services. Its technologies are widely deployed in aerospace, tooling, education, healthcare, automotive, energy power, and rail transit. Committed to R&D investment and technological iteration, the company continuously enhances the stability and reliability of its metal AM systems to support large-scale industrial production.

description_zh: 湖南华曙高科技股份有限公司由著名3D打印科学家许小曙博士于2009年10月在湖南长沙成立。公司秉持“自主创新、开源共享”理念，瞄准产业化应用持续开展高质量自主创新，不断向科技广度和深度进军，持续推进创新、创业、创造，成为中国增材制造行业头部企业。2023年4月17日，华曙高科在上海证券交易所科创板首次公开发行A股上市，证券简称：华曙高科，证券代码：688433。
description_en: Founded in October 2009 in Changsha by Dr. Xiaoshu Xu—a renowned 3D printing scientist—Farsoon High-Tech champions 'independent innovation and open sharing', pursuing high-quality, industry-oriented R&D across broad and deep technological frontiers. A leader in China’s additive manufacturing sector, the company completed its initial public offering on the Shanghai Stock Exchange STAR Market on April 17, 2023 (stock code: 688433).

description_zh: 汉邦激光深耕金属增材制造领域，是国家专精特新重点“小巨人”企业、国家知识产权优势企业。是国内一家掌握金属3D打印设备、软件、核心器件（振镜）、耗材（新材料研发）及应用技术五大产业链核心板块全自主自研能力的高科创属性企业。产品已广泛应用于航空航天、核能、新能源汽车、消费电子、医疗器械、人形机器人、低空飞行器、模具等重点行业领域并形成了一定的规模化应用，目前已成功研发大中小(加工幅面涵盖150mm×150mm×150mm到1600mm×1600mm×1700mm）20多款金属3D打印装备，产品矩阵完整。
description_en: Hanbang Laser is a national 'specialized, refined, distinctive, and innovative' (Zhuan Jing Te Xin) key 'Little Giant' enterprise and national intellectual property advantage enterprise. It is among the few Chinese companies with full in-house R&D capabilities across all five core segments of the metal AM value chain: equipment, software, critical components (e.g., galvanometers), consumables (novel material development), and application technologies. Its metal 3D printers—spanning build volumes from 150 × 150 × 150 mm to 1600 × 1600 × 1700 mm—serve aerospace, nuclear energy, new-energy vehicles, consumer electronics, medical devices, humanoid robotics, low-altitude aircraft, and tooling industries at scale.

description_zh: 易加增材是国家专精特新“重点小巨人”企业、国家高新技术企业，获得军事科技进步奖一等奖。公司致力于研发和推广工业级3D打印（增材制造）系统与应用技术，专注研发、生产、销售工业级3D打印装备、打印材料及应用软件，是国内技术实力领先的工业级3D打印装备制造商与应用方案供应商。
description_en: Eplus3D is a national 'specialized, refined, distinctive, and innovative' key 'Little Giant' enterprise and national high-tech enterprise, honored with the First Prize of Military Science and Technology Progress. The company focuses on the R&D and commercialization of industrial-grade 3D printing (additive manufacturing) systems and applications, delivering end-to-end solutions including industrial AM equipment, printing materials, and application software. It ranks among China’s top-tier industrial 3D printing equipment manufacturers and solution providers.

address_en: China/Jiangsu/苏州市/中国江苏省苏州市常熟市碧溪街道兴港东路7-1号
description_zh: Polymaker 是一家专注于3D打印材料的高科技企业，通过严格把控生产的每一个环节，研发和生产高性能3D打印材料。 基于将3D打印发展为主流制造方式的愿景，Polymaker 不断丰富功能型材料体系，拓展材料选择的可能性。 Polymaker 坚持以客户为中心，兼具开拓精神、创造力与社会责任感，致力于让创造不再困难、高品质和可持续发展，为3D打印行业提供安全洁净的材料解决方案。 目前，Polymaker 已成长为挤出式3D打印材料领域的重要创新者与供应商之一，其产品广泛应用于汽车、航空航天、工业制造、医疗服务以及日常消费品等多个领域。
description_en: Polymaker is a high-tech enterprise specializing in high-performance extrusion-based 3D printing materials. Guided by the vision of establishing 3D printing as a mainstream manufacturing method, Polymaker continuously expands its functional material portfolio to broaden application possibilities. Customer-centric and driven by innovation, creativity, and social responsibility, Polymaker delivers safe, clean, high-quality, and sustainable material solutions. Today, it stands as a leading innovator and supplier in the extrusion-based 3D printing materials market, serving automotive, aerospace, industrial manufacturing, healthcare, and consumer goods sectors.

name_zh: 宁波海天增材科技有限公司
name_en: Ningbo Haitian Additive Manufacturing Co., Ltd.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

description_zh: 宁波海天增材科技有限公司（海天增材），隶属于海天集团激光机械产业，专注于激光金属3D打印设备、配套辅机、控制软件的研发与制造。依托集团近60年的装备制造经验，公司建立了完善的设计研发、生产装配、质量检验、市场营销及售后服务体系。基于不同应用行业的差异化需求，现已成功开发C250M至C1500M成熟机型，提供多种成型尺寸与激光策略。配套设备运行全流程的粉末循环方案，真正实现人粉隔离，保障操作人员的健康安全，避免环境风险。支持设备24小时连续运转，提高产能。自主研发软件，实现智能视觉铺粉及打印质量监测。配套MES系统，满足数字化大生产时代的信息化需求。并由专业团队提供全流程、全方位的服务支持。
description_en: Ningbo Haitian Additive Manufacturing Co., Ltd. ('Haitian AM'), a subsidiary of the Haitian Group’s laser machinery division, designs and manufactures laser metal 3D printing systems, auxiliary equipment, and control software. Leveraging nearly 60 years of group expertise in equipment manufacturing, it offers a comprehensive suite of C250M to C1500M LPBF machines with multiple build sizes and laser strategies. Its fully integrated powder recycling solutions ensure operator safety via human-powder isolation, support 24/7 continuous operation, and feature proprietary intelligent visual powder spreading and real-time print quality monitoring. Integrated MES compatibility enables digital production readiness, backed by end-to-end professional service support.

description_zh: 联泰科技 UnionTech 成立于2000年，是中国较早参与 3D 打印技术应用实践的企业之一，见证了中国 3D 打印技术的整体发展进程，目前产业规模位居行业前列，在 3D 打印领域具有广泛的行业影响力和品牌知名度。联泰科技UnionTech，其技术被广泛应用于航空航天、电子电器、口腔医疗、文化创意、教育、鞋业、建筑等行业，在工业端3D打印的应用领域具有较大的品牌知名度及行业影响力。
description_en: Founded in 2000, UnionTech is one of China’s earliest enterprises engaged in practical 3D printing technology applications and a key witness to the nation’s AM development. With industry-leading scale and broad influence, UnionTech’s technologies serve aerospace, electronics, dental healthcare, cultural-creative industries, education, footwear, and architecture—establishing strong brand recognition and leadership in industrial 3D printing applications.

description_zh: 深圳市大族聚维科技有限公司（简称“大族聚维”）作为大族激光全资子公司，致力于增材制造技术的研发与应用，是集研发、生产、销售与服务于一体的高科技企业。公司产品包含金属粉末3D打印设备、金属丝材3D打印设备、以及激光熔覆修复设备等。 依托深厚的技术积累，大族聚维致力于向航空航天、3C电子、医疗器械、汽车制造、模具加工、珠宝首饰等多个领域，提供专业化、定制化的增材制造解决方案。公司组建了多支由行业专家领衔的技术团队，深入客户生产场景，针对具体需求进行精准分析，为客户提供从工艺开发到设备服务的全链条支持。 目前，大族聚维已在国内外构建起完善的服务网络，确保为客户提供高效、及时的技术支持与售后
description_en: Shenzhen Han's Juvie Technology Co., Ltd. ('Han's Juvie'), a wholly owned subsidiary of Han's Laser, is a high-tech enterprise integrating R&D, manufacturing, sales, and service in additive manufacturing. Its product portfolio includes metal powder-based 3D printers, metal wire-based 3D printers, and laser cladding repair systems. Drawing on deep technical expertise, Han's Juvie delivers professional, customized AM solutions for aerospace, 3C electronics, medical devices, automotive manufacturing, tooling, and jewelry. Supported by expert-led technical teams embedded in customer production environments, the company provides full-lifecycle support—from process development to after-sales service—and maintains an extensive global service network for rapid technical assistance.

address_en: China/Beijing/北京市/北京市经济技术开发区科创三街10号迪昌工业园
description_zh: 中航迈特增材科技（北京）有限公司成立于 2015 年，是北京市属国企京城机电控股企业、国务院 “科改企业” 标杆企业、国家级专精特新 “小巨人” 企业。 公司深耕金属 3D 打印设备与合金粉末材料研发生产，掌握高性能合金材料设计、球形粉末制备、高精密选区激光熔化装备开发等核心技术，为客户提供金属3D打印材料及装备解决方案。产品远销全球，广泛服务于航空、航天、医疗、汽车、模具、消费电子、科研等领域。 公司总部设于北京经济技术开发区，在江苏徐州布局两大生产基地，配套建有省级产业技术研究院等多个科研平台，矢志成为科技引领、绿色发展的世界一流增材制造企业。
description_en: AVIC Meta Additive Manufacturing (Beijing) Co., Ltd., established in 2015, is a Beijing municipal SOE under Jingcheng Machinery & Electronics Holding, a benchmark enterprise under the State Council’s 'Scientific Reform Initiative', and a national 'specialized, refined, distinctive, and innovative' 'Little Giant' enterprise. The company specializes in R&D and production of metal 3D printing equipment and alloy powders, mastering core technologies including high-performance alloy design, spherical powder atomization, and high-precision selective laser melting (SLM) systems. Its globally exported products serve aerospace, medical, automotive, tooling, consumer electronics, and research sectors. Headquartered in Beijing Economic-Technological Development Area, with two production bases in Xuzhou, Jiangsu, and multiple provincial-level R&D platforms—including a provincial industrial technology research institute—the company aims to become a world-class, science-driven, green AM enterprise.

address_en: China/Jiangsu/苏州市/吴江区贤明路168号
description_zh: 苏州中瑞科技是中国领先的工业级3D打印设备制造商、国家高新技术企业、国家级重点专精特新“小巨人”企业、工信部首批增材制造典型应用场景单位；拥有自主知识产权的SLA光固化、SLM金属熔化、SLS尼龙、AMC陶瓷四大系列工业级3D打印产品线。公司为航空航天、能源动力、工业模具、汽车制造、电子电器、生物医疗、科研院所等行业超1000+客户提供3D打印解决方案。 公司自建研发大楼12000平米，生产工厂33000平米，分别在广东、湖南等地设有分公司；建有国家博士后科研工作站、江苏省企业技术中心、江苏省工业设计中心、江苏省工程技术研究中心、江苏省研究生工作站等研发平台；拥有授权专利127项.
description_en: Suzhou Zhongrui Intelligent 3D Technology Co., Ltd. is a national high-tech enterprise, a national key 'specialized, refined, distinctive, and innovative' 'Little Giant' enterprise, and one of the first batch of enterprises designated by MIIT for typical AM application scenarios. It owns proprietary industrial-grade AM product lines covering SLA (stereolithography), SLM (selective laser melting), SLS (selective laser sintering), and AMC (advanced ceramic manufacturing). Serving over 1,000 customers across aerospace, energy power, industrial tooling, automotive, electronics, biomedicine, and research institutions, the company operates a 12,000 m² R&D center and a 33,000 m² production facility, with branches in Guangdong and Hunan. It hosts national and provincial R&D platforms—including a National Postdoctoral Research Workstation—and holds 127 authorized patents.

description_zh: 湖南云箭集团有限公司隶属于中国兵器工业集团有限公司，是我国特种产品科研、生产在湘央企和增材制造全产业链创新应用引领者。公司长期致力于各类工业级和消费级增材制造高端装备的研发、生产和销售，形成了涵盖激光选区熔化、激光选区烧结、微滴喷射、熔融沉积等增材制造技术的装备体系，可为用户提供系统的增材制造综合解决方案。 历经多年的创新和发展，公司建成了现代化智能制造车间，拥有面向多种材料和工艺的增材制造装备、后处理设备，以及产品检测设备300余台套；具备先进的增材制造工艺开发、快速制造和技术服务能力；被认定为：增材制造国家认定企业技术中心、博士后科研工作站等国家级、省部级科研创新平台。
description_en: Hunan Yunjian Group Co., Ltd., a central SOE under China North Industries Group Corporation Limited (Norinco), is a leader in full-chain AM innovation and application in Hunan Province. The company develops, manufactures, and sells high-end industrial- and consumer-grade AM equipment based on selective laser melting (SLM), selective laser sintering (SLS), inkjet micro-droplet deposition, and fused deposition modeling (FDM). Its modern smart manufacturing workshop houses over 300 sets of AM systems, post-processing equipment, and inspection instruments. Yunjian possesses advanced capabilities in AM process development, rapid manufacturing, and technical service, and hosts national and provincial R&D platforms—including a National Certified Enterprise Technology Center and a Postdoctoral Research Workstation.

description_zh: 深圳市金石三维打印科技有限公司成立于2015年，是行业领先的全品类增材制造综合解决方案提供商，是国家高新技术企业、专精特新“小巨人”企业，可为全球客户提供打印设备+打印服务+打印材料+打印软件于一体的工业级增材制造综合解决方案。 金石三维旗下智能制造设备涵盖SLA、SLM、SLS、FGF、DLP和LCD等全品类增材3D打印技术，以及增减材复合加工技术，实现多种主流智能制造技术的全覆盖。市场应用涵盖航空航天、模具、手板、鞋业、雕塑、医疗、齿科、汽车、教育和建筑等领域，帮助客户提高生产效率。
description_en: Shenzhen Kings 3D Printing Technology Co., Ltd., founded in 2015, is a national high-tech enterprise and 'specialized, refined, distinctive, and innovative' 'Little Giant' enterprise, providing end-to-end industrial additive manufacturing solutions—encompassing equipment, on-demand printing services, materials, and software. Its智能制造 equipment portfolio covers SLA, SLM, SLS, FGF (fused granular fabrication), DLP, and LCD technologies, plus hybrid additive-subtractive manufacturing systems—ensuring comprehensive coverage of mainstream smart manufacturing processes. Applications span aerospace, tooling, prototypes, footwear, sculpture, medical and dental devices, automotive, education, and construction—enhancing customer productivity.

description_en: Huile (Changzhou) Additive Manufacturing Equipment Co., Ltd., established on October 25, 2022, specializes in auxiliary equipment for 3D printing systems. Its core products include powder feeding systems, filtration and recycling units, sieving machines, wet explosion-proof vacuum cleaners, bag breakers, and automated powder removal stations. Additionally, Huile Value-Added operates eight meter-class metal 3D printers, enabling a full range of metal part printing services.

description_zh: 南京中科煜宸激光技术有限公司成立于 2013 年，是一家专业从事激光增材制造（送粉3D打印、铺粉3D打印、增减材打印、激光修复）、智能激光加工（激光焊接自动化、水导激光加工）、核心器件及系列化工业软件的研发与制造的国家级专精特新小巨人企业，公司致力于为世界500强国内外制造企业提供完善的智能激光加工系统解决方案。公司在金属增材制造方面取得了突破性进展，打破了制约金属3D打印产业发展的卡脖子关键技术。中科煜宸通过承担科技部十三五、十四五重点研发计划，解决了DED打印及金属增减材大尺寸、高效率、双光束、多材料、高通量、高质量、智能化增材制造的产业难题，实现了核心器件、工业软件和金属材料的自主可控。
description_en: Nanjing Zhongke Yuchen Laser Technology Co., Ltd., founded in 2013, is a national 'specialized, refined, distinctive, and innovative' 'Little Giant' enterprise specializing in laser additive manufacturing—including directed energy deposition (DED), powder bed fusion (PBF), hybrid additive-subtractive manufacturing, and laser repair—as well as intelligent laser processing (e.g., automated laser welding, water-jet guided laser machining), core components, and industrial software. As a key contributor to national R&D programs (13th and 14th Five-Year Plans), the company has broken critical bottlenecks in large-scale, high-efficiency, dual-beam, multi-material, high-throughput, high-quality, and intelligent metal AM—achieving independent control over core components, industrial software, and metal materials.

description_zh: 航天工程装备（苏州）有限公司隶属于中国航天科技集团有限公司第八研究院，是上海航天设备制造总厂有限公司控股子公司，国家高新技术企业、国家级专精特新“小巨人”企业。 作为国防科工局唯一支持的搅拌摩擦焊装备产业化公司，公司依托雄厚的技术实力，在搅拌摩擦焊装备领域承担了多项国家重大专项，创造了多项国内第一，用户涵盖航天航空、轨道交通、船舶、电力电子、新能源汽车等国家战略新兴领域，设备远销德国、法国、瑞典、美国等市场。公司专注于搅拌摩擦焊技术应用推广和前沿探索，秉承“客户为本、技术引领、诚实守信、精益求精”的经营理念，不断创新驱动、服务客户，致力于成为全球领先的智能搅拌摩擦焊接及固相增材智造提供商。
description_en: Aerospace Engineering Equipment (Suzhou) Co., Ltd., a subsidiary of Shanghai Aerospace Equipment Manufacturing General Factory Co., Ltd. under the Eighth Academy of China Aerospace Science and Technology Corporation, is a national high-tech enterprise and national 'specialized, refined, distinctive, and innovative' 'Little Giant' enterprise. As the sole stir friction welding (SFW) equipment industrialization enterprise supported by the State Administration of Science, Technology and Industry for National Defense (SASTIND), it has led multiple national major projects in SFW, achieving numerous domestic firsts. Its equipment serves strategic emerging sectors—including aerospace, rail transit, shipbuilding, power electronics, and new-energy vehicles—and is exported to Germany, France, Sweden, and the United States. Committed to SFW technology advancement and application, the company pursues innovation-driven growth and customer-centric service to become a global leader in intelligent stir friction welding and solid-state additive manufacturing.

description_zh: 希禾增材（ADDIREEN）——绿激光金属3D打印技术引领者、铜金属3D打印专家，是全球首家专注绿激光金属增材制造的企业。基于自研增材专用高功率、单模、连续绿光激光器，打造新一代金属3D打印装备与定制化打印服务。为铜、铝、金、银等高反金属材料、难熔金属材料、贵金属材料及常规金属材料的高品质、高效率、超精细打印提供整体解决方案。
description_en: ADDIREEN—pioneer of green-laser metal 3D printing and specialist in copper-metal AM—is the world’s first enterprise exclusively dedicated to green-laser metal additive manufacturing. Leveraging its proprietary high-power, single-mode, continuous-wave green lasers optimized for AM, ADDIREEN develops next-generation metal 3D printers and customized printing services. It delivers holistic solutions for high-quality, high-efficiency, ultra-high-resolution printing of highly reflective metals (e.g., copper, aluminum, gold, silver), refractory metals, precious metals, and conventional alloys.

description_en: Kingsun Electric Group, established in 2010, is a national high-tech enterprise, 'specialized, refined, distinctive, and innovative' 'Little Giant' enterprise, pilot demonstration factory for intelligent manufacturing, and a public service platform for industrialization of key component innovations. The group builds a complete intelligent manufacturing industrial chain—integrating equivalently forming (isometric manufacturing), additive manufacturing, subtractive manufacturing, low-stress manufacturing, and intelligent manufacturing—spanning R&D, design, production, inspection, and service.

description_zh: 洛阳盈创极光精密制造有限公司--金属3D打印产品及打印设备服务商。公司创立于2019年4月，注册资金4000万，占地280余亩，员工人数130余人，其中研发人员50余人；国家级专精特新“小巨人”企业，国家高新技术企业、国家科技型中小企业、河南省“专精特新”企业，拥有省级企业研发中心。公司致力成为国内领先的金属增材制造技术全套解决方案提供商，目前拥有自主研发的450*450幅面、650*650幅面、800*800幅面、1300*1300幅面等；公司金属3D打印产品及打印设备广泛应用于航空、航天、船舶、兵器、核电、体育休闲等领域及其他民用市场。
description_en: Luoyang Yingchuang Jiguang Precision Manufacturing Co., Ltd., founded in April 2019 with registered capital of RMB 40 million and occupying over 280 mu (≈18.7 ha), is a national 'specialized, refined, distinctive, and innovative' 'Little Giant' enterprise, national high-tech enterprise, national technology-based SME, and Henan Provincial 'specialized, refined, distinctive, and innovative' enterprise, hosting a provincial-level enterprise R&D center. The company aims to become a leading domestic provider of end-to-end metal AM solutions and currently offers proprietary metal 3D printers with build envelopes of 450 × 450 mm, 650 × 650 mm, 800 × 800 mm, and 1300 × 1300 mm. Its metal AM products and equipment serve aerospace, defense, marine, nuclear power, sports/recreation, and other civilian markets.

description_zh: 天弘激光成立于2001年，国家“工业母机”企业、国家级“专精特新”小巨人企业、国家高新技术企业。公司专注于工业数字化智能装备的研发、制造和服务，是以激光技术为核心的智能装备及自动化产线提供商，主要为下游客户提供“激光 + 机器视觉 + 自动化+MES 信息系统集成”的综合解决方案。 目前，公司产品涉及金属增材制造、激光焊接应用装备及自动化生产线、激光精细加工系列设备、激光切割机系列设备等四大类百余种智能装备及产线，主要应用于新能源锂电、电驱电机、3C消费电子、半导体、汽车及汽车零部件、航空航天、医疗等领域。技术涵盖：软件、机械、电气、运动控制、机器人、光学、图像、材料、激光等。
description_en: Tianhong Laser, founded in 2001, is a national 'industrial mother machine' enterprise, national 'specialized, refined, distinctive, and innovative' 'Little Giant' enterprise, and national high-tech enterprise. Specializing in digital intelligent industrial equipment centered on laser technology, the company delivers integrated solutions combining 'laser + machine vision + automation + MES information system integration'. Its product portfolio comprises over 100 intelligent equipment models and production lines across four categories: metal additive manufacturing, laser welding systems and automated lines, precision laser processing equipment, and laser cutting machines—serving lithium battery, electric drive/motor, 3C electronics, semiconductor, automotive, aerospace, and medical industries. Core competencies span software, mechanical engineering, electrical systems, motion control, robotics, optics, imaging, materials science, and laser physics.

description_zh: 江苏威拉里新材料股份有限公司是徐州矿务集团有限公司于2015年投资组建的国家级高新技术企业，主要从事金属3D打印粉末的研发生产，成功解决我国增材制造领域关键原材料“卡脖子”难题，入选国家科改企业、国家级专精特新重点“小巨人”企业名单，荣获“支持国防建设先进单位”、“国家知识产权优势企业”等荣誉称号，融入长三角国家技术创新中心体系，是全球领先的金属增材制造整体解决方案提供商。
description_en: Jiangsu Well-Red New Materials Co., Ltd., established in 2015 by Xuzhou Mining Group Co., Ltd., is a national high-tech enterprise specializing in the R&D and production of metal 3D printing powders. It has resolved critical domestic supply bottlenecks in additive manufacturing raw materials, been selected for the National Science & Technology Reform Enterprise Program and the National Specialized, Refined, Distinctive, and Innovative (SRDI) 'Little Giant' Enterprise List, and honored as an 'Advanced Unit Supporting National Defense Construction' and a 'National Intellectual Property Advantage Enterprise'. Integrated into the Yangtze River Delta National Technology Innovation Center system, it is a global leader in end-to-end metal additive manufacturing solutions.

description_zh: 融速科技，成立于2020年，是一家聚焦金属送丝增材制造领域的高新技术企业，也是中国领先的金属3D打印解决方案服务商。融速科技拥有成熟的激光送丝增材和电弧送丝增材技术，深耕打印服务、装备销售、核心器件销售三类核心业务。自研六激光同轴送丝技术VEAM，拥有激光送丝增材、电弧送丝增材系列设备，提供30余种金属材料的打印服务，自研DED工艺监控软件和路径规划软件，赋能工业生产超自动化，为航空航天、自动化生产、科研院校、船舶重工等领域提供一站式DED金属增材制造解决方案。
description_en: Founded in 2020, Rongsu Technology is a high-tech enterprise focused on wire-fed metal additive manufacturing and a leading Chinese provider of metal 3D printing solutions. It offers mature laser wire-fed additive manufacturing (LWFAM) and arc wire-fed additive manufacturing (AWFAM) technologies, with core businesses spanning printing services, equipment sales, and core component sales. Its proprietary six-laser coaxial wire-fed technology—VEAM—powers its LWFAM and AWFAM equipment series. Rongsu delivers printing services for over 30 metal alloys and develops proprietary DED process monitoring and path planning software to enable ultra-automation in industrial production, providing one-stop directed energy deposition (DED) metal AM solutions for aerospace, automated manufacturing, research institutions, and shipbuilding.

description_zh: 中科祥龙（2021年成立）依托中科院宁波材料所孵化，是行业领先的增材制造轻量化整体解决方案的提供商。我们专注于通过先进的3D打印技术，为航空航天、低空飞行、医疗器械及消费电子等领域，提供从结构轻量化设计到功能一体化制造的端到端服务。

It delivers integrated services—from topology-optimized structural design to function-integrated fabrication—for aerospace, urban air mobility, medical devices, and consumer electronics.

description_zh: 中国钢研科技集团有限公司（简称中国钢研）经国务院国资委批准，由原钢铁研究总院和冶金自动化研究设计院于2006年12月合并成立。中国钢研是我国金属新材料研发基地、冶金行业重大关键与共性技术创新基地、国家冶金分析测试技术权威机构、国家双创示范基地。拥有四家上市公司及多家高新技术企业。以金属新材料技术为核心主业，为客户提供材料全生命周期的解决方案。
description_en: Central Iron and Steel Research Institute Group Co., Ltd. (CISRI), approved by the State-owned Assets Supervision and Administration Commission of the State Council, was formed in December 2006 through the merger of the former Central Iron and Steel Research Institute and the Metallurgical Automation Research and Design Institute. CISRI serves as China’s premier R&D base for advanced metal materials, a national innovation hub for critical and generic metallurgical technologies, the authoritative national institution for metallurgical analysis and testing, and a national demonstration base for mass entrepreneurship and innovation. It operates four listed companies and multiple high-tech enterprises, delivering full-lifecycle material solutions centered on advanced metal新材料 technologies.

description_zh: 成立于2011年5月，是一家致力于为工业智能制造提供安全、可靠、先进的解决方案的创新型科技公司。公司主营业务包括金属增材、智能焊接、移动机器人等。本着“传递价值、承载信托”的企业精神，为汽车制造、电力、军工、石油化工、航空航天、船舶、重工机械、科研院所等行业的客户提供优质的产品和完善的售前、售后服务。
description_en: Founded in May 2011, Nanjing Inigma Industrial Automation Technology Co., Ltd. is an innovative technology company dedicated to delivering safe, reliable, and advanced solutions for intelligent industrial manufacturing. Its core businesses include metal additive manufacturing, intelligent welding, and mobile robotics. Guided by its corporate ethos—'Delivering Value, Upholding Trust'—it provides high-quality products and comprehensive pre-sales and after-sales support to customers across automotive manufacturing, power generation, defense, petrochemicals, aerospace, shipbuilding, heavy machinery, and research institutes.

description_zh: 埃尔泰克集团是全球最大的预浸料/热压罐、树脂导入和湿铺的真空袋与复合模具材料生产商，天津埃尔泰克复合材料有限公司是其分公司。公司在全球范围内战略性地设立了七个分部，分别位于美国、英国、卢森堡、印度和中国。 目前在中国，我们正在大力拓展增材制造和3D打印用树脂合成业务。 我们为客户提供专用于3D打印的树脂颗粒及KIMYA丝材，并提供大型3D打印服务，含打印模具及产品。埃尔泰克已开发出符合航空航天标准的 3D打印应用专用复合树脂，这些3D打印专用树脂可适用于从低温到高温，并拥有KIMYA丝材全线产品。Print-Tech®是埃尔泰克自主研发的3D打印技，适用于任何大型模具及零部件打印。
description_en: Tianjin Eltex Composite Materials Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Eltex Group—the world’s largest producer of prepreg/autoclave, resin infusion, and wet lay-up vacuum bagging and composite tooling materials. Strategically operating seven regional divisions across the U.S., U.K., Luxembourg, India, and China, Eltex is actively expanding its additive manufacturing and 3D printing resin synthesis business in China. It supplies specialized 3D printing resin granules and KIMYA filament, along with large-format 3D printing services—including mold and part production. Eltex has developed aerospace-grade composite resins tailored for 3D printing, compatible across low- to high-temperature applications, and offers the full KIMYA filament portfolio. Its proprietary Print-Tech® technology enables large-scale mold and component printing.

description_zh: 共享智能装备是国家高新技术企业和国家专精特新“小巨人”企业、国家绿色工厂，下设8家子公司（海外2家），现有员工近700人，研发人员占比26%。 公司主导产业包括粘结剂喷射（铸造/金属/陶瓷）3D打印设备研发制造、3D打印工厂建设、3D打印产品及服务、精密钣金制造等；并设立粘结剂喷射3D打印工程技术研究中心、机床辅机技术研究中心、全球营销中心、装备制造中心、全球运维中心、3D打印服务中心，力争发展成为产品一流、质量一流、服务一流的高端智能装备制造企业，支持我国3D打印技术和装备制造产业加速步入国际先进行列，实现“制造强国”梦！
description_en: G-Share Intelligent Equipment is a national high-tech enterprise, a national SRDI 'Little Giant' enterprise, and a national green factory, with eight subsidiaries—including two overseas—and nearly 700 employees (26% R&D personnel). Its core businesses include binder jetting (for casting, metals, and ceramics) 3D printer R&D and manufacturing, turnkey 3D printing factory construction, 3D printed products and services, and precision sheet metal fabrication. It hosts dedicated centers for binder jetting AM engineering, machine tool auxiliary equipment, global marketing, equipment manufacturing, global operations & maintenance, and 3D printing services—aiming to become a world-class intelligent equipment manufacturer delivering top-tier products, quality, and service to accelerate China’s AM technology and equipment manufacturing into the global forefront and realize the 'Manufacturing Powerhouse' vision.

description_zh: 美光(江苏)三维科技有限公司英文简称 “FastForm”，由南洋理工大学与华中科技大学博士团队联合创立。公司致力于金属3D打印设备的产业化应用，为全球齿科、工业、科研及教育用户提供全场景3D打印解决方案，现已形成覆盖设备研发、材料科学、工艺优化及智能软件的全产业链核心技术闭环。 公司依托完全自主化的正向研发体系，打造出国内首个涵盖桌面级至工业级全场景的增材制造设备矩阵（Desk-Fab/FF-M140/M180/M220/M300/M420/M500/M800）。自主研发的Fastlayer®智能工业平台集成开源架构与AI算法，突破传统工艺参数边界，获38项国内外专利认证。
description_en: FastForm (FastForm (Jiangsu) 3D Technology Co., Ltd.), co-founded by doctoral teams from Nanyang Technological University and Huazhong University of Science and Technology, focuses on industrializing metal 3D printing systems. It delivers full-spectrum 3D printing solutions for global dental, industrial, research, and educational users. Its vertically integrated technology stack covers equipment development, materials science, process optimization, and intelligent software. Leveraging fully independent forward-engineering capabilities, FastForm has launched China’s first complete AM equipment matrix—from desktop to industrial scale (Desk-Fab / FF-M140 / M180 / M220 / M300 / M420 / M500 / M800). Its proprietary Fastlayer® intelligent industrial platform—built on open architecture and AI algorithms—breaks conventional process parameter limits and holds 38 domestic and international patents.

description_zh: 中体新材，国内领先的3D 打印金属粉末（增材制造材料）厂商，专注于微米级至纳米级金属粉末材料的科研与产业化。产品涵盖钛基粉末、铝基粉末、铁基粉末、铜基粉末、镍基粉末等，能够满足多种3D打印技术，广泛应用于航空航天、汽车、消费电子、机器人、新能源材料等行业。 目前已取得 ISO9001,ISO 41001, ISO45001,IATF16949, ISO 13485, 100% SCS回收认证以及国家高新技术企业等认证，并且拥有多项核心技术发明专利。
description_en: Zhongti New Materials is a leading domestic manufacturer of metal 3D printing powders (additive manufacturing feedstock), specializing in R&D and industrialization of micron- to nano-scale metal powders. Its product portfolio includes titanium-, aluminum-, iron-, copper-, and nickel-based powders, compatible with multiple AM processes—including SLM, EBM, and DED—and widely applied in aerospace, automotive, consumer electronics, robotics, and new energy sectors. Certified to ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, IATF 16949, ISO 13485, and 100% SCS recycled content standards, it is also a national high-tech enterprise holding multiple core invention patents.

description_zh: 西帝摩成立于2015年，专注粉末床激光熔化金属3D打印技术研发与产业化，拥有全链条自主知识产权。其核心产品XDM系列金属3D打印设备成形幅面覆盖120mm×120mm至2000mm×2000mm，其中XDM750设备为2017年全球较大的PBLM设备，2021年推出的2000mm级超大型设备填补全球技术空白，被列为金属打印领域重大技术进展。
description_en: Xidimo, founded in 2015, specializes in R&D and industrialization of powder bed fusion laser melting (PBF-LM) metal 3D printing technology, holding full-stack intellectual property rights. Its XDM-series metal 3D printers offer build volumes ranging from 120 mm × 120 mm to 2000 mm × 2000 mm. The XDM750—launched in 2017—was among the world’s largest PBF-LM systems at the time; its 2000-mm-class ultra-large system, introduced in 2021, filled a global technological gap and was recognized as a major advancement in metal AM.

description_zh: 苏州倍丰智能科技有限公司成立于2017年8月，由吴鑫华院士一手创立。苏州倍丰围绕“金属3D打印全产业链”，业务范围涵盖金属3D打印原材料粉末、小型到超大型金属3D打印机、金属粉末前后处理设备和金属3D打印先进工艺研发和构件打印服务。业务涉及金属3D打印生态系统各个环节，从材料制备到打印过程，再到先进打印工艺研发，力求在每一步中实现创新和优化。

Its business scope encompasses metal AM feedstock powders, compact to ultra-large metal 3D printers, powder handling and post-processing equipment, advanced metal AM process R&D, and component printing services—covering every ecosystem layer from material synthesis and printing execution to next-generation process innovation and optimization.

description_zh: 知象光电是一家专注于高精度三维视觉与具身智能技术的国家级专精特新重点“小巨人”企业。公司自主研发微纳光学芯片，深耕底层视觉算法与人工智能技术，打造智能终端产品，广泛应用于工业三维扫描、机器人视觉、无人机航拍等场景。公司设有微纳芯片传感流片产线，集研发、生产、 销售 于一体。旗下 Revopoint 品牌产品畅销全球 150 多个国家和地区，用户覆盖三维设计、工业检测、3D 打印、医疗健康、数字娱乐、创意艺术、文物保护等多个领域，广受全球企业与个人用户青睐。
description_en: RealLight Photonics is a national SRDI 'Little Giant' enterprise specializing in high-precision 3D vision and embodied AI technologies. It independently develops micro-nano optical chips and pioneers foundational vision algorithms and AI technologies to deliver intelligent endpoint products for industrial 3D scanning, robotic vision, and UAV aerial imaging. With an in-house micro-nano chip sensor wafer fab integrating R&D, production, and sales, its Revopoint brand serves customers in over 150 countries and regions—spanning 3D design, industrial inspection, 3D printing, healthcare, digital entertainment, creative arts, and cultural heritage preservation.

description_zh: MOVA 是全球高端 AI 智慧生活引领者，打造融合前沿科技与人文温度的智能生态系统，覆盖 6 大核心生活场景：家庭清洁、智慧户外、个护美护、厨房家电、宠物护理以及空气净化。通过 AI 驱动的创新产品与系统化解决方案，MOVA 正在把房子真正升级为智慧“家”，以高端、可靠且充满关怀的体验，满足全球家庭对美好生活方式的向往。在 MOVA 的全球布局中，原子重塑（AtomForm） 是集团重点打造的创新子品牌。原子重塑是一家专注于多场景创作工具解决方案的全球化公司，诞生于 2023 年 10 月，核心成员由具备成功研发经验的智能硬件行业专家和 3D 打印爱好者组成。
description_en: MOVA is a global leader in premium AI-powered smart living ecosystems, unifying cutting-edge technology with human-centric design across six core life scenarios: home cleaning, smart outdoor, personal care & beauty, kitchen appliances, pet care, and air purification. Through AI-driven products and integrated solutions, MOVA transforms houses into truly intelligent 'homes', delivering premium, reliable, and empathetic experiences aligned with global families’ aspirations for better living. Within MOVA’s global structure, AtomForm is a dedicated innovation sub-brand launched in October 2023. AtomForm is a global company focused on multi-scenario creation tool solutions, staffed by experienced smart hardware engineers and passionate 3D printing enthusiasts.

description_zh: 雷石是一家专注于工业级金属增材制造和激光熔覆技术，拥有自主知识产权和核心技术的高新技术企业。公司致力于激光增材制造及再制造技术的研发，为客户提供软硬件一体的综合解决方案。 经过多年的沉淀和发展，雷石已经形成了以总部济南为装备制造基地，济南、西安两地为增材打印服务基地的产业布局。公司是国家专精特新“小巨人”企业，是“山东省先进激光增材制造技术与高端装备重点实验室”的承建单位，参与起草多项增材制造国家标准，同时也是山东省“瞪羚企业”、山东省“专精特新”企业，承担多项省部级重点研发项目。
description_en: Leishi Intelligent Manufacturing is a high-tech enterprise specializing in industrial-grade metal additive manufacturing and laser cladding technologies, possessing independent IP and core technologies. It develops laser-based AM and remanufacturing solutions, delivering integrated hardware-software systems. With headquarters in Jinan serving as its equipment manufacturing base—and Jinan and Xi’an as its AM service hubs—Leishi is a national SRDI 'Little Giant' enterprise, the designated builder of Shandong Province’s Key Laboratory of Advanced Laser Additive Manufacturing Technologies and High-End Equipment, a contributor to multiple national and provincial AM standards, a Shandong 'Gazelle Enterprise', a Shandong SRDI enterprise, and a recipient of numerous provincial and ministerial key R&D projects.

description_zh: 精亮科技旗下的浙江精亮新材料科技有限公司，位于浙江上虞永和精亮产业园内，毗邻美丽的四明湖畔，杭甬高速G92出口 旁，交通极为便利，公司面积达11万平方米。 自1995年开始至今，形成色母粒、功能母粒、塑料着色、添加剂改性及新材料的生产和制造。并于2020年成立环保生物降 解材料、生物降解色母粒、生物降解制品、非降解类工业及日用品色母材料等， 以共同实现环保节能，减少碳排放，而尽 我所能。 精亮科技（苏州）有限公司坐落于苏州工业园区，毗邻金鸡湖和独墅湖畔，是一座新型的现化工厂◇于2023年进行升级改 造◇拥有最新的生产线以及高端产品的生产研发能力，是精亮科技的技术研发所在地。
description_en: Zhejiang Jingliang New Materials Technology Co., Ltd., a subsidiary of Jingliang Technology, is located in the Yonghe Jingliang Industrial Park in Shangyu, Zhejiang—adjacent to scenic Siming Lake and the G92 Hangzhou-Ningbo Expressway exit—with convenient transportation and a facility area of 110,000 m². Since 1995, the company has manufactured color masterbatches, functional masterbatches, plastic colorants, additive-modified compounds, and advanced materials. In 2020, it expanded into eco-friendly biodegradable materials—including biodegradable masterbatches, finished biodegradable products, and non-biodegradable industrial and consumer color masterbatches—to advance environmental sustainability and carbon reduction. Jingliang Technology (Suzhou) Co., Ltd., situated in Suzhou Industrial Park near Jinji Lake and Dushu Lake, is a modern smart factory upgraded in 2023, equipped with state-of-the-art production lines and advanced R&D capabilities for high-end products—serving as Jingliang Technology’s primary R&D center.

description_zh: Snapmaker快造科技成立于 2016 年，是一家专注技术创新的消费级 3D 打印公司，聚焦多工具头、高速打印与智能易用等前沿技术，为全球用户提供稳定可靠的桌面级 3D 打印体验。 Snapmaker 致力于成长为具有全球影响力的消费级 3D 打印品牌，让 3D 打印走进每个人的生活。
description_en: Snapmaker, founded in 2016, is an innovation-driven consumer-grade 3D printing company focused on multi-toolhead integration, high-speed printing, and intuitive smart operation. It delivers stable, reliable desktop 3D printing experiences to global users and aims to become a globally influential consumer 3D printing brand—bringing 3D printing into everyday life.

description_en: Synergetic Innovation High-Tech Development Co., Ltd.—the sole operational entity for both the Guangdong Province Additive Manufacturing Equipment Innovation Center and the Shenzhen 3D Printing Manufacturing Innovation Center—is jointly established and operated by Guangdong Laser Industry Association founding member Guangyun Da (300227), carbon fiber and new energy equipment technology leader Jinggong Technology (002006), hard-tech investment firm Tsinghua Capital, strategic emerging industry promoter Wote Co., Ltd. (002886), and domain experts and doctoral teams. Operational since 2021, it is China’s first industrial-grade service provider covering continuous fiber composites, metal, and ceramic 3D printing—focused on aerospace, petrochemicals, automotive electronics, embodied AI, and low-altitude economy sectors—delivering integrated system solutions spanning materials, processes, equipment, software, and application engineering.

description_zh: 西安空天机电智能制造有限公司（简称西空智造）于2020年4月成立，是一家面向空天动力系统领域，专注于关键零部件高性能制造的高新技术企业。公司将智能增材制造特称为“i-3D”（i是智能intelligence的首个字母），旨在突出3D打印从数字制造发展为智能数字制造；并自主创新发展智能激光锻打印、激光/电弧合打印、电子束点打印技术，简称“智能三打”。公司开发出业内领先的激光粉末床熔融锻打印、激光/电弧定向能量沉积合打印和电子束点打印智能增材高端装备。 公司牵头或参与多项国家、省部级重点研发计划项目，拥有发明专利、软著、商标等知识产权近百项;获批高新技术企业、国家专精特新“小巨人”企业等称号。
description_en: Xi’an KONGTIAN Mechanical & Electrical Intelligent Manufacturing Co., Ltd. (abbreviated as 'KONGTIAN Intelligence')—established in April 2020—is a high-tech enterprise specializing in high-performance manufacturing of critical components for aerospace propulsion systems. It brands intelligent AM as 'i-3D' (with 'i' denoting intelligence), signifying the evolution from digital to intelligent digital manufacturing. It has independently developed three proprietary intelligent AM technologies—intelligent laser forging printing, hybrid laser/arc printing, and electron beam dot printing—collectively termed 'Intelligent Triple Printing'. Its flagship systems include industry-leading intelligent laser powder bed fusion forging printers, intelligent hybrid laser/arc directed energy deposition printers, and intelligent electron beam dot printers. The company leads or participates in numerous national and provincial key R&D programs and holds nearly 100 IP assets—including invention patents, software copyrights, and trademarks—while being certified as a national high-tech enterprise and national SRDI 'Little Giant' enterprise.

description_zh: 厦门汉印股份有限公司（简称汉印）是一家专业从事打印设备的研发、生产、销售及服务的国家级高新技术企业，致力成为全球打印行业的领导者。成立于2012年，注册资本5263万元，拥有50000㎡以上的生产基地，每年提供超2000个就业岗位，其中研发人员400余人，截止2024年底，累计获得授权专利785件，用户覆盖全球80多个国家和地区。 汉印凭借自主研发的核心精密技术，先后荣膺“国家级专精特新小巨人企业”、“国家级服务型制造示范企业”、“国家级制造业单项冠军示范企业”等荣誉，以及“德国红点最佳设计奖”、“中国专利奖”等重要奖项，并积极响应国家碳中和与绿色制造的号召，获评“福建省绿色工厂”。
description_en: Xiamen Hanprint Co., Ltd. (Hanprint) is a national high-tech enterprise specializing in the R&D, manufacturing, sales, and service of printing equipment, with a vision to become a global leader in the printing industry. Founded in 2012 with registered capital of RMB 52.63 million, Hanprint operates production bases exceeding 50,000 m² and provides over 2,000 jobs annually. Its R&D team comprises more than 400 engineers. As of end-2024, Hanprint holds 785 authorized patents and serves customers in over 80 countries and regions. Recognized as a National 'Specialized, Precise, Unique, and Innovative' (SPUI) Little Giant Enterprise, a National Service-Oriented Manufacturing Demonstration Enterprise, and a National Champion in Manufacturing, Hanprint has also received prestigious awards including the German Red Dot Best Design Award and the China Patent Award. It is certified as a Fujian Green Factory in alignment with China’s carbon neutrality and green manufacturing initiatives.

description_zh: 公司全名：广东三绿科技有限公司 公司slogan：3D打印材料专家 公司简介：三绿成立于2013年，是一家专注于提供3D打印耗材、设备、及解决方案的高新技术企业。三绿国内拥有华东（安徽）和华南（广东）两大基地战略布局，海外拥有越南生产基地、德国运营中心，国际化战略布局徐徐展开。公司秉承“科技让创造更简单”的核心价值观，以用户为中心，以创造者为本，用心提升用户体验，降低用户使用门槛，致力于成为可持续发展的行业领导者。
description_en: Guangdong Sanlǜ Technology Co., Ltd. ('Sanlǜ'), founded in 2013, is a high-tech enterprise focused on 3D printing materials, equipment, and end-to-end solutions. Strategically operating dual domestic manufacturing hubs in East China (Anhui) and South China (Guangdong), Sanlǜ has expanded internationally with a production base in Vietnam and an operations center in Germany. Guided by its core value — 'Technology Makes Creation Simpler' — Sanlǜ places users and creators at the center of its mission, continuously enhancing user experience and lowering adoption barriers to become a sustainable industry leader.

description_zh: eSUN易生品牌致力于3D打印材料的研发、生产与销售，促进3D打印行业的深入发展。公司已掌握PLA、PCL、ABS、PETG等多种3D打印材料的生产技术，可以满足不同领域客户对3D打印材料性能要求。eSUN易生3D打印材料种类齐全、性能优异、性价比高、适用面广，被广泛应用于产品设计、工业制造、外科医疗、文化艺术、教育科研等领域。 在研发上，eSUN易生拥有多项国际国内专利技术，是PLA 3D打印耗材国家标准起草单位；在生产上，eSUN易生在湖北孝感及越南胡志明建有生产基地。
description_en: eSUN, a brand of Shenzhen Esun Technology Co., Ltd., is dedicated to the R&D, manufacturing, and sales of 3D printing materials to advance the industry. The company masters production technologies for multiple thermoplastic materials including PLA, PCL, ABS, and PETG, meeting diverse performance requirements across applications. eSUN offers a comprehensive portfolio of high-performance, cost-effective, and broadly applicable 3D printing materials widely adopted in product design, industrial manufacturing, surgical medicine, cultural arts, education, and scientific research. As the primary drafting unit for China’s national standard on PLA 3D printing filaments, eSUN holds numerous domestic and international patents and operates production facilities in Xiaogan (Hubei Province) and Ho Chi Minh City (Vietnam).

description_zh: 博理新材料是一家专注于超高速3D打印技术的高新技术企业，实现了从原材料研发到终端产品制造的全流程自主可控。公司自研的ELASTRIUM高性能材料库及HALS（受阻异步光固化反应）超高速3D打印技术，实现了3D打印速度较传统方式提升20至100倍，大幅缩短生产周期，开启3D打印规模化制造新时代。目前，博理新材料已为运动装备、消费电子、工业零部件、文创产品、家居、医疗器械、人形机器人等多个行业提供定制化与批量化生产解决方案，助力客户快速实现设计落地与商业转化。
description_en: Boli New Materials Technology Co., Ltd. is a high-tech enterprise specializing in ultra-high-speed 3D printing technologies, achieving full-process autonomy from raw material development to end-product manufacturing. Its proprietary ELASTRIUM high-performance material library and HALS (Hindered Asynchronous Light-curing Synthesis) ultra-high-speed 3D printing technology deliver 20–100× speed improvements over conventional methods, dramatically shortening production cycles and enabling scalable 3D manufacturing. Boli provides customized and mass-production solutions for industries including sports equipment, consumer electronics, industrial components, cultural & creative products, home furnishings, medical devices, and humanoid robotics—accelerating design realization and commercialization for clients.

description_zh: 天工国际建有中国首条工模具钢及钛合金粉末冶金工业化生产线，与钢研总院成立了中国首个粉末冶金研究院，天工已形成从矿业、新材料业到精密切削刀具制造一体化科研、生产、销售.服务体系。 天工是中国唯-一家全产业链、全品种特种新材料生产企业，产品被广泛应用于航空、汽车、海洋、高速列车、石油化工等行业，以及机械加工、激光熔覆、3D打印等不同领域，畅销欧美等世界近百个国家以及香港、台湾等地区。在美国、俄罗斯、捷克、韩国、土耳其、加拿大、意大利、墨西哥、泰国、印尼、印度、台湾、越南等国家和地区设有分公司。 未来，天工致力成为世界新材料行业引领者，成为世界唯一全粉末系列产品生产制造商。
description_en: Tiangong International established China’s first industrial-scale powder metallurgy production line for tool steels and titanium alloys and co-founded China’s first Powder Metallurgy Research Institute with the Central Iron and Steel Research Institute. Tiangong has built an integrated R&D, production, and service system spanning mining, advanced new materials, and precision cutting tools. As China’s only vertically integrated, full-portfolio producer of specialty new materials, Tiangong’s products serve aerospace, automotive, marine, high-speed rail, petrochemical, precision machining, laser cladding, and additive manufacturing sectors — with distribution across nearly 100 countries and regions including the US, EU, Hong Kong, and Taiwan. Subsidiaries operate in the US, Russia, Czech Republic, South Korea, Turkey, Canada, Italy, Mexico, Thailand, Indonesia, India, Taiwan, and Vietnam. Tiangong aims to become a global leader and the world’s sole manufacturer of comprehensive powder-based product lines.

address_en: China/Shanghai/上海市/青浦区华新镇华志路1388号中交数字智造港8号楼1-3层
description_zh: GW Laser Tech ,成立于2014年9月，总部位于美国康涅狄格洲，创始团队包括两名华裔在内的多名激光技术专家。GW团队有超过10年的合作经验，为包括林肯实验室和北美普瑞玛在内的美国各大科研机构和大型工业企业，提供各种光纤激光器的技术方案。GW团队多年来一直努力的方向是提升光纤激光器，特别是单腔激光器，的功率密度和能量密度。GW代表团队对技术的执着，Gigga Watt代表吉瓦，10万万瓦。 光惠（上海）激光技术有限公司，是GW LaserTech于2015年11月在中国大陆成立的中外合资企业，负责GW在亚太地区光纤激光器的组装，销售，服务以及应用解决方案。
description_en: GW Laser Tech, founded in September 2014 and headquartered in Connecticut, USA, was established by a founding team including two ethnic Chinese laser technology experts. With over a decade of collaborative experience, GW has delivered fiber laser technical solutions to leading U.S. institutions such as Lincoln Laboratory and North American Prima. The team focuses on advancing power density and energy density — especially in single-cavity fiber lasers. 'GW' signifies technical dedication; 'Gigga Watt' denotes gigawatt-class (10¹⁰ W) capability. GW Laser Tech (Shanghai) Co., Ltd., a Sino-foreign joint venture established in November 2015, handles fiber laser assembly, sales, service, and application solutions across the Asia-Pacific region.

description_zh: 浙江融彩机械有限公司隶属于铭稳集团，专注于高性能3D打印耗材全自动挤出生产线的研发与制造。依托集团16年深厚的技术积淀与精密制造经验，公司汇聚了一支由资深机械工程师、电气自动化专家、软件工程师及材料专家组成的核心研发团队，持续突破行业关键技术瓶颈。 融彩机械致力于为全球增材制造领域提供智能化、无人化、高效率的先进装备解决方案，助力客户实现稳定量产与品质升级。 融彩机械：专注于3D打印材料挤出技术的创新与突破，融彩机械集成精密温控、智能在线检测、在线除湿干燥、无人化自动收卷与换卷等先进技术，实现整线高度自动化运行。
description_en: Zhejiang Rongcai Machinery Co., Ltd., a subsidiary of Mingwen Group, specializes in R&D and manufacturing of fully automated extrusion lines for high-performance 3D printing filaments. Leveraging the group’s 16 years of deep technical expertise and precision manufacturing experience, Rongcai has assembled a core R&D team comprising senior mechanical engineers, electrical automation specialists, software engineers, and materials scientists — consistently breaking through critical industry bottlenecks. Rongcai delivers intelligent, unmanned, high-efficiency advanced equipment solutions for global AM stakeholders, enabling stable mass production and quality enhancement. Its integrated systems feature precision temperature control, AI-powered inline inspection, online dehumidification/drying, and unmanned automatic spooling/unspooling for fully automated line operation.

name_zh: 阿帕奇(北京)光纤激光技术有限公司

description_zh: IPG是世界领先的高功率光纤激光器开创者和生产商，其生产的高功率光纤激光器可实现更高精度、更快加工速度、更灵活的生产方式和更高的生产效率。IPG 光纤激光器结合了半导体二极管的优势，独特的光纤设计具备高放大及卓越的光束质量，确保了产品的高性能、可靠性和适用性。 IPG 持续开拓发展，将与光纤激光器相关的众多独特技术不断商业化， 将深厚的材料科学专业知识、工艺技术与垂直整合的商业模式相结合， 并在技术开发和量产方面始终处于领先地位。所有光纤激光技术的关键部件均自主生产，具备以下优势： • 产品研发速度更快 • 更高效的生产手段 • 行业领先的产品交期 • 性能卓越、更高质
description_en: IPG Photonics is the world’s leading pioneer and manufacturer of high-power fiber lasers. IPG lasers deliver superior precision, faster processing speeds, greater production flexibility, and higher efficiency. Combining semiconductor diode advantages with a proprietary fiber architecture, IPG achieves exceptional amplification and outstanding beam quality — ensuring high performance, reliability, and broad applicability. Through continuous innovation, IPG commercializes numerous unique fiber laser technologies, integrating deep materials science expertise, process know-how, and a vertically integrated business model — maintaining leadership in both R&D and volume manufacturing. All key fiber laser components are manufactured in-house, delivering faster product development, more efficient production, industry-leading lead times, and superior performance and quality.

description_zh: 创瑞激光成立于2017年，总部位于山东烟台，公司自主研发了2激光到64激光，180mm到3500mm成型尺寸的十余款工业级金属增材制造高端智能装备，是国家增材制造标准化技术委员会数据和设计分技术委员会秘书处单位，荣获国家高新技术企业、国家专精特新重点“小巨人“企业、山东省增材制造技术与装备重点实验室、山东省企业技术中心、山东省工程研究中心等30余项资质和荣誉，公司己累计取得专利87项，其中发明专利39项，牵头及参与国家标准21项，团体标准3项，行业标准3项，牵头国际标准立项1项，牵头国家重点研发计划项目1项，获得国家软著25项。
description_en: Chuangrui Laser, founded in 2017 and headquartered in Yantai, Shandong, independently developed over ten industrial-grade metal additive manufacturing systems — featuring 2–64 lasers and build volumes from 180 mm to 3,500 mm. The company serves as Secretariat of the Data and Design Subcommittee under China’s National Additive Manufacturing Standardization Technical Committee. Chuangrui holds over 30 certifications and honors, including National High-Tech Enterprise, National Key SPUI Little Giant Enterprise, Shandong Provincial Key Laboratory of Additive Manufacturing Technology & Equipment, Shandong Provincial Enterprise Technology Center, and Shandong Provincial Engineering Research Center. It holds 87 patents (39 invention patents), leads or participates in 21 national standards, 3 group standards, 3 industry standards, and 1 international standard (initiated), leads one national key R&D program, and owns 25 software copyrights.

description_zh: Stratasys凭借创新的3D打印解决方案，正在全球范围内引领航空航天、汽车、消费品及医疗等不同行业向增材制造转变。 通过智能互联 的3D 打印机、聚合物材料、软件生态系统和按需生产的部件，Stratasys解决方案能够在产品价值链的每个阶段都为客户带来竞争优势。许多全球领先的企业和机构正在通过Stratasys提供的技术与服务，实现产品设计转型、提升制造和供应链的敏捷性，以及改善患者护理。
description_en: Stratasys drives the global transition to additive manufacturing across aerospace, automotive, consumer goods, and healthcare industries via innovative 3D printing solutions. Its intelligent, connected 3D printers, polymer materials, software ecosystem, and on-demand part production deliver competitive advantage across every stage of the product value chain. Leading global enterprises and institutions leverage Stratasys technologies and services to transform product design, enhance manufacturing and supply chain agility, and improve patient care.

description_zh: 闪铸集团是一家集专业3D打印产品和解决方案于一体的研发型生产企业。 公司旗下拥有三条产品线，涵盖了数十款市场领先产品，为用户提供包括3D打印设备、耗材、应用软件及全面的解决方案，旨在满足工业级、商业级及消费级市场的多元需求。 集团秉承“让3D打印科技造福每个普通人”的使命，以科技创新降低使用门槛，让3D打印成为人人都能轻松驾驭的创作工具，赋能每个行业的进步与变革。经过十二年的不懈努力，如今闪铸已将产品遍布全球200多个国家和地区，赢得近百万用户的信赖和喜爱。
description_en: FlashForge Group is an R&D-driven manufacturer offering professional 3D printing products and comprehensive solutions. Its three product lines encompass dozens of market-leading offerings — including 3D printers, filaments, application software, and turnkey solutions — addressing industrial, commercial, and consumer needs. Guided by its mission 'To empower every individual with 3D printing technology', FlashForge leverages innovation to lower technical barriers and make 3D printing accessible and intuitive for all creators — accelerating progress and transformation across industries. After 12 years of sustained growth, FlashForge products are distributed in over 200 countries and regions, earning trust and acclaim from nearly one million users worldwide.

description_zh: 杭州喜马拉雅信息科技有限公司是国内领先的3D打印和三维扫描设备及系统软件研发制造商、3D打印和三维扫描数据服务商、创新教育和创新医疗领域3D打印和三维扫描数字化综合解决方案提供商。公司致力于3D打印和三维数字化系统及产品的研究、开发、生产、销售和服务。为政府、学校、医院、企业和消费者提供有竞争力的3D打印综合解决方案。公司产品已成功应用于教育培训、医疗健康、文化创意、企业研发、科学研究、逆向工程、航空航天、汽车制造等众多领域。
description_en: Hangzhou Himalaya Information Technology Co., Ltd. is a leading Chinese manufacturer of 3D printing and 3D scanning hardware and system software, a provider of 3D printing and 3D scanning data services, and a comprehensive digital solution provider for innovation-driven education and healthcare. The company focuses on R&D, manufacturing, sales, and service of 3D printing and 3D digitization systems and products, delivering competitive end-to-end solutions to government agencies, schools, hospitals, enterprises, and consumers. Its solutions are deployed across education and training, medical health, cultural creativity, enterprise R&D, scientific research, reverse engineering, aerospace, and automotive manufacturing.

Its in-house R&D center holds multiple patents and software copyrights. All QIDI products comply with MET safety certification, CE, FCC, and RoHS standards. With extensive international cooperation experience, QIDI was the first Chinese 3D printer supplier to partner directly with Amazon — earning widespread acclaim from users globally.

description_zh: “爱丽兹”隶属于江阴市龙山合成材料有限公司，“龙山合成”是一家从事改性材料25年+的国家重点高新技术企业，为国家级专精特新小巨人，拥有独立CNAS实验室。 为更好的服务客户，3D打印事业部和传统的热塑性材料业务分离，于2022年独立为无锡爱丽兹三维科技有限公司。 一个全新领先的尖端制造商名字--Aliz应运而生，专注于3D打印耗材产品的ODM/OEM服务，为整个非金属3D打印行业提供整体解决方案。 欢迎来到Aliz爱丽兹！

(Aliz), established in 2022 as an independent entity from Jiangyin Longshan Synthetic Materials Co., Ltd., specializes in ODM/OEM services for non-metal 3D printing consumables. Longshan Synthetic — a national high-tech enterprise with 25+ years’ expertise in modified materials and a CNAS-accredited lab — is a National SPUI Little Giant Enterprise. To better serve customers, Aliz was spun off from Longshan’s traditional thermoplastic business to become a pioneering, next-generation manufacturer delivering holistic solutions for the entire non-metal 3D printing industry.

description_zh: 南京淮安宁淮智能制造产业园是南京和淮安两市按照江苏省委、省政府决策部署携手打造的南北合作共建园区， 2021年2月开展省级南北共建园区高质量发展创新试点，园区管委会于同年12月7日揭牌成立。园区位处G25、新扬高速交汇区域，紧邻G25高速铁山寺出口800米，距南京江北新区35分钟车程，距南京高铁北站45分钟车程，是南京进入苏北的“第一站”。园区规划面积8.21平方公里，在16平方公里范围内实施封闭开发。园区紧盯增材制造、机器人和智能制造产业，招引落地了一批高科技创新型企业，开工新建了数字算力中心，初步形成以高素质创新人才、高端产业体系、高端服务保障为一体，具有新质生产力发展特色的创新园区雏形。
description_en: The Nanjing-Huai’an Ninghuai Intelligent Manufacturing Industrial Park is a cooperative development zone jointly established by Nanjing and Huai’an municipalities under the strategic deployment of Jiangsu Provincial Party Committee and Government. Designated in February 2021 as a provincial-level pilot for high-quality north-south collaboration, the Park Management Committee was formally inaugurated on December 7, 2021. Strategically located at the intersection of G25 and Xinyang Expressways — just 800 meters from the TieShanSi exit of G25 — the park is 35 minutes from Nanjing Jiangbei New Area and 45 minutes from Nanjing North High-Speed Railway Station, serving as Nanjing’s 'first station' entering northern Jiangsu. Covering a planned area of 8.21 km² (with closed development across 16 km²), the park focuses on additive manufacturing, robotics, and intelligent manufacturing. It has attracted numerous high-tech enterprises and launched construction of a digital computing power center — emerging as an innovation hub characterized by high-caliber talent, high-end industry, premium services, and new-quality productive forces.

description_en: Guangzhou Hongli Bingyi Optoelectronics Technology Co., Ltd. ('Hongli Bingyi'), a subsidiary of Hongli Zhuhui Group Co., Ltd. (SZSE: 300219), is a national high-tech enterprise engaged in R&D, manufacturing, and sales of ultraviolet light-emitting diodes (UV-LEDs), excimer lamps, and semiconductor lasers. It serves as a council member of the National Semiconductor Lighting Engineering R&D and Industry Alliance, a member of the MIIT Semiconductor Lighting Technology Standards Working Group, a council member of the凹版 Printing Branch of the China Printing Technology Association, Chair of the UV Professional Committee of Guangdong Optoelectronics Technology Association, and Deputy Chair of the UV-LED Professional Committee of the National Semiconductor Lighting Engineering R&D and Industry Alliance.

description_zh: 西门子股份公司（总部位于柏林和慕尼黑）是一家专注于工业、基础设施、交通和医疗领域的科技公司，致力于持续推动创新，以科技共创每一天。通过融合现实与数字世界，西门子赋能客户加速数字化和可持续转型，助力工厂更高效，城市更宜居，交通更可持续。西门子作为工业AI应用的先行者与创新推动者，始终依托深厚的行业专长，积极推进包括生成式AI在内的人工智能技术落地应用，使AI技术更广泛地服务于各行业客户，创造深远价值。
description_en: Siemens AG, headquartered in Berlin and Munich, is a technology company focused on industry, infrastructure, transport, and healthcare — committed to continuous innovation that shapes everyday life. By integrating the real and digital worlds, Siemens empowers customers to accelerate digitalization and sustainability transformations — making factories more efficient, cities more livable, and transportation more sustainable. As a pioneer and innovator in industrial AI applications, Siemens leverages deep domain expertise to drive practical implementation of AI technologies — including generative AI — delivering broad, industry-specific value to customers worldwide.

description_zh: 上海毅速激光科技有限公司，是一家金属3D打印科创企业，专注于提供模具3D打印服务，及帮助客户建成并运营3D打印事业部的全链服务！目前已构建起“打印设备、打印材料、打印工艺、打印服务、增减协同、技术输出”六位一体的业务组合，完成了3D打印上下游的技术闭环。 毅速激光自2007年深耕于模具行业，2018年起开启模具3D打印的技术研究，已获得了15项发明专利及国家级高新技术企业、上海市专精特新中小企业等资质，为全球2000多家知名企业提供打印服务，并积累了20多万个应用案例，从而奠定了模具3D打印引领者的地位！
description_en: Shanghai Yisu Laser Technology Co., Ltd. is a metal additive manufacturing (AM) innovation enterprise specializing in 3D printing services for molds and end-to-end support for establishing and operating in-house AM departments. Its integrated business portfolio covers six core domains: AM equipment, metal powders, process development, on-demand printing services, hybrid additive-subtractive manufacturing, and technology transfer—achieving full technical closure across the AM value chain. With deep expertise in mold manufacturing since 2007 and dedicated R&D in mold-specific metal AM since 2018, Yisu Laser holds 15 invention patents and certifications including National High-Tech Enterprise and Shanghai Specialized, Refined, Distinctive, and Innovative SME. It has delivered over 200,000 application cases for more than 2,000 global clients, establishing itself as a leader in mold-oriented metal AM.

description_zh: 深圳市智能派科技有限公司（爱乐酷）成立于2015年，是一家专注于消费级3D打印机、激光雕刻机及STEM教育套件研发、生产与销售的高科技企业。凭借持续创新与高速增长，公司已迅速崛起为全球智能制造领域的领军企业，并先后获评国家级高新技术企业、国家级专精特新“小巨人”企业及深圳市潜在科技独角兽企业等荣誉称号。 截至目前，智能派的产品已销往全球150多个国家和地区，累计销量突破百万台。其中，公司旗下LCD消费级3D打印机出货量稳居全球第一，入选《中国出海品牌百强榜》新锐品牌榜单。2024年，公司年销售额突破16亿元人民币，展现出强劲的市场竞争力。
description_en: Shenzhen Intelli3D Technology Co., Ltd. (brand: Alec), founded in 2015, is a high-tech enterprise focused on R&D, manufacturing, and sales of consumer-grade 3D printers, laser engravers, and STEM education kits. Recognized as a National High-Tech Enterprise, a national 'Little Giant' specialized, refined, distinctive, and innovative enterprise, and a Shenzhen Potential Tech Unicorn, Intelli3D has shipped over one million units to 150+ countries and regions. Its LCD-based consumer 3D printers rank #1 globally by shipment volume and are featured in the 'China’s Top 100 Cross-Border Brands' Emerging Brands list. In 2024, annual revenue exceeded RMB 1.6 billion, reflecting strong market competitiveness.

description_zh: 珠海赛纳三维科技有限公司是著名打印技术企业“赛纳科技”旗下专注增材制造技术研发与应用解决方案开发于一体的高新技术企业，赛纳集团2.8万人，年销售额300亿，拥有从技术研发、材料开发、设备生产、售后服务的完整产业生态链，也是国内唯一拥有彩色打印技术的3D打印企业。
description_en: Zhuhai Sinno 3D Technology Co., Ltd. is a high-tech enterprise under Sinno Technology Group—a leading printing technology company—dedicated to R&D and application solutions in additive manufacturing. With a workforce of 28,000 and annual sales of RMB 30 billion, Sinno Group maintains a complete industrial ecosystem spanning R&D, materials development, equipment manufacturing, and after-sales service. It is the only domestic 3D printing company possessing proprietary full-color 3D printing technology.

description_zh: 西安赛隆增材技术股份有限公司成立于2013年，是西北有色金属研究院控股的高新技术企业，主营产品为电子束3D打印装备、等离子旋转电极雾化制粉装备及3D打印服务。公司拥有完整的电子束3D打印全产业链技术，建成国内领先的粉末床电子束3D打印设备生产线，并在医疗、汽车、航空航天、科研等领域实现规模化应用。
description_en: Xi’an Sailong Additive Manufacturing Co., Ltd., established in 2013 and majority-owned by the Northwest Institute for Nonferrous Metals Research, is a high-tech enterprise specializing in electron beam powder bed fusion (EB-PBF) 3D printing systems, plasma rotating electrode process (PREP) powder atomization equipment, and AM services. The company owns full EB-PBF industrial chain capabilities, operates China’s leading EB-PBF production line, and has achieved large-scale applications in healthcare, automotive, aerospace, and scientific research sectors.

description_zh: 思看科技是面向全球的三维视觉数字化综合解决方案提供商，主营业务为三维视觉数字化产品及系统的研发、生产和销售。公司深耕三维视觉数字化软硬件专业领域多年，产品主要覆盖工业级高精度和专业级高性价比两大差异化赛道，涵盖便携式3D视觉数字化产品、跟踪式3D视觉数字化产品、工业级自动化3D视觉检测系统和专业级彩色3D视觉数字化产品等。 公司产品广泛应用于航空航天、汽车制造、工程机械、交通运输、3C电子、绿色能源等工业应用领域，以及教学科研、3D打印、艺术文博、医疗健康、公安司法、虚拟世界等万物数字化应用领域，致力于提供高精度、高便携和智能化的三维视觉数字化系统解决方案，打造三维视觉数字化民族品牌。
description_en: Shinova Technology (Hangzhou) Co., Ltd. is a global provider of comprehensive 3D visual digitization solutions. Its core business encompasses R&D, manufacturing, and sales of professional 3D vision digitization hardware and software systems. Shinova serves two distinct market segments: industrial-grade high-precision systems and professional-grade cost-effective solutions—including portable 3D scanners, tracked 3D scanning systems, industrial automated 3D inspection platforms, and color-capable professional 3D digitizers. Applications span aerospace, automotive, construction machinery, transportation, 3C electronics, green energy, education/research, 3D printing, cultural heritage, medical imaging, public security, judicial forensics, and metaverse development. Shinova is committed to building a nationally recognized brand delivering high-accuracy, highly portable, and intelligent 3D visual digitization systems.

name_en: Yuanjia Biotechnology (Quzhou) Co., Ltd.

description_zh: 元嘉生物科技有限公司致力于“革新先进材料，创享美好生活”，通过技术创新和优化生产工艺，积极拓展生物基可降解材料及其他环保新材料的各种应用场景，使更多下游行业和用户拥抱低碳美好的未来。元嘉生物通过实现自身健康和可持续的增长，创造社会价值，努力赢得全社会的尊重，加强全社会对我们的期待。我们将迎接“创新”的挑战，不仅在技术上，也在生活的各个方面。恳切希望您能继续给予我们支持和鼓励!期待与您共同携手，为实现可持续发展的低碳社会、共建人类美好家园而努力奋进!
description_en: Yuanjia Biotechnology Co., Ltd. is dedicated to 'redefining advanced materials for a better life' through technological innovation and optimized manufacturing processes. It actively expands application scenarios for bio-based biodegradable materials and other eco-friendly novel materials, enabling downstream industries and end users to embrace a low-carbon future. Committed to healthy, sustainable growth, Yuanjia creates social value, earns broad societal respect, and fulfills rising expectations—embracing innovation not only in technology but across all facets of life.

description_zh: 中天上材增材制造有限公司（以下简称中天上材）是由中天科技集团投资成立的高新技术企业，是江苏省专精特新企业。位于江苏省南通市经济技术开发区，公司总投资2亿元。 中天上材以研发和生产高品质3D打印用金属粉末为核心业务，引进德国高端金属粉末制造装备，在紧耦合和超声气雾化等方面拥有多项国内领先的核心技术，已授权17项国家发明专利。 公司主产品有各类钛合金、镍基高温合金、钴铬合金、不锈钢、模具钢和定制化特种合金等增材制造用金属粉末。公司以推动增材制造产业化为核心，已具备为用户提供全产业链完整解决方案的能力。
description_en: Zhongtian Tiancai Additive Manufacturing Co., Ltd. (‘Zhongtian Tiancai’) is a high-tech enterprise invested by Zhongtian Technology Group and certified as a Jiangsu Provincial Specialized, Refined, Distinctive, and Innovative enterprise. Located in Nantong Economic & Technological Development Zone, Jiangsu Province, with a total investment of RMB 200 million, the company focuses on R&D and production of high-purity metal powders for additive manufacturing. Leveraging advanced German powder manufacturing equipment and proprietary technologies in close-coupled and ultrasonic gas atomization, it holds 17 authorized national invention patents. Core products include titanium alloys, nickel-based superalloys, cobalt-chrome alloys, stainless steels, tool steels, and custom specialty alloys—enabling end-to-end AM solutions for industrial customers.

description_zh: 纵横增材智能科技（珠海）有限公司 是3D打印行业集研发生产一体的创新型公司。公司提供专业SLA 、SLS、 DLP等3D打印设备及相关机型耗材，公司致力于3D打印技术的市场化应用，为个人、 高校 、企业提供专业的3D数字化解决方案。 公司是国家级高新技术企业、国家级科技型中小企业、及省级创新型中小企业。 截止至2022年12月底，公司研发人员占比40%，申请增材制造技术相关知识产权以及多项发明专利多达39项。
description_en: Zonhoo Additive Intelligence (Zhuhai) Co., Ltd. is an innovative R&D-and-manufacturing-integrated enterprise in the 3D printing industry. It offers professional SLA, SLS, and DLP 3D printing systems and compatible consumables, focusing on commercializing AM technologies for individuals, universities, and enterprises via tailored 3D digitalization solutions. Certified as a National High-Tech Enterprise, National Science & Technology SME, and Jiangsu Provincial Innovative SME, Zonhoo had 40% R&D personnel as of December 2022 and has filed 39 intellectual property rights—including multiple invention patents—related to AM technologies.

address_en: China/Jiangsu/苏州市/常熟市兴业路2号11号楼
description_zh: 碳索者三号是全球首款消费级连续纤维 3D 打印机，旨在让工业级复合材料制造触手可及，服务专业工程师与高端创作者。 其核心搭载碳索科技自主研发的复合纤维共挤（CFC）技术，可沿关键受力路径用连续碳纤维强化打印件，实现轻量化、高强度的零件性能，远超传统 FDM 打印极限。 这让碳索者三号不仅能打印原型，更可直接生产真正的功能性零件。 碳索者三号填补了昂贵工业级复合制造系统与消费级 3D 打印机之间的空白，让工程师可在桌面端直接完成生产制造。 搭配智能切片软件，我们在简化复杂复合材料打印流程的同时，仍为高阶用户保留完整的参数控制。
description_en: CarbonX Technology’s CarbonX-3 is the world’s first consumer-grade continuous fiber 3D printer, designed to make industrial-grade composite manufacturing accessible to professional engineers and premium creators. Powered by CarbonX’s proprietary Continuous Fiber Co-extrusion (CFC) technology, it reinforces printed parts along critical load paths using continuous carbon fiber—delivering lightweight, high-strength functional components that surpass traditional FDM performance limits. CarbonX-3 bridges the gap between costly industrial composite systems and entry-level 3D printers, enabling true functional part production directly from the desktop. Integrated with intelligent slicing software, it simplifies complex composite workflows while retaining full parameter control for advanced users.

address_en: China/Shaanxi/渭南市
description_zh: 渭南3D打印产业培育基地（简称“基地”）始建于2013年，占地520亩，主要围绕3D打印技术产业化应用，开展工程研发、企业孵化和成果产业化，通过构建政府引导、企业主导、科研院所支撑、金融机构保障的“政产学研用金”六位一体的服务体系，全面实施3D打印研发孵化和产业培育，率先建成国内规模最大、体系最全的增材制造专业园区。截止目前，基地累计注册孵化企业200多家，培育科技型中小企业63家，高新技术企业30家，规模以上企业12家，“专精特新”企业3家，瞪羚企业1家，累计授权专利450项（其中发明专利160项），实现年产值约10亿元。
description_en: The Weinan 3D Printing Industry Cultivation Base (‘the Base’), established in 2013 and covering 520 mu (≈34.7 hectares), is China’s largest and most comprehensive dedicated additive manufacturing industrial park. It advances engineering R&D, startup incubation, and industrialization of AM innovations through a ‘government–industry–university–research–application–finance’ integrated service system. To date, the Base has incubated over 200 enterprises, nurtured 63 science & technology SMEs, 30 high-tech enterprises, 12 designated large-scale enterprises, 3 specialized, refined, distinctive, and innovative enterprises, and 1 gazelle enterprise; secured 450 patents (including 160 invention patents); and generated ~RMB 1 billion in annual output value.

address_en: China/Jiangsu/苏州市/苏州市漕湖街道方桥路532号3E数字智造园D2号楼
description_zh: 诺思贝瑞新材料科技（苏州）有限公司（KEXCELLED）是国际领先的增材制造材料供应商，专注于增材制造高分子材料的研发、生产与销售，涵盖成熟的FDM材料和光敏树脂产品线。自成立以来荣获多项荣誉，包括江苏省民营科技企业和国家高新技术企业。与LEHVOSS、DOW、HUNTSMAN、COVESTRO等国内外知名企业和机构保持紧密合作，致力于提升研发能效，累积申请专利40余项。于2016年成立欧洲分公司，开启全球化发展进程。于2023年成立南通分公司，全面提升产能。始终秉持以客户为中心的理念，提供优质的3D打印材料和定制化的3D打印服务，推动增材制造成为创新制造方式。
description_en: Norsbeary New Materials Technology (Suzhou) Co., Ltd. (brand: KEXCELLED) is a globally leading supplier of additive manufacturing materials, specializing in R&D, production, and sales of high-performance polymeric AM materials—including mature FDM thermoplastics and photopolymer resin product lines. Recognized as a Jiangsu Provincial Private Science & Technology Enterprise and National High-Tech Enterprise, Norsbeary collaborates closely with global leaders including LEHVOSS, Dow, Huntsman, and Covestro. It has filed over 40 patents, launched a European subsidiary in 2016, and established a Nantong branch in 2023 to scale production capacity. Guided by a customer-centric philosophy, Norsbeary delivers premium 3D printing materials and customized AM services to accelerate adoption of AM as a mainstream manufacturing paradigm.

name_zh: 中国机械总院集团郑州机械研究所有限公司
name_en: Zhengzhou Research Institute of Mechanical Engineering, China Academy of Machinery Science & Technology Group Co., Ltd.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）
address_zh: 中国大陆/河南省/郑州市/河南省郑州市高新区科学大道149号
address_en: China/Henan/郑州市/河南省郑州市高新区科学大道149号
description_zh: 郑州机械研究所有限公司成立于1956年，是航天科技、航天科工、中核工业集团的配套供应商，公司坐落在河南省郑州市，拥有科研生产建筑面积11万平方米，拥有1200台套专用生产和检测设备，主要从事高端装备基础共性技术研究开发与成果转化、粉体工程技术研发和粉体装备制造。公司是国内最早开展并成功研制出大型工业级等离子旋转电极雾化制粉设备的科研单位，研制的DXD-80型设备经过专家组鉴定，各项参数指标均达到世界先进或领先水平，其制粉质量和生产效率可完全替代进口设备，生产粉末洁净度更高、形貌更优，满足了我国航空航天、核工业、增材制造等领域对高端金属粉体的迫切需求，对我国重大装备和新材料自立自强具有重要意义
description_en: Zhengzhou Research Institute of Mechanical Engineering, China Academy of Machinery Science & Technology Group Co., Ltd., founded in 1956 and headquartered in Zhengzhou, Henan Province, is a key supplier to China Aerospace Science and Technology Corporation (CASC), China Aerospace Science and Industry Corporation (CASIC), and China National Nuclear Corporation (CNNC). With 110,000 m² of R&D and production facilities and 1,200 specialized manufacturing and testing systems, it specializes in foundational generic technologies for high-end equipment, powder engineering R&D, and powder processing equipment manufacturing. It was the first domestic institution to successfully develop large-scale industrial plasma rotating electrode process (PREP) powder atomization equipment. Its DXD-80 PREP system—certified by expert panels as world-leading or world-class in all key parameters—delivers superior powder cleanliness and sphericity versus imported equivalents, fully meeting urgent domestic demand for high-end metal powders in aerospace, nuclear power, and AM applications, thereby supporting China’s strategic self-reliance in critical equipment and new materials.

description_zh: 形朗科技成立于2018年3月，母公司Formlabs成立于2011年，总部位于美国波士顿，形朗科技作为Formlabs在中国全资子公司，是除波士顿以外的唯一海外硬件研发中心和亚太区最大的区域总部，涵盖硬件研发，生产运营管理，供应链整合，测试实验室，市场及渠道销售等职能。 Formlabs是世界领先的3D打印设备公司，其在光固化3D打印（SLA）和选择性激光烧结（SLS）领域均处于世界领先位置。截止2025年一季度，全系列3D打印设备全球出货量超 13 万台，成功完成部件打印量超 3 亿。
description_en: Formlabs (Shenzhen) Technology Co., Ltd., established in March 2018, is the wholly owned Chinese subsidiary of Formlabs Inc.—a U.S.-based pioneer in professional 3D printing headquartered in Boston. As Formlabs’ sole overseas hardware R&D center outside Boston and its largest regional headquarters in the Asia-Pacific, it oversees hardware R&D, production operations management, supply chain integration, testing laboratories, marketing, and channel sales. Formlabs ranks among the world’s top 3D printing companies, leading globally in stereolithography (SLA) and selective laser sintering (SLS). As of Q1 2025, its global installed base exceeds 130,000 units, with over 300 million printed parts produced.

description_zh: 纳维加特有限公司（Navector）于2005年成立，公司总部设于上海市，致力于粉体工程领域内的产品开发与制造。已经涉及到食品医药、磨料、金属粉末、非金属粉末、化学粉末等众多行业，更在新能源材料、复合材料、环保材料领域，倾注了大量资源。我们搭建了先进的实验平台，从事各种物性测试，基础理论研究，和各大专学校、科研机构进行学术开发与广泛的学术交流和合作，同时拥有大型的机械装备加工基地和完善的质量管理体系。
description_en: Navector (Shanghai) Screening Technology Co., Ltd., founded in 2005 and headquartered in Shanghai, specializes in product development and manufacturing for powder processing engineering. Its solutions serve diverse sectors including food & pharmaceuticals, abrasives, metal powders, non-metallic powders, and chemical powders—and increasingly target emerging fields such as new energy materials, composites, and environmental materials. Navector maintains an advanced experimental platform for material property testing and fundamental research, collaborates extensively with universities and research institutes, and operates large-scale mechanical equipment manufacturing facilities supported by a comprehensive quality management system.

name_en: Shenzhen Creality 3D Technology Co., Ltd.
address_zh: 中国大陆/广东省/深圳市/深圳市龙华区民治街道新牛社区梅龙大道锦绣鸿都大厦18F

description_zh: 深圳市创想三维科技股份有限公司是全球消费级3D打印生态领创者，国家级专精特新“小巨人”企业，国家高新技术企业。自2014年创立以来，公司秉持“3D打印产业布道者”精神，一直致力于推动全球3D打印技术的创新、应用和普及。 创想三维围绕“一体两翼”战略布局，产品全面覆盖3D打印机、3D扫描仪、激光雕刻机、配件、耗材等，构建完善的3D打印生态圈和创想云一体化3D打印平台，目前已拥有Creality和Ender两大国际品牌，同时旗下拥有HALOT 、Sermoon等创新品牌，在个人、家庭、教育、制造等领域得到了广泛应用，并受到全球用户和合作伙伴的高度认可。
description_en: Shenzhen Creality 3D Technology Co., Ltd. is a global leader in the consumer-grade 3D printing ecosystem and a nationally certified ‘Little Giant’ specialized, refined, distinctive, and innovative enterprise and National High-Tech Enterprise. Since its founding in 2014, Creality has championed the mission of ‘advocating for the 3D printing industry’, driving global innovation, application, and democratization of 3D printing. Under its ‘One Body, Two Wings’ strategy, Creality offers a full portfolio—including 3D printers, 3D scanners, laser engravers, accessories, and consumables—and has built a complete 3D printing ecosystem anchored by the Creality Cloud integrated platform. Its international brands include Creality and Ender, complemented by innovative sub-brands HALOT and Sermoon—widely adopted across personal, home, educational, and industrial manufacturing applications and highly acclaimed worldwide.

description_zh: 宁波尚材三维科技有限公司采用气雾化制粉系统生产球形钛及钛合金粉末系列产品，年销 售超过100吨。材料主要牌号包括TC4、TA15、TA1、TA2、TC11、4N5Ti 等，产品粒径包括 0-20微米、15-53微米、20-63微米、53-150微米等。并可根据客户要求提供定制化钛合金粉 末产品。 2024年公司新建四川生产基地，产能扩充至1000吨/年，使用清洁能源及材料回收技术， 实现100%绿色制造，助力钛合金近净成型工艺获得更广泛应用
description_en: Ningbo Shangcai 3D Technology Co., Ltd. produces spherical titanium and titanium alloy powders via gas atomization systems, with annual sales exceeding 100 metric tons. Key grades include TC4, TA15, TA1, TA2, TC11, and 4N5Ti. Particle size distributions cover 0–20 µm, 15–53 µm, 20–63 µm, and 53–150 µm, with custom alloy formulations available upon request. In 2024, the company commissioned a new Sichuan production base, scaling capacity to 1,000 tons/year using clean energy and material recycling technologies to achieve 100% green manufacturing—supporting broader adoption of titanium alloy near-net-shape forming processes.

description_zh: 远铸智能（INTAMSYS）是一家提供高性能材料和工程材料3D打印及工业级增材制造解决方案的高科技公司，由海内外从事多年精密设备开发、高性能材料研究的工程师团队联合创建。其FUNMAT系列产品广泛服务于航空航天、汽车、电子制造、教育科研、医疗、人形机器人等行业领域，助力客户从概念验证到功能件制造再到量产化转型。 远铸智能建立了覆盖全球的完整营销和售后服务体系，分支机构位于上海、东莞、德国斯图加特、美国明尼苏达，与全球各行业合作伙伴一起，持续推动高性能材料和工程材料FDM 3D打印的产业化落地。 智造无限，重塑未来，远铸智能始终致力于推动工业FDM 3D打印的产业化。
description_en: INTAMSYS (Shanghai Farsoon Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd.) is a high-tech enterprise providing industrial-grade additive manufacturing solutions for high-performance and engineering thermoplastics. Founded by engineers with extensive experience in precision equipment development and advanced materials research, INTAMSYS’ FUNMAT series serves aerospace, automotive, electronics manufacturing, education/research, healthcare, and humanoid robotics—enabling seamless transitions from prototyping to functional part production and mass manufacturing. With global marketing and service branches in Shanghai, Dongguan, Stuttgart (Germany), and Minnesota (USA), INTAMSYS partners worldwide to advance industrial FDM 3D printing adoption—driving the vision of ‘Infinite Manufacturing, Reshaping the Future’.

description_zh: 上海如昂科技坐落于“中国经济中心”——上海，是国内拥有超声波技术的企业、专业从事粉体筛分设备、真空上料设备、自动化整体解决方案。致力于精细化筛分领域、依托可靠的技术支持、产品取得国内外客户的认可。 公司建立以来，以市场为依托，严格按ISO9001认证企业的标准为原则，本着“务实、开拓、创新”的企业精神，不断加强科技创新。 公司秉承：创新、可持续、用心服务、客户至上的理念服务新老客户，公司坐落在奉贤区奉浦大道1599号上海交通大学国家科技园。公司立志于成为精细筛分领域的领导者，依托上海交通大学的振动、冲击、噪音专业的科研力量，正式成为交通大学的合作企业！
description_en: Shanghai Ru’ang Ultrasonic Equipment Co., Ltd., based in Shanghai—the economic center of China—is a domestic specialist in ultrasonic technology, focusing on precision powder screening equipment, vacuum conveying systems, and integrated automation solutions. Committed to excellence in fine particle separation, Ru’ang leverages robust technical expertise and adheres strictly to ISO 9001 standards. Guided by the principles of pragmatism, pioneering spirit, and innovation, the company continuously advances R&D while upholding values of innovation, sustainability, dedicated service, and customer supremacy. Located at No. 1599 Fengpu Avenue, Fengxian District, in the Shanghai Jiao Tong University National Science Park, Ru’ang collaborates closely with SJTU’s vibration, impact, and acoustics research teams to become a leader in precision screening technology.

description_en: Materialise Group, founded in Belgium in 1990, pioneers the realization of new applications for the transformative potential of 3D printing. For over three decades, Materialise has developed industry-enabling software solutions, engineering services, and 3D printing production capabilities—forming the foundational infrastructure for the global AM ecosystem.

address_en: China/Jiangsu/南通市/江苏省南通市开发区齐心路20号
description_zh: 南通金源智能技术有限公司成立于2015年9月，为国内首批专注于3D打印及钛合金粉末生产的企业。总部位于江苏省南通市经济技术开发区，旗下设有宁波研发中心及贵州钛科子公司。 公司拥有90 亩现代化智造基地，深耕材料赛道，聚焦金属粉末的研发与生产，用尖端材料科技赋能高端制造。公司现拥有5类国际先进的真空气雾化粉末生产线：分别为VIGA生产线，EIGA生产线，等离子丝材雾化（PA）生产线、等离子球化（PS）生产线和氢化脱氢技术（HDH）生产线。 公司主要产品包括铝基、钛基、镍基、钴基、铁基、铜基、难熔稀有金属（钨、钼、钽、铌）粉末及特种粉末定制，能满足各种金属3D打印技术对粉末的需求。
description_en: Founded in September 2015, Nantong Jinyuan Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd. is among China’s first enterprises dedicated to 3D printing and titanium alloy powder production. Headquartered in the Nantong Economic & Technological Development Zone (Jiangsu Province), the company operates a Ningbo R&D center and a Guizhou Titanium Science subsidiary. It maintains a modern 90-acre intelligent manufacturing base focused on metal powder R&D and production. The company operates five internationally advanced vacuum induction melting gas atomization (VIGA), electrode induction melting gas atomization (EIGA), plasma wire atomization (PA), plasma spheroidization (PS), and hydride-dehydride (HDH) powder production lines. Its product portfolio includes aluminum-, titanium-, nickel-, cobalt-, iron-, copper-, and refractory rare-metal (tungsten, molybdenum, tantalum, niobium) powders, as well as custom specialty powders—fully compatible with all major metal additive manufacturing technologies including SLM, DMLS, and LPBF.

description_zh: 清研智束是中国电子束金属3D打印（EBSM®）技术的领导品牌，拥有EBSM® 技术自主知识产权，已实现电子光学系统等核心技术的自主可控。公司针对不同应用场景推出了Qbeam S600、S350、S200、G350、G250、E200等多系列型号设备应用于航天、航空、医疗等领域，牵头或参与多项国家重大科技专项及重点研发计划。 清研智束以重塑制造流程为使命，致力于金属增材批量化应用。公司是专精特新“小巨人”企业、国家高新技术企业、工信部中国增材制造产业联盟首批理事单位，同时公司拥有ISO9001:2015质量管理体系认证，也是首个电子束选区熔化增材制造机床国家标准的牵头起草单位。
description_en: Qingyan Zhishu (Qbeam) is China’s leading brand in electron beam selective melting (EBSM®) metal 3D printing technology, holding full independent intellectual property rights for EBSM® and achieving self-reliance in core subsystems—including the electron optical system. The company offers multiple industrial-grade EBSM® systems—including the Qbeam S600, S350, S200, G350, G250, and E200—deployed across aerospace, aviation, and medical applications. Qbeam leads or participates in multiple national key science and technology initiatives and national key R&D programs. As a ‘Little Giant’ enterprise specialized in niche innovation, a National High-Tech Enterprise, and a founding council member of the China Additive Manufacturing Industry Alliance (under MIIT), Qbeam holds ISO 9001:2015 certification and is the lead drafting entity for China’s first national standard on electron beam powder bed fusion (EB-PBF) additive manufacturing machines. Its mission is to reshape manufacturing workflows through scalable metal AM adoption.

description_zh: 星箭始建于 1981 年，是一家专注于高压流体控制元件和系统，集研发、生产、检测、安装调试、服务为一体的国家高新技术企业。致力于成为流体控制应用领域的全球领跑者。 公司产品广泛应用于航空航天、船舶、电子科技、石油化工以及可再生能源等领域。 星箭秉承“一切以客户为中心”的原则，会根据客户个性化需求，提供全方位、定制化服务，并与客户建立长期稳定的合作关系。
description_en: Founded in 1981, Xingjian Technology Co., Ltd. is a National High-Tech Enterprise specializing in high-pressure fluid control components and integrated systems—from R&D and manufacturing to testing, installation, commissioning, and after-sales service. The company serves aerospace, marine, electronics, petrochemical, and renewable energy sectors, aiming to become a global leader in fluid control solutions. Guided by its ‘customer-first’ principle, Xingjian delivers end-to-end customized services and fosters long-term, stable partnerships with clients.
