description_zh: 合肥蔚戴数字技术有限公司（Solid Dynamic）是一家总部位于中国合肥的顶尖3D打印设备制造商，致力于为全球工业客户提供高性能的增材制造解决方案。 我们专注于高性能复合材料（如碳纤维增强材料）的3D打印技术研发。Solid Dynamic 凭借自主研发的精密控制系统和先进的打印工艺，打破了传统制造的限制，使复杂几何结构与超高强度的结合成为可能。我们的产品线涵盖了从研发级原型机到工业级生产系统，广泛应用于航空航天、汽车轻量化、医疗器械及高端科研领域。 作为数字化制造的推动者，蔚戴不仅提供硬件设备，更致力于材料科学的深度探索。我们坚信“动力源于固体，创新始于数字”，旨在通过持续
description_en: Hefei Weidai Digital Technology Co., Ltd. (brand name: Solid Dynamic), headquartered in Hefei, Anhui, is a premier Chinese manufacturer of industrial 3D printing systems delivering high-performance additive manufacturing solutions worldwide. The company specializes in R&D of high-performance composite 3D printing technologies—particularly carbon fiber–reinforced materials. Leveraging proprietary precision motion control systems and advanced print processes, Solid Dynamic overcomes traditional manufacturing constraints, enabling the fabrication of parts with complex geometries and ultra-high strength. Its product line spans research-grade prototyping systems to fully industrial production platforms, serving aerospace, automotive lightweighting, medical devices, and advanced scientific research. As a digital manufacturing enabler, Weidai provides not only hardware but also deep material science expertise—driven by its vision: ‘Power originates from solids; innovation begins with digits.’

description_zh: 深圳市宝辰鑫激光科技有限公司，创鑫激光子公司，秉承创鑫激光“科技普惠大众”的理念，依托创鑫激光强大的研发生产能力和产业垂直整合能力，布局行业激光解决方案的技术创新与落地应用，助力高端装备产业高质量发展。 宝辰鑫立足细分行业，作为专业的行业激光方案服务商，致力于为客户提供一站式的激光智造方案，主要产品包含新能源锂电、光伏、汽车、3C等行业激光解决方案以及增材制造、大功率激光焊接、精密加工、激光清洗等行业激光应用方案。 宝辰鑫在深圳、苏州设立大型的研发生产基地，拥有快速敏捷的交付能力和工艺研发能力；在华东、华南、华中、华北等区域设立商务支持中心，向全球智能制造客户提供优质的激光技术服务。
description_en: Shenzhen Baochenxin Laser Technology Co., Ltd., a subsidiary of Maxphotonics, advances industry-specific laser solutions grounded in Maxphotonics’ philosophy of ‘making technology accessible to all’. Leveraging Maxphotonics’ robust R&D, manufacturing capabilities, and vertical integration, Baochenxin innovates and deploys laser solutions for high-end equipment manufacturing. As a specialized industry laser solution provider, it delivers one-stop laser intelligent manufacturing solutions—including tailored systems for new-energy lithium batteries, photovoltaics, automotive, and 3C electronics—as well as additive manufacturing, high-power laser welding, precision machining, and laser cleaning applications. With large-scale R&D and production bases in Shenzhen and Suzhou—and business support centers across East, South, Central, and North China—Baochenxin ensures agile delivery, rapid process development, and world-class laser technical services for global smart manufacturing customers.

description_zh: 广州瑞通增材科技有限公司成立于1997年，是一家专注于增材制造技术的高科技公司。为客户提供3D打印整体解决方案，业务范围涵盖3D打印设备、材料研发、打印服务、技术服务等。 瑞通增材在齿科、消费电子、科研教育、医疗、珠宝、模具和工业应用场景都有专业的产品和解决方案。以立足设备制造深耕应用场景为发展理念，逐渐发展成为3D打印细分市场的全栈运营商。
description_en: Founded in 1997, Guangzhou Ruitong Additive Manufacturing Co., Ltd. is a high-tech enterprise specializing in additive manufacturing technologies. It delivers comprehensive 3D printing solutions—including equipment, material R&D, on-demand printing services, and technical support—across dental, consumer electronics, scientific research & education, healthcare, jewelry, tooling, and general industrial applications. Guided by its strategy of deepening application-specific expertise through equipment manufacturing, Ruitong has evolved into a full-stack operator within targeted 3D printing market segments.

address_zh: 中国大陆/山东省/青岛市/山东省青岛市城阳区棘洪滩街道宏祥二路17号
address_en: China/Shandong/青岛市/山东省青岛市城阳区棘洪滩街道宏祥二路17号
description_zh: 青岛领科汇创智能科技有限公司作为一家高新技术创新型企业集研发、生产、销售为一体，公司通过ISO9001国际质量体系认证、IATF16949认证、ISO14001认证，专业融合3D打印、CNC加工、复模小批量三重核心优势，提供精密零部件加工与先进增材制造服务。公司配备百余台工业级3D打印设备，支持 24 小时内快速发货，同步构建大规模CNC加工集群，涵盖五轴联动加工中心、精密数控车床等设备，可完成复杂曲面与高精度零部件的高效生产。 公司立足青岛辐射全国，提供从设备、原材料到快速样件的全链条增材制造方案，自主研发FGF颗粒熔融3D打印机等设备，服务铸造、航空航天、汽车等多行业。
description_en: Qingdao Lingke Huichuang Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd. is a high-tech innovation enterprise integrating R&D, manufacturing, and sales. Certified to ISO 9001, IATF 16949, and ISO 14001 standards, the company uniquely combines three core competencies: industrial 3D printing, CNC machining, and low-volume reaction injection molding (RIM). It operates over 100 industrial-grade 3D printers supporting sub-24-hour rapid fulfillment, alongside a large-scale CNC cluster—including 5-axis machining centers and precision CNC lathes—for efficient production of complex curved surfaces and high-precision components. Based in Qingdao and serving nationwide, Lingke Huichuang provides end-to-end AM solutions—from equipment and raw materials to rapid prototyping—and has developed proprietary FGF (Filament Granule Fusion) granular fusion 3D printers. Its services span casting, aerospace, and automotive industries.

Serving the global 3D printing market, Phaetus delivers integrated system solutions combining functional materials, critical hardware components, and optimized print parameters—tailored to specific industrial applications.

description_zh: 四川中久大光科技有限公司坐落在中国唯一科技城一一四川省绵阳市，在成都设有研发中心。作为激光聚变研究中心与中国久远激光技术成果转化和产业化的依托平台，公司主要经营业务为:光纤激光设备、光纤激光器、光纤器件等产品的研发、生产、销售及高端激光系统解决方案。公司产品在特殊行业经历多年考核，取得了优秀的市场成绩和口碑。
description_en: Sichuan Zhongjiu Daguang Technology Co., Ltd., headquartered in Mianyang—the only national ‘Science & Technology City’ in China—with an R&D center in Chengdu, serves as the industrialization platform for laser fusion research and laser technology transfer from China Jiuyuan Group. The company develops, manufactures, and sells fiber laser equipment, fiber lasers, fiber-optic components, and high-end laser system solutions. Its products have undergone extensive validation in demanding special-sector applications and enjoy strong market performance and reputation.

name_zh: 中国航空制造技术研究院
name_en: China Academy of Aviation Manufacturing Technology (CAAMT)
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备
复合材料（碳纤维增强复合材料等）
address_zh: 中国大陆/北京/北京市/北京市朝阳区朝阳路一号院
address_en: China/Beijing/北京市/北京市朝阳区朝阳路一号院
description_zh: 中国航空制造技术研究院（以下简称“航空工业制造院”）是中国航空工业集团有限公司直属业务单位，下设2家科研院所和1家上市公司。 航空工业制造院主要承担航空材料、制造工艺、专用装备等基础、应用和工程转化研究工作，为我国新型飞机、发动机、导弹等航空装备研制和航空工厂的技术改造提供了大量先进制造技术和工艺装备。同时，也为国防工业其它领域，如航天、电子、兵器、船舶等提供了先进制造技术。先后与美国、俄罗斯、德国、法国、瑞士、意大利、日本等30多个国家和地区的研究机构、企业建立了长期的技术交流和经济合作关系。
description_en: The China Academy of Aviation Manufacturing Technology (CAAMT), a direct business unit of the Aviation Industry Corporation of China (AVIC), comprises two research institutes and one listed company. CAAMT conducts foundational, applied, and engineering-transformation research in aviation materials, manufacturing processes, and specialized equipment—supplying advanced manufacturing technologies and process equipment to support the development of new aircraft, aero-engines, missiles, and technical upgrades of aviation factories. It also extends its advanced manufacturing expertise to other defense sectors—including aerospace, electronics, ordnance, and shipbuilding. CAAMT maintains long-term technical exchange and economic cooperation with research institutions and enterprises across more than 30 countries, including the U.S., Russia, Germany, France, Switzerland, Italy, and Japan.

name_en: BMF Precision Tech Inc.

聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）
address_zh: 中国大陆/广东省/深圳市/龙华区红山地铁站6979商业中心26栋5楼
address_en: China/Guangdong/深圳市/龙华区红山地铁站6979商业中心26栋5楼
description_zh: 摩方精密（BMF Precision Tech Inc.）成立于2016年，是全球微纳3D打印技术及精密加工解决方案的领军企业。凭借自主创新的面投影微立体光刻（PμSL）技术，实现2μm/10μm/25μm超高打印精度，且兼具±10μm/±25μm/±50μm超高公差控制能力。同时配置韧性树脂、硬性树脂、耐高温树脂等功能材料，生物应用材料，工程应用材料，陶瓷材料等多类打印材料，可直接成型高精密结构件和功能器件，无需再进行抛光、打磨、喷涂等后处理工艺，为传统生产方式难以实现的复杂结构产品量身定制各类解决方案。截至目前，摩方精密已与2900+科研机构和企业单位建立合作。
description_en: BMF Precision Tech Inc., founded in 2016, is a global leader in micro/nano-scale 3D printing and precision manufacturing solutions. Its proprietary projection micro-stereolithography (PμSL) technology achieves ultra-high resolutions of 2 μm, 10 μm, and 25 μm, with corresponding dimensional tolerances of ±10 μm, ±25 μm, and ±50 μm. BMF offers a broad range of functional resins—including tough, rigid, and high-temperature-resistant grades—as well as biocompatible, engineering, and ceramic materials. Parts are printed with finished-surface quality, eliminating post-processing steps such as polishing, grinding, or coating. This enables bespoke solutions for highly complex structures unattainable via conventional manufacturing. To date, BMF has partnered with over 2,900 research institutions and enterprises globally.

address_zh: 中国大陆/广东省/东莞市/广东省东莞市松山湖园区学府路1号15栋329室
address_en: China/Guangdong/东莞市/广东省东莞市松山湖园区学府路1号15栋329室
description_zh: 东莞一迈智能科技有限公司是一家专注于3D打印研发和生产的高科技企业。其品牌IEMAI 3D是全球工业级3D打印机品牌，致力于为用户提供多种材料兼容问题的“多合一” 3D打印解决方案。IEMAI 3D支持3D打印市场中的大多数热塑性材料，并协助用户解决制造过程中遇到的问题，所有3D打印机和材料均已获得CE和ROHS认证。我们非常重视品牌建设，已获得中国、美国和欧盟的商标证书。我们致力于核心技术的研发，并已获得软件版权，发明专利，实用新型专利，外观设计专利，并获得国家高新技术企业称号。目前，我们的3D打印解决方案已应用于航空航天，汽车，石化，医疗和电子制造。
description_en: Dongguan Yimai Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd., operating under the brand IEMAI 3D, is a high-tech enterprise specializing in the R&D and manufacturing of industrial-grade 3D printers. IEMAI 3D delivers ‘all-in-one’ multi-material-compatible 3D printing solutions, supporting the majority of thermoplastic materials used in the 3D printing market. All printers and materials are CE- and RoHS-certified. The company holds registered trademarks in China, the U.S., and the EU, and owns software copyrights, invention patents, utility model patents, and design patents. Recognized as a National High-Tech Enterprise, IEMAI 3D solutions serve aerospace, automotive, petrochemical, medical, and electronics manufacturing sectors.

name_zh: 先临三维科技股份有限公司
name_en: Shining 3D Tech Corp.
address_zh: 中国大陆/浙江省/杭州市/浙江省杭州市萧山区闻堰镇湘滨路1398号
address_en: China/Zhejiang/杭州市/浙江省杭州市萧山区闻堰镇湘滨路1398号
description_zh: 先临三维科技股份有限公司成立于2004年，是三维视觉领域科技创新型企业。公司专注于高精度三维视觉软、硬件的研发和应用，致力于成为具有全球影响力的三维视觉技术企业，推动高精度三维视觉技术的普及应用。 公司的高精度3D扫描业务，主要产品为手持3D扫描仪（主要用于数字化设计、存档、可视化交互）、高精度3D视觉检测系统（主要用于3D全尺寸检测）等，为汽车工业、航空航天、能源、重工制造、交通运输、电子电器、文物雕塑、医疗健康、影视娱乐、虚拟展示、教育科研等行业提供设计和视觉检测的高精度3D数字化解决方案。
description_en: Shining 3D Tech Corp., established in 2004, is an innovative enterprise in the field of 3D vision. Specializing in high-precision 3D vision hardware and software, the company aims to become a globally influential 3D vision technology provider and drive the widespread adoption of high-precision 3D digitization. Its core offerings include handheld 3D scanners—used for digital design, archival, and interactive visualization—and high-precision 3D vision inspection systems—designed for full-dimensional 3D metrology. These solutions serve automotive, aerospace, energy, heavy machinery, transportation, electronics, cultural heritage, healthcare, film & entertainment, virtual exhibitions, and education & research sectors.

name_zh: 中国惠普有限公司
name_en: HP Inc. China
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备
聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)
address_zh: 中国大陆/上海/上海市/上海市浦东新区张江高科技园区金科路2727号B栋
address_en: China/Shanghai/上海市/上海市浦东新区张江高科技园区金科路2727号B栋
description_zh: 始创于1939年，惠普公司（HP Inc）是全球领先的打印和个人系统技术公司，总部位于美国硅谷。一直以来，惠普致力于创新技术缔造美好生活。通过打印机、3D打印解决方案、个人电脑、移动设备、解决方案和服务，惠普的使命是创造妙不可言的科技新体验。惠普进入中国市场以来，始终坚持“在中国，为中国”战略，以开放的增长思维推动最适合中国市场和不同客户的方案。在这个战略的指导下，惠普个性化和3D打印业务一方面持续开发和完善非金属与金属方向端到端的制造方案，另一方面，通过持续的产能提高，质量保障和成本优化，联合设计来推动3D打印零件在终端应用中的附加值批量体现。
description_en: Founded in 1939 and headquartered in Silicon Valley, HP Inc. is a global leader in printing and personal systems technologies. Committed to creating meaningful technological experiences, HP delivers transformative solutions through printers, 3D printing systems, PCs, mobile devices, and associated services. Since entering the Chinese market, HP has consistently pursued its ‘In China, For China’ strategy—leveraging open growth thinking to tailor optimal solutions for local markets and diverse customers. Within this framework, HP’s Personalization and 3D Printing business continuously develops and refines end-to-end manufacturing solutions for both polymer and metal applications, while enhancing production capacity, ensuring quality, optimizing costs, and co-designing with partners to realize scalable value-addition of 3D-printed parts in final applications.

name_en: Wuhan Yizhi Technology Co., Ltd.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备

description_zh: 武汉易制科技有限公司是国内最早实现粘结剂喷射金属和全彩3D打印机商品化的高新技术企业，最新核心产品粘结剂喷射金属3D打印系统具有国际领先水平。公司建设有武汉研发中心和江苏常州产业化基地，研发中心设有后处理中心、化学实验室、检测中心。 荣誉称号：“湖北省专精特新中小企业”、“光谷瞪羚企业”。
description_en: Wuhan Yizhi Technology Co., Ltd. is one of China’s earliest high-tech enterprises to commercialize binder jetting metal 3D printers and full-color 3D printers. Its latest flagship binder jetting metal 3D printing system represents world-leading performance. The company operates a Wuhan R&D center—including post-processing, chemistry, and metrology laboratories—and an industrialization base in Changzhou, Jiangsu. It holds honors including ‘Hubei Province Specialized, Refined, Distinctive, and Innovative SME’ and ‘Optics Valley Gazelle Enterprise’.

name_zh: 佛山市众城智慧科技有限公司
name_en: Foshan Zhongcheng Smart Technology Co., Ltd.
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)

address_en: China/Guangdong/佛山市/佛山市南海区狮山镇狮山科技工业园兴业东路13号
description_zh: 佛山市众城智慧科技有限公司是一家专注于蜡材及各类粘结剂喷射（3DP）、连同砂型等各类粉末铺床技术的高新技术企业，是全球目前为数不多的同时具备各类喷头（尤其是英国赛尔喷头）设备开发、波形开发、新材料研发、应用研发于一体的3D打印高科技公司。公司自主研发的失蜡铸造蜡模3D打印设备和智能3D工业砂型打印机，已成功应用于珠宝、航空航天、汽车制造、精密铸造等高端制造领域，产品远销全球多个国家和地区。作为3D打印智造引擎，我们已为全球超100家企业提供数字化解决方案，助力客户突破传统制造瓶颈，实现效率与成本的双重革命。
description_en: Foshan Zhongcheng Smart Technology Co., Ltd. is a high-tech enterprise specializing in wax-based and various binder jetting (3DP) materials, as well as sand-based powder-bed 3D printing technologies. Among the few global companies capable of developing printheads (including Xaar printheads), waveform drivers, novel materials, and application-specific solutions, Zhongcheng has successfully launched proprietary lost-wax casting wax-model 3D printers and intelligent industrial sand 3D printers—widely deployed in jewelry, aerospace, automotive manufacturing, and precision casting. Its products are exported globally. As a ‘digital manufacturing engine’, Zhongcheng has delivered digital transformation solutions to over 100 enterprises worldwide—enabling breakthroughs in traditional manufacturing bottlenecks and delivering dual revolutions in efficiency and cost.

name_zh: 武汉中观自动化科技有限公司
name_en: Wuhan Zhongguan Automation Technology Co., Ltd.

description_zh: 中观是由海克斯康集团控股的一家全球性摄影测量与计算机视觉领域的高科技公司，致力于3D数字化测量的技术研发与产品开发。公司产品线覆盖三维数据采集设备、自动化三维检测系统和三维数据智能处理与分析系统等。中观的自动化解决方案，在汽车、轨道交通、航空航天、新能源电池盒等领域积累了丰富的应用经验，为智能制造的加速推进提供了创新动能。
description_en: Zhongguan Automation, a Hexagon-owned global high-tech company, specializes in photogrammetry and computer vision for 3D digital metrology. Its product portfolio encompasses 3D data acquisition devices, automated 3D inspection systems, and intelligent 3D data processing & analytics platforms. Zhongguan’s automated solutions have accumulated extensive application experience in automotive, rail transit, aerospace, and new-energy battery housing manufacturing—providing innovative impetus for accelerating smart manufacturing.

address_en: China/Jiangsu/苏州市/苏州市吴中区木渎镇珠江南路888号科技创业园4号楼4121
description_zh: 中纤三维科技（苏州）有限公司是一家提供先进的3D打印设备与一体化解决方案的高新技术企业。公司通过持续研发材料、软件及3D打印设备，携手行业伙伴与客户，共同推动增材制造的技术革新与产业升级，助力各行业迈向高效、精准、智能化的未来制造新时代。公司成立于2023年7月27日，总部位于江苏省苏州市。 中纤三维通过稳定可靠的设备、全面兼容的材料系统以及智能化切片软件，旨在构建了一个完整的3D打印生态。 中纤三维打印设备可广泛应用于航空航天、低空经济、汽车工程和工装制造等领域，推动智能制造领域的轻量化与高性能化发展。
description_en: Zhongxian 3D Tech (Suzhou) Co., Ltd., founded on July 27, 2023, and headquartered in Suzhou, Jiangsu, is a high-tech enterprise delivering advanced 3D printing equipment and integrated solutions. Through continuous R&D in materials, software, and hardware, Zhongxian 3D collaborates with industry partners and customers to advance additive manufacturing innovation and industrial upgrading—empowering sectors to embrace efficient, precise, and intelligent next-generation manufacturing. Its ecosystem features reliable hardware, broadly compatible material systems, and intelligent slicing software. Zhongxian 3D printers serve aerospace, emerging low-altitude economy applications, automotive engineering, and tooling manufacturing—supporting lightweighting and high-performance advancement in smart manufacturing.

description_zh: 上海漫格科技有限公司，创立于2019年，是一家以算法为核心的国产创新3D打印软件公司。 致力于增材制造工业软件CAD/CAM/CAE的自主研发，通过打造设计、仿真到生产全流程的数字化软件系统，为医疗、教育、航空航天、汽车和消费品等行业提供智能化增材制造工业软件及算法解决方案，最终实现制造业数字化转型。
description_en: Shanghai Mango3D Technology Co., Ltd., founded in 2019, is a domestic innovator in algorithm-driven 3D printing industrial software. Focused on independent R&D of CAD/CAM/CAE software for additive manufacturing, Mango3D builds end-to-end digital software systems—from design and simulation to production—to deliver intelligent AM industrial software and algorithmic solutions for healthcare, education, aerospace, automotive, and consumer goods industries—ultimately enabling digital transformation in manufacturing.

description_zh: 盈普三维技术团队成立于1999年，是一家专注于选择性激光烧结(SLS)技术研发与应用的3D打印企业，是国内较早进入该领域的专业技术公司。公司现已发展成为集设备、材料研发、生产、销售于一体的行业领先企业，推出了S、P 两大系列工业级SLS 3D 打印系统及二十余种专用材料，拥有90多项国家专利及软著证书，服务涵盖医疗、汽车、消费电子、教育文创及航空航天等领域。
description_en: Teton 3D’s technical team was established in 1999 and is a pioneer in selective laser sintering (SLS) R&D and application in China. Today, Teton 3D is an industry-leading enterprise integrating SLS equipment and material R&D, manufacturing, and sales. It offers two major industrial SLS 3D printing system series—S and P—and over twenty specialized polymer powders. Holding more than 90 national patents and software copyrights, Teton 3D serves healthcare, automotive, consumer electronics, education & cultural creativity, and aerospace sectors.

name_zh: 北京格拉飞可斯科技有限公司

address_zh: 美国/California/Sunnyvale
address_en: 美国/California/Sunnyvale
description_zh: Meshy 是一家创立于硅谷的生成式 AI 公司，以“解放 3D 创造力”为使命，通过自研业界领先的 3D 基础大模型，将传统耗时的建模流程缩短至分钟级。用户仅需文字或图片，即可生成高精度几何结构与逼真材质的 3D 资产。公司汇聚了来自计算机图形学与 AI 领域的全球人才，团队成员毕业于 MIT、斯坦福等名校，并曾任职于Google、英伟达等巨头。作为全球领先的 3D AI 工具，Meshy 获评 AI 产品榜“2025 AI 年度产品” 和 A16Z 年度最受欢迎奖项，服务 1000 万创作者。
description_en: Meshy is a generative AI company founded in Silicon Valley with the mission to 'liberate 3D creativity.' Leveraging its proprietary, industry-leading 3D foundation large model, Meshy reduces traditional time-intensive 3D modeling workflows to minutes. Users generate high-fidelity geometric models and photorealistic material assets from text or image inputs alone. The team comprises global talent from computer graphics and AI domains, with alumni from MIT and Stanford and prior experience at Google and NVIDIA. As a world-leading 3D AI tool, Meshy was named '2025 AI Product of the Year' by the AI Product Awards and received the A16Z Annual Favorite Award, serving 10 million creators worldwide.

address_en: China/Zhejiang/金华市/浙江省金华市孝顺镇广顺南街丽讯光电6号楼4楼
description_zh: 金华市宁美科技有限公司成立与2019年是一家专注于3D打印耗材研发、生产与贸易的现代化企业，致力于为全球3D打印行业提供高品质、多品类的材料解决方案。公司集生产制造与国际贸易于一体，凭借先进的生产技术、严格的品控体系和高效的供应链管理，已成为3D打印耗材领域的重要供应商，产品广泛应用于工业制造、创意设计、教育科研、医疗健康等多个领域。公司目前厂房面积11200平方，拥有86名员工。
description_en: Jinhua Ningmei Technology Co., Ltd., established in 2019, is a modern enterprise specializing in the R&D, manufacturing, and trade of 3D printing consumables. It delivers high-quality, multi-category material solutions for the global 3D printing industry. Integrating advanced manufacturing with international trade, the company employs cutting-edge production technologies, rigorous quality control, and efficient supply chain management. Its consumables serve diverse sectors including industrial manufacturing, creative design, education & research, and healthcare. The company operates a 11,200 m² production facility and employs 86 professionals.

description_zh: 河北敬业增材制造科技有限公司成立于2015年，总投资23.4亿元，拥有金属粉末、金属3D打印、金属注射成形等多条智能制造生产线，是全球领先的全流程增材制造公司。公司通过了职业质量管理、环境管理、健康管理体系认证，拥有专利108项，被评为国家高新技术企业、河北省“专精特新”中小企业;2018年入选“中国制造2025”项目；2019年获得“中国机械工业科学技术奖一等奖”。
description_en: Hebei Jingye Additive Manufacturing Technology Co., Ltd., founded in 2015 with a total investment of RMB 2.34 billion, operates integrated intelligent manufacturing lines for metal powders, metal additive manufacturing (including SLM/DMLS), and metal injection molding (MIM). As a globally leading end-to-end additive manufacturing company, it holds ISO 9001 (Quality), ISO 14001 (Environmental), and ISO 45001 (Occupational Health & Safety) certifications, owns 108 patents, and is recognized as a National High-Tech Enterprise and Hebei Province 'Specialized, Refined, Distinctive, and Innovative' SME. It was selected for China’s 'Made in China 2025' initiative in 2018 and awarded the First Prize of the China Machinery Industry Science and Technology Award in 2019.

description_zh: 宁波家联科技股份有限公司是一家专注于生物全降解制品及塑料日用品的研发、生产与销售的高新技术企业（股票代码：301193）。公司所售3D打印线材有：PLA线材、PLA+线材、PLA高速打印线材、PLA高韧线材、PLA丝绸线材、PLA哑光线材、PLA透明线材、PLA夜光线材。家联科技选用进口原料，采用自动化车间生产，只为用户提供高质量、易打印的3D打印PLA线材。公司在浙江、广西、广东及美国、泰国等地建立了 9 个生产基地，销售网络覆盖全球，为全球客户提供个性化的3D打印服务及创新解决方案。
description_en: Ningbo Jialian Technology Co., Ltd. (Stock Code: 301193) is a national high-tech enterprise focused on R&D, manufacturing, and sales of fully biodegradable products and plastic daily-use goods. Its 3D printing filament portfolio includes PLA, PLA+, high-speed PLA, high-toughness PLA, silk-finish PLA, matte PLA, transparent PLA, and glow-in-the-dark PLA filaments. All filaments are produced using imported raw materials and automated production lines to ensure high printability and consistent quality. With nine production bases across Zhejiang, Guangxi, Guangdong provinces, the U.S., and Thailand, Jialian serves global customers with personalized 3D printing services and innovative material solutions.

description_zh: 众远新材料于2018年成立，是国家级高新技术企业、国家级专精特新“小巨人”企业，公司专注高品质金属材料尤其是增材制造金属粉末的研发与生产。构建了高温合金、钛合金等全谱系材料体系，产品广泛应用于航空航天、医疗健康等先进制造领域；公司总部位于浙江宁波，有浙江、湖南、四川三大现代化研发生产基地，规划年产能超万吨，拥有超过240人的专业团队，核心研发力量雄厚。 公司掌握VIGA、EIGA等核心气雾化制粉工艺，突破多项关键技术瓶颈，形成全链条专利技术体系；同时提供柔性化售后技术陪伴服务，以“创新、精进、协作、责任、卓越”为核心价值观，致力于成为全球领先的新材料解决方案提供者，以新材料科技赋能产业升级。
description_en: Ningbo Zhongyuan New Materials Technology Co., Ltd., established in 2018, is a National High-Tech Enterprise and a national 'Little Giant' specialized, refined, distinctive, and innovative SME. The company focuses on R&D and production of premium metal materials—especially metal powders for additive manufacturing—including comprehensive material systems for nickel-based superalloys and titanium alloys. Its products serve advanced manufacturing sectors such as aerospace and healthcare. Headquartered in Ningbo, Zhejiang, it operates three modern R&D and production bases in Zhejiang, Hunan, and Sichuan, with an annual planned capacity exceeding 10,000 metric tons and a professional team of over 240. Core competencies include VIGA and EIGA gas atomization processes, a full-stack patent portfolio covering powder production to application, and flexible after-sales technical support. Guided by the values of Innovation, Excellence, Collaboration, Responsibility, and Perfection, Zhongyuan aims to become a world-leading provider of advanced materials solutions enabling industrial upgrading.

name_en: Shenzhen JimuYida Technology Co., Ltd.

description_zh: 深圳积木易搭科技技术有限公司成立于2015年，是国内领先、国际知名的全栈式3D数字化解决方案提供商。公司总部位于深圳，产研中心位于武汉。2022年，成立香港子公司，以3DMakerpro品牌拓展海外市场；2023年，成立洛杉矶和卢森堡全资子公司，布局全球化市场。公司先后荣获国家级专精特新“小巨人”企业、国家高新技术企业认定；已获得3D领域发明和实用新型专利100+项，软著145+项。公司业务涵盖消费级3D扫描仪、工业级3D扫描仪、齿科医疗3D扫描仪、3D空间扫描仪、3D云设计工具、3D数字化营销服务平台、3D模型大数据服务平台等。
description_en: Shenzhen JimuYida Technology Co., Ltd., founded in 2015, is a leading domestic and internationally recognized full-stack 3D digitalization solution provider. Headquartered in Shenzhen with an R&D and production center in Wuhan, the company expanded globally with subsidiaries in Hong Kong (launched in 2022 under the 3DMakerpro brand), Los Angeles, and Luxembourg (both launched in 2023). Recognized as a National 'Little Giant' SME and National High-Tech Enterprise, it holds over 100 invention and utility model patents and 145+ software copyrights in the 3D domain. Its product portfolio spans consumer-grade and industrial-grade 3D scanners, dental medical 3D scanners, 3D spatial scanners, cloud-based 3D design tools, 3D digital marketing platforms, and 3D model big data services.

address_en: China/Jiangsu/苏州市/江苏省苏州市吴中区兴吴路27号1号楼
description_zh: 奇迹智能是国家高新技术企业、国家制造业信息化培训中心合作单位、江苏省增材制造协会副理事长单位、江苏省版权示范单位、市“双创"人才企业。成立至今专注3D打印（增材制造）领域研发、生产及销售。现已建立涵盖3D打印设备、软件、耗材、扫描及服务的完整产业链，核心产品含多系列陶瓷3D打印机及配套浆料，适配高端领域复杂构件成型，满足不同客户需求。公司拥有专利三十余项、授权著作权近百项，3D打印设备通过国家级增材质量检验及CE/EMC/ROHS等国际认证，品质可靠获市场认可。
description_en: Jiangsu Qiji Intelligent Manufacturing Technology Co., Ltd. is a National High-Tech Enterprise, cooperative unit of the National Manufacturing Informatization Training Center, Vice Chairman of the Jiangsu Additive Manufacturing Association, Jiangsu Provincial Copyright Demonstration Unit, and a municipal 'Innovation & Entrepreneurship Talent' enterprise. Focused exclusively on 3D printing (additive manufacturing) since inception, it has built a complete industrial chain covering 3D printers, software, consumables, scanning systems, and services. Core offerings include multiple series of ceramic 3D printers and compatible slurries, engineered for complex component fabrication in high-end applications. The company holds over 30 patents and nearly 100 software copyrights; its 3D printers are certified by national additive manufacturing quality inspection authorities and meet CE, EMC, and RoHS standards.

description_zh: 广州市荔湾区创能投资发展有限公司由荔湾区属一级企业荔湾发展集团、荔源集团共同出资设立，注册资本 3 亿元。创能公司开发建设运营的广州市激光与增材制造产业园，聚焦激光与增材制造、智能装备、新一代信息技术等重点产业，为入驻企业提供高标准生产厂房、研发试验空间、总部办公场地及食堂、人才房等完善配套，同时依托区属国企平台优势，整合产业资源，助力企业高质量发展。
description_en: Guangzhou Liwan Chuangneng Investment & Development Co., Ltd. is a joint venture established by Liwan Development Group and Liyuan Group—two first-tier state-owned enterprises under Liwan District—with registered capital of RMB 300 million. Chuangneng develops, constructs, and operates the Guangzhou Laser & Additive Manufacturing Industrial Park, targeting strategic industries including laser technology, additive manufacturing, intelligent equipment, and next-generation information technology. The park provides high-standard production facilities, R&D labs, headquarters office space, staff canteens, and talent housing. Leveraging its SOE platform, Chuangneng integrates industrial resources to accelerate high-quality growth for resident enterprises.

description_zh: 凯普林光电始创于2003年，公司以“让梦想驭光而行”为使命，以成为“全球激光解决方案领跑者”为愿景，以“创变非凡”为价值观，面向全球客户提供半导体、光纤、超快激光产品及解决方案。 公司追求持续创新，坚持自主可控的先进工艺和技术。为此，凯普林以北京总部为核心，先后在江苏、深圳建立了生产及研发中心，在天津投资兴建了智能化、数字化生产基地。为打造世界高水平技术实力和产品品质，凯普林在2020年成立德国子公司，为研发生产和技术创新国际化迈出坚实一步。 时至今日，凯普林在全球已累计拥有数百万个激光器运行，产品遍及60多个国家，应用涉及工业、医疗、商业、科研、信息等诸多领域。
description_en: Jiangsu KPL Photonics Co., Ltd., founded in 2003, is committed to the vision of 'becoming the global leader in laser solutions' and guided by the mission 'to let dreams ride the light' and the value 'innovate extraordinarily.' It delivers semiconductor lasers, fiber lasers, ultrafast lasers, and integrated solutions worldwide. Committed to self-reliant, advanced process technologies, KPL maintains a Beijing headquarters, production and R&D centers in Jiangsu and Shenzhen, and a smart, digital manufacturing base in Tianjin. In 2020, it established a German subsidiary to advance international R&D and innovation. Today, millions of KPL lasers operate across more than 60 countries, serving industrial, medical, commercial, scientific research, and information technology applications.

description_zh: 上海睿准工业装备有限公司自2016年成立以来，始终专注于为中国制造业引进并整合全球顶尖的工业技术。公司下设两大事业部：工业3D事业部与电子事业部，分别致力于美国MARKFORGED增材制造技术与瑞士ESSEMTEC电子装配解决方案的在华推广与服务。 作为美国MARKFORGED公司在中国的授权代理商及金级合作商，我们的工业3D事业部不仅是高端设备的提供者，更是值得信赖的本地化技术合作伙伴。
description_en: Shanghai Ruizhun Industrial Equipment Co., Ltd., founded in 2016, specializes in introducing and integrating world-class industrial technologies into China. Its two business divisions—the Industrial 3D Division and the Electronics Division—focus respectively on promoting and supporting MARKFORGED (USA) additive manufacturing systems and ESSEMTEC (Switzerland) electronic assembly solutions in China. As an authorized MARKFORGED distributor and Gold Partner, Ruizhun provides not only high-end AM equipment but also trusted localized technical partnership and service.

description_zh: 江苏铬莱铂数字科技有限公司(英文名Global Laser Box,以下简称:“铬莱铂”)是金属3D打印规模化生产解决方案提供商,采用自主研发的工业级SLM金属3D打印设备及软件,向用户提供金属3D打印装备、产品,主要应用领域涉及高端齿科,工业模具、3C消费电子、航空航天等,助力规模化生产。目前公司已有江苏盐城及湖南常德两大SLM金属3D打印设备生产基地，浙江温州、湖南常德、江苏盐城亭湖及盐南四大3D打印服务基地。总建筑面积约20000平米,员工约160人，研发人员占比约21%。
description_en: Jiangsu Globallaserbox Digital Technology Co., Ltd. (a.k.a. 'Globallaserbox') is a provider of scalable metal 3D printing production solutions. It deploys proprietary industrial-grade Selective Laser Melting (SLM) metal 3D printers and software to deliver metal 3D printing equipment and end-use parts. Key application areas include high-end dentistry, industrial tooling, consumer electronics (3C), and aerospace. The company operates two SLM metal 3D printer manufacturing bases—in Yancheng, Jiangsu and Changde, Hunan—and four 3D printing service hubs—in Wenzhou (Zhejiang), Changde (Hunan), Tinghu (Yancheng), and Yan’nan (Yancheng). Its total building area is approximately 20,000 m², with ~160 employees, including ~21% R&D personnel.

address_en: China/Jiangsu/苏州市/江苏省张家港市锦丰镇锦乐路453号
description_zh: 张家港弗兰德机械深耕3D打印耗材生产线研发与制造十几年，致力于为全为全球客户提供从实验研发到工业化量产、从单机设备到智能工厂的全场景3D打印耗材生产解决方案。有用于科研打样的FLD-25精密3D打印丝实验机、用于规模化生产的FLD-45高效3D打印耗材生产线工业线，以及集成自动测径与自动收卷的FLD-Auto智能无人化产线，3D打印耗材挤出机。全线标配闭环反馈系统与高精度模具，线径公差稳定控制在±0.02mm，全面兼容PLA、ABS、PETG、TPU等材料。 我们始终坚持“用稳定的设备，成就稳定的耗材”这一理念，已为全球超过数百家客户提供定制化生产线及交钥匙工程服务。
description_en: Zhangjiagang Fred Machinery Co., Ltd. has dedicated over a decade to R&D and manufacturing of 3D printing consumable production lines, delivering end-to-end solutions—from lab-scale prototyping to industrial mass production, and from standalone machines to smart factories. Its product lineup includes the FLD-25 precision filament extrusion tester for R&D, the FLD-45 high-efficiency industrial filament production line for mass manufacturing, and the FLD-Auto intelligent unmanned production line featuring integrated automatic diameter measurement and auto-winding. All systems feature closed-loop feedback control and high-precision dies, maintaining filament diameter tolerance within ±0.02 mm. Fully compatible with PLA, ABS, PETG, TPU, and other thermoplastics, Fred Machinery adheres to the principle 'stable equipment enables stable consumables,' having delivered customized production lines and turnkey engineering projects to hundreds of global clients.

description_zh: 武汉锐科光纤激光技术股份有限公司（以下简称“锐科激光”, 股票代码：300747.SZ）, 是一家专业从事光纤激光器及其关键器件与材料的研发、生产和销售的国家火炬计划重点高新技术企业, 拥有高功率光纤激光器国家重点领域创新团队和光纤激光器技术国家地方联合工程研究中心, 是全球有影响力的具有从材料、器件到整机垂直集成能力的光纤激光器研发、生产和服务供应商。公司主营业务包括为激光制造装备集成商提供各类光纤激光器产品和应用解决方案, 并为客户提供技术研发服务和定制化产品。
description_en: Wuhan Raycus Fiber Laser Technologies Co., Ltd. (Stock Code: 300747.SZ) is a key national high-tech enterprise under the Torch Program, specializing in R&D, manufacturing, and sales of fiber lasers and their critical components and materials. It hosts the National Key R&D Team for High-Power Fiber Lasers and the National-Local Joint Engineering Research Center for Fiber Laser Technology. As a globally influential vertically integrated supplier—from raw materials and components to complete systems—Raycus provides fiber laser products and application solutions to laser equipment integrators, along with R&D services and custom-engineered products.

description_zh: 零犀智造(天津)科技有限公司是一家集3D打印设备设计研发、生产销售、线上云平台开发运用于一体的智能制造企业。专注于3D打印机、3D打印服务及开放式创新网络平台运营解决方案。 公司下设天津生产基地、北京研发中心、深圳新材料联合实验室，并在四省设有销售渠道，研发人员占比超过30%，平均年龄28岁，拥有专业的知识、丰富的经验，不断突破、追求技术创新，是一支具有基础研究、工程化应用、批量生产等综合能力的朝气蓬勃的创新型人才队伍。
description_en: Lingxi Smart Manufacturing (Tianjin) Co., Ltd. is an intelligent manufacturing enterprise integrating 3D printer design & development, production & sales, and cloud-based platform development & operation. It specializes in 3D printing hardware, on-demand 3D printing services, and open innovation network platforms. The company operates a Tianjin production base, a Beijing R&D center, and a Shenzhen joint laboratory for new materials. With sales channels across four provinces and over 30% R&D personnel—averaging 28 years of age—the team combines deep expertise, rich experience, and strong capabilities in fundamental research, engineering application, and volume production.

description_zh: 浙江久立特材科技股份有限公司（简称“久立”，股票代码002318）是一家为全球工业提供高性能材料解决方案的上市公司。目前，我们形成了从研发、原材料（不锈钢及特种合金的板、棒、丝、线）、钢管、管件、法兰（无缝、焊接、复合）、管道预制件的全产业链体系，来确保久立交付的产品能够应用于最苛刻、严峻的工况。我们将材料研发创新与客户实际需求深度结合，与客户保持长期良好的合作伙伴关系，为客户提供高效、优质、合理的材料解决方案，助力客户高质量、可持续的发展。
description_en: Zhejiang Juli Special Materials Co., Ltd. ('Juli', Stock Code: 002318) is a publicly listed company delivering high-performance material solutions to global industries. Its vertically integrated industrial chain spans R&D, raw materials (stainless steel and specialty alloy plates, bars, wires, and rods), seamless/welded/composite pipes and pipe fittings, flanges, and prefabricated piping systems—ensuring reliability under the most demanding operating conditions. Juli closely aligns material innovation with real-world customer needs, maintaining long-term partnerships to deliver efficient, high-quality, and cost-effective material solutions that support sustainable, high-quality client growth.

description_zh: 广州捷和电子科技有限公司成立于2011年，历经15年沉淀已经成长为拥有完备的研发，生产，销售与工业应用开发一体化公司。是全中国领先的工业级3D打印设备，快速铸造，解决方案的供应商。 多年精心研发，从机械结构设计，核心控制代码，到应用控制软件，全方位无缝整合优化。广泛适用于教育、艺术、医疗保健、工业设计，航空航天等领域。目前已自主研发3D打印机QUBEA以及其快速铸造方案，其各项技术参数均为国际先进水平，并获得多项自主知识产权。研发全球独有线光机成型技术，基于线光机的SLA智能打印机，形成3D打印设备及配套软件、3D打印材料、快速铸造工艺、光学模组产品线。
description_en: Guangzhou Jiehe Electronic Technology Co., Ltd., founded in 2011, has evolved over 15 years into a fully integrated enterprise encompassing R&D, manufacturing, sales, and industrial application development. It is a leading domestic supplier of industrial-grade 3D printers and rapid casting solutions. Through holistic optimization—from mechanical structure design and core control firmware to application software—the company delivers seamless, high-performance systems applicable across education, art, healthcare, industrial design, and aerospace. Its proprietary QUBEA 3D printer and rapid casting system achieve internationally advanced technical specifications and hold multiple independent intellectual property rights. Jiehe pioneered a globally unique Line Light Engine (LLE) forming technology, enabling SLA-based intelligent printers and establishing product lines spanning 3D printers & software, 3D printing materials, rapid casting processes, and optical modules.

description_zh: 武汉市奥特康设备有限公司是深圳朗光科技全资子公司，注册资本1000万元。作为一家自动化设备和光系统集成解决方案提供商，公司聚焦在激光及其应用领域，为行业客户提供国内领先的自动化测试、加工设备，产品类型覆盖光斑检测、光学测量、光纤加工及光学工艺等四大领域。 公司在武汉、深圳均建有设备研发实验室，负责产品的研发、生产及测试工作。在常州更有15000平米大型生产基地，具备批量供货的能力。奥特康起源于朗光科技，拥有丰富的自用经验，公司产品在朗光科技及欧凌镭射产线批量使用多年，稳定且可靠。同时，在外部客户使用方面奥特康也进展神速，多款产品已获得国内激光龙头企业的认可，并取得不错的订单。
description_en: Wuhan Autokang Equipment Co., Ltd. is a wholly owned subsidiary of Shenzhen Langguang Technology, with registered capital of RMB 10 million. As an automation equipment and optical system integration solution provider, Autokang focuses on laser-related applications, delivering domestically leading automated testing and processing equipment across four domains: laser beam profiling, optical metrology, fiber optic processing, and optical process systems. It maintains R&D laboratories in Wuhan and Shenzhen for product development, manufacturing, and testing, and operates a 15,000 m² large-scale production base in Changzhou capable of high-volume delivery. Originating from Langguang Technology, Autokang benefits from extensive in-house application experience—its products have been deployed reliably for years on Langguang and Orlight production lines—and is rapidly gaining external traction, with multiple products validated and ordered by leading Chinese laser manufacturers.

('HeyGears') is an innovation-driven company centered on 3D printing applications and digital intelligent manufacturing technologies. Starting from real-world application requirements, HeyGears integrates expertise across 3D printing, materials science, artificial intelligence, software development, and big data analytics to transform manufacturing paradigms. It delivers comprehensive, industry-specific 3D printing digital solutions across dentistry, consumer electronics, smart wearables (e.g., earphones), rehabilitation medicine, industrial manufacturing, and cultural & creative industries.

description_zh: 同异科技是一家集高性能连续碳纤维复合丝材制备、3D打印设备和切片软件研发为一体的高科技公司，旨在为客户提供连续碳纤维复合材料产品设计与制造一站式解决方案，使零件更轻、更强、更智能。 公司现有桌面级连续碳纤维3D打印设备T300，准工业级连续碳纤维3D打印设备T420，工业级高温连续碳纤维3D打印设备T420pro、Y600等产品，具备机械臂方式连续碳纤维3D打印设备交付能力，公司的热塑性连续纤维预浸渍丝材性能优异、分布均匀、孔隙率低。
description_en: Tongyi is a high-tech company integrating the development of high-performance continuous carbon fiber composite filaments, 3D printing equipment, and slicing software. It delivers end-to-end solutions for design and manufacturing of continuous carbon fiber composite parts—enabling lighter, stronger, and smarter components. Its product portfolio includes desktop-scale (T300), near-industrial-scale (T420), and industrial-grade high-temperature continuous carbon fiber 3D printers (T420 Pro, Y600), as well as robotic-arm-based continuous carbon fiber 3D printing systems. Its thermoplastic continuous fiber prepreg filaments feature superior mechanical performance, uniform fiber distribution, and low porosity.

description_zh: 空实科技：领航3D打印、助力工业数字化转型 空实科技坐落于广东东莞市“世界工厂”的核心地带，是一家以3D打印技术与工业应用为核心，专注于为各行业提供工业应用落地解决方案的创新型服务企业。 空实科技自主研发工业级光固化3D打印设备,创新材料实验室拥有20+项专利技术，服务广泛覆盖全球多个不同行业，其工程材料达传统ABS75%机械强度，耐高温材料实现280℃热变形温度;凭借3D打印前沿技术，为各行业实现数字化转型，提供成熟、高效的落地解决方案。
description_en: Kongshi Tech, headquartered in Dongguan—the heart of China’s ‘World Factory’—is an innovative service provider specializing in industrial applications of 3D printing technology. It develops proprietary industrial-grade stereolithography (SLA) 3D printers and operates an advanced materials lab holding over 20 patents. Its engineering-grade photopolymer resins achieve up to 75% of ABS mechanical strength, while high-temperature resins withstand heat deflection temperatures up to 280°C. Kongshi delivers mature, efficient, and scalable digital transformation solutions for global clients across diverse sectors.

description_zh: 成都增谊科技有限公司是一家专业提供粘接剂喷射增材制造技术（Binder Jetting，简称BJ）的高科技公司，开展面向批量化生产的3D打印技术研发及推广，提供成套综合解决方案。公司已研发粘接剂喷射增材制造设备多种型号，多种新型粘接剂材料，通过持续创新和优质服务，已为航空、航天、汽车、电子、院校等领域提供专业的3D打印应用解决方案。
description_en: Chengdu Zengyi is a high-tech enterprise specializing in binder jetting (BJ) additive manufacturing technology. It focuses on R&D and commercialization of BJ systems for high-volume production and offers comprehensive turnkey solutions—including BJ printers, novel binder formulations, process optimization, and application engineering. Its solutions serve aerospace, automotive, electronics, academia, and other advanced manufacturing sectors.

description_zh: 蓝芯智能科技是一家秉持 “技术创新为核，品质坚守为魂” 发展理念的高新技术企业，专注于弹性体 3D 打印设备的全链条研发、生产与销售，为全球客户提供从设备供应到定制化方案的一体化创新升级服务。作为弹性体增材制造领域的新锐力量，公司构建了 “材料 - 设备 - 软件 - 服务” 四位一体的全产业链布局，凭借突破性核心技术与灵活高效的服务模式，快速成为鞋类、运动装备、工业制造、医疗健康、汽车零部件等八大领域的优选合作伙伴，推动弹性体 3D 打印技术从 “小众应用” 向 “规模化普及” 的产业升级，助力客户实现从原型开发到批量生产的高效转型。
description_en: Lanxin Intelligent Technology is a high-tech enterprise committed to 'innovation at the core, quality as the soul.' It pioneers full-stack R&D, manufacturing, and sales of elastomer 3D printing systems. The company has established an integrated ecosystem spanning materials, hardware, software, and services—enabling one-stop innovation upgrades from equipment supply to customized solutions. As a rising leader in elastomer AM, Lanxin serves footwear, sports equipment, industrial manufacturing, medical devices, automotive components, and six additional verticals—accelerating the industry’s shift from niche prototyping to scalable production.

description_zh: Hitem3D是由数美万物（MathMagic）推出的全球领先面向三维创作的高精度模型生成工具。 创作者通过上传单图或多视图，即可一键生成1536^3超高分辨率的三维模型。生成模型可应用于3D打印、工业设计、游戏开发、影视制作、数字孪生等多种场景。
description_en: Hitem3D is a globally leading high-fidelity 3D model generation tool for creative professionals, developed by MathMagic. Users generate ultra-high-resolution (1536³ voxel) 3D models with a single click—using either monocular or multi-view image inputs. Output models are production-ready for 3D printing, industrial design, game development, film & VFX, and digital twin applications.

description_en: Guided by the vision 'Break the Limits of Imagination—Only Gomity,' the company specializes in soft rubber 3D printing, delivering integrated 'equipment + consumables' solutions tailored for footwear and broader soft-material industries. Its end-to-end offerings enhance design freedom, reduce time-to-market, and lower production costs—empowering customers to transcend traditional manufacturing constraints. Through continuous innovation in material diversity and application expansion, Gomity drives widespread adoption and technological advancement of soft-material 3D printing, creating sustainable commercial, societal, and industrial value.

description_zh: 南京长江工业技术研究院有限公司是南航国际创新港内成果转化的运营主体，旨在打造集科技研发、技术转化、人才培养、社会服务“四位一体”的国家级重点创新平台、南京先进制造科教和科技创新高地。在成立以来推动建设7个国家级重点实验室和13个省部级平台，并获得了国家高新技术企业、江苏省专精特新中小企业及武器装备质量管理体系认证、知识产权合规管理体系认证等资质证书。
description_en: Nanjing Changjiang Industrial Technology Research Institute Co., Ltd. is the operational entity for technology transfer within the NUAA International Innovation Port. It aims to establish a national-level integrated innovation platform combining scientific research, technology commercialization, talent cultivation, and social service—positioning Nanjing as a national hub for advanced manufacturing education and technological innovation. Since inception, it has supported the establishment of seven national key laboratories and thirteen provincial/ministerial-level platforms, and holds certifications including National High-Tech Enterprise, Jiangsu Province Specialized, Refined, Distinctive, and Innovative SME, Weapon Equipment Quality Management System, and Intellectual Property Compliance Management System.

description_zh: 深圳嘉立创科技集团股份有限公司（以下简称“公司”）成立于2006年，是立足深圳、全球领先的电子及机械产业一站式基础设施服务提供商，为全球数百万电子工程师提供“一个概念进，一个产品出”的全链路硬件创新服务。作为集团机械业务线自营加工服务项目，嘉立创3D打印实现了集团同源客户与自主拓展客户的双向积累。以数字化制造、线上全流程操作的经营模式，为用户提供高效便捷、性价比优异的增材制造解决方案，不仅能满足各行业快速打样的需求，更可承接中小批量定制、复杂功能件生产等多样化加工需求。 主要服务领域包括：消费电子、工业生产、汽车制造、文创手办、 科教研发、能源设备、医疗器械等多个领域。
description_en: Founded in 2006 and headquartered in Shenzhen, JieLiCang is a world-leading one-stop infrastructure service provider for the electronics and mechanical industries. It delivers full-lifecycle hardware innovation—from concept to finished product—for millions of engineers worldwide. Its in-house 3D printing service leverages shared customer bases and independent market expansion, offering digitally driven, end-to-end online manufacturing. With competitive pricing and rapid turnaround, it supports rapid prototyping, low-to-mid volume custom production, and complex functional part fabrication across consumer electronics, industrial automation, automotive, collectibles, education & research, energy equipment, and medical devices.

description_en: Established in 2014 in Jimo, Qingdao, Yinglong Zhilian is a manufacturer of high-speed non-metal 3D printing systems, developing and producing its own equipment in-house. It operates regional 3D printing service centers integrating CNC machining, CNC sheet metal fabrication, and additive manufacturing—delivering hybrid manufacturing solutions. Its services span high-end sectors including automotive, aerospace, UAVs, intelligent robotics, and medical devices.

name_en: Hangzhou VAST Technology Co., Ltd.

address_en: China/Zhejiang/杭州市
description_zh: VAST成立于2023年3月，是一家专注于通用3D大模型研发的AI公司，致力于通过打造大众级3D内容创作工具建立3D UGC内容平台，使基于3D的空间成为用户体验升级、内容表达创新和新质生产力提升的核心要素。 自2024年初起，VAST持续迭代Tripo大模型。 2025年8月Tripo 3.0正式发布，通过核心算法升级与功能模块优化，参数级别达到200亿，将几何清晰度与细节纹理质感都推向极限。集十亿体素级三维分辨率、任意拓扑结构和高效计算三大能力于一身，用户可轻松还原最复杂的细节与形态，让每一次生成都“毫发毕现”，从此3D生成迈入IMAX新时代。
description_en: VAST, founded in March 2023, is an AI company focused on general-purpose 3D foundation models. Its mission is to democratize 3D content creation by building mass-market tools and a user-generated 3D content platform—making spatial 3D experiences central to UX enhancement, expressive innovation, and next-generation productivity. Since early 2024, VAST has iteratively advanced its Tripo large model; Tripo 3.0, released in August 2025, features a 20-billion-parameter architecture, breakthrough algorithmic enhancements, and optimized functional modules. Delivering billion-voxel resolution, arbitrary topology support, and high computational efficiency, Tripo 3.0 enables pixel-perfect geometric fidelity and texture realism—ushering in the IMAX era of generative 3D.

description_zh: 中山大简科技有限公司成立于2015年，是一家专注于3D打印材料解决方案的供应商，产品涵盖SLA、DLP、LCD光敏树脂和FDM线材等技术领域。 公司核心研发团队由师从中国工程院柴立元院士的欧阳丽伟女士领导，团队成员来自全球知名高校，具备丰富的从业经验。在欧阳丽伟女士的领导下，大简成功研发了30多款高质量的光固化材料和FDM材料，并获得了16余项国内外授权专利。其中，通用型白料、ABS级高韧性材料、高透明材料和铸造材料填补了国内空白，打破了国外垄断。 大简是国家级专精特新小巨人企业，产品远销全球100多个国家和地区，服务于1500多家企业，包括宁德时代、格力和广汽集团等多家世界500强企业。
description_en: Founded in 2015, Zhongshan Dajian is a supplier of comprehensive 3D printing materials, covering SLA, DLP, LCD photopolymers, and FDM filaments. Led by Ms. Liwei Ouyang—a protégée of Academician Liyuan Chai of the Chinese Academy of Engineering—the R&D team comprises experts from globally renowned universities. Under her leadership, Dajian has developed over 30 high-performance photopolymer and FDM materials and secured more than 16 domestic and international patents. Its universal white resin, ABS-grade high-toughness resin, ultra-clear resin, and investment-casting resin have filled critical domestic gaps and broken foreign monopolies. As a national 'Specialized, Refined, Distinctive, and Innovative' Little Giant Enterprise, Dajian exports to 100+ countries and serves 1,500+ enterprises—including CATL, Gree, and GAC Group.

description_zh: 华工激光是中国“激光+智能制造”系统的开创者和引领者，牵头制订“光纤激光器”全球行业标准，是国内唯一实现从芯片到器件、装备、产线、智慧工厂的全产业链布局。技术覆盖激光减材、等材、增材三大材料加工体系，致力于为 3C 电子、半导体芯片、汽车及新能源、船舶制造、商业航天、智慧农业等行业提供“激光+智能制造”全面解决方案。
description_en: Huagong Laser is the pioneer and leader of China’s 'Laser + Intelligent Manufacturing' systems. It spearheaded the formulation of the global industry standard for fiber lasers and remains the only domestic enterprise with vertically integrated capabilities—from laser chips and components to equipment, production lines, and smart factories. Its technology portfolio spans subtractive, formative, and additive laser material processing. Huagong Laser delivers comprehensive 'Laser + Intelligent Manufacturing' solutions for 3C electronics, semiconductor chips, new-energy vehicles, shipbuilding, commercial aerospace, and smart agriculture.

description_zh: 纽氏达特行星传动系统技术(淄博)股份有限公司,总部坐落于山东·淄博,并在苏州、深圳设有生产研发基地,自2006年成立以来,纽氏达特坚持以产品细分为导向,以服务机器人和智能装备新质生产力为目标,围绕机·电·感·软·硬·控关键基础核心零部件创新突破,构建起由点成线，由线成面,由面成网的矩阵式立体化机器人全产业链生态体系,是中国出货量领先的专业行星减速机厂商。公司已荣获国家级专精特新“小巨人”企业等称号，年产能超过75万台，市场占有率稳居国产厂商首位。 主要产品:精密行星减速机、重载行星减速机、微型精密行星减速机、精密柔性复合减速机、精密传动系统模组、中空旋转平台等产品。
description_en: Nuosidate Planetary Transmission Systems Technology (Zibo) Co., Ltd., headquartered in Zibo, Shandong—with R&D and production bases in Suzhou and Shenzhen—is a leading planetary gearbox manufacturer in China. Since its founding in 2006, Nuosidate has pursued component-level innovation across mechanics, electronics, sensing, software, hardware, and control—building a matrix-style, three-dimensional industrial ecosystem for robotics and intelligent equipment. Recognized as a national 'Specialized, Refined, Distinctive, and Innovative' Little Giant Enterprise, it ships over 750,000 units annually and leads domestic market share. Core products include precision planetary gearboxes, heavy-duty planetary gearboxes, micro-precision planetary gearboxes, precision flexible composite gearboxes, precision transmission system modules, and hollow rotary tables.

description_zh: 蚌埠格瑞拓呈恩压缩机制造有限公司是一家专注于中高压压缩机产品研发、生产、销售的专业公司，主要有CNG压缩机、沼气压缩机、煤层气压缩机、页岩气压缩机、PET无油吹瓶压缩机、风冷中高压活塞式压缩机、水冷中高压活塞式压缩机、大排量螺杆活塞串联中高压压缩机、氢气/氮气/氦气/氩气/氧气等特种气体压缩机和油田制氮注气系统。
description_en: Bengbu Grt-Chenen Compressor Manufacturing Co., Ltd. is a specialized enterprise engaged in R&D, manufacturing, and sales of medium- and high-pressure compressors. Its product range includes CNG compressors, biogas compressors, coalbed methane compressors, shale gas compressors, oil-free PET bottle-blowing compressors, air-cooled and water-cooled medium- and high-pressure piston compressors, large-displacement screw-piston series compressors, and specialty gas compressors for hydrogen, nitrogen, helium, argon, and oxygen—as well as oilfield nitrogen generation and injection systems.

description_zh: 华峰集团主导产品聚氨酯原液、聚氨酯树脂、氨纶、超纤合成革等，其产能与市场业绩均居国内甚至全球前列，荣获“中国企业500强”。浙江华峰新材料有限公司隶属于华峰集团， 是全球产销量最大的聚氨酯原液生产企业。专业从事聚氨酯鞋底原液、聚氨酯制品和聚酯多元醇的开发、生产和销售，可应用于鞋材、汽车配件、共享单车、高铁垫片、软泡、工业制造等生产领域。华峰光固化3D打印技术开发始于2019年，系华峰集团旗下最新的业务板块，是基于聚氨酯材料最前沿的技术探索，主营材料研发和生产服务，已经在运动装备、医疗、护具以及工业等领域实现量产应用。
description_en: Zhejiang Huafeng New Materials Co., Ltd., a subsidiary of Huafeng Group, is the world’s largest producer of polyurethane prepolymers. It specializes in R&D and manufacturing of PU sole prepolymers, PU engineered products, and polyester polyols—widely applied in footwear, automotive components, shared bicycles, high-speed rail gaskets, flexible foams, and industrial manufacturing. Since launching its photopolymer 3D printing initiative in 2019—the Group’s newest business vertical—Huafeng has pioneered cutting-edge polyurethane-based photopolymer materials. Its light-curable PU resins are now commercially deployed in sports equipment, medical devices, protective gear, and industrial applications.

description_zh: 德亿纬成立于2022年，是国内最早开展粘结剂喷射3D打印业务的企业。 德亿纬拥有粘结剂喷射3D打印成套解决方案，提供从材料、工艺、产品到装备的研发、代理、销售服务。公司代理各系列工业级粘结剂喷射3D打印装备，可打印各类金属、陶瓷、复合材料。 德亿纬致力于通过粘结剂喷射3D打印技术的革新与应用，助力汽车、医疗、能源、饰品、消费电子、航空航天等领域提升制造效益。 增材新未来，德亿纬抢先探索。
description_en: Founded in 2022, DeYiWei is among China’s earliest providers of binder jetting (BJ) 3D printing solutions. It offers complete BJ systems—including materials, process development, equipment, and finished parts—via in-house R&D, agency partnerships, and direct sales. It distributes industrial-grade BJ printers capable of processing metals, ceramics, and composites. DeYiWei accelerates manufacturing efficiency across automotive, medical, energy, jewelry, consumer electronics, and aerospace through continuous BJ technology innovation and application engineering—leading the exploration of additive manufacturing’s next frontier.

description_zh: 泉州迪科科技有限公司位于美丽的“中国鞋都”福建晋江。公司集3D打印设备和3D打印耗材于一体。是一家高科技企业，从研发、生产、销售、设计3D打印产品到生产，全程提供闭环服务。公司拥有行业资深科研人员、工程技术管理人员等高素质人才队伍，全面实施数字化垂直管理，服务范围涵盖模具、陶瓷、医疗、工艺品、鞋服日用品、汽车配件以及航空航天等领域，公司拥有国内外众多知名品牌客户！公司秉承“匠人精神，制造一流产品”的宗旨，为广大客户提供优质高效的服务。与您携手共创未来！
description_en: Quanzhou Dike Technology Co., Ltd., located in Jinjiang, Fujian—the 'China Shoe Capital'—is a high-tech enterprise integrating 3D printing equipment and consumables development, manufacturing, sales, and design. It delivers closed-loop, end-to-end services supported by senior R&D scientists and engineering management professionals. Digitally enabled vertical integration covers molds, ceramics, medical devices, crafts, footwear & daily goods, automotive parts, and aerospace components. Serving numerous internationally recognized brands, Dike adheres to the 'artisan spirit' philosophy—committed to excellence in product quality and service efficiency, partnering with customers to co-create the future.

description_zh: 数马三维是深圳数马电子技术有限公司旗下专注于三维技术研发与应用的前沿子公司。依托母公司国家级高新技术企业与专精特新“小巨人”企业的雄厚基础，数马三维深度融合光学传感、精密机械及工业自动化等核心技术，致力于为客户提供高精度三维扫描仪、桌面五轴CNC加工中心等智能装备，以及集三维视觉与自动化加工于一体的数字制造解决方案。 公司重视自主研发和创新，拥有完整的自主知识产权体系和质量管理体系，截至2025年3月，数马电子已累计申请国内外专利、软件著作权、集成电路布图等600余项，累计注册商标90余件，覆盖20多个国家和地区。
description_en: Suma 3D, a cutting-edge subsidiary of Shenzhen Suma Electronics Technology Co., Ltd., specializes in R&D and application of 3D technologies. Leveraging its parent company’s status as a National High-Tech Enterprise and a 'Little Giant' enterprise certified for specialization, refinement, uniqueness, and innovation, Suma 3D integrates core technologies including optical sensing, precision mechanics, and industrial automation to deliver high-precision 3D scanners, desktop five-axis CNC machining centers, and integrated digital manufacturing solutions combining 3D vision with automated processing. The company maintains a robust independent R&D capability, comprehensive intellectual property portfolio, and quality management system—holding over 600 patents (including invention patents, software copyrights, and IC layout designs) and 90+ registered trademarks across 20+ countries and regions as of March 2025.

description_zh: 西安优弧智熔增材制造有限公司成立于 2018 年，研发和生产基地位于陕西省西安市高陵区兵器产业基地北方智造产业园 A11 厂房，是一家金属熔丝增材设备制造及增材产品打印服务全套解决方案提供商。 公司由电弧增材制造工艺专家、电气控制专家及材料研发专家等团队共同创办，经过不断创新，突破技术瓶颈，在等离子弧熔丝增材制造（WPAAM）、 弧焊增材制造（WAAM）、激光熔丝增材制造（WLAM）等技术实现突破及应用。公司坚持以用户为中心，以市场为焦点，帮助用户实现最优设计、降低生产成本、提高生产效率、提升产品品质、创造价值。 公司是国内唯一从事等离子弧熔丝增材技术研究的金属 3D 打印公司。
description_en: Xi’an Youhu Zhirong Additive Manufacturing Co., Ltd., established in 2018 and headquartered in the Northern Intelligent Manufacturing Industrial Park (Building A11), Gao陵 District, Xi’an, Shaanxi Province, is a full-solution provider of metal wire arc additive manufacturing (AM) equipment and AM part printing services. Founded by experts in arc-based AM processes, electrical control systems, and materials development, the company has achieved technological breakthroughs in plasma arc wire additive manufacturing (PWAAM), wire arc additive manufacturing (WAAM), and laser wire additive manufacturing (LWAM). It is the only Chinese enterprise exclusively focused on PWAAM research and application. Committed to user-centricity and market orientation, Youhu Zhirong helps customers optimize design, reduce production costs, improve efficiency, enhance product quality, and create value.

name_en: Hunan LuoJia Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备
address_zh: 中国大陆/湖南省/岳阳市/湖南省岳阳市岳阳楼区康王乡木里港科创产业园111号11栋、17栋(总部)
address_en: China/Hunan/岳阳市/湖南省岳阳市岳阳楼区康王乡木里港科创产业园111号11栋、17栋(总部)
description_zh: 湖南珞佳智能科技有限公司成立于2021年，由武汉大学刘胜院士带领的增材制造及智能制造相关技术人才与岳阳经开区轩达公司共同组建，重点聚焦智能制造领域，开展科技成果研发与孵化工作。公司目前主营业务之一为金属增材制造，该业务主要面向航空、航天、医疗、模具、核工业、电子行业以及高校研究所等多个领域，其技术优势在于集成在线检测、闭环反馈以及接触/非接触式改质的先进工艺，通过融合工件表观、内部缺陷、宏观尺度、微观结构等多维度检测手段，并结合接触/非接触材料调质方法，致力于提升工件力学性能，尤其是疲劳力学性能，助力航空航天等领域实现技术突破与产品升级。
description_en: Founded in 2021, Hunan LuoJia Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd. was jointly established by academic talents led by Academician Sheng Liu of Wuhan University—specializing in additive manufacturing and intelligent manufacturing—and Yueyang Economic & Technological Development Zone’s Xuanda Company. Focusing on intelligent manufacturing, the company conducts R&D and incubation of advanced technologies. Its metal additive manufacturing business serves aerospace, defense, medical devices, molds, nuclear industry, electronics, and academic research institutions. Its technical edge lies in integrated in-process monitoring, closed-loop feedback control, and contact/non-contact material modification—leveraging multi-dimensional inspection (surface appearance, internal defects, macro-scale geometry, microstructure) combined with tailored material conditioning to significantly enhance mechanical performance—particularly fatigue resistance—enabling technological breakthroughs and product upgrades in demanding sectors.

description_zh: 华博智材科技(台州)有限公司是一家主要从事3D打印材料以及各类环境友好型生物降解材料的研发、生产、销售于一体的科技型企业。公司主打产品包括PLA、PETG、尼龙碳纤等各类环保及高性能FDM打印耗材，广泛应用于消费品、艺术品、教育、工业等领域。产品远销海内十几个国家。致力于提供高质量、环保、可持续的3D打印耗材，助力3 D打印行业的发展。华博智材积极响应国家环保政策，研发出一系列绿色生物3D打印材料，为我国环保事业贡献力量。华博智材耗材不仅种类多样，还具有优良的加工性能和一致性，能够满足不同行业的需求。公司通过与知名高校和科研机构合作，不断探索材料的极限，保持其在行业内的领先地位。
description_en: Huabo Smart Materials (Taizhou) Co., Ltd. is a technology-driven enterprise engaged in the R&D, production, and sales of 3D printing materials and eco-friendly biodegradable polymers. Core products include PLA, PETG, and carbon-fiber-reinforced nylon—high-performance, environmentally sustainable FDM filaments widely adopted in consumer goods, art, education, and industrial applications. Products are exported to over a dozen countries. Huabo actively aligns with national environmental policies, pioneering green biopolymer 3D printing materials to support China’s sustainability goals. With diverse formulations offering excellent processability and batch-to-batch consistency, its materials meet stringent requirements across industries. Strategic collaborations with leading universities and research institutes enable continuous material innovation and sustained leadership in the field.

description_zh: 东莞市智赢智能装备有限公司是一家专注于智能控制与运动部件的国家高新技术企业，主导产品为直线电机、直线模组、DD马达、驱动器、编码器，可提供工业运动控制一站式解决方案，下游客户包括半导体设备、新能源设备、面板显示设备、医疗器械、3C设备等精密自动化行业的知名企业。公司配备有先进的研发、生产设备及检测仪器，通过了ISO9001、ISO45001、ISO14001、欧盟CE、ROSH等体系认证和产品认证，拥有发明专利、实用新型专利、软件著作权等各项知识产权授权共87项（截止2024.10月），并荣获国家级专精特新“小巨人”称号。
description_en: Dongguan Zhiwin Intelligent Equipment Co., Ltd. is a National High-Tech Enterprise specializing in intelligent motion control and precision motion components. Its flagship products include linear motors, linear modules, direct-drive (DD) motors, servo drives, and encoders—offering end-to-end industrial motion control solutions. Key customers span semiconductor equipment, new-energy equipment, flat-panel display manufacturing, medical devices, and 3C electronics. Equipped with state-of-the-art R&D, production, and metrology facilities, the company holds ISO 9001, ISO 45001, ISO 14001, CE, and RoHS certifications. As of October 2024, it holds 87 intellectual property rights—including invention patents, utility model patents, and software copyrights—and has been designated a National 'Little Giant' enterprise for specialization, refinement, uniqueness, and innovation.

description_zh: 东莞爱的三维科技有限公司现位于东莞市东坑镇东坑科技路195号3栋701室，公司面积15000㎡，是一家集研发、生产、销售为一体的3D打印材料与胶黏剂的现代化企业。公司现有员工140余名，研发团队占比20%，其中数人具有国内、国外博士或硕士学历，并有在国际一流化工企业中从事本专业研究和实践数十年的经验，是一支具备强大的研发能力、创新能力、大批量生产能力的高效率团队。我们致力于向客户提供优秀解决方案和产品定制化服务，可根据客户的要求对产品各项性能进行重新设计和优化。
description_en: Dongguan AiDe 3D Technology Co., Ltd., located at No. 195 Keji Road, Dongkeng Town, Dongguan City (15,000 m² facility), is a modern enterprise integrating R&D, manufacturing, and sales of 3D printing materials and adhesives. With 140+ employees—including a 20% R&D team comprising PhDs and MScs from top domestic and international institutions, many with decades of experience at world-class chemical enterprises—the company delivers high-efficiency, scalable, and innovative solutions. AiDe provides customized product development and performance optimization services, tailoring material properties precisely to client specifications.

description_zh: 安徽丰原生物技术股份有限公司成立于2016年10月11日，是国家生物基材料行业“链主”企业、国家“专精特新”小巨人企业、国家绿色供应链管理企业、2024全球独角兽企业，建有国家绿色工厂、安徽省生物基材料重点行业工业互联网平台。公司设有发酵技术国家工程研究中心、安徽省聚乳酸新材料制造业创新中心、安徽省企业技术中心、安徽省博士后科研工作站，并与农业农村部合作共建农膜污染防控重点实验室、与中国农业科学院合作共建全生物降解地膜研发推广中心、与安徽省邮政管理局合作共建安徽省绿色快递包装示范制造联合实验室。公司现已发展成为国内生物基材料和生物化学品产业链最全、产业规模最大、技术最领先的龙头企业。
description_en: Anhui BBCA Biotechnology Co., Ltd., founded on October 11, 2016, is the national industry 'chain leader' in bio-based materials, a National 'Little Giant' enterprise, a National Green Supply Chain Management Enterprise, and a 2024 Global Unicorn. It operates a National Green Factory and the Anhui Provincial Bio-based Materials Industry Internet Platform. The company hosts the National Engineering Research Center for Fermentation Technology, the Anhui Provincial Innovation Center for Polylactic Acid (PLA) New Materials, the Anhui Provincial Enterprise Technology Center, and the Anhui Provincial Postdoctoral Research Workstation. It collaborates with the Ministry of Agriculture and Rural Affairs on the Key Laboratory for Agricultural Film Pollution Prevention, with the Chinese Academy of Agricultural Sciences on the Full-Biodegradable Mulch Film R&D & Promotion Center, and with the Anhui Provincial Postal Administration on the Anhui Green Express Packaging Demonstration Manufacturing Joint Laboratory. BBCA is now China’s leading enterprise in bio-based materials and biochemicals—boasting the most complete industrial chain, largest scale, and most advanced technology.

description_zh: 曼界创意 | 3D 打印生活馆：让科技与创意触手可及 欢迎踏入曼界创意的 3D 打印美学空间 这里是由创新驱动的 3D 打印生活馆，更是连接科技与艺术的灵感枢纽。我们以增材智造技术为笔，以无限创意为墨，为 3D 打印爱好者构筑一个充满想象的造物世界。 在曼界创意站，1000余款依托 3D 打印工艺匠心淬炼的产品，已构建起丰盈多元的生态矩阵。其业务范畴深度覆盖艺术收藏领域的限量珍品、萌宠主题的精致模型摆件、兼具设计感与实用性的时尚配饰，以及引领潮流风向的鞋帽单品等多元维度，以科技与美学的融合重构创意产品的边界。
description_en: Manjie Creative | 3D Printing Lifestyle Studio: Where technology meets creativity. Manjie Creative is an innovation-driven 3D printing lifestyle studio and an inspirational hub bridging science and art. Leveraging additive manufacturing as its creative medium, it empowers 3D printing enthusiasts with an imaginative, hands-on making ecosystem. Its curated catalog features 1,000+ meticulously crafted 3D-printed products spanning limited-edition art collectibles, premium pet-themed figurines, fashion-forward accessories blending aesthetics and utility, and trendsetting footwear and headwear—redefining creative product boundaries through seamless integration of technology and design.

description_zh: 青岛赛飞装备有限公司成立于2020年，是一家面向航空、航天、舰船及能源装备等领域高端精密制造的科技型企业。公司与乌克兰国家科学院巴顿焊接研究所深度联合，将巴顿所国际先进的热加工成套技术（增材制造、冶炼、焊接等技术）引入中国，为用户提供钛合金、锆合金、铌合金、钼合金、钽合金、钨合金、钛铝金属间化合物及陶瓷等材料的高精密度、高可靠性产品。全球首创的"电子束动能锻造技术"，采用五轴系统，适用于多种难熔材料增材制造，可以实现低应力超大尺寸高效打印，实际性能水准得到有效提升。采用本系统打印钛合金、铌合金及高温合金等材料部件，经专业机构及用户评价，达到并超过了航空锻件质量标准，实际性能超过锻件水准。
description_en: Qingdao Saifei Equipment Co., Ltd., founded in 2020, is a high-precision manufacturing technology enterprise serving aerospace, defense, marine, and energy equipment sectors. In deep collaboration with Ukraine’s Paton Welding Institute (National Academy of Sciences), Saifei introduces internationally advanced thermal processing technologies—including additive manufacturing, smelting, and welding—to China. It produces high-precision, high-reliability components from titanium, zirconium, niobium, molybdenum, tantalum, tungsten alloys, titanium aluminides, and ceramics. Its globally pioneering Electron Beam Kinetic Forging (EBKF) technology—a five-axis system enabling low-stress, large-format, high-efficiency AM of refractory metals—delivers mechanical performance exceeding aerospace forging standards, as validated by third-party testing and end-user evaluation.

description_zh: 绵阳九方智能装备科技有限公司位于四川省江油市高新技术产业园区，是一家集研发、生产、销售、服务于一体的超细粉体工程设备系统集成商。 公司拥有专业的技术研发团队、工业化实验室、先进的检测中心；先后取得了40余项专利授权、10余项软件著作权，并通过了武器装备质量管理体系认证及三体系认证，被认定为“国家高新技术企业”、“四川省专精特新中小企业”、“四川省省级企业技术中心”。 公司长期致力于为国内外客户提供超细粉体工程设备，其生产的高超音速气流粉碎机、高精气流分级机、分级式冲击磨、颗粒整形机等几大类产品在粉末冶金、硬质合金与先进陶瓷、锂电正负极材料等领域得到了广泛的应用和认可。
description_en: Mianyang JiuFang Intelligent Equipment Technology Co., Ltd., located in Jiangyou Hi-Tech Industrial Park, Sichuan Province, is a system integrator specializing in ultrafine powder engineering equipment. The company maintains a professional R&D team, pilot-scale industrial laboratories, and an advanced testing center. It holds over 40 patents, 10+ software copyrights, and certifications including the Weapon Equipment Quality Management System (GJB9001) and ISO 9001/14001/45001. Recognized as a National High-Tech Enterprise, a Sichuan Provincial 'Little Giant' SME, and a Sichuan Provincial Enterprise Technology Center, JiuFang’s flagship products—including hypersonic jet mills, high-precision air classifiers,分级-type impact mills, and particle-shaping machines—are widely deployed in powder metallurgy, cemented carbides, advanced ceramics, and lithium-ion battery cathode/anode material production.

Boso advances the industrial-scale adoption of eco-materials through proprietary technology. It currently operates a 15,000-ton annual capacity for CPLA modified compounds and a 7,500-ton annual capacity for cast biodegradable films—supplying globally certified green, sustainable materials to international markets.

description_zh: 原铸三维科技专注于DLP 3D打印弹性体技术，依托西北工业大学、西安交通大学等高校研发资源，构建了覆盖软硬件开发、材料研发与工艺创新的全链条自主技术团队，是国内少数具备工业级DLP技术自主研制与产业化能力的企业。 公司坚持核心技术自主可控，自主研发专业打印软件，突破传统配方壁垒，已形成从材料制备、打印成型到后处理的完整生产流程，实现技术全环节自主掌控。依托校企连研沉淀与全产业链布局，我们可提供高精度、高柔性、高适配性的DLP 3D打印整体解决方案，精准满足各行业对柔性成型、高强度塑料件及定制化制造的需求，以创新技术赋能智能制造，为客户创造更高价值。
description_en: Yuanzhu 3D Technology specializes in DLP-based 3D printing of elastomers. Leveraging R&D resources from Northwestern Polytechnical University and Xi’an Jiaotong University, it has built an end-to-end in-house technical team covering hardware/software development, photopolymer formulation, and process engineering—making it one of few domestic enterprises with full industrial-grade DLP technology R&D and commercialization capabilities. Yuanzhu maintains strict core technology autonomy, having developed proprietary slicing software and overcome conventional resin formulation limitations. Its vertically integrated workflow—from material synthesis and DLP printing to post-processing—ensures full technical control. Through university-industry collaboration and full-chain deployment, Yuanzhu delivers high-precision, highly flexible, and application-adaptive DLP 3D printing solutions—meeting diverse industry needs for soft-part fabrication, high-strength plastic components, and mass-customized manufacturing.

description_zh: 深圳市大族光子激光技术有限公司（简称：大族光子），是大族激光科 技产业集团股份有限公司旗下全资子公司，专业从事连续光纤激光器的研 发、生产、销售和服务，是国家级高新技术企业，同时也是全球为数不多 的、具备垂直整合能力的光纤激光器制造商。 大族光子坚持自主创新、夯实核心技术的先进理念，拥有集光学、材 料、电气、机械及软件等不同领域的研发专家，具备从半导体泵浦源、特种 光纤、激光器核心器件、整机研发到技术应用的垂直整合能力。公司光纤激 光器产品涵盖中、高功率段，已获得国家科技成果鉴定及百余项技术专利， 并广泛应用于激光切割、激光焊接、激光熔覆、增材制造、激光清洗等工业领域。
description_en: Shenzhen Han's Photon Laser Technology Co., Ltd. ('Han's Photon'), a wholly owned subsidiary of Han's Laser Technology Industry Group Co., Ltd., is a National High-Tech Enterprise specializing in the R&D, manufacturing, sales, and service of continuous-wave fiber lasers. As one of the world’s few vertically integrated fiber laser manufacturers, Han's Photon excels in core component development—including semiconductor pump sources, specialty fibers, and laser cavity optics—as well as system-level design and industrial application engineering. Its product portfolio spans medium- to high-power segments, backed by national scientific achievement appraisals and over 100 technical patents. Applications include laser cutting, welding, cladding, additive manufacturing (e.g., LPBF), and laser cleaning.

description_en: Zhejiang Enst Transmission Co., Ltd. is a specialized manufacturer of linear bearings, linear shafts, and linear guide rails. Its precision motion components serve diverse industrial sectors—including automation equipment, automotive, construction machinery, textiles, tobacco processing, mining/metallurgy, and robotics. Staffed by industry veterans with deep expertise in linear motion systems, Enst combines refined technical know-how, extensive production experience, and acute market insight to deliver professional technical consultation and after-sales support throughout clients’ design, manufacturing, and maintenance cycles.

description_en: Founded in 2015, Qiyu Technology is an industry-leading provider of ceramic 3D printing solutions. Its R&D team comprises PhDs from world-renowned universities, with profound expertise in ceramic additive manufacturing. The company has secured over 20 invention patents and published numerous seminal academic papers in the field. Qiyu’s breakthrough innovations in equipment and materials form a solid foundation for sustained technical support and turnkey solutions. It collaborates deeply with 200+ global research institutions and industrial manufacturers and contributes to the formulation of national standards for ceramic materials.

Its core team emerged from leading domestic and international laboratories, combining strong in-house R&D with strategic partnerships across top-tier Chinese research institutions. Its comprehensive material portfolio includes ceramics and ceramic matrix composites (CMCs), high-performance metals, and advanced polymers—enabling fully customized, optimized technical solutions aligned to domain-specific user requirements.

description_zh: 上海飞博激光科技股份有限公司，致力于研发、生产和销售光纤激光器及为用户提供专业服务和优异工艺解决方案。 成立至今，连续4次获批高新技术企业，并先后获得小巨人企业、国家级专精特新企业等荣誉和称号。 现有3D打印、点环能量可调(PAM)、2μm掺铥、风冷、精密、高功率窄线宽、线偏等系列产品，广泛应用于3D打印及增材制造、新能源汽车、钣金加工、工程机械、医疗医美、科研等行业。
description_en: Shanghai Fibercore Laser Technology Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells fiber lasers while delivering professional services and superior process solutions. Certified as a National High-Tech Enterprise four times consecutively, it holds accolades including 'Little Giant' and National Specialized, Refined, Unique, and Innovative (SRUI) Enterprise designations. Its product lines include 3D printing–optimized lasers, point-and-ring energy-adjustable (PAM) lasers, 2-μm thulium-doped lasers, air-cooled lasers, precision lasers, high-power narrow-linewidth lasers, and linearly polarized lasers—widely applied in additive manufacturing, new-energy vehicles, sheet-metal fabrication, construction machinery, medical/aesthetic devices, and scientific research.

description_zh: 翼视（江苏）科创发展有限公司是国内领先的科研成果产业化加速器和复合型应用人才培养基地。核心团队致力于为工业自动化、航空航天、文化旅游等战略新兴产业提供专业的3D打印增材制造及三维扫描、工业产品设计全流程解决方案。翼视科创以强大的研发与产业化能力，发展成为集研发、生产、销售和服务于一体的高科技企业。在增材制造领域，翼视科创自2021年启动ANYRAID项目，开始自主研发行业级3D打印装备。于24年推出鸿影ONE高速打印机；针对农场制造需求，率先推出了部署便利同时具备热管理和空气管理的鸿影 310 FDM 集群生产系统；在26年中，将推出具备大尺寸恒温舱和高速打印性能的全新行业应用产品鸿影500。
description_en: Yishi (Jiangsu) Sci-Tech Development Co., Ltd. is a leading accelerator for industrializing scientific research outcomes and a hub for cultivating interdisciplinary application talent. Its core team delivers end-to-end 3D printing and additive manufacturing solutions—including 3D scanning and industrial product design—for strategic emerging sectors such as industrial automation, aerospace, and cultural tourism. Since launching the ANYRAID project in 2021, Yishi has independently developed industrial-grade 3D printers: the Hongying ONE high-speed printer (2024), the Hongying 310 FDM cluster production system—featuring rapid deployment, thermal management, and air management (optimized for farm manufacturing)—and the upcoming Hongying 500 (2026), featuring a large-format constant-temperature chamber and high-speed printing performance.

name_zh: 三维流动贸易（上海）有限公司
name_en: FLOW-3D China Co., Ltd.
address_zh: 中国大陆/江苏省/苏州市/江苏省苏州市工业园区苏州大道西9号中海财富中心西塔2203室
address_en: China/Jiangsu/苏州市/江苏省苏州市工业园区苏州大道西9号中海财富中心西塔2203室
description_zh: 三维流动贸易（上海）有限公司是美国FLOW-3D软件中国子公司。FLOW-3D软件公司（Flow Science）是自由液面追踪技术VOF的创始公司，其CFD仿真技术广泛应用于增材制造、激光焊接、金属铸造、水利环境及航空航天等领域。 FLOW-3D AM软件基于离散元方法（DEM）和计算流体动力学（CFD）为各种增材制造过程提供建模平台，包括粉末床熔融、定向能量沉积、黏结剂喷射以及材料挤出等。FLOW-3D AM的自由液面跟踪算法和多物理场建模功能可高精度模拟铺粉、熔池动力学、孔隙形成、渗透和扩散，分析和优化工艺参数。
description_en: FLOW-3D China Co., Ltd. is the Chinese subsidiary of Flow Science, Inc., the pioneer of the Volume-of-Fluid (VOF) free-surface tracking method. Its CFD simulation technology is widely applied in additive manufacturing, laser welding, metal casting, hydraulic and environmental engineering, and aerospace. FLOW-3D AM—a modeling platform built on discrete element method (DEM) and computational fluid dynamics (CFD)—supports various AM processes including powder bed fusion (PBF), directed energy deposition (DED), binder jetting, and material extrusion. Its advanced free-surface tracking algorithm and multiphysics modeling capabilities enable high-fidelity simulation of powder spreading, melt pool dynamics, pore formation, infiltration, and diffusion—facilitating process parameter analysis and optimization.

description_zh: 诺曼比尔公司是一家专注于真空热处理技术发展和应用的企业。企业于2017年11月在苏州成立，并已在华南地区设立分公司，同时在昆山建立了热处理实验中心。 诺曼比尔对外提供专业的热处理设备、工艺验证和加工服务，助力客户加速研发与生产进程。 在医疗应用这一关键领域，诺曼比尔已合作超过75家企业和院校。我们深刻理解医疗器械认证的严苛要求，在客户漫长的产品取证数据验证阶段，提供持续、可靠的热处理技术支持，成为其坚实的后盾。
description_en: Normabil Materials Technology Co., Ltd., established in November 2017 in Suzhou, is a specialist in vacuum heat treatment technology development and application. With a branch in South China and a dedicated heat treatment testing center in Kunshan, the company provides professional heat treatment equipment, process validation, and contract processing services to accelerate R&D and production for clients. In the critical medical device sector, Normabil has partnered with over 75 enterprises and academic institutions. Recognizing the stringent regulatory requirements for medical device certification, it delivers continuous, reliable heat treatment technical support throughout customers’ lengthy product qualification and data validation phases.

description_zh: 光速一构智能科技为了解决传统工业级3D打印机速度慢、性能差、成本高等问题，研发了超高速液体光固化3D打印技术。 公司专注于弹性体增材制造领域，集成了“弹性体材料-核心零部件-打印机整机-工艺及服务“完整的弹性体增材制造整体解决方案，可以帮助客户快速搭建可量产的柔性“弹性体产品3D打印智能工厂”。 我们位于南通如皋市的首个“样板工厂”已经投入使用，在为客户提供硬件解决方案的同时，可以为客户提供软件、培训和服务的一体化解决方案.
description_en: LightSpeed OneForm Intelligent Technology (Hangzhou) Co., Ltd. developed ultra-high-speed liquid photopolymerization 3D printing technology to overcome limitations of conventional industrial 3D printers—including low speed, suboptimal performance, and high cost. Specializing in elastomer additive manufacturing, the company offers an integrated end-to-end solution covering elastomer materials, core components, full-system printers, process development, and service support—enabling customers to rapidly deploy scalable, flexible 'elastomer product 3D printing smart factories.' Its first demonstration factory in Rugao, Nantong, is operational and delivers hardware, software, training, and service as a unified solution.

description_zh: 济南铭品机电设备有限公司位于美丽的泉城--济南，是一家集研发、生产、销售为一体的生产冷水机以及各种精密温控设备的规范化企业。产品主要应用于各种不同功率的工业用3D打印设备激光雕刻机，激光切割机及光纤激光机等专业领域，广泛服务于服装、制鞋、皮革、广告、印刷、打标、模具、化工、玩具、水产、等行业。公司成立以来，秉着诚信至上的经营理念，致力于研发、生产高标准、高质量的多种制冷设备。 经过多年的发展，公司内部已经拥有了一支集研发、生产、质检、销售于一体的精英团队，本公司研发生产的冷水机和制冷设备得到了国内外厂商的信赖。向客户提供高品质高质量的产品，诚心诚意地为客户服务，是我们一贯的宗旨
description_en: Jinan Mingpin Electromechanical Equipment Co., Ltd., headquartered in Jinan—the 'City of Springs'—is a standardized enterprise integrating R&D, manufacturing, and sales of industrial chillers and precision temperature-control equipment. Its products serve diverse high-power industrial applications, including 3D printers, laser engravers, laser cutters, and fiber laser systems, across industries such as apparel, footwear, leather, advertising, printing, marking, molds, chemicals, toys, and aquaculture. Committed to integrity-driven innovation, the company develops and manufactures high-standard, high-quality refrigeration equipment. It maintains an elite team spanning R&D, production, quality assurance, and sales; its chillers and cooling systems are trusted by domestic and international manufacturers.

description_en: Guangzhou Deqing Optical Technology Co., Ltd., founded in 2017 in Guangzhou, is a national high-tech enterprise specializing in R&D and manufacturing of automated laser processing auxiliary equipment. The company focuses on real-time in-process monitoring and control technologies for laser welding, laser surface treatment, and additive manufacturing—delivering comprehensive quality assurance from pre-weld through post-weld stages.

description_zh: 启源视觉成立于2021年，总部位于杭州未来科技城，在国家级重大项目园区-浙江·诸暨视觉产业园建设有现代化精密仪器制造工厂，是一家专注三维机器视觉和人工智能领域的高新技术企业，致力于提供高精度三维人脸识别、三维数字化、三维测量产品及行业解决方案，推动计量级三维视觉技术的普及。团队核心成员均来自行业头部企业，专注高精度测量领域，积累超过十年的AI计量领域深耕经验，在算法的研发与应用方面具有独到优势。公司已通过ISO 9001:2015质量管理体系、ISO 14001:2015环境管理体系及ISO 45001:2018职业健康安全管理体系，并获得了欧盟CE、、美国FCC、RoHS认证等国际权威资质。
description_en: Hangzhou Qiyuan Vision Technology Co., Ltd., established in 2021 and headquartered in Hangzhou Future Tech City, operates a modern precision instrumentation manufacturing facility at Zhejiang Zhuji Vision Industry Park—a national key project site. As a high-tech enterprise focused on 3D machine vision and artificial intelligence, it delivers metrology-grade 3D facial recognition, 3D digitization, and 3D measurement products and industry-specific solutions. Its core team—drawn from leading industry players—brings over a decade of deep expertise in AI-powered metrology and algorithm development. The company is certified to ISO 9001:2015 (Quality), ISO 14001:2015 (Environmental), and ISO 45001:2018 (Occupational Health & Safety), and holds CE, FCC, and RoHS certifications.

description_zh: 新乡市先锋振动机械有限公司成立于2013年，现注册资本2010万元人民币。是一家集研发，加工制造与服务为一体的创新型振动筛厂家，公司位于有“振动机械之乡”美誉的新乡市，境内交通便利，资源丰富。 先锋振动自创业以来，始终坚持借鉴、消化、吸收、创新等原则，产品日臻完善成熟，产品遍布全国远销北美、俄罗斯、日本、韩国、巴基斯坦、马来西亚等多个地区国家。我们积极倡导以市场为向导，以科研为龙头，以创新为手段，积极开拓国内外市场。
description_en: Xinxiang Pioneer Vibration Machinery Co., Ltd., founded in 2013 with registered capital of RMB 20.1 million, is an innovative manufacturer of vibratory screening equipment integrating R&D, precision machining, and after-sales service. Located in Xinxiang—renowned as China’s 'Hometown of Vibratory Machinery'—the company leverages convenient transportation and abundant resources. Adhering to principles of technology introduction, digestion, absorption, and independent innovation, Pioneer Vibration has continuously refined its product portfolio, achieving broad domestic market penetration and export to North America, Russia, Japan, South Korea, Pakistan, Malaysia, and other regions. It champions market-oriented strategies, science-driven R&D leadership, and innovation-led global expansion.

name_en: Ningbo Institute of Materials Technology and Engineering, Chinese Academy of Sciences
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备
address_zh: 中国大陆/浙江省/宁波市/浙江省宁波市镇海区中官西路1219号
address_en: China/Zhejiang/宁波市/浙江省宁波市镇海区中官西路1219号
description_zh: 中国科学院宁波材料技术与工程研究所（简称宁波材料所）成立于2004年，由中国科学院与浙江省、宁波市共建，聚焦材料技术、新能源、先进制造及生物医学工程，构建从基础研究到产业化的全链条创新体系。现有员工960余人，含院士8人、杰青7人，承担科研项目7300余项，材料科学进入全球前1‰，授权专利4100余件。 激光极端制造研究中心成立于2022年6月，隶属于宁波材料所，已建成浙江省重点实验室，牵头国家级项目20��项，在研经费约4亿元。中心聚焦难加工材料及结构的激光高效加工，并培育多材料增材制造等前沿方向，致力于突破千瓦飞秒加工等核心技术，建成难加工材料结构变革性激光制造示范线，服务国家重大战略需求。
description_en: The Ningbo Institute of Materials Technology and Engineering (NIMTE), Chinese Academy of Sciences—established in 2004 through joint construction by CAS, Zhejiang Province, and Ningbo Municipality—focuses on materials science, new energy, advanced manufacturing, and biomedical engineering. It operates a full-chain innovation system bridging fundamental research to industrialization. With over 960 staff—including 8 academicians and 7 National Distinguished Young Scholars—it has undertaken more than 7,300 research projects; its materials science discipline ranks within the global top 1‰, and it holds over 4,100 authorized patents. The Laser Extreme Manufacturing Research Center, founded in June 2022 under NIMTE, hosts a Zhejiang Provincial Key Laboratory and leads 20 national-level projects, with ~RMB 400 million in active R&D funding. The Center pioneers high-efficiency laser processing of hard-to-machine materials and structures, advances multi-material additive manufacturing, targets breakthroughs in kilowatt-class femtosecond laser processing, and aims to establish a transformative laser manufacturing demonstration line for hard-to-machine components—supporting major national strategic initiatives.
