description_zh: 博瑞科三维源于德国Breuckmann公司，Breuckmann成立于1986年，自2009年进入中国3D行业。博瑞科三维致力于提供全三维技术解决方案。从工业工程设计，到全材料的3D打印服务和三维扫描，均是我们的业务范围，历经十余年行业历程，积累2000多个项目经验；涉及医疗、机械制造、复合材料、航空航天、教科研等多个行业领域，服务客户近千位，包括清华大学，浙江大学，同济大学等国内重点高校，也包括奔驰，大众等制造行业领军企业。
description_en: Qingdao Borike Additive Manufacturing Co., Ltd. originates from German company Breuckmann GmbH (founded 1986), which entered China’s 3D industry in 2009. Borike provides comprehensive 3D technology solutions—from industrial engineering design and full-material 3D printing services to 3D scanning. With over a decade of industry experience, it has completed 2,000+ projects across healthcare, mechanical engineering, composites, aerospace, education, and scientific research. Its client base includes top-tier universities such as Tsinghua, Zhejiang, and Tongji Universities, and industry leaders including Mercedes-Benz and Volkswagen.

description_zh: 上海普利生三维科技有限成立于2005年，是一家3D打印一站式解决方案的供应商，专业从事微纳3D打印机的研发、生产、制造，以及微纳3D打印产品的批量化生产。 公司自主研发并销售的微纳3D打印机以2微米精度领先全球，除此之外，还有5微米、10微米、20微米等精度的3D打印设备。支持多样化的打印材质，包括光敏树脂、陶瓷、金属，可以同时满足不同应用在产品精度和材料性能上的要求。 上海普利生三维科技有限公司的亚像素微扫描技术解决了微纳3D打印光源依赖进口的问题，实现了整套3D打印设备的国产化。微纳3D打印的产品已经实现了批量化生产，包括微流控芯片、手术器械中的精密陶瓷绝缘件、医美用的微针产品。
description_en: Shanghai Pro3dure 3D Technology Co., Ltd., established in 2005, is a one-stop supplier of micro- and nano-scale 3D printing solutions, specializing in R&D, manufacturing, and mass production of micro/nano 3D printers and printed parts. Its proprietary micro/nano 3D printers achieve a world-leading resolution of 2 µm, with additional models offering 5 µm, 10 µm, and 20 µm resolutions. Compatible with photosensitive resins, ceramics, and metals, these systems meet diverse application requirements for both dimensional accuracy and material performance. Leveraging proprietary sub-pixel micro-scanning technology, Pro3dure resolved reliance on imported light sources—achieving full localization of its micro/nano 3D printing platforms. Mass production is already realized for applications including microfluidic chips, precision ceramic insulators for surgical instruments, and microneedles for aesthetic medicine.

description_zh: 雷孚斯集团（LEHVOSS Group）1894年成立于德国汉堡，是一家拥有120多年历史的以技术为导向的特种化学品与定制化材料生产商。雷孚斯3D打印材料基于集团在高性能改性塑料领域近40年的经验积淀，在全球同类产品中处于技术领先地位。

LEHVOSS 3D printing materials build upon the Group’s nearly 40 years of expertise in high-performance modified plastics, positioning them at the global technological forefront in this segment.

description_zh: 必趣创新旗下拥有BIQU 和 BIGTREETECH两大品牌，专注于适配主流桌面打印机的高性能升级配件与3D打印DIY硬件领域。 自2015年创立以来，必趣始终通过持续创新与完善的配件售后支持，致力于为用户带来稳定、可靠且高品质的打印体验。 截至目前，BIQU 已斩获 100 余项专利，服务用户超过 300 万人，业务覆盖 100 多个国家和地区。 秉承“不止于升级，致力于体验”的品牌理念，BIGTREETECH 与 BIQU 始终作为值得信赖的 3D 打印升级专家伙伴，为全球创客社区提供高品质、可靠且高性价比的解决方案。
description_en: Biqu Innovation Technology (Shenzhen) Co., Ltd. operates two flagship brands—BIQU and BIGTREETECH—focused on high-performance upgrade kits and DIY hardware for mainstream desktop 3D printers. Since its founding in 2015, Biqu has consistently delivered stable, reliable, and high-quality printing experiences through sustained innovation and comprehensive aftermarket support. BIQU holds over 100 patents and serves more than 3 million users across 100+ countries and regions. Guided by its philosophy 'Beyond Upgrades—Focused on Experience,' BIGTREETECH and BIQU serve as trusted 3D printing upgrade partners for the global maker community—providing high-value, reliable, and cost-effective solutions.

description_zh: 麓邦公司创立于2018年，专注于光学元件、光学模组、光学系统与光学仪器的研发、生产和销售，致力于为光学领域科研人员提供更高端、更精准、更前沿的综合产品和解决方案，是国家级专精特新“小巨人”企业。麓邦公司坚持以成就客户为中心、与用户共成长，数年来已服务200余所高校及科研院所、300余家创新型企业的30,000多名科研人员。
description_en: Lumina Optics Technology Co., Ltd., founded in 2018, specializes in the R&D, manufacturing, and sales of optical components, modules, systems, and instruments. As a national-level specialized, refined, distinctive, and innovative 'Little Giant' enterprise, Lumina delivers premium, precise, and cutting-edge optical solutions for scientific researchers. Customer-centric and growth-oriented, Lumina has served over 200 universities and research institutes and more than 300 innovative enterprises—supporting over 30,000 scientists and engineers.

description_zh: 盘星新型合金材料（常州）有限公司（简称盘星新金属）成立于2018年，是盘固集团的重要成员企业，致力于高品质球形金属粉末及其材料的研发和生产，拥有自主核心知识产权，面向国内外市场，为客户提供标准金属粉末产品及定 制化高性能粉末产品。 盘星新金属是研发型新材料制造企业，与南京理工大学合作成立了经验丰富、具有行业领导力的研发团队，建设了从材料设计、熔炼、成型、制粉、打印到测试的全流程硬件设施和闭环研发体系，拥有行业中独树一帜的研发能力，努力成为全球金属增材制造材料专家。
description_en: Panxing New Alloy Materials (Changzhou) Co., Ltd. ('Panxing New Metals'), established in 2018 as a core member of the Panggu Group, focuses on R&D and production of high-quality spherical metal powders and advanced alloys. Holding autonomous core intellectual property, it supplies standardized spherical metal powders and customized high-performance powders to global markets. As a R&D-intensive new materials manufacturer, Panxing New Metals collaborates with Nanjing University of Science and Technology to form an industry-leading R&D team. It operates a fully integrated, closed-loop hardware infrastructure and R&D system—from materials design and melting to forming, powder production, AM printing, and testing—establishing a unique competitive advantage in the field and striving to become a globally recognized expert in metal AM materials.

description_zh: 河北依铂新材料科技有限公司位于河北省故城县高新产业技术开发区，是一家涵盖金属粉末材料类研发、制造加工和销售的全面专业的创新型企业。公司引进真空雾化、电极感应雾化制粉技术，主要从事铁合金、钛合金、高温合金、铝合金、铜合金、钴铬合金等应用于航空航天、兵器工业、汽车制造、生物医疗、工业模具等多种领域材料的研发、生产、销售，并针对客户需求，提供高品质金属粉末个性化定制服务和金属粉末成分性能检测服务，致力于打造为中国领先的金属3D打印解决方案供应商。
description_en: Hebei Yibo New Materials Technology Co., Ltd., located in Gucheng County High-Tech Industrial Development Zone, Hebei Province, is a comprehensive, innovative enterprise specializing in R&D, manufacturing, and sales of metal powder materials. Equipped with vacuum atomization and electrode induction melting atomization (EIGA) technologies, the company develops, produces, and sells iron-based alloys, titanium alloys, superalloys, aluminum alloys, copper alloys, and cobalt-chromium alloys for aerospace, defense, automotive, biomedical, and industrial mold applications. It provides personalized high-performance metal powder customization and compositional/property testing services—committed to becoming China’s leading provider of metal 3D printing solutions.

description_zh: 西安欧中材料科技股份有限公司(欧中科技)是西北有色金属研究院下属的专业从事高端金属球形粉末及粉未冶金部件的生产服务的国家级专精特新重点“小巨人”企业，成立于2013年，注册资本1.8亿元。组建了具备国际先进水平的国内首条超高转速等离子旋转电极(“SS-PREP®”)金属球形粉末生产线和国内首条高温合金粉末盘“超高转速粉末+热等静压”(SS-PREP Disk®)短流程生产线，具备年产金属球形粉末1500吨和粉未冶金部件2000件的生产能力，主要致力于钛合金、高温合金及其他金属球形粉未及粉末冶金部件的研发、生产及进出口贸易等。
description_en: Xi’an Eurasia Materials Technology Co., Ltd. ('Eurasia Materials'), a national-level specialized, refined, distinctive, and innovative 'Key Little Giant' enterprise under the Northwest Institute for Nonferrous Metals Research, was founded in 2013 with registered capital of RMB 180 million. It operates China’s first domestically developed ultra-high-speed plasma rotating electrode process (SS-PREP®) production line for spherical metal powders and the nation’s first short-process production line for high-temperature alloy powder disks (SS-PREP Disk®), combining ultra-high-speed powder production with hot isostatic pressing (HIP). With annual capacities of 1,500 tons of spherical metal powders and 2,000 powder metallurgy components, Eurasia Materials specializes in R&D, production, and import/export of titanium alloys, high-temperature alloys, and other spherical powders and powder metallurgy parts.

description_zh: 上海福柯斯智能科技有限公司是一家基于高端数字X射线技术相关应用，以工业CT全息成像装备和器件为核心产品，研产销服为一体的高新技术企业。公司在上海松江区拥有独立研发生产基地，是国内拥有完整自主知识产权的工业质量无损检测解决方案专业提供商。公司产品涵盖显微CT、计量CT、原位CT、微焦点CT、平面CT、加速器CT、在线CT和DR,已广泛应用于国防军工、航空航天、高端集成电路、增材制造、汽车制造、新材料、新能源、石油岩土、生命科学和高校等诸多领域的知名上市公司、研究所及重点实验室,在质量工艺改善、制造效率提升、综合成本降低、数字化能力跃升等方面为用户带来不可替代的价值。
description_en: Shanghai Focus Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd. is a high-tech enterprise integrating R&D, manufacturing, sales, and service of industrial CT holographic imaging systems and components—centered on advanced digital X-ray technology. Based in Songjiang District, Shanghai, it is a domestic leader in industrial non-destructive testing (NDT) solutions with complete independent intellectual property rights. Its product portfolio includes micro-CT, metrology CT, in-situ CT, microfocus CT, planar CT, accelerator-based CT, online CT, and digital radiography (DR). Widely deployed across defense, aerospace, high-end ICs, additive manufacturing, automotive, new materials, new energy, petroleum & geotechnical engineering, life sciences, and universities, Focus delivers irreplaceable value in quality/process improvement, manufacturing efficiency gains, total cost reduction, and digital capability advancement for leading listed companies, research institutes, and key laboratories.

description_zh: 杭州聚丰新材料有限公司是一家专业从事高端聚合物、高分子化工材料及设备研发、生产和销售的创新型高新技术企业。公司被认定为国家级科技型中小企业、国家级高新技术企业，浙江省专精特新中小企业、浙江省企业研究院、浙江省高新技术企业研究开发中心、浙江省创新型中小企业。 公司定位高分子材料领域，主营全生物降解塑料、热塑性有机硅弹性体、改性工程塑料、聚烯烃改性材料、特种尼龙、改性PPO、3D打印颗粒和线材等产品。 “茧语JIANYU”为聚丰旗下3D打印材料专属���牌。拥有聚丰在高分子聚合物领域的技术优势与沉淀，具备自主核心知识产权，面向国内外增材制造行业市场，为客户提供高性能3D打印专用线材。
description_en: Hangzhou Jufeng New Materials Co., Ltd. is an innovative high-tech enterprise specializing in R&D, manufacturing, and sales of advanced polymers, specialty chemical materials, and related equipment. Certified as a National Science & Technology SME, National High-Tech Enterprise, Zhejiang Provincial Specialized, Refined, Distinctive, and Innovative SME, Zhejiang Provincial Enterprise Research Institute, Zhejiang High-Tech Enterprise R&D Center, and Zhejiang Innovative SME, Jufeng focuses on high-performance polymer materials—including fully biodegradable plastics, thermoplastic silicone elastomers, modified engineering plastics, polyolefin modifications, specialty nylons, modified PPO, and 3D printing granules and filaments. Its dedicated 3D printing materials brand, 'Jianyu,' leverages Jufeng’s deep expertise and proprietary IP in polymer synthesis to deliver high-performance, application-optimized 3D printing filaments for global AM markets.

description_zh: Visitech是DLP数字光处理成像解决方案的全球技术领导者，为全球设备制造商开发和制造高性能的直接成像光刻和增材制造子系统。凭借卓越的设计、高质量的制造和广泛的现场验证，我们的产品能实现高效率、高精度的生产，并确保连续生产的稳定性和卓越的使用寿命。 Visitech在中国、美国、德国、挪威和日本都拥有强大的业务中心，能够为客户提供快速和适当的支持。我们的专业团队由应用专家组成，在光学、机械、DLP®系统、软件、FPGA和高速电子设计等各个方面拥有多年的经验，能帮您应对在产品的开发、使用和服务中的产品或软件相关的挑战。 我们在亚洲和美国建设了零部件采购和制造基地，以确保稳定可靠的供应。
description_en: Visitech is a global technology leader in DLP® digital light processing imaging solutions, developing and manufacturing high-performance direct imaging lithography and additive manufacturing subsystems for equipment OEMs worldwide. With excellence in optical design, precision manufacturing, and extensive field validation, Visitech’s products deliver high efficiency, micron-level accuracy, and exceptional reliability for continuous production. The company maintains strong business centers in China, the U.S., Germany, Norway, and Japan to ensure rapid, localized technical support. Its application engineering team brings deep expertise across optics, mechanics, DLP® systems, software, FPGA, and high-speed electronics—enabling robust support throughout product development, deployment, and service. Localized component sourcing and manufacturing hubs in Asia and the U.S. guarantee stable, reliable supply chains.

description_zh: 中山市胜洋电机有限公司成立于 2011 年，是集步进、直流、无刷电机生产、研发、销售于一体的国家级高新技术企业。公司坐落于中山小榄镇，占地 20000 平方米，拥有 500 名经验丰富的员工，配备先进生产设备、自动化生产线及配套检验测试设施。 公司产品月产量达 150 万台，广泛应用于安防监控、银行系统、门禁、舞台灯光、打印机、机器人等精密控制领域。企业除遵循国内外标准生产外，还可按需定制产品。 凭借高品质产品及上下游伙伴支持，胜洋在电机行业声名卓著，逐步发展为业内品牌企业。公司拥有年轻务实的创新团队，秉持 “质量为先、信誉为重、管理为本、服务为诚” 的宗旨，竭诚为海内外客户服务。
description_en: Zhongshan Shengyang Motor Co., Ltd., established in 2011, is a national high-tech enterprise specializing in the R&D, manufacturing, and sales of stepper motors, DC motors, and brushless DC motors. Located in Xiaolan Town, Zhongshan, the company operates a 20,000 m² facility staffed by 500 experienced professionals and equipped with advanced automated production lines and comprehensive testing infrastructure. With a monthly output capacity of 1.5 million units, its precision control motors serve security & surveillance, banking systems, access control, stage lighting, printers, and robotics. Products comply with international and domestic standards, and custom engineering is available. Guided by the principles of 'quality first, integrity paramount, management-based excellence, and service-oriented sincerity,' Shengyang has evolved into a recognized brand in the motor industry, serving global customers with innovative, reliable solutions.

description_zh: 宝尼特装备科技有限公司是一家集产品设计、研发、销售、服务于一体的综合性企业，业务聚焦自动 化装置与空气分离装置领域。 公司主营PSA变压制氮装置、 PSA 变压制氧装置、冷冻式干燥机、吸附式干燥机、压力容器、气体纯化 装置、气体回收装置、空气净化设备。 高端、节能、直销，我公司生产的设备广泛应用于化工行业、石油行业、医药行业、食品保 鲜、冶金行业、玻璃行业、热处理等行业和领域，设备运行稳定，安全可靠，至今已覆盖远销 欧美、中东、东南亚等国家，长期合作港、澳、台、同胞经销商。支持OEM, 诚招国内外合作伙伴。
description_en: Jiangsu Bonite Energy-Saving Equipment Technology Co., Ltd. is an integrated provider of design, R&D, sales, and after-sales service for automation and air separation systems. Core products include PSA nitrogen/oxygen generation systems, refrigerated and adsorption-type dryers, pressure vessels, gas purification systems, gas recovery units, and air filtration equipment. Engineered for energy efficiency and industrial reliability, Bonite’s systems serve chemical, petrochemical, pharmaceutical, food preservation, metallurgical, glass, and heat treatment industries. Deployed across North America, Europe, the Middle East, and Southeast Asia—and supported by long-term partnerships with distributors in Hong Kong, Macau, and Taiwan—the company offers OEM services and actively seeks global strategic partners.

description_zh: 深圳锐沣科��有限公司（Ray Form）成立于2018年8月，是一家致力于数字化智能制造、技术研发、生产及销售高速光固化3D打印设备的创新驱动型科技公司，公司一直坚持自主研发，集合光学设计、图像算法、数字材料、微纳加工等多领域硕博精英团队，开发出全球首创的工业级、多引擎超阵列3D打印智能制造技术（HADPＴＭ技术），打造高效率、高精度、智能化的3D打印设备及耗材（如隐形矫正器、种植牙、弹性体等）。 锐沣奉行“坦诚、共赢、勤奋、创新”的价值观，坚持脚踏实地做技术、目光长远谋发展，通过优质的产品服务好客户，赢得公司的长久发展。
description_en: Shenzhen Ray Form Technology Co., Ltd. (Ray Form), founded in August 2018, is an innovation-driven company focused on R&D, manufacturing, and commercialization of high-speed, digital light processing (DLP)-based 3D printing systems for intelligent manufacturing. Leveraging multidisciplinary expertise in optical engineering, image algorithms, digital materials, and micro/nano-fabrication, Ray Form pioneered the world’s first industrial-grade, multi-engine hyper-array 3D printing technology—HADP™—enabling high-efficiency, high-precision, and intelligent production of dental aligners, dental implants, elastomers, and other functional end-use parts. Committed to 'integrity, win-win collaboration, diligence, and innovation,' Ray Form delivers cutting-edge hardware and consumables through rigorous technical execution and long-term strategic vision.

description_zh: 无锡伊博特环保科技有限公司坐落在太湖明珠-无锡，成立于 2012 年，现以宜兴制造基地为核心，在无锡，宜兴双城设有营销服务中心。作为国家高新技术企业，公司专注为工业生产环境中产生的粉尘，烟尘，油雾及金属碎屑提供清理收集治理服务，并研发整套粉尘油雾净化解决方案，构建集研发、 生产、销售于一体的全链条服务体系。 伊博特始终秉持“高品质，高效率，人性化 ”的产品理念，通过自主研发与技术创新，打造出YIBOOTE品牌工业吸尘器工业除尘器等核心产品。 目前产品已深度应用于新能源设备 , 智能制造，工业机器人，汽车零部件，医药食品，等20余个领域，累计为5000余家客户提供专业化定制化的工业环境治理
description_en: Wuxi Yibote Environmental Protection Technology Co., Ltd., founded in 2012 and headquartered in Wuxi—the 'Pearl of Taihu Lake'—operates dual marketing and service centers in Wuxi and Yixing, with Yixing as its core manufacturing base. As a national high-tech enterprise, Yibote specializes in integrated dust, fume, oil mist, and metal chip collection and purification solutions for industrial environments. The company develops end-to-end dust and oil mist control systems, covering R&D, manufacturing, and service. Guided by the philosophy of 'high quality, high efficiency, and human-centered design,' Yibote has independently developed its flagship YIBOOTE-brand industrial vacuum cleaners and dust collectors. Its solutions are deployed across 20+ sectors—including new energy equipment, intelligent manufacturing, industrial robotics, automotive components, and pharmaceuticals—delivering customized environmental governance solutions to over 5,000 clients.

Its solutions enable seamless integration across diverse applications—from reverse engineering and quality inspection to heritage preservation, medical modeling, and custom manufacturing.

name_en: Nanjing Precision Machinery Equipment Co., Ltd.

description_zh: 南京工艺装备制造股份有限公司创建于1952年，是国有控股国家高新技术企业，工信部制造业单项冠军示范企业，国务院国资委“科改示范企业”，中国机床工具工业协会副理事长单位。公司牵头主持承担5项、参与承担37项高档数控机床国家科技重大专项，近三年公司主持编制的4项国家标准、6项行业标准、1项团体标准,突破行业卡脖子问题，破除制约瓶颈，取得重大技术突破，产品达到国际先进水平，实现为高端数控装备提供国产化配套，补齐国内短板，成功替代进口。公司产品参加国家“十三五”科技成就展和2022年国家“奋进新时代”主题成就展，通过了世界机床头部企业德国 DMG 欧洲工厂精密滚珠丝杠副、精密滚动直线导轨副供货认证。
description_en: Nanjing Precision Machinery Equipment Co., Ltd., established in 1952, is a state-controlled national high-tech enterprise, a Ministry of Industry and Information Technology (MIIT) 'Single Champion Demonstration Enterprise' in manufacturing, a State-owned Assets Supervision and Administration Commission (SASAC) 'Sci-Tech Reform Pilot Enterprise,' and Vice Chairman of the China Machine Tool & Tool Industry Association. The company leads or participates in 42 national science and technology major projects for high-end CNC machine tools, including five as lead contractor. In the past three years, it has spearheaded the formulation of four national standards, six industry standards, and one group standard—resolving critical 'bottleneck' technologies and achieving internationally advanced performance in precision ball screws and linear guides. Its products support domestic high-end CNC equipment, replacing imports and filling key domestic gaps. Featured in China’s '13th Five-Year Plan' Science & Technology Achievements Exhibition and the 2022 'Striding into a New Era' National Achievement Exhibition, its precision components are certified for supply to DMG MORI’s European factories.

description_zh: 武汉渡诣科技有限公司是专业的激光3D 打印设备制造商、专注于激光3D打印技术研发与应用，并提供优质激光3D打印设备的解决方案。目前激光3D打印设备在航空航天、汽车及零配件制造、医疗、房屋建筑模型、电子、模具等领域得到广泛应用，激光3D打印致力于推动智能制造，把高效、精准、智能的生产为客户提高生产制造价值最大化。
description_en: Wuhan Duyi Technology Co., Ltd. is a professional manufacturer of laser-based metal additive manufacturing (AM) systems, specializing in R&D, application engineering, and turnkey solutions for selective laser melting (SLM) and direct metal laser sintering (DMLS). Its AM platforms serve aerospace, automotive and component manufacturing, medical devices, architectural modeling, electronics, and mold-making industries. By advancing intelligent, high-precision, high-efficiency production workflows, Duyi empowers customers to maximize value creation in next-generation smart manufacturing.

name_en: Aplus Intelligent Equipment (Shanghai) Co., Ltd.

address_zh: 中国大陆/上海/上海市/田林路130号 20栋1层
address_en: China/Shanghai/上海市/田林路130号 20栋1层
description_zh: A+团队在精密设备设计、硬件、软件、材料加工和不同的垂直市场应用方面拥有丰富的知识和经验。基于半导体设备精度的运动控制和直接驱动技术，经过多年的终端使用经验，使FFF2.0系统能够同时体现速度和精度。 我们的使命，专注FFF2.0价值链，含聚合物的供应和工艺包，与生态系统参与者密切合作，以加快FFF2.0在批量生产阶段的实施。 基于 Blast系列 FFF2.0敏捷制造平台，保障了端到端一件定制的批量制造模式 Blast与BlastMate高通量配方丝材和BlastAcc(切片软件预置最佳工艺参数)，构成了FFF2.0智造平台，专注于工业FDM规模化生产用途。
description_en: Aplus leverages deep expertise in precision motion control—originally developed for semiconductor equipment—and direct-drive technology to deliver its FFF2.0 platform: a high-speed, high-accuracy fused filament fabrication system. Built upon the Blast-series agile manufacturing platform, the FFF2.0 ecosystem integrates BlastMate high-throughput specialty filaments, BlastAcc slicing software with pre-optimized process parameters, and polymer supply chain support. Aplus collaborates closely with ecosystem partners to accelerate industrial-scale adoption of FFF2.0 for mass customization and high-volume production of functional polymer parts.

description_zh: 山东诺森塑胶有限公司坐落于中国北方的山东省，自2008年成立以来快速发展，现已成为国内规模领先的塑料母粒生产商之一。公司塑料母粒年产能达62000吨，产品应用场景广泛，可全面适配吹膜、注塑、管道、管材、电缆等多个工业领域。此外，公司深耕先进制造领域，配备百余台工业级3D打印设备，构建了全流程3D打印服务体系，业务覆盖3D线材生产、3D打印、三维设计以及非标定制化产品研发、小批量生产等板块，始终致力于为各行业客户提供高品质、定制化、高效率的一站式3D打印解决方案。
description_en: Shandong Nuosen Plastic Co., Ltd., headquartered in Shandong Province, is a leading domestic masterbatch producer with an annual capacity of 62,000 metric tons. Its masterbatches serve blow film, injection molding, pipe/extrusion, and cable applications. Beyond traditional plastics, Nuosen operates over 100 industrial-grade 3D printers to deliver full-cycle additive manufacturing services—including filament production, 3D printing, 3D design, non-standard R&D, and small-batch manufacturing—providing high-quality, customized, and efficient end-to-end 3D printing solutions for diverse industries.

address_zh: 中国大陆/上海/上海市/上海市金山区亭林镇亭谊路111号
address_en: China/Shanghai/上海市/上海市金山区亭林镇亭谊路111号
description_zh: 米开罗那，是一家按德国商业文化理念创立的品牌，公司是集研发、生产、服务于一体的高科技企业，始终致力于为客户提供高端智能装备和服务。 公司于2000年初在国内研发、生产、销售手套箱设备，现在生产产品范围涵盖隔离类手套箱/真空箱产品、保护/防护类手套箱产品、激光切割与焊接机，自动化类产品、物联网工业智能产品、高端智能装备等产品，这些高端装备被广泛应用于锂电池研发及生产、物理化学研究、粉末冶金、原子核技术、生物制药、特种焊接、OLED、材料处理、精细化工等行业。 米开罗那产品遍及各国，拥有多个服务中心，上海、湖北，沈阳设有研发中心。同时在上海、湖北建有两座现代化制造工厂。
description_en: Mikrolna, a German-inspired high-tech enterprise, designs, manufactures, and services premium intelligent equipment. Since launching glovebox systems in China in the early 2000s, Mikrolna now offers isolation/vacuum gloveboxes, protective gloveboxes, laser cutting & welding systems, automation solutions, IoT-enabled industrial intelligence products, and advanced smart manufacturing equipment. Its systems serve lithium battery R&D/production, physical chemistry research, powder metallurgy, nuclear technology, biopharmaceuticals, specialized welding, OLED, materials processing, and fine chemicals. With R&D centers in Shanghai, Hubei, and Shenyang—and modern manufacturing facilities in Shanghai and Hubei—Mikrolna serves global customers through a network of service centers.

description_zh: 北京造物时代科技有限公司（Makera）是全球领先的数字加工与智能制造工具与服务提供商，目前专注于智能化数字桌面数字加工工具如桌面型3D雕刻机（CNC）、3D打印机、激光切割机等产品的研发与生产工作。产品适合个人创客、教育科研、企业快速原型开发的等场景。也在机器人、AI方面积极开拓新的产品与业务。 2021年公司成功研发的“刻未来 ™ 智能3D雕刻机”产品在全球最大的众筹平台Kickstarter成功上线，众筹金额170余万美金，成为CNC品类第一名。
description_en: Beijing Makera Technology Co., Ltd. (Makera) is a global leader in digital fabrication and intelligent manufacturing tools and services. It develops and manufactures desktop-scale intelligent digital fabrication equipment—including CNC engravers, 3D printers, and laser cutters—for makers, education/research institutions, and rapid prototyping in enterprises. Makera also pioneers new product lines in robotics and AI. Its flagship 'Ke Weilai™ Smart 3D Engraver' launched successfully on Kickstarter in 2021, raising over USD 1.7 million—the highest-funded CNC project on the platform.

description_zh: 江苏康瑞成立于2001年6月，总部位于工业发达的长江三角洲江苏省江阴市，拥有江阴、南通、沭阳三大生产基地。公司提供从熔炼，轧制，锻压到3D打印和机加工的全制成服务。公司聚焦金属材料精密成型领域，专注于为下游精密制造领域客户提供高精度、高性能、特定材质及结构的精密金属材料。公司产品包括不锈钢、铝合金、钛合金和高温合金等，应用于消费电子、汽车零部件、工业设备零部件、医疗器械等应用领域。
description_en: Jiangsu Kangrui New Materials Technology Co., Ltd., founded in June 2001 and headquartered in Jiangyin, Jiangsu—a hub of Yangtze River Delta industry—operates three production bases in Jiangyin, Nantong, and Shuyang. The company provides full-process metal component manufacturing, from melting and rolling to forging, additive manufacturing (LPBF/SLM), and precision machining. Specializing in precision metal forming, Kangrui delivers high-accuracy, high-performance, material- and geometry-specific components—including stainless steel, aluminum alloys, titanium alloys, and superalloys—for consumer electronics, automotive parts, industrial equipment, and medical devices.

description_zh: WonderMaker 专注于多头多色 3D 打印机的研发与制造。我们的愿景，是将更大尺寸、更高速度、更具性价比的多色 3D 打印机带入每一个家庭。 “你的需求，终将体现在我们的产品之中。” 在 WonderMaker，我们深刻理解用户痛点，认真倾听每一位用户的真实需求，不断突破技术边界，打破行业壁垒，并始终保持开放、透明的沟通方式，帮助 3D 打印爱好者以更高的效率实现多色打印的无限可能。 欢迎来到 WonderMaker，欢迎来到多色 3D 打印的世界！
description_en: WonderMaker designs and manufactures multi-nozzle, multi-color 3D printers engineered for larger build volumes, higher throughput, and superior cost-performance. Guided by the vision 'Your needs will be reflected in our products,' WonderMaker deeply engages users to identify pain points, push technical boundaries, dismantle industry barriers, and maintain open, transparent communication—empowering hobbyists and professionals alike to achieve efficient, limitless multi-color 3D printing.

name_zh: 飞而康快速制造科技有限责任公司
name_en: FeiErKang Rapid Manufacturing Technology Co., Ltd.
address_zh: 中国大陆/江苏省/无锡市/江苏省无锡市新吴区鸿山街道经十一路与鸿新路交叉口
address_en: China/Jiangsu/无锡市/江苏省无锡市新吴区鸿山街道经十一路与鸿新路交叉口
description_zh: 飞而康快速制造科技有限责任公司(简称“飞而康”)创办于2012年8月，公司坐落于江苏无锡，规划用地50亩，总注册资本为2.6亿元，国有控股混合所有制企业，无锡产业发展集团下属企业成员，国家级专精特新“小巨人"企业，江苏省高新技术企业，十四五国家重点研发计划牵头单位。飞而康作为国际领先的金属增材制造全链条解决方案提供商，历经十余年研发，系统性攻克了激光选区熔融（SLM）技术在稳定性、一致性及控形控性方面的核心工艺挑战，建立了覆盖40余种金属材料的成熟工艺体系。依托100余项专利与高端设备集群，公司已累计为航空航天、能源、汽车、医疗等领域交付近十万个高品质零件。
description_en: FeiErKang Rapid Manufacturing Technology Co., Ltd. ('FeiErKang'), founded in August 2012 in Wuxi, Jiangsu, is a state-controlled mixed-ownership enterprise and national 'Little Giant' specialist, high-tech firm. As a world-leading end-to-end metal additive manufacturing solution provider, FeiErKang has systematically overcome core challenges in stability, repeatability, and shape/property control for selective laser melting (SLM). Its mature process database covers 40+ metal alloys. Supported by 100+ patents and an advanced equipment cluster, FeiErKang has delivered nearly 100,000 high-integrity components for aerospace, energy, automotive, and medical applications.

description_zh: CoreTechnologie 成立于 1998 年，是一家拥有法德技术背景的专业软件公司，专注于帮助工业企业充分释放 3D 数据的商业价值。作为全球领先的 CAD 数据互操作解决方案提供商，CoreTechnologie 致力于打通不同 CAD 系统之间的数据壁垒，让工程师、制造企业和数字化工厂能够更高效地协同工作，实现 更快的设计迭代、更稳定的数据质量，以及零数据损失的数字化流程。 旗下产品 3D_Evolution、4D_Additive、和 3D_Kernel_IO，覆盖从设计与仿真、增材制造，到质量检测与验证的全流程 3D 数据处理需求，能够轻松应对最复杂的CAD 与 3D 数据挑战
description_en: CoreTechnologie, founded in 1998 with Franco-German engineering roots, is a specialized software company enabling industrial enterprises to unlock the full commercial value of 3D data. As a global leader in CAD data interoperability, CoreTechnologie bridges data silos across heterogeneous CAD platforms—accelerating design iteration, ensuring data fidelity, and enabling zero-loss digital workflows for engineers, manufacturers, and smart factories. Its product suite—3D_Evolution, 4D_Additive, and 3D_Kernel_IO—covers the full 3D data lifecycle: design & simulation, additive manufacturing, and quality inspection & validation—handling even the most complex CAD and 3D data challenges.

description_zh: 菲镭泰克成立于2014年，国家工信部认定的第六批国家级专精特新“小巨人”企业。拥有激光器输出光束动态聚焦技术的发明专利（专利号：ZL201410460960.6），是全球仅三家、中国唯一掌握该核心专利的企业。 作为工业激光3D动态聚焦系统领域的领跑者，菲镭泰克是国内最早独立从事动态聚焦系统研发的企业，现覆盖全波段、全品类的产品体系，满足多样化应用场景的需求。 在新能源汽车、增材制造、3C精密加工等应用领域，菲镭泰克具备完善的3D动态聚焦落地应用方案能力。提供涵盖动态聚焦技术、光学设计以及软控集成在内的整体解决方案。公司长期致力动态聚焦系统的应用工艺创新和全闭环工艺落地的工艺解决方案。
description_en: FLE-TECH, founded in 2014 and designated a national 'Little Giant' enterprise by MIIT, holds the core patent (ZL201410460960.6) for dynamic beam focusing technology in industrial lasers—the only Chinese company and one of only three globally holding this IP. As a pioneer and market leader in 3D dynamic focusing systems, FLE-TECH offers a complete portfolio spanning all wavelengths and product categories. Its solutions address demanding applications in new-energy vehicles, additive manufacturing, and precision 3C manufacturing. FLE-TECH delivers holistic, application-ready packages integrating dynamic focusing optics, control software, and process engineering—driving full-closed-loop implementation and continuous process innovation.

description_zh: FUJIFILM Dimatix是世界领先的按需喷墨打印头供应商，应用于非接触性工业印刷、装饰、涂层和材料沉积。 整体硅基MEMS技术的极光（Skyfire）和可拆卸维修的星光（StarFire SG）喷头是公司最新的成熟科研成果，双重墨水循环和完全拆卸维修设计更耐腐蚀，可兼容多种墨水，精确打印至各种基材，致力于增材制造中的砂型、金属、尼龙等应用的原型与量产。
description_en: FUJIFILM Dimatix is a world-leading supplier of industrial piezoelectric inkjet print heads for non-contact industrial printing, decorative applications, functional coating, and material deposition. Its latest generations—Skyfire (silicon-based MEMS) and StarFire SG (modular, field-repairable)—feature dual ink recirculation and corrosion-resistant construction, enabling compatibility with diverse inks and precise deposition onto varied substrates. These platforms support both prototyping and high-volume production in additive manufacturing applications including sand casting molds, metal parts, and nylon components.

description_zh: RPS 由具有二十余年产品开发、试制、中小批量快速智造经验的的专业技术人员200余人组成， 拥有工业级 SLA、SLS、FDM、DLP、SLM 等高性能塑胶材料和金属材料增材制造和创意应用级全系列3D打印机； 装备军工级碳纤维真空高压成型罐，是航空、军工、无人机轻量化产品核心装备；配套 CNC、真空复模机、低压灌注机、注塑机、吸塑机、自动化检测仪等三百余台先进成型设备。 RPS 在广东和华中地区拥有独立生产园区，控股或合资协办工厂12家。
description_en: RPS Co., Ltd. is a professional rapid manufacturing service provider with over 200 technical personnel possessing more than two decades of expertise in product development, prototyping, and small-batch rapid manufacturing. The company operates a full suite of industrial-grade additive manufacturing systems—including SLA, SLS, FDM, DLP, and SLM—for both high-performance polymer and metal materials. Its advanced production infrastructure includes military-grade carbon-fiber vacuum hot-press autoclaves—critical for lightweight aerospace, defense, and UAV components—as well as over 300 complementary precision equipment units such as CNC machines, vacuum casting systems, low-pressure resin infusion systems, injection molding machines, thermoforming machines, and automated inspection systems. RPS maintains independent production parks in Guangdong and Central China, and holds equity stakes or joint ventures with 12 affiliated manufacturing facilities.

description_zh: 北京柯林柯尔科技发展有限公司致力于烧结板(塑烧板)除尘设备及系统的进、研发、生产及销售。通过与德国禾鼎过滤技术有限公司的全面合作，以许可证方式在中国生产制造德国禾鼎过滤技术有限公司全系列专利产品烧结板除尘器，并使用HERDING”商标。 在金属材料增材制造中，安全问题越来越受到重视。尤其是活泼金属由于易燃易爆，确保过滤过程安全可靠尤为重要。北京柯林柯尔科技发展有限公司研发的“金属3D打印机专用烧结板过滤器”，应用德国Herding®烧结板滤芯，搭配安全钝化处理和惰性气体保护系统，为金属增材制造的循环过滤提供了一个最佳的解决方案。
description_en: Beijing Collinkor Technology Development Co., Ltd. specializes in the R&D, manufacturing, and sales of sintered plate (sintered plastic plate) dust collection equipment and systems. Through a comprehensive licensing partnership with German Herding Filtertechnik GmbH, Collinkor manufactures Herding’s full range of patented sintered plate dust collectors in China under the 'HERDING' trademark. Recognizing the heightened safety requirements in metal additive manufacturing—particularly for reactive metals prone to combustion and explosion—Collinkor has developed a dedicated 'Sintered Plate Filter for Metal 3D Printers'. This solution integrates Herding® sintered plate filter elements with proprietary safety passivation treatment and inert gas protection systems, delivering an optimal, reliable closed-loop filtration solution for metal AM processes.

description_zh: 冠达科技 于2018年成立，总部位于辽宁省鞍山市，是一家高端金属粉末、金属粉末研发生产企业。 公司采用VIGA、EIGA、PREP等制粉技术，主要生产单质金属粉末，镍基、钴基、铁基、铜基、钛基合金粉末，高熵合金粉末，金属基复合粉末等。 产品广泛应用于航空航天、交通工具制造、油气开采及储运、化工医药、新能源工程等领域。
description_en: Founded in 2018 and headquartered in Anshan, Liaoning Province, Liaoning Guanda New Materials Technology Co., Ltd. is a high-end metal powder R&D and production enterprise. The company employs advanced atomization technologies—including Vacuum Induction Gas Atomization (VIGA), Electrode Induction Melting Gas Atomization (EIGA), and Plasma Rotating Electrode Process (PREP)—to produce a broad portfolio of spherical metal powders: elemental metals; nickel-, cobalt-, iron-, copper-, and titanium-based alloys; high-entropy alloys; and metal matrix composite powders. Its products serve critical applications across aerospace, transportation manufacturing, oil & gas exploration and storage, chemical & pharmaceutical industries, and new energy engineering.

description_zh: 四川巨子粉体设备有限公司位于“两弹”故乡和中国科技城—绵阳，是从国防尖端科研机构中国空气动力研究与发展中心分离而来，由国内最早气流粉碎分级及研发团队组成的高新技术企业，是国内具有独特技术优势的超微粉碎分级设备专业研发生产基地。公司拥有一流的研发团队，产品核心技术达到国际先进水平，产品种类涉及诸多应用领域，可提供上万种粉体系统工程解决方案，解决了大量的粉体加工难题。
description_en: Sichuan Juzi Powder Technology Co., Ltd., located in Mianyang—the birthplace of China’s nuclear and missile programs and China’s Science & Technology City—is a high-tech enterprise spun off from the China Aerodynamics Research and Development Center. Comprising China’s earliest R&D team specializing in jet milling and classification, Juzi is a leading domestic manufacturer of ultrafine grinding and air classification equipment with distinctive technological advantages. The company maintains a world-class R&D team; its core technologies have reached international advanced levels; and its product portfolio spans numerous application sectors. Juzi delivers over 10,000 customized powder system engineering solutions, resolving complex challenges in fine powder processing.

description_zh: 广州施伯迩传动设备有限公司成立于2016年，位于广州市番禺区。总生产基地6000平方米，主要生产系列电动缸、升降机、小推杆和滑台为主。是一家集设计、生产、销售为一体的传动设备制造商，一直坚持以品质求生存、以客户为中心的理念，不断地努力前进，现已在华南、华东、华中、西南等地区设立了办事处，已形成了成熟的管理体系以及销售团队。在20年-25年期间先后被评为：“广东省守合同重信用企业”、“科技型中小企业”、“高新技术企业”、“专精特新中小企业”。
description_en: Established in 2016 and based in Panyu District, Guangzhou, Guangzhou Sbera Transmission Equipment Co., Ltd. is an integrated designer, manufacturer, and supplier of motion control components. Its 6,000 m² production base specializes in electric actuators, lifting columns, miniature linear actuators, and precision sliding stages. Guided by a customer-centric philosophy and commitment to quality excellence, Sbera has established branch offices across South, East, Central, and Southwest China, building a mature management system and sales network. From 2020 to 2025, the company was recognized as a 'Guangdong Province Contract-Honoring and Credit-Keeping Enterprise', a 'Technology-Based SME', a 'High-Tech Enterprise', and a 'Specialized, Refined, Distinctive, and Innovative (Zhuan Jing Te Xin) SME'.

With a monthly output of 150–200 metric tons, the company possesses extensive industry experience in 3D printing filament and resin consumables. It continuously develops new formulations to meet diverse application requirements and warmly welcomes collaboration opportunities.

description_zh: 深圳市汇丰创新技术有限公司（深圳龙岗）系国家级高新技术企业，专注光固化3D打印领域，集设备与光敏树脂材料研发、生产、销售于一体，技术覆盖DLP、LCD、SLA全系列。产品广泛服务于鞋业、骑行、医疗、牙科、珠宝、工业手板及教育培训等行业，并提供专业整体解决方案。 作为国内规格最全的光固化设备制造商，公司拥有市场打印尺寸最大机型，为全球客户提供ODM/OEM服务。研发团队拥有超15年经验及60余项专利，完全自主知识产权，产品远销欧美，获海内外市场高度认可。 秉承“科技创新、改变未来”愿景，汇丰致力于推动3D打印产业进步，期待与您携手共创未来。
description_en: Shenzhen HuiFeng Innovation Technology Co., Ltd. (Longgang, Shenzhen) is a national high-tech enterprise specializing exclusively in photopolymerization-based 3D printing. The company integrates R&D, manufacturing, and sales of both hardware and photosensitive resin materials, covering the full spectrum of DLP, LCD, and SLA technologies. Its solutions serve footwear, cycling, medical devices, dentistry, jewelry, industrial prototyping, and education sectors. As China’s most comprehensive photopolymerization equipment manufacturer, HuiFeng offers the industry’s largest build-volume machines and provides global ODM/OEM services. Its R&D team brings over 15 years of domain expertise and holds more than 60 patents—fully protected by independent intellectual property rights. Products are exported to Europe and North America and widely acclaimed internationally. Guided by its vision 'Innovation Drives the Future', HuiFeng is committed to advancing the global 3D printing industry.

description_zh: 嘉兴美塑科技有限公司，坐落于长三角核心城市浙江嘉兴，是一家专注于3D打印材料上游解决方案的研发型制造企业。我们深知，材料的色彩与质感，决定了最终产品的生命力。因此，我们致力于从源头出发，为3D打印行业提供专业的着色方案与特种材料。
description_en: Jiaxing Meisu Technology Co., Ltd., headquartered in Jiaxing—a core city of the Yangtze River Delta—is a R&D-driven manufacturer focused on upstream solutions for the 3D printing materials supply chain. Recognizing that color fidelity and surface aesthetics fundamentally define end-product value, Meisu develops specialized coloring systems and functional polymer formulations tailored specifically for additive manufacturing applications.

address_en: China/Guangdong/惠州市/广东省惠州市仲恺高新区陈江街道正大路23号3号厂房3楼、6楼
description_zh: 奥瑞科技从2008年以来，为美国凤凰城30年增材制造经验的PADT/Oryx Additive OEM生产设备的研发生产中心。除了FDM支撑材料清洗去除设备：水流循环搅拌式sca1200ht、sca3600、大型的清洗槽sca40K，和去除Polyjet支撑的scaWaterjet高压水喷射式清洗机，另外还有针对光敏树脂余料清洗的pca系列，并持续研发其他如超声波式、表面精加工（研磨、抛光和蚀刻）和上色技术，以及合作开发取代高挥发溶剂的魔速洗清洗稀释剂，还有废液废料处理设备。奥瑞科技能帮您打造高效的整体解决方案，强化制造过程，优化生产工艺，减少浪费报废，提高打印成功率。
description_en: Since 2008, Huizhou Oryx Technology Co., Ltd. has served as the R&D and manufacturing center for PADT/Oryx Additive—Phoenix, Arizona-based OEMs with 30 years of additive manufacturing experience. Oryx develops and produces post-processing equipment for support material removal, including water-circulation agitation cleaners (SCA1200HT, SCA3600), large-capacity immersion tanks (SCA40K), and high-pressure waterjet systems (SCAWaterjet) for PolyJet support removal. It also offers the PCA series for photocurable resin residue cleaning. Oryx continues active R&D in ultrasonic cleaning, surface finishing (grinding, polishing, etching), coloring technologies, and solvent-free alternatives—including the proprietary 'Moshu Xi' cleaning diluent—and waste liquid/solid treatment systems. Oryx delivers efficient, integrated post-processing solutions that enhance manufacturing throughput, optimize process efficiency, reduce scrap rates, and increase print success rates.

description_zh: 河南金丹乳酸科技股份有限公司始建于1984年，主要从事乳酸、乳酸盐、乳酸酯、丙交酯、PLA、PBAT、变性淀粉、晶须等产品的研发、生产、销售为一体的高新技术企业。金丹科技于2020年4月22日在深交所创业板成功上市，是国内乳酸行业第一家登陆A股的上市公司。公司拥有自备电厂、欧洲金丹公司、金丹生物新材料、河南金丹环保新材料有限公司、河南金丹现代农业开发有限公司、河南省聚乳酸可降解材料产业研究院有限公司五个子公司。
description_en: Founded in 1984, Henan Jindan Lactic Acid Technology Co., Ltd. is a high-tech enterprise engaged in the R&D, production, and sales of lactic acid, lactates, lactate esters, lactide, polylactic acid (PLA), poly(butylene adipate-co-terephthalate) (PBAT), modified starch, and cellulose nanocrystals. Listed on the ChiNext of the Shenzhen Stock Exchange on April 22, 2020 (stock code: 300829), Jindan is China’s first A-share listed company in the lactic acid industry. The group comprises five subsidiaries: its own power plant, Euro-Jindan GmbH, Jindan Bio-New Materials Co., Ltd., Henan Jindan Environmental New Materials Co., Ltd., Henan Jindan Modern Agricultural Development Co., Ltd., and Henan Provincial Polylactic Acid Biodegradable Materials Industry Research Institute Co., Ltd.

description_zh: 我们的团队：建立在精密制造的基础之上 我们的团队由精密制造领域的专家组成，自2008年以来，拥有十多年的精密注塑模具设计、金属冲压和大批量零件生产的卓越经验。我们在工业结构和高分子材料方面的深厚专业知识，源自为全球财富500强客户提供服务的经验，涵盖关键行业，包括半导体（MICRON, LEXAR）、汽车（广汽丰田、一汽丰田）和电子（BUFFALO,Longsys）。这一背景使我们形成了严谨、��质量为驱动的方法，以及针对工业B2B客户需求的强服务意识。 我们的品牌：3D打印材料创新的领导者 Callab是我们的旗舰品牌，致力于开发高性能的FDM 3D打印耗材，将可靠性与视觉效果完美结合。
description_en: Huizhou Caiduowu Technology Co., Ltd. builds upon deep expertise in precision manufacturing. Since 2008, its team of specialists has accumulated over a decade of excellence in precision injection mold design, metal stamping, and high-volume component production. Its profound knowledge in industrial structures and polymer materials stems from serving Fortune 500 clients across semiconductors (Micron, Lexar), automotive (GAC Toyota, FAW Toyota), and electronics (Buffalo, Longsys). This heritage informs a rigorous, quality-driven methodology and strong B2B service orientation. Its flagship brand, Callab, pioneers high-performance FDM 3D printing filaments—uniquely balancing mechanical reliability with superior visual aesthetics.

description_zh: 陕西宇光飞利金属材料有限公司成立于2000年6月，原隶属于中国航天科技集团某研究院。我司主要从事世界公认粉末产品性能指标最优的PREP（等离子旋转电极）技术制备3D打印用球形金属粉末项目。多年来卓力于深度技术创新和研发，洁净冶炼、粉末粒度控制、粉末形态控制、粉末气体含量控制、粉末夹杂控制、固有频率谐振等一系列核心关键技术方面深入探索研究，各方面均达到了国内领先及国际先进水平。公司现装备有六套在产PREP产业化粉末生产设备，有100%自主知识产权，均为自主研发制造。多年来我司制备过的金属材料粉末种类达到12类100余种，现有制粉设备每天单台单班生产能力为200公斤，年产量可达到400吨以上。
description_en: Founded in June 2000 and formerly affiliated with a research institute of China Aerospace Science and Technology Corporation, Shaanxi Yuguang Feili Metal Materials Co., Ltd. specializes in producing spherical metal powders for additive manufacturing using the Plasma Rotating Electrode Process (PREP)—globally recognized as the benchmark for powder performance. The company has achieved domestic leadership and international advanced standards in core technologies including ultra-clean melting, precise particle size distribution control, spherical morphology optimization, oxygen/nitrogen/hydrogen content regulation, inclusion minimization, and resonant frequency tuning. It operates six fully owned, domestically designed and manufactured PREP production lines—100% covered by independent IP rights. To date, Yuguang Feili has produced over 100 powder variants across 12 material families; each production line achieves a single-shift capacity of 200 kg/day, supporting an annual output exceeding 400 metric tons.

description_zh: 艾弗尔塑料机械是一家专业从事塑料机械研发、生产、销售的快速发展的企业。公司先后引进国内外先进技术,注重技术改造，不断开发新产品。主要产品有:3D打印丝耗材生产线，相关辅机类设备,以及原材料供应等。 我们努力在未来的技术和服务上实现自我完善，更致力于为客户创造和提供真正有价值的最佳产品，用一流的技术、一流的产品和一流的服务与客户并肩迎接美好的未来。本公司生产的机器具有良好的质量和有效的售后服务，在国外市场上,先后出口到美国、德国、俄罗斯、西班牙、南非、加拿大、阿尔及利亚、乌兹别克斯坦等多个国家，创造了良好的销售业绩和良好的反馈。
description_en: Aifer Plastic Machinery Manufacturing Co., Ltd. is a rapidly growing enterprise specializing in the R&D, manufacturing, and sales of plastic processing machinery. Leveraging advanced domestic and international technologies, the company emphasizes continuous technological upgrading and new product development. Its primary offerings include complete 3D printing filament extrusion lines, auxiliary equipment, and raw material supply solutions. Committed to excellence in technology and service, Aifer strives to deliver best-in-class value to customers through first-tier engineering, products, and after-sales support. Its machines are renowned for reliability and robust global service coverage, with exports spanning the United States, Germany, Russia, Spain, South Africa, Canada, Algeria, Uzbekistan, and other markets—earning strong sales performance and positive customer feedback worldwide.

description_zh: 扬州惠通生物新材料有限公司是扬州惠通科技股份有限公司(股票代码:301601)的全资子公司，专注于生物可降解材料的研发与应用，主要产品为丙交酯、聚乳酸切片，现年产能为3.5万吨。公司积极布局绿色可持续材料领域，为3D打印、生物降解塑料、纺织、包装等行业提供综合解决方案。 扬州惠通生物秉承绿色环保、市场与客户第一的理念，成功研发出聚乳酸循环再生技术。该技术可将聚乳酸制品转化为丙交酯，实现聚乳酸材料”生产-使用-再生”的完整闭环。公司获得了多家全球权威认证机构(欧盟DIN/美国BPI/澳大利亚ABA)的可堆肥认证，及欧盟DIN的生物基认证，不断深入推进行业下游应用的拓展。
description_en: Yangzhou Huitong Bio-New Materials Co., Ltd. is a wholly owned subsidiary of Yangzhou Huitong Technology Co., Ltd. (stock code: 301601), focusing on R&D and commercialization of biodegradable materials. Its core products—lactide and PLA chips—achieve an annual production capacity of 35,000 metric tons. Actively expanding into green and sustainable materials, the company provides integrated solutions for 3D printing, biodegradable packaging, textiles, and plastics. Guided by principles of environmental stewardship and customer-first responsiveness, Huitong Bio successfully developed a closed-loop PLA recycling technology that converts post-use PLA products back into lactide—enabling a complete 'production–use–regeneration' lifecycle. The company holds internationally recognized certifications including EU DIN and US BPI compostability, Australian ABA compostability, and EU DIN bio-based content certification, and continues to advance downstream application development.

description_en: Zhejiang Hisun Biomaterials Co., Ltd. (hereinafter 'the Company'), founded in August 2004, is a high-tech enterprise integrating R&D, production, and sales of lactic acid. Through independent innovation, the Company broke the 'bottleneck' of industrial-scale lactide production—the key monomer for polylactic acid—achieving full domestication of PLA resin manufacturing. It is China’s first publicly listed company dedicated exclusively to PLA business (stock name: Hisun Biomaterials; stock code: 688203).

description_zh: 南京GS-mach成立于2013年，一直专注于聚合物挤出设备及工艺技术。我们专业且富有进取精神的团队在塑料加工机械设计领域取得了诸多里程碑式的成就，是塑料挤出机领域的领军企业。 南京GS-mach是一家专业的机械设计制造企业，专注于塑料、橡胶、化工等行业的尖端设备自主研发和生产。目前，公司主要产品包括橡胶和塑料造粒设备、塑料薄膜、片材挤出成型设备以及3D打印长丝挤出机。凭借强大的实力，GS-mach的产品远销多个国家和地区，深受国内外客户的青睐。
description_en: Founded in 2013, Nanjing Guosu Intelligent Equipment Co., Ltd. (GS-mach) specializes in polymer extrusion equipment and process technologies. Its highly skilled and innovative team has achieved multiple milestones in plastic processing machinery design, establishing GS-mach as an industry leader in extrusion systems. As a professional mechanical design and manufacturing enterprise, GS-mach focuses on developing and producing cutting-edge equipment for plastics, rubber, and chemical industries. Core products include rubber and plastic pelletizing systems, plastic film and sheet extrusion lines, and 3D printing filament extruders. Backed by strong technical capabilities, GS-mach exports its equipment globally and enjoys widespread acclaim from domestic and international customers.

description_zh: 广东金力智能传动技术股份有限公司聚焦微型化、精密化与智能化，在超微齿轮制造、机电软一体化模块整合上不断取得突破，不仅产品填补了国内空白，更推动引领了全球微型智能传动行业的技术迭代。主营产品有微小直流电机、微型直流减速器、微型传动模组、智能控制器等，产品被广泛应用于 AI 智能机器人、工业自动化、汽车电子等领域。 截至目前，公司已获得工信部国家制造业单项冠军产品认证企业、国家专精特新重点 “小巨人” 企业、国家知识产权优势示范企业等多项荣誉。 组建了由教授、博士、高级工程师等 200 多人组成的机电软跨学科研发团队，主导与参与了多项国家和行业标准的制定，打通了电机、齿轮箱和软件三个不同的细分
description_en: Guangdong Jinli Intelligent Transmission Technology Co., Ltd. focuses on miniaturization, precision, and intelligence in micro-gear manufacturing and mechatronic-software integration. Its breakthroughs have not only filled critical domestic gaps but also driven global technological evolution in micro-intelligent transmission systems. Core products include micro DC motors, micro DC gearmotors, micro transmission modules, and intelligent controllers—widely deployed in AI robotics, industrial automation, and automotive electronics. The company holds multiple national accolades, including recognition as a 'National Single-Champion Product Enterprise' (MIIT), a 'Key Little Giant Enterprise' under China’s Specialized, Refined, Distinctive, and Innovative (Zhuan Jing Te Xin) program, and a 'National Intellectual Property Advantage Demonstration Enterprise'. Its interdisciplinary R&D team—comprising over 200 professors, PhDs, and senior engineers—has led or participated in formulating multiple national and industry standards, unifying motor, gearbox, and software domains into cohesive, high-performance solutions.

description_zh: 东华希烯埃姆（苏州）装备技术有限公司（DOH CCM）是一家拥有自主知识产权的高端复材装备制造商，掌握CFRTP核心加工工艺和技术特征。经过多年的发展和积累，结合尖端科技和源自欧美产品设计、开发、制造和服务的全方位的专业技术，旨在成为全球领先的高端材料装备和解决方案提供商
description_en: DOH CCM (Suzhou) Equipment Technology Co., Ltd. is a high-end composite equipment manufacturer with independent intellectual property rights, specializing in core processing technologies and technical characteristics of carbon-fiber-reinforced thermoplastic (CFRTP) composites. Leveraging advanced technologies and comprehensive expertise in product design, development, manufacturing, and service derived from European and North American practices, the company aims to become a global leader in high-end material processing equipment and integrated solutions.

description_zh: 睿见智能科技是一站式增材制造解决方案提供商，长期专注于3D打印产品��技术的研发与应用，构建集材料研发、成品打印、生产服务于一体的综合性产业平台，为客户提供全流程、高品质增材制造服务与产品支持。 如意天工 — 旗下3D打印耗材品牌：如意天工专注于3D打印线材研发与生产，坚持选用高品质原料，依托专业研发实验室，以科学配方与严格品控体系，打造稳定可靠、易用高效的专业打印材料，助力用户实现更优质的打印成果。核心产品系列：PLA Basi、PLA Silk、PLA Matte、PETG 品质与安全承诺：公司高度重视产品安全性与环保性，相关产品已通过国际权威检测机构 SGS欧盟 RoHS 标准检测。
description_en: Taizhou Ruijian Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd. is a one-stop additive manufacturing (AM) solutions provider, specializing in the R&D and application of 3D printing technologies and products. The company operates an integrated industrial platform covering AM material development, finished-part printing, and production services—delivering end-to-end, high-quality AM services and product support. Its proprietary filament brand, Ruyi Tiangong, focuses on R&D and manufacturing of premium 3D printing filaments—including PLA Basi, PLA Silk, PLA Matte, and PETG—using high-grade raw materials, scientific formulations, and rigorous quality control. All filaments comply with international SGS-certified EU RoHS standards for safety and environmental compliance.

description_zh: 创联电源始创于2000年03月，专精特新“小巨人"企业、国家高新技术企业，是国内集研发、生产、销售于一体的服务全球的三大标准开关电源制造商之一，也是拥有强大自主研发和知识产权优势的创新型企业。创联电源主营:工业控制电源、LED显示屏电源和照明亮化电源，致力于为工业、新能源、电力、通信、智慧交通、仪器仪表、电子设备、3D打印、LED显示屏、照明亮化等领域提供全方位的开关电源解决方案，帮助客户提高生产效率和能源效率，降低对环境的不良影响，为客户提供稳定可靠的电源产品和服务。产品远销欧美、非洲、拉丁美洲、中东、东南亚等50多个国家和地区，备受客户青睐，年产销超2500万台。
description_en: Chuanglian Power Supply Co., Ltd., established in March 2000, is a national high-tech enterprise and a 'Little Giant' enterprise recognized for specialization, refinement, uniqueness, and innovation. It ranks among the world’s top three standard switch-mode power supply manufacturers, serving global markets with in-house R&D capabilities and robust IP ownership. The company specializes in industrial control power supplies, LED display power supplies, and lighting & illumination power supplies—providing comprehensive, energy-efficient, and reliable power solutions for industries including industrial automation, new energy, power systems, telecommunications, intelligent transportation, instrumentation, electronic devices, 3D printing, LED displays, and architectural lighting. Its products are exported to over 50 countries across Europe, North America, Africa, Latin America, the Middle East, and Southeast Asia, with annual production and sales exceeding 25 million units.

name_zh: SynaCore
name_en: SynaCore
address_zh: 新加坡/Singapore
address_en: 新加坡/Singapore
description_zh: 增材制造能否真正兑现可持续发展的承诺？对于企业和投资者而言，如何让增材制造的产品质量可预测、可控，从而实现企业经营的可控，当企业能够预见到清晰的价值实现时，才更愿意进行大规模投资。 SynaCore数字孪生AM-DT软件源于新加坡科技研究局A*Star高性能计算中心，在以虚拟计算驱动真实制造的愿景驱动下，SynaCore数字孪生软件将机器、材料和工作流程同步为一个单一的自适应核心，实现一站式的仿真结果预测（包括金属微观组织、机械性能、热处理等结果的仿真），在此基础上，其自适应激光路径（Adaptive Tool Path)帮助以最优3D打印参数将新零件、新材料的工艺开发周期从数月缩短至数天。
description_en: Can additive manufacturing truly deliver on its sustainability promise? SynaCore addresses this challenge by enabling predictable, controllable AM part quality—thereby supporting business predictability and justifying large-scale investment. Developed at A*STAR’s高性能 Computing Research Centre in Singapore, SynaCore’s AM-DT digital twin software synchronizes machines, materials, and workflows into a single adaptive core. It delivers integrated simulation of microstructure evolution, mechanical properties, and heat treatment outcomes for metal AM. Its Adaptive Tool Path technology reduces process development time for new parts and materials—from months to days—by optimizing laser parameters in real time.

description_zh: 增材制造解决方案及高速五轴数控机床 CMS Advanced Materials Technology先进材料技术公司是加工先进材料（复合材料、碳纤维、铝、轻合金和金属）和用于增材制造的解决方案的CNC加工中心领域的领导者。 对研发的大量投入使该品牌一直处于行业领先地位，其机器在精度、执行速度和可靠性方面具有一流的性能，能够满足行业运营最苛刻客户的需求。 自21世纪初以来，CMS Advanced Materials Technology在许多行业确立了自己的技术合作伙伴地位，例如：航天、航空、汽车、赛船、一级方程式和最先进的铁路行业。
description_en: CMS SPA, operating under CMS Advanced Materials Technology, is a leader in CNC machining centers for advanced materials—including composites, carbon fiber, aluminum, light alloys, and metals used in additive manufacturing. Through sustained R&D investment, CMS machines achieve industry-leading precision, speed, and reliability—meeting the most demanding requirements of aerospace, automotive, marine, Formula 1, and next-generation rail sectors. Since the early 2000s, CMS has established itself as a trusted technology partner across these high-performance industries.

description_zh: 纤意科技主要进行连续纤维增材制造设备的开发与产业化，公司核心技术团队由4位法国海归博士组成，是全球少数能实现设备、材料、软件全栈自研的团队。 公司核心产品性能媲美国际头部企业，已与多领域头部客户开展应用合作。 连续纤维增强复合材料(CFRTP)3D打印技术是新兴的复合材料智能增材制造技术，与传统复合材料成型工艺相比，3D打印工艺简单、材料利用率高，大大降低了复合材料工件的制造成本;同时可实现复杂结构件的一体化快速成型，成型过程中的原材料成分及其分布方式便于动态调控，而且无需模具和连接工艺，在航空航天和新能源汽车等领域有着巨大的应用前景。
description_en: Suzhou Xianyi Rongfei Technology Co., Ltd. develops and industrializes continuous fiber additive manufacturing (CFAM) systems. Its core R&D team comprises four PhDs educated in France, making it one of the few globally capable of fully vertical integration—covering hardware, materials, and software. Its flagship CFRTP 3D printing technology enables rapid, mold-free, monolithic fabrication of complex structural components with dynamic control over material composition and distribution. Compared to conventional composite manufacturing, CFAM offers simplified processes, higher material utilization, lower cost, and broad applicability in aerospace and new-energy vehicles.

description_zh: 有研增材技术有限公司（简称有研增材），注册资本5000万元，是中国有研科技集团（原北京有色金属研究总院）下属公司，有研粉料（科创板上市）子公司。入选国家首批“启航企业”、国家专精特新“小巨人”企业、北京市专精特新“小巨人”企业、国家高新技术企业等。有研增材位于北京怀柔科学城，专业从事增材制造及特种合金粉末材料的研发、生产及销售。建有年产3000吨球形金属粉末生产线，包括真空惰性气体雾化、高速旋转电极雾化、电极感应熔炼气体雾化EIGA等生产装备50余台套，以及增材制造铝合金粉末专用生产线5条。产品包括高流动性铝合金粉末、低氧高流动性铜及铜合金粉末、高纯净高温合金粉末、模具钢和不锈钢粉末等粉末材料
description_en: GRINM Additive Manufacturing Technology Co., Ltd. (‘GRINM AM’), a subsidiary of GRINM Group (formerly General Research Institute for Nonferrous Metals, Beijing) and GRINM Powder Materials Co., Ltd. (listed on STAR Market), is headquartered in Huairou Science City, Beijing. As a national high-tech enterprise and ‘Little Giant’ in specialized, refined, unique, and innovative sectors, GRINM AM specializes in R&D, production, and sales of AM materials and specialty alloy powders. It operates a 3,000-ton-per-year spherical metal powder production line equipped with over 50 sets of advanced facilities—including vacuum inert gas atomization (VIGA), high-speed rotating electrode process (PREP), and electrode induction melting gas atomization (EIGA)—plus five dedicated aluminum alloy AM powder lines. Product portfolio includes high-flowability Al alloys, low-oxygen high-flowability Cu/Cu alloys, ultra-high-purity superalloys, tool steels, and stainless steels.

description_zh: 星尘科技（广东）有限公司是一家专注于高端难熔粉体材料的研发、生产和销售的国家高新技术企业。公司以射频等离子体制粉技术为核心竞争力，致力于为客户提供粉体制备、改性与应用的一体化解决方案。 公司产品涵盖钨、钼、钽、铌、钒、钛、锆、铪、铼、铬等高端稀有难熔金属及其合金、化合物球形粉体，并提供射频等离子体球化、3D打印、热等静压等专业技术服务。公司已通过ISO9001:2015、ISO13485:2016、GJB9001C-2017等质量管理体系认证，产品广泛应用于航空航天、国防军工、通信电子、核能工业以及生物医疗等领域。
description_en: Stardust Technology (Guangdong) Co., Ltd. is a national high-tech enterprise focused on R&D, production, and sales of high-performance refractory powder materials. Its core competency is radio-frequency (RF) plasma spheroidization technology, enabling integrated solutions spanning powder synthesis, surface modification, and application engineering. Products include spherical powders of tungsten, molybdenum, tantalum, niobium, vanadium, titanium, zirconium, hafnium, rhenium, chromium, and their alloys/compounds. The company also provides RF plasma spheroidization, 3D printing, and hot isostatic pressing (HIP) services. Certified to ISO 9001:2015, ISO 13485:2016, and GJB 9001C-2017, its materials serve aerospace, defense, telecommunications, nuclear energy, and biomedical applications.

With ~10,000 m² of production space, it maintains a specialized R&D and laser process engineering team possessing extensive industrial laser application experience—making it one of the few domestic enterprises capable of full vertical integration from optical components to system-level laser solutions.

description_zh: 广东固特超声股份有限公司（新三板挂牌上市），是拥有24年技术沉淀的超声产品ODM源头工厂。建有行业独有超声技术研究院，60人本硕博研发团队，60+发明专利，储备200+超声应用解决方案，与4所高校建立产学研合作；持有200+资质荣誉，通过ISO9001/ISO14001双体系及CE、FCC等多项产品认证，以全流程质检严控品质。 依托5万㎡“中国超声产业第一园”，50余条生产线，年产超声产品/组件2000万台/ 套，在深圳、梅州、成都设研发生产基地；成功服务海尔、迈瑞等知名企业。 公司聚焦超声内核技术，提供从配方到成品的全链ODM服务，争做全球客户的超声技术合伙人，赋能客户产品领先布局！
description_en: Guangdong Gutai Ultrasonic Co., Ltd. (listed on the New Third Board) is an ultrasonic product ODM source factory with 24 years of technical heritage. It houses a proprietary ultrasonic technology research institute, a 60-person R&D team (BSc/MSc/PhD), 60+ invention patents, and a portfolio of 200+ ultrasonic application solutions. Collaborating with four universities, the company holds 200+ certifications and accreditations, and is certified to ISO 9001/ISO 14001, CE, FCC, and other international standards. Operating from China’s largest ultrasonic industrial park (50,000 m²), it runs 50+ production lines and manufactures 20 million ultrasonic products/components annually across R&D and manufacturing bases in Shenzhen, Meizhou, and Chengdu. Serving leading clients including Haier and Mindray, Gutai delivers full-chain ODM services—from formulation to finished product—to empower customers’ ultrasonic technology leadership.

description_zh: 惠州宏茂新材料科技有限公司是一家专注于3D打印耗材研发和生产的企业，宏茂致力于为3D打印行业提供高品质、高性能的产品，产品覆盖：SLA光固化树脂、LCD光固化树脂、DLP光固化树脂和FDM系列PLA/PETG线材等。 宏茂公司拥有一支专业的研发团队，具有丰富的化学和材料科学背景，能够进行针对性的材料研究和技术创新。我们不断优化配方和工艺，提升产品的性能和稳定性，满足不同客户的需求。 我们坚持与客户建立长期合作关系，注重与客户的沟通和协作，提供定制化的解决方案和优质的售后服务。 我们将继续不断创新，为客户提供更优质、更可靠的产品和服务，共同推动3D打印技术的发展和应用。
description_en: Huizhou Hongmao New Materials Technology Co., Ltd. is a 3D printing consumables specialist developing and manufacturing high-performance, high-quality materials—including SLA, LCD, and DLP photopolymer resins, and FDM-grade PLA/PETG filaments. Backed by a specialized R&D team with strong backgrounds in chemistry and materials science, Hongmao continuously optimizes formulations and processes to enhance performance, stability, and application-specific reliability. Committed to long-term partnerships, the company provides customized solutions and responsive after-sales support—driving forward the advancement and adoption of 3D printing technologies.

description_zh: 聚塔时代（江苏）材料科技有限公司是一家专业从事金属增材制造（3D打印）材料研发、生产和销售、提供增材制造全产业链技术咨询和服务的高新技术企业。公司以“AI+材料基因组计算”为基础平台，利用AI赋能集成材料计算驱动材料研发，致力于成为全球领先的金属增材制造原材料供应商和金属增材制造技术解决方案提供商。公司核心团队人员来自上海交通大学长期从事增材制造技术和应用研究的一流团队，以及凝聚了一批多层次、多学科、结构合理的研发人才。公司依托全球先进增材制造中心科研平台和分析测试中心，与国际前沿的增材制造装备研发公司合作，打通原材料、装备、打印构件、构件性能和适航认证及技术服务等多个环节。
description_en: Juta Era (Jiangsu) Materials Technology Co., Ltd. is a high-tech enterprise specializing in R&D, production, and sales of metal additive manufacturing (AM) materials, and providing end-to-end AM technical consulting and services. Built upon an AI-powered materials genome computing platform, the company accelerates material discovery and optimization via AI-integrated computational materials science. Its core team originates from Shanghai Jiao Tong University’s world-class AM research group, complemented by multidisciplinary R&D talent. Collaborating with leading global AM equipment developers and leveraging advanced research infrastructure—including analytical testing centers—the company bridges raw materials, AM hardware, printed components, mechanical performance validation, airworthiness certification, and technical support.

description_zh: 锐新射线(RAYSOV Instrument)(丹东锐新射线��器有限公司)，是一家专业从事X射线检测设备研发与制造的国家级高新技术企业，辽宁省“专精特新”企业，国家科技型中小企业，辽宁省"揭榜挂帅”科技项目承担企业，是中国高端X射线系统解决方案的开拓者和引领者。 锐新坚持以元件级基础研究为根基，致力以核心技术赋能客户需求，以自主研发探索中国工业射线的无限可能，在国内独树一帜地打造出30keV-15MeV全能谱工业射线自主解决方案;旗下DR、电源、元件三大产品事业部和CT分公司四大板块，可一站式为客户提供从基础器件、应用单元到整体系统的X射线全产业链的高端中国制造解决方案。
description_en: Dandong Ruixin X-ray Instrument Co., Ltd. (RAYSOV Instrument), a national high-tech enterprise, Liaoning Provincial ‘Specialized, Refined, Unique, Innovative’ enterprise, and National Science & Technology SME, pioneers and leads China’s high-end industrial X-ray system solutions. Grounded in component-level fundamental research, RAYSOV independently developed a full-spectrum industrial X-ray solution spanning 30 keV to 15 MeV. Its four business units—DR imaging systems, high-voltage power supplies, core X-ray components, and CT systems—deliver a complete, China-made X-ray value chain: from foundational components and functional modules to turnkey systems.

Its mature modular product portfolio—including flatbed and 3D laser cutting, welding, multi-functional welding, cladding, and flexible wavelength beam delivery arms—significantly shortens development cycles and lowers technical barriers for smart laser equipment. Tongli’s comprehensive product lineup enables flexible, tailored solutions for diverse industrial laser applications.

description_zh: 江苏华苏工业炉制造有限公司成立于2008年，现座落在美丽的常州市金坛经济开发区。是一家集研制、设计、制造、销售、服务为一体的企业。从成立至今，公司先后取得了十余项实用新型专利，通过了ISO及CE等多项认证；被评为质量管理优秀企业及科技创新奖等荣誉。并培养了一批经验丰富、技术精湛的生产和售后团队，以保证给广大客户以优质的产品和良好的服务。公司始终将技术研发与创新放在首位，同时，公司还积极与国际先进技术进行交流与合作，引进国外先进的技术和设备，拥有进口氦质谱检漏仪，为产品质量保驾护航，以不断提升自身的技术水平和产品质量，确保能够为广大的客户提供优质的产品和满意的服务。
description_en: Jiangsu Huasu Industrial Furnace Manufacturing Co., Ltd., founded in 2008 and headquartered in Jintan Economic Development Zone, Changzhou, is an integrated enterprise engaged in R&D, design, manufacturing, sales, and service of industrial furnaces. Holding over ten utility model patents and certified to ISO and CE standards, the company has earned recognition as an Outstanding Quality Management Enterprise and Innovation Award recipient. Its experienced production and after-sales teams, supported by imported helium mass spectrometer leak detectors and collaboration with international advanced technology partners, ensure consistently high product quality and customer satisfaction.

description_en: Jiangsu Metallink Special Alloys Co., Ltd., located in Nanjing Jiangning Economic Development Zone, is a national 'Specialized, Refined, Distinctive, and Innovative' (Zhuan Jing Te Xin) Little Giant enterprise, a Nanjing City Unicorn Cultivation Enterprise, and a Jiangsu Province Top-100 High-Growth Technology Enterprise. The company specializes in R&D, manufacturing, and sales of advanced high-temperature alloys, high-purity refractory metals, specialty master alloys, and high-entropy alloys. It holds over 50 authorized invention patents and is certified to ISO 9001, IATF 16949, and AS9100D. Metallink is among the few domestic suppliers capable of producing single-crystal alloy powders and specialized powders for additive manufacturing and repair applications.

description_zh: 创材深造（苏州）科技有限公司(Deep Material)成⽴于2021年，是⾏业领先的AI+新材料解决⽅案提供商。公司深度融合材料计算、材料信息学、机器学习与深度神经⽹络等前沿技术，构建智能材料研发系统，加速⾼端⾦属材料的研发，实现产业化落地。依托⾃主创新的⾼通量研发平台与智能计算引擎，创材深造致⼒于为客⼾提供⾼通量研发设备、3D打印⾦属粉末材料和⾼端⾦属材料研发服务。 公司建有国内智能化程度最高的高通量金属材料研发实验基地，成功开发多款航空航天级高强铝合金、中高强铝合金、镍基高温合金和模具钢等核心产品，研发流程实现了高精度、高效率、低成本、自动化、标准化和流程化。
description_en: Deep Material (Suzhou) Technology Co., Ltd., established in 2021, is an industry-leading provider of AI-driven new materials solutions. Integrating materials computation, materials informatics, machine learning, and deep neural networks, the company has built an intelligent materials R&D platform to accelerate the development and industrialization of high-end metallic materials. Leveraging its proprietary high-throughput R&D platform and intelligent computing engine, Deep Material delivers high-throughput R&D equipment, metal 3D printing powders, and advanced metallic materials development services. Its intelligent high-throughput metal R&D laboratory—the most advanced in China—has successfully developed aerospace-grade high-strength aluminum alloys, medium-to-high strength aluminum alloys, nickel-based superalloys, and tool steels, achieving precision, efficiency, cost-effectiveness, automation, standardization, and process integration.

description_zh: 常州熠立增材科技有限公司是一家以生产制造高品质球形金属粉末产品为主高科技制造企业。公司拥有具有完全自主知识产权的等离子雾化技术工艺和装备，解决了我国在球形金属粉末制造领域PA技术应用卡脖子的问题，有效降低生产制造成本的同时，更可以为航空航天、汽车制造、生物医疗、3C通讯等行业提供高品质的球形金属粉末产品。公司的愿景：致力于成为全国金属粉末材料制造行业的标杆企业，通过持续科技创新为客户创造价值。
description_en: Changzhou Yili Additive Manufacturing Technology Co., Ltd. is a high-tech manufacturer specializing in high-quality spherical metal powders. The company owns fully independent intellectual property rights in plasma atomization (PA) technology and equipment—resolving critical domestic bottlenecks in spherical metal powder production. Its PA process significantly reduces manufacturing costs while supplying premium spherical metal powders to aerospace, automotive, biomedical, and 3C communications industries. Yili aims to become a national benchmark enterprise in metal powder manufacturing through continuous technological innovation and value creation for customers.

description_en: Suzhou Yunhuo Materials Technology Co., Ltd. (Yunhuo Materials), located in Changshu Hi-Tech Zone, Suzhou, is a world-class enterprise in plasma-derived powder materials and application technologies, jointly established by the Yangtze River Delta National Innovation Center (Jiangsu Industrial Technology Research Institute), the Suzhou municipal government, and a team of high-level talent. The company has successfully developed ultra-high-purity powders for aerospace, semiconductors, new energy, and consumer electronics—including semiconductor-grade ultra-pure metal powders (W, Mo, Ta, Nb, Re), ultra-high-temperature alloy powders (W-based, Nb-based, Ni-based, and high-entropy alloys), and ultra-high-temperature ceramic powders (ZrC, TiC, ZrO₂, Y₂O₃, and metal-ceramic composites).

description_en: Zhuhai Bense New Materials Research Institute Co., Ltd. is a professional supplier focused on R&D and integrated deployment of 3D printing materials. description_zh: 我们以材料为基石,深耕3D打印耗材领域,致力于将科学与匠心融入每一卷。从原料的严格筛选、分子结构的精细调控,到生产流程的全方位精密管控，我们坚持在每一环节追求极致。通过持续的研发投入与工艺创新，我们确保产品具备卓越的打印稳定性、强韧的机械性能与细腻的表面表现，为创意落地与工业制造提供可靠保障。精研不止,是我们对品质不变的承诺。 立足当下,魔塑丝以成为客户信赖的“材料解决方案伙伴”为愿景,致力于以稳定的品质与专业的技术，推动材料创新与可持续发展。与客户共同成长，塑造更可持续的未来。
description_en: Shanghai Mosi New Materials Technology Co., Ltd. anchors its expertise in 3D printing consumables, integrating scientific rigor and craftsmanship into every spool. Through sustained R&D investment and process innovation, its filaments deliver exceptional print stability, superior mechanical strength, and fine surface finish—ensuring reliability for both creative prototyping and industrial manufacturing. Committed to relentless refinement, Mosi envisions itself as a trusted 'materials solutions partner', advancing material innovation and sustainable development through consistent quality and technical expertise.

description_zh: 磐采股份有限公司位于台湾，成立于1998 年。我们的产品广泛应用于CD (光盘)、彩色印刷、3D打印等行业。我们已成功与多家国际知名的3D打印机制造商合作开展ODM项目，赢得了客户高度的信赖和认可。我们提供一系列高品质的3D打印材料，色彩鲜艳、质感细腻、功能多样，包括高分辨率（8K+）、抗冲击、软性、变色龙、阻燃等树脂，以及PLA 为基础的金属质感、石材质感、抗菌、植物纤维复合材料、碳纤维增强和工程应用PP、ASA、PETG等线材。 我们致力于推广高品质的MIT台湾制造产品，并欢迎世界各地的合作伙伴与我们携手共进，共创互利共赢。
description_en: Pansai Co., Ltd., headquartered in Taiwan and founded in 1998, serves diverse industries including optical discs (CD), color printing, and additive manufacturing. As an ODM partner to multiple internationally renowned 3D printer manufacturers, Pansai delivers high-quality, vibrant, and functionally diverse photopolymer resins—including 8K+-resolution, impact-resistant, flexible, chameleon, and flame-retardant formulations—as well as PLA-based specialty filaments (metallic, stone-textured, antibacterial, plant-fiber composite, carbon-fiber-reinforced) and engineering-grade filaments (PP, ASA, PETG). Committed to promoting high-quality 'Made in Taiwan' (MIT) products, Pansai welcomes global partners for mutually beneficial collaboration.

description_zh: 深圳市依迪姆智能科技有限公司(Shenzhen Yidimu Intelligent Technology CO.,Ltd.)位于深圳东部中心改革创新试验区--龙岗区，是一家集研发、生产、销售、服务于一体的高新技术企业。公司现经营： LCD光固化3D打印机的研发与制造、SLA，DLP工业级3D打印机的研发与制造，以及学校智能教室创客实验室的课程开发与培训。
description_en: Shenzhen Yidimu Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd., based in Longgang District—the Eastern Innovation & Reform Experimental Zone of Shenzhen—is a high-tech enterprise integrating R&D, manufacturing, sales, and service. The company develops and manufactures LCD-based stereolithography (SLA) and digital light processing (DLP) industrial-grade 3D printers, and provides curriculum development and training for smart classroom maker laboratories in educational institutions.

description_zh: 武汉美构信息科技有限公司创立于2018年11月，公司位于中国光谷，是一家专业从事制造业全链服务数字化的高科技企业。是国家高新技术企业、第十三批“3551光谷人才计划”创业人才企业、国家鼓励的软件企业、科技型中小企业，通过ISO9001质量管理体系认证，拥有软件著作权数十件。 美构立足科技创新，专注产品研发，是国内领先的智能制造企业数字化解决方案提供商。主打的产品FSD涵盖了CRM、MES、WMS、SRM等模块，在3D打印、机加工、激光设备、产品制造等行业领域均有广泛应用。 美构坚持“立足创新、专注质量、诚信服务、共同发展”的服务理念，为客户提供优质、安全、可靠的产品和技术服务。
description_en: Wuhan Meigou Information Technology Co., Ltd., founded in November 2018 and located in China’s Optics Valley, is a national high-tech enterprise specializing in end-to-end digital transformation services for manufacturing. Recognized under Wuhan’s '3551 Optics Valley Talent Program', as a state-supported software enterprise and a science-and-technology SME, and certified to ISO 9001, Meigou offers the FSD digital suite—comprising CRM, MES, WMS, and SRM modules—widely deployed across 3D printing, CNC machining, laser equipment, and general product manufacturing. Guided by innovation, quality, integrity, and co-development, Meigou delivers secure, reliable, and high-quality digital solutions.

description_zh: 赫丁环保是一家专业生产高效过滤部件(塑烧板)的生产厂家。公司拥有先进的生产设备和技术，可以满足客户各种复杂环境下的需求。我们可以提供定制化服务，根据客户的需求定制各种规格的高效过滤部件（塑烧板），以满足客户的个性化需求。公司专注于微孔过滤技术的研究和生产应用，公司研发生产的“赫丁Heding”塑烧板广泛应用于3D增材打印、生物制药、矿山开采、汽车喷涂、输送系统、隧道掘进、切割焊接、烟草、食品、冶金、电子、化工、贵金属回收、进口塑烧板（烧结板）替换等行业，并得到了客户的一致好评。
description_en: Shijiazhuang Heding Environmental Protection Technology Co., Ltd. is a specialist manufacturer of high-efficiency sintered plastic filter plates (sintered plates). Equipped with advanced production facilities and technical expertise, Heding delivers customized sintered plates meeting complex environmental requirements across diverse sectors—including additive manufacturing, biopharmaceuticals, mining, automotive painting, conveying systems, tunneling, cutting/welding, tobacco, food, metallurgy, electronics, chemicals, precious metal recovery, and replacement of imported sintered plates. Its 'Heding' brand sintered plates are widely acclaimed for performance and reliability.

description_zh: NatureWorks公司是一家先进材料的生产商，提供一系列来自可再生资源的生物聚合物和化学品组合。天然先进的Ingeo™生物材料的功能性和经济效益皆可媲美石油基材料，因其独特的性能备受青睐而被应用于制造多元化的产品，从咖啡胶囊，电器，以及茶包和3D打印线材等。NatureWorks公司由全球化学公司（GC）和Cargill嘉吉集团共同拥有。
description_en: NatureWorks LLC is a producer of advanced materials, offering a portfolio of biopolymers and chemicals derived from renewable resources. Its Ingeo™ biopolymers match petroleum-based materials in functionality and cost-effectiveness, and are valued for unique performance attributes in diverse applications—including coffee capsules, electronics, tea bags, and 3D printing filaments. NatureWorks is jointly owned by Global Chemicals (GC) and Cargill.

description_zh: 普罗森是全球领先的3D打印科技公司，自2016年成立，一直致力推动3D打印技术的发展，是最早研发推出黑白屏高速打印，并推导行业往4K、8K高精度切入的厂商，凭借着高精度与稳定的打印品质，成为专业用户的信赖之选。 我们提供一站式的3D打印技术方案，服务客户遍及工业制造、医疗、航空航太、金工珠宝、牙科、车用零件等多个领域，为合作伙伴有效缩短开发周期，建材增效，推动产品革新。
description_en: Proson is a global leader in 3D printing technology, founded in 2016. A pioneer in monochrome LCD high-speed printing, Proson drove industry adoption of 4K and 8K high-resolution capabilities. Renowned for exceptional print precision and consistency, Proson serves professional users across industrial manufacturing, healthcare, aerospace, jewelry, dentistry, and automotive components—delivering end-to-end 3D printing solutions that shorten development cycles, enhance productivity, and accelerate product innovation.

description_zh: 舍弗勒集团是一家专注驱动技术的科技公司。作为集团重要业务之一，舍弗勒智能装备，专注智能装备研发制造，依托70余年工业自动化经验，为汽车、工业、医疗等领域提供定制装配测试设备、标准化智能装备及数字化解决方案。 2023年，舍弗勒智能装备战略布局增材制造领域，成功收购选择性粉末沉积技术领军企业 Schaeffler Aerosint。通过整合其创新粉末铺设技术与自身丰富的自动化制造经验, 研发多款先进3D打印设备，推动多金属与陶瓷3D打印工业化应用，助力制造业智能升级与高质量发展。
description_en: Schaeffler Intelligent Equipment, a key business unit of the Schaeffler Group—a global technology leader in motion systems—leverages over 70 years of industrial automation expertise to deliver custom assembly and test equipment, standardized intelligent machinery, and digital solutions for automotive, industrial, and medical markets. In 2023, Schaeffler Intelligent Equipment expanded into additive manufacturing by acquiring Aerosint—the global leader in selective powder deposition technology. By integrating Aerosint’s innovative powder spreading technology with Schaeffler’s deep automation know-how, the unit now develops advanced multi-metal and ceramic 3D printers, accelerating industrial-scale adoption and supporting intelligent, high-quality manufacturing transformation.

description_zh: 东莞市德之健塑胶电子有限公司，深耕 3D 打印耗材领域已达 13 年之久，是一家集研发、生产、销售于一体的综合性 3D 打印耗材生产厂家。我们专注于为 3D 打印行业提供高质量、多样化的耗材解决方案。每月耗材产能可达 120 吨，现有 1000 台 3D 打印机为客户提供 3D 打印专属定制服务。
description_en: Dongguan Dezhi Jian Plastic & Electronics Co., Ltd. has specialized in 3D printing consumables for 13 years. As an integrated R&D, manufacturing, and sales enterprise, it provides high-quality, diversified filament solutions for the 3D printing industry. With monthly filament production capacity reaching 120 metric tons and a fleet of 1,000 3D printers dedicated to on-demand custom part manufacturing, Dezhi Jian supports rapid prototyping and low-volume production needs.

description_zh: 北京世佳博科技集团有限公司（以下简称“世佳博”）是搅拌摩擦焊细分领域全球知名的“整体解决方案” 提供商。公司2014年成立于北京，立足中国，服务全球市场。公司在河北固安、江苏昆山、重庆北碚、广东东莞建立工厂。公司拥有经验丰富的搅拌摩擦焊接专家团队，是省级“工业企业技术研发中心”、“国家高新技术”企业、“中关村高新技术”企业、北京市“专精特新”示范企业 、 国家级“先进工业母机”制造企业。
description_en: Beijing Shijia Bo Technology Group Co., Ltd. ('Shijia Bo') is a globally recognized provider of integrated solutions in friction stir welding (FSW). Founded in Beijing in 2014, the company serves global markets from manufacturing bases in Gu'an (Hebei), Kunshan (Jiangsu), Beibei (Chongqing), and Dongguan (Guangdong). Its expert FSW engineering team supports clients across aerospace, rail, automotive, and energy sectors. Shijia Bo holds provincial 'Industrial Enterprise Technology R&D Center' accreditation, national and Zhongguancun high-tech enterprise status, Beijing 'Specialized, Refined, Distinctive, and Innovative' demonstration enterprise designation, and national 'Advanced Machine Tool' manufacturing certification.

description_zh: 深圳市福佳电器有限公司是一家集研发、生产、销售为一体的开关电源生产企业。公司创建于1993年，注册资金2000万元，历经三十年的发展与沉淀，专心经营，逐步建立了产品的研发、生产、销售体系，企业不断发展壮大，成为具有一定规模的现代化管理企业和领先行业的电源管理专家。 企业本着以产品技术为基础，以产品质量信誉为目标，以客户满意为宗旨的管理理念，近年公司各项经济指标在国内同行业的同类产品中位居前列，受到业界及媒体的一致好评。公司通过ISO9001：2015质量管理体系认证、企业实施ERP系统管理、是广东省电源行业协会理事单位、2012年被评为深圳市安全管理标杆企业。企
description_en: Shenzhen Fujia Electric Co., Ltd., established in 1993 with registered capital of RMB 20 million, is an integrated R&D, manufacturing, and sales enterprise specializing in switch-mode power supplies. With three decades of focused development, Fujia has built a mature product development, production, and sales system and evolved into a modern, large-scale enterprise and industry-leading power management expert. Certified to ISO 9001:2015, managed via ERP, and serving as a council member of the Guangdong Power Supply Industry Association, Fujia was named a Shenzhen Safety Management Model Enterprise in 2012. Its products consistently rank among the top performers in domestic peer-group economic indicators.

description_zh: 专业的3D影像综合方案服务商 产品：公司产品涵盖写实人像3D重建、3D卡通生成以及3D浮雕的生成与彩色3D打印。 架构：拥有软硬件研发中心、 3D影像采集设备制造基地、彩色3D打印基地、品牌运营中心。 渠道：公司旗下拥3D人像业务连锁品牌速哇和SHAREWOW，公司在国内外拥有70多家连锁门店，同时与多家知名品牌建立业务合作关系。 技术：公司在AI3D重建、3D模型智能修复、硬件成像算法、彩色3D打印批量化交付、以及全流程数字化管理等，是全面掌握3D人像从数据采集生成到成品交付各个环节核心技术的企业。
description_en: A professional provider of integrated 3D imaging solutions, specializing in photorealistic 3D portrait reconstruction, 3D cartoon generation, 3D relief modeling, and full-color 3D printing. The company operates R&D centers for software and hardware, a 3D imaging acquisition equipment manufacturing base, a full-color 3D printing production facility, and a brand operations center. Its proprietary 3D portrait service chains—Suwa and SHAREWOW—comprise over 70 franchise stores domestically and internationally, with strategic partnerships established with multiple renowned brands. Core competencies include AI-powered 3D reconstruction, intelligent 3D model repair, hardware imaging algorithms, mass-production-ready full-color 3D printing, and end-to-end digital workflow management.

name_zh: 杭州非白三维科技有限公司
name_en: Hangzhou Feibai 3D Technology Co., Ltd.
description_zh: 杭州非白三维科技有限公司是一家专注3D机器视觉底层算法技术研发和3D机器视觉传感器制造的企业；2015年11月在杭州梦想小镇成立，经过多年的积累和发展目前已经实现了从传感器、光学系统、核心底层算法库的全部自研发。目前是全行业唯一完成全栈自主的厂商。同时是国家级高新技术企业、浙江省专精特新中小企业，浙江省科技型中小企业、浙江省企业高新技术研发开发中心，雏鹰企业、双软企业；通过IOS9001质量管理体系认证；作为杭州硬科技代表，CCTV曾多次直播报道非白三维公司产品。在2019年全国双创周中，非白三维是为数不多同时在金色长廊和国际学术中心同时展示的企业，并接受了李克强总理的检阅。
description_en: A national high-tech enterprise focused on R&D of foundational algorithms for 3D machine vision and manufacturing of 3D machine vision sensors. Founded in November 2015 in Hangzhou’s Dream Town, the company has achieved full-stack self-research and development—including sensors, optical systems, and core algorithm libraries—making it the industry’s sole fully autonomous vendor. Certified to ISO 9001, it holds designations as a Zhejiang Province ‘Specialized, Refined, Distinctive, and Innovative’ SME, Zhejiang Science & Technology SME, Zhejiang Provincial Enterprise High-Tech R&D Center, ‘Chick Eagle’ Enterprise, and ‘Dual-Software’ Enterprise. Recognized as a representative of Hangzhou’s hard-tech innovation, its products have been featured in multiple CCTV live broadcasts. At the 2019 National Mass Entrepreneurship and Innovation Week, Feibai 3D was among the few enterprises simultaneously exhibiting in both the Golden Corridor and the International Academic Center, receiving inspection by Premier Li Keqiang.

description_zh: 上海名鹰科技有限公司是一家专注于传动带与传动带轮产品研发、制造与销售的高新技术企业。公司总部位于中国上海，依托长三角地区完善的工业配套体系与便捷的交通网络，致力于为全球客户提供高效、稳定、耐用的动力传动解决方案。
description_en: A high-tech enterprise specializing in the R&D, manufacturing, and sales of power transmission belts and pulleys. Headquartered in Shanghai and leveraging the Yangtze River Delta’s robust industrial ecosystem and superior transportation infrastructure, the company delivers efficient, reliable, and durable power transmission solutions to global customers.

It specializes in 3D printing materials across a broad hardness spectrum and PEBA elastomers. Its flagship TPU filament portfolio includes matte, lightweight foamed, high- and low-hardness, non-yellowing, low-temperature-resistant, bio-based, food-grade, medical-grade, and high-elasticity PEBA series—offering versatile flexible 3D printing materials.

description_zh: 金华造物新材料有限公司成立于2018年8月，是一家专注于高端3D打印材料研发、生产和销售的先锋企业。我们的卓越不仅体现在制造上，还致力于为众多尊贵的客户提供OEM/ODM服务，确保每一件产品都符合最高的质量和定制标准。 我们拥有一支由100多位专业人员组成的团队，我们利用集体的专业知识和热情推动3D打印行业的创新。我们的设施面积达9000多平方米，配备了先进的设备和技术，使我们能够每年生产多达1200吨的高品质3D打印丝材。
description_en: Founded in August 2018, Jinhua Zaowu New Materials is a pioneering enterprise dedicated to the R&D, production, and sales of premium 3D printing materials. Beyond manufacturing excellence, it provides OEM/ODM services tailored to discerning clients, ensuring strict adherence to highest quality and customization standards. Supported by a team of over 100 professionals and a 9,000+ m² state-of-the-art facility equipped with advanced machinery, the company produces up to 1,200 metric tons of high-performance 3D printing filaments annually.

With a 50-acre campus and an annual production capacity of 8,000 metric tons, its resins are widely applied in UV coatings, UV inks, and UV adhesives.
