description_zh: 科森塑业（山东）有限责任公司是旭科新材料全资子公司，依托旭科在资金、技术、人才、原料等方面领先优势，聚焦新型高端塑料制品的科研、生产、销售和技术服务。位于山东省日照市的制造基地引进国内外先进生产设备，投资建设3D打印材料、一次性可降解制品、新型包装材料等多条生产线，致力打造成为行业领先的高端化、智能化、洁净化绿色工厂；位于浙江省宁波市的全球销售中心聚焦品牌宣传、产品推广、国际贸易与客户服务，携手行业精英，共谱产业发展新篇章。科森塑业正以科技创新赋予传统塑料制品新的魅力，为塑造更加绿色、健康、舒适的生态环境而砥砺前行。
description_en: A wholly owned subsidiary of Xuke New Materials, Kesen Plastics (Shandong) leverages its parent company’s leadership in capital, technology, talent, and raw materials to focus on scientific research, manufacturing, sales, and technical services for next-generation high-end plastic products. Its manufacturing base in Rizhao, Shandong features advanced domestic and international production equipment, supporting dedicated lines for 3D printing materials, single-use biodegradable products, and novel packaging materials—aiming to establish a leading green factory distinguished by high-end capabilities, intelligence, and clean production. Its Global Sales Center in Ningbo, Zhejiang drives brand promotion, product marketing, international trade, and customer service, collaborating with industry leaders to advance sectoral development. Through technological innovation, Kesen Plastics is redefining traditional plastics for greener, healthier, and more comfortable ecosystems.

description_zh: 德国DIAMANT有限责任公司 -- 增材制造的创新密封解决方案 DIAMANT有限责任公司数十年来一直致力于开发和生产用于工业应用的高性能聚合物。我们的核心技术在于高填充的高性能聚合物体系以及低粘度、具有毛细活性的密封剂，它能够可靠地封闭孔隙，实现零件液密气密。凭借这项技术，我们为增材制造开启了新的机遇：针对性密封不仅能提高质量和功能，还能提升成本效益 —— 例如，通过实现更轻的结构、减少材料消耗和缩短打印时间。 在TCT展会上，我们将展示专为3D打印开发的密封解决方案，旨在使增材制造的部件达到市场要求的耐用性。
description_en: DIAMANT GmbH — Innovative Sealing Solutions for Additive Manufacturing. For decades, DIAMANT has developed and manufactured high-performance polymers for industrial applications. Its core expertise lies in highly filled high-performance polymer systems and low-viscosity, capillary-active sealants that reliably close pores to achieve liquid- and gas-tightness. This technology unlocks new opportunities for additive manufacturing: targeted sealing enhances part quality, functionality, and cost-efficiency—e.g., enabling lighter structures, reduced material consumption, and shorter print times. At TCT, DIAMANT will showcase sealing solutions engineered specifically for 3D-printed components to meet market requirements for durability.

description_zh: 无锡商测检测技术有限公司(简称商测检测)于2016年6月在江苏无锡组建成立，2018年12月通过中国合格评定国家认可委员会的CNAS认可，2019年12月通过CMA江苏省市场管理局认可。 无锡商测检测技术有限公司主要从事金属及非金属材料及零部件的检测、检验、分析服务,金属及非金属材料领域内的技术培训、技术咨询、技术开发等服务的第三方检测及认证机构。具有CNAS和CMA资质，并与国内外多家知名企业进行业务合作和技术交流，获得一致好评和广泛认可。
description_en: Wuxi Shangce Testing Technology Co., Ltd. (‘Shangce Testing’) was established in June 2016 in Wuxi, Jiangsu Province. It received CNAS accreditation from the China National Accreditation Service for Conformity Assessment in December 2018 and CMA accreditation from the Jiangsu Provincial Market Supervision Administration in December 2019. As an independent third-party testing and certification body, Shangce Testing provides inspection, testing, and analytical services for metallic and non-metallic materials and components; technical training, consulting, and R&D in materials science; and related value-added services. Holding both CNAS and CMA accreditations, it collaborates extensively with leading domestic and international enterprises, earning consistent acclaim and broad recognition.

description_zh: 珠海赛纳数字医疗技术有限公司是赛纳科技旗下专注于数字医疗领域技术创新应用和产品开发的专业化企业。公司针对心血管领域、肿瘤领域等重大复杂病例的临床诊疗需求，面向医疗机构提供三维数字化技术支持与产品解决方案，如3D建模服务、3D打印技术服务、创新性定制化医疗器械等。 重点研究3D打印技术在临床的数字化3D模型重建和打印、AI建模软件开发及应用、云平台系统、手术规划、手术导板、医疗植入物、康复辅助器具、手术训练、解剖教学、数字化3D模型的生物力学分析等方面应用。
description_en: A specialized subsidiary of Sinno Technology focusing on innovation-driven applications and product development in digital healthcare. Addressing clinical needs for complex cases in cardiology and oncology, the company delivers 3D digital technical support and product solutions—including 3D modeling, 3D printing services, and innovative customized medical devices—to healthcare institutions. Key R&D areas encompass clinical applications of 3D printing for digital 3D model reconstruction and fabrication, AI-powered modeling software development and deployment, cloud platform systems, surgical planning and patient-specific surgical guides, medical implants, rehabilitation assistive devices, surgical training models, anatomical teaching tools, and biomechanical analysis of digital 3D models.

description_zh: Lotactree是隆祺旗下的3D打印品牌，总部位于葡萄牙波尔图。此外，我们还在中国、越南、印度尼西亚、美国和墨西哥建立了分公司、工厂和服务网点，提供本地的生产和服务。Lotactree致力于研究、开发和生产高品质和创新的3D打印材料。我们的使命是通过提供卓越的材料解决方案来推动3D打印技术的发展，同时帮助客户实现他们的创意和制造愿望。我们的核心价值观是高品质、可持续发展和创新。通过不懈的努力，我们不断满足客户需求，为全球3D打印爱好者和制造专业人士提供最佳的材料选择。
description_en: Lotactree—a 3D printing brand under Longqi Group—is headquartered in Porto, Portugal. With subsidiaries, production facilities, and service hubs in China, Vietnam, Indonesia, the United States, and Mexico, Lotactree delivers localized manufacturing and support. Committed to R&D and production of high-quality, innovative 3D printing materials, its mission is to advance additive manufacturing through superior material solutions while empowering customers to realize their creative and manufacturing goals. Guided by core values of quality, sustainability, and innovation, Lotactree continuously refines its offerings to provide optimal material choices for global 3D printing enthusiasts and professional manufacturers.

description_zh: 江西宝航新材料有限公司 是中国宝安集团（股票代码： 000009） 旗下专业从事金属3D打印材料及制件、 金属基复合材料及制件的高新技术企业。 公司于2018年1月在南昌注册成立， 注册资金2340万元，母公司为北京宝航新材料有限公司。 公司主要产品有： 微细球形铝/铝合金粉末、 铝合金3D打印粉末材料及制件、 铝基碳化硅（AlSiC） 复合材料及制件、 AlSiC热沉片、 AlSiC IGBT基板、 精密激光加工设备等。 公司坐落于南昌市高新区航空城， 毗邻中航工业洪都航空新厂区， 致力于成长为一家世界一流的航空航天新材料企业。
description_en: A high-tech enterprise under China Baoan Group (Stock Code: 000009), specializing in metal 3D printing powders and components, as well as metal-matrix composites and related parts. Established in January 2018 in Nanchang with registered capital of RMB 23.4 million, the company is a subsidiary of Beijing Baohang New Materials Co., Ltd. Its principal products include fine spherical aluminum/aluminum alloy powders, aluminum alloy 3D printing powders and components, aluminum-silicon-carbide (AlSiC) composites and components, AlSiC heat sinks, AlSiC IGBT substrates, and precision laser processing equipment. Located in the Aviation City zone of Nanchang High-Tech Industrial Development Zone—adjacent to AVIC Hongdu’s new aviation facility—the company aims to become a world-class aerospace new-materials enterprise.

Its mission is ‘to make advanced optoelectronic technologies accessible.’

description_zh: 宝鸡嘉琦金属有限公司始创于2011年，跻身省级高新技术企业与“专特新”企业行列，汇聚研发、生产、检验、销售全链条专业人才，深耕钛合金领域，手握多项发明专利，彰显强劲技术底蕴。专注高端钛及钛合金产品研发生产，涵盖增材制造、医用外科植入物、航空航天航海、压力容器等多领域所需产品，远销欧美、日韩、亚太等多个地区，享誉海内外市场。新厂区斥资1.5亿元打造，拥有国际生产设备与精密检测仪器，年产能达两千多吨，筑牢品质生产根基。已通过Bureau Veritas、AS9100D航空航天质量体系双认证，恪守“产品质量为企业生命”之宗旨，以科学管理赋能发展，以持续改进精益求精，矢志跻身国际一流钛产品生产企。
description_en: Established in 2011, Baoji Jiaqi Metal is a provincial high-tech enterprise and ‘Specialized, Refined, Distinctive, and Innovative’ (‘Zhuan Jing Te Xin’) enterprise. With comprehensive expertise spanning R&D, production, quality inspection, and sales, the company excels in titanium and titanium alloy materials—holding numerous invention patents and demonstrating strong technical capability. It focuses on high-end titanium/titanium alloy R&D and manufacturing for additive manufacturing, medical surgical implants, aerospace, marine, and pressure vessel applications, exporting globally to North America, Europe, Japan, Korea, and the Asia-Pacific region. Its new RMB 150-million production facility features world-class equipment and precision metrology instruments, achieving an annual capacity exceeding 2,000 metric tons. Certified to Bureau Veritas and AS9100D aerospace quality standards, the company upholds ‘product quality as corporate life,’ applying scientific management and continuous improvement to pursue world-class titanium product manufacturing excellence.

description_zh: 北京中孚悦达真空科技有限公司(www.jointvac.com)是一家专业设计，生产，制造真空炉的高新技术企业，团队由在真空热处理行业贰拾年以上专业人员创建。创始人员本着专业， 创新的原则，结合多年的现场实践经验，对现有真空炉设备进行了更加合理的改进创新，力求为客户提供全套完整的真空热工技术解决方案！目前，公司拥有多项知识产权，其中发明专利4项，实用新型专利16项，外观设计专利2项；软件著作专利10项，从产品的稳定性、绿色环保、节能等方面进行多项创新。公司产品面向军工，服务航空，航天，船舶，汽车等行业，已向航空工业，中国航发，中国航天科工，中国航天科技，兵器工业集团，中核，中船重工等。
description_en: A high-tech enterprise specializing in the design, manufacturing, and production of vacuum furnaces. Founded by professionals with over 20 years of experience in vacuum heat treatment, the company combines deep field expertise with innovative engineering to deliver optimized, next-generation vacuum furnace systems. It provides complete vacuum thermal processing solutions, backed by extensive intellectual property—including 4 invention patents, 16 utility model patents, 2 design patents, and 10 software copyrights—focused on system stability, environmental sustainability, and energy efficiency. Its products serve defense, aerospace, aviation, shipbuilding, automotive, and other strategic sectors, with major clients including AVIC, AECC, CASIC, CASC, Norinco, CNNC, and CSIC.

description_zh: 上海昊量光电设备有限公司是一家专业的光电产品代理商。我们专注于光电领域的技术服务与产品经销，致力于引进国外顶级光电产品制造商的技术与产品，为国内客户提供优质的产品与服务。目前，昊量光电已经与全球几十家知名光电产品制造商建立了紧密的合作关系。其代理品牌均处于相关领域的发展前沿，产品包括各类激光器与光电器件，所涉及的领域涵盖了材料加工、光通讯、生物医疗、科学研究与国防等。
description_en: A professional distributor of optoelectronic products, specializing in technical services and distribution within the optoelectronics domain. Aolight introduces cutting-edge technologies and products from world-leading optoelectronic manufacturers to serve the Chinese market with high-quality solutions. It maintains close partnerships with dozens of globally renowned optoelectronic brands, representing frontier technologies across lasers, optoelectronic components, materials processing, optical communications, biomedicine, scientific research, and defense applications.

description_zh: 沈阳众拓机器人是国家高新技术企业，专注于桁架机器人和龙门机器人的研发与制造，并提供完整的定制化解决方案。尤其在重载、大跨距、高精度的龙门和桁架机器人方面具备核心技术优势。公司致力于满足工厂自动化、信息化和智能化的需求，提供从研发、设计、制造到调试的全流程整体解决方案。众拓机器人特别擅长在高温、低温、尘雾、辐射、防爆、水下等特殊应用场景中提供定制化产品和服务。产品广泛应用于汽车、火工防爆、航天航空、钢铁冶金、工程机械、轨道交通、物流分拣、声场测量、电子等多个领域。同时，众拓机器人专注特种直线模组的研发定制。众拓模组“重载+长距+高速+精密”四位一体技术架构，可满足各工工业领域高端严苛需求。
description_en: A national high-tech enterprise specializing in the R&D and manufacturing of gantry and portal robots, delivering comprehensive custom-engineered automation solutions. It holds core technological advantages in heavy-duty, long-span, and high-precision gantry and portal robotic systems. Committed to advancing factory automation, informatization, and intelligence, Zhongtuo provides end-to-end turnkey solutions—from R&D and design to manufacturing and commissioning. The company excels in developing customized robotic systems for extreme environments, including high/low temperatures, dust/fog, radiation, explosion-proof, and underwater conditions. Its products serve automotive, pyrotechnics/explosives safety, aerospace, metallurgy, construction machinery, rail transit, logistics sorting, acoustic field measurement, and electronics industries. Zhongtuo also specializes in custom linear motion modules, featuring its proprietary ‘heavy-duty + long-stroke + high-speed + high-precision’ integrated architecture to meet stringent requirements across demanding industrial applications.

description_zh: 奥影检测科技（上海）有限公司是一家专注于研发、生产和销售高端三维 X 射线工业CT系统的高新技术企业。自成立以来，奥影始终坚持精益求精的品质和专业技术创新，以行业先行者的技术积淀与国标起草单位的专业底色，致力于为客户提供卓越的X射线工业 CT系统解决方案。 奥影已构建了涵盖Micro-CT、纳米CT、原位加载CT、高能加速器CT、小动物CT 等在内的完备的工业 CT类产品体系，目前已深度应用于高校科研、航空航天、军工船舶、汽车制造、电子元器件、生物医疗、新能源等众多行业领域。无论是无损检测、材料分析、质量控制还是产品设计，奥影的X射线CT产品都能精准满足客户的需求。
description_en: A high-tech enterprise specializing in the R&D, manufacturing, and sales of high-end industrial X-ray computed tomography (CT) systems. Since inception, Aoying has pursued technical excellence and innovation, drawing upon its status as an industry pioneer and contributor to national CT standards. It offers a comprehensive industrial CT product portfolio—including Micro-CT, nano-CT, in-situ loading CT, high-energy accelerator CT, and small-animal CT—widely deployed in academia, aerospace, defense & shipbuilding, automotive manufacturing, electronics, biomedical research, and new energy sectors. Whether for non-destructive testing, materials analysis, quality control, or product design validation, Aoying’s X-ray CT systems precisely meet diverse customer requirements.

description_zh: 深圳市蓝德欧智能控制技术有限公司成立于2016年，是国家高新技术企业、专精特新企业及广东省创新企业。公司秉持“科技引领未来，创新改变生活”的理念，专注于高品质消费级3D打印机DIY套装的研发与制造，产品在海内外市场广受认可。 公司以创新为驱动，拥有行业专家与资深工程师组成的研发团队，持续推动产品技术迭代与品质提升。同时，我们建立完善的售后服务体系，为用户提供全方位技术支持，确保优质用户体验。 凭借强大的研发实力、可靠的产品品质及以客户为中心的服务体系，蓝德欧在3D打印领域积累了良好的市场声誉。未来，公司将继续坚持创新、品质与服务的核心价值观，携手合作伙伴推动3D打印技术发展，共创美好未来。
description_en: Founded in 2016, Landou Intelligent Control Technology Co., Ltd. is a National High-Tech Enterprise, a ‘Specialized, Refined, Distinctive, and Innovative’ (Zhuan Jing Te Xin) enterprise, and a Guangdong Provincial Innovation Enterprise. The company specializes in the R&D and manufacturing of high-quality DIY kits for consumer-grade 3D printers, with products widely recognized in domestic and international markets. Backed by an expert R&D team comprising industry specialists and senior engineers, Landou continuously advances product iteration and quality enhancement. It maintains a comprehensive after-sales service system delivering end-to-end technical support to ensure an exceptional user experience. With strong R&D capabilities, reliable product quality, and a customer-centric service philosophy, Landou has established a solid reputation in the 3D printing industry.

description_zh: 上海盖泽激光科技有限公司，专业从事智能激光解决方案、核心器件设计研发与制造、激光熔覆用超耐磨材料研发、激光增材再制造服务。通过了ISO9001体系认证，拥有完善的质量保证体系和先进的激光加工设备。 盖泽激光以自有专利技术为基础，以徐滨士院士科研团队为主要科研力量， 针对表面处理行业的特点，开发出了针对不同具体应用的光学镜头、送粉喷嘴以及送粉装置，并且针对特殊应用提供解决方案。可为不同领域，不同维度的客户提供激光表面处理核心零部件。与AbicorBinzel成立激光研究院开发激光复合热源产品。 客户的业务覆盖航空航天、铁路、船舶、矿山、电力、冶金、模具、���床等行业。
description_en: Shanghai Gaize Laser Technology Co., Ltd. is a specialist provider of intelligent laser solutions, core component design and manufacturing, ultra-wear-resistant materials for laser cladding, and laser-based additive remanufacturing services. Certified to ISO 9001, the company operates a robust quality assurance system and advanced laser processing equipment. Leveraging proprietary patented technologies and guided by the research team of Academician Binshi Xu, Gaize Laser develops application-specific optical lenses, powder feed nozzles, and powder delivery systems tailored to surface engineering requirements. It supplies core laser surface treatment components across diverse dimensions and applications. In collaboration with Abicor Binzel, Gaize established a joint Laser Research Institute to develop hybrid laser heat-source products. Its customers span aerospace, rail transportation, marine, mining, power generation, metallurgy, mold manufacturing, and machine tool industries.

description_zh: 浙江超领智能科技有限公司自主开发了颗粒料挤出式3D打印装备，以及与之配套的高性能纤维增强复合材料，形成了材料----装备----工艺完整的成套技术。公司已形成带有回抽功能的精准流量控制3D打印装备、高温3D打印装备、机器人辅助3D打印装备、超大型3D打印装备等系列产品。拥有自主知识产权多项，包括发明专利、软件著作权、商标等。围绕颗粒料的3D打印，已经在航空航天、汽车制造、复材模具、医疗器械等多个领域得到应用。
description_en: Zhejiang Chaoling Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd. has independently developed granular-feed extrusion-based 3D printing equipment and complementary high-performance fiber-reinforced composite materials, establishing a complete integrated technology chain covering materials, equipment, and process. Its product portfolio includes precision flow-controlled 3D printers with retraction capability, high-temperature 3D printers, robot-assisted 3D printers, and ultra-large-format 3D printers. The company holds multiple intellectual property rights, including invention patents, software copyrights, and registered trademarks. Its granular-feed 3D printing technology is applied across aerospace, automotive manufacturing, composite tooling, and medical devices.

description_zh: 东莞拓森塑料机械有限公司成立于2015年，位于交通便利，环境优美的制造业名城-东莞，公司占地面积10000平方拥有专业技术人员及员工50人。专业生产精密中小型塑料挤出机,年生产能力超过150台。公司在3d打印耗材挤出生产领域拥有10多年的经验。我们的主要 产品包括单色/双色/三色及彩虹色3d打印耗材挤出机。 自2015年以来，我们已与全球各国的3D打印耗材厂家合作，如美国、德国、波兰、土耳巴西等国家。国内市场，我们也与众多知名3D耗材厂家有良好的合作关系。
description_en: Founded in 2015 and headquartered in Dongguan—a renowned manufacturing hub with convenient logistics and an attractive environment—Dongguan Tuosen Plastic Machinery Co., Ltd. occupies a 10,000 m² facility and employs 50 professionals, including specialized technicians. The company manufactures high-precision small- and medium-sized plastic extruders, with an annual production capacity exceeding 150 units. With over a decade of expertise in extrusion-based 3D printing filament production, its core offerings include monochrome, bichrome, trichrome, and rainbow-color 3D printing filament extruders. Since 2015, Tuosen has partnered with filament manufacturers globally—including in the U.S., Germany, Poland, Turkey, and Brazil—and maintains strong collaborative relationships with leading domestic filament producers.

description_zh: AMAREA Technology 专注于多材料 3D 打印技术。 作为一家高科技初创企业，AMAREA Technology 研发并销售 MMJ ProX 系列工业级多材料 3D 打印机，该系列设备可在单一打印过程中加工并组合多达六种不同材料，包括先进工程陶瓷、金属、玻璃、硬质合金、复合材料及颗粒填充聚合物，适用于在严苛环境下使用的高功能性零部件制造。 面向希望开发此前难以实现或无法实现的创新产品的工业企业及科研机构，AMAREA Technology 不仅提供丰富的材料组合方案，还在多材料设计与制造方面提供专业咨询与技术支持。
description_en: AMAREA Technology is a high-tech startup focused on multi-material 3D printing. It develops and markets the MMJ ProX series of industrial-grade multi-material 3D printers, capable of processing and combining up to six distinct materials—including advanced engineering ceramics, metals, glass, cemented carbides, composites, and particle-filled polymers—in a single print job. These systems enable the fabrication of highly functional components for extreme environments. AMAREA serves industrial enterprises and research institutions seeking to realize previously unachievable or impossible innovations, offering not only versatile material combinations but also expert consulting and technical support in multi-material design and manufacturing.

description_zh: ASTM增材制造卓越中心（ASTM AM COE）是一个全球领先的倡议，致力于推动增材制造（AM），亦称3D打印领域的发展。ASTM AM CoE 由 ASTM 国际标准组织成立，汇集了行业领导者、研究人员和创新者，通过培训、认证和咨询服务，推动全面标准的制定，促进创新，并推广增材制造的最佳实践。
description_en: The ASTM Additive Manufacturing Center of Excellence (ASTM AM CoE) is a globally leading initiative dedicated to advancing additive manufacturing (AM), also known as 3D printing. Established by ASTM International, the AM CoE unites industry leaders, researchers, and innovators to drive the development of comprehensive standards through training, certification, and consultancy services—fostering innovation and promoting best practices across the AM ecosystem.

description_zh: 上海量维信息科技有限公司是聚焦高端制造领域的数字化技术服务商，深度融合 nTop 拓扑优化技术与 3D 打印工艺，为航空航天、新能源汽车等行业提供从结构设计到制造落地的一体化解决方案。我们依托 nTop 的算法能力，结合增材制造工艺特性，助力客户实现复杂轻量化结构的高效设计与生产，大幅提升产品性能并缩短研发周期。本次 TCT 展会，我们将展示基于 nTop+3D 打印+AI的能力，针对行业包括航空航天、汽车、工业、热管理、消费品等，包含拓扑优化/轻量化等标杆案例，欢迎莅临交流。
description_en: Shanghai Liangwei Information Technology Co., Ltd. is a digital technology service provider specializing in high-end manufacturing. By deeply integrating nTop’s topology optimization algorithms with additive manufacturing processes, Liangwei delivers end-to-end integrated solutions—from structural design to production—for aerospace and new-energy vehicle industries. Leveraging nTop’s computational capabilities and AM process knowledge, Liangwei enables efficient design and fabrication of complex lightweight structures, significantly enhancing product performance and shortening development cycles. At TCT, Liangwei will showcase its nTop + 3D printing + AI capabilities across aerospace, automotive, industrial, thermal management, and consumer goods sectors, featuring benchmark case studies in topology optimization and lightweighting.

description_zh: 陕西鼎益科技有限公司成立于2004年，专注于3D打印、增材制造领域的特种牌号以及钛合金材料的研发、生产、制造与服务。3D打印增材制造专用的钛合金丝棒材产品，用于旋转电极雾化，感应熔融气体雾化，等离子雾化以及等离子体沉积打印等航天航空，医疗高端领域。产品成功进入了波音，空客，GE，VSMPO等航工工业领域供应链，多项核心技术达到了国际先进水平。
description_en: Founded in 2004, Shaanxi Dingyi Technology Co., Ltd. specializes in the R&D, production, and service of specialty-grade titanium alloys and other advanced materials for 3D printing and additive manufacturing. Its titanium alloy wire and bar products are engineered for critical AM processes including rotating electrode atomization (PREP), induction-melting gas atomization (IGA), plasma atomization (PA), and plasma deposition printing—serving high-end aerospace and medical applications. Dingyi’s products have been qualified into supply chains of Boeing, Airbus, GE Aviation, and VSMPO-AVISMA, with several core technologies achieving international advanced levels.

description_zh: 诚联电源股份有限公司成立于2001年，是专业从事AC/DC、DC/DC系列开关电源研发、制造、销售的高新技术企业。总部坐落于常州市高新技术产业开发区 ， 并在深圳设立研发中心 ，全国多地均有销售和服务中心 ， 并积极拓展海外市场并建立服务中心。现为中国电源学会会员、 中国光电协会理事、 中国照明学会成员单位。 品质、 技术和团队是诚联电源的核心优势。
description_en: Chenglian Power Supply Co., Ltd., founded in 2001, is a high-tech enterprise specializing in the R&D, manufacturing, and sales of AC/DC and DC/DC switching power supplies. Headquartered in Changzhou High-Tech Industrial Development Zone, it maintains an R&D center in Shenzhen and sales and service centers across China and overseas. Chenglian is a member of the China Power Supply Society, a council member of the China Optoelectronics Association, and a member unit of the China Illumination Society. Its core strengths lie in quality, technological capability, and professional team expertise.

description_zh: 广州劲云电子科技有限公司（劲云三维）成立于2015年，致力于现代化智能制造领域，集3D打印机研发、生产、销售及3D打印整体解决方案于一体。公司拥有多项自主知识产权及软件著作权，在智能制造领域卓有建树，此外，公司是广州市增材制造行业协会理事单位，为广州市3D打印产业的发展承担着一份责任。在3D打印方面有更全面的服务指引和资源信息，确保能为客户提供最优最新的3D打印解决方案。目前公司的产品已远销美国、俄罗斯、韩国、伊朗、巴基斯坦及港澳台等海外地区，获得国内外众多用户的信赖和好评，使公司更加坚定的在3D打印领域扬帆起航。
description_en: Guangzhou Jingyun Electronics Technology Co., Ltd. (Jingyun 3D), established in 2015, is an integrated provider of modern intelligent manufacturing solutions—covering 3D printer R&D, manufacturing, sales, and holistic 3D printing system integration. The company holds multiple independent intellectual property rights and software copyrights, and serves as a council member of the Guangzhou Additive Manufacturing Industry Association, actively contributing to local 3D printing industry development. With comprehensive service guidance and extensive resource networks, Jingyun 3D ensures optimal, cutting-edge 3D printing solutions for clients. Its products are exported to the U.S., Russia, South Korea, Iran, Pakistan, and Hong Kong, Macau, and Taiwan—earning widespread trust and acclaim from global users.

description_en: Guangzhou Xuzhiyuan Technology Co., Ltd. launched the ATAZ industrial power supply brand and focuses on the R&D and manufacturing of professional-standard industrial power supplies. Core technologies center on power electronics and automated control, with product lines spanning chassis-mount, modular, and DIN-rail power supplies. Applications span industrial automation, new energy, medical devices, intelligent manufacturing, charging/swapping infrastructure, and smart city systems.

description_zh: CurTec设计、制造和销售高性能塑料包装。在全球范围内，CurTec帮助领先的制药、特种化学品和食品配料公司保护、识别和营销其高价值的产品，卫生、安全和经过认证对这些公司至关重要。 我们的产品帮用户提高其产品价值，降低运营成本，并使供应链更具可持续性。 CurTec是一家通过GMP认证的包装公司。 CurTec是一家面向未来的包装公司。我们的可持续发展路线图确保我们在即将出台的立法和实现您自己的可持续发展目标方面仍然是您可靠的合作伙伴。
description_en: CurTec designs, manufactures, and sells high-performance plastic packaging. Globally, CurTec supports leading pharmaceutical, specialty chemical, and food ingredient companies in protecting, identifying, and marketing their high-value products—where hygiene, safety, and regulatory certification are critical. Its packaging solutions enhance product value, reduce operational costs, and improve supply chain sustainability. As a GMP-certified packaging company and a future-focused partner, CurTec’s sustainability roadmap ensures continued reliability in meeting upcoming legislation and customers’ own ESG goals.

description_zh: 深圳市顺远光学有限责任公司成立于2022年8月，公司坐落于深圳市龙华区，前身为深圳市万顺兴科技有限公司光学事业部。 自2020年开始，专注于激光行业光学镜片的研发、生产和销售，拥有自主知识产权，获得多项发明专利，顺远光学拥有成熟的标准化经营、规范化管理模式，并率先通过IS09001:2015质量管理体系认证。 产品涵盖激光远心场镜、消色差场镜、平场场镜、碳化硅镜片、高功率激光透镜、石英柱，现有研发、专业生产技术人员120余人，拥有专业的研发、生产制造体系和服务团队，为广大客户提供优质的激光光学产品和服务。
description_en: Founded in August 2022 and headquartered in Longhua District, Shenzhen, Shenzhen Shunyuan Optics Co., Ltd. evolved from the optics division of Shenzhen Wanshunxing Technology Co., Ltd. Since 2020, it has specialized in R&D, manufacturing, and sales of laser optics, holding multiple invention patents and independent IP rights. Shunyuan Optics operates under standardized, regulated management and was among the first to achieve ISO 9001:2015 certification. Its product range includes telecentric F-theta lenses, achromatic F-theta lenses, flat-field F-theta lenses, silicon carbide mirrors, high-power laser lenses, and fused silica cylindrical lenses. With over 120 R&D and production engineers and a dedicated service team, it delivers premium laser optical components and services worldwide.

description_zh: 合心传动系统有限公司成立于1995年，专业致力于传动产品的研发与生产，是中国高品质传动产品的制造商。总公司位于浙江省慈溪市慈东工业开发区，拥有4万多平方米的生产基地和国际领先的制造设备和检测仪器。专业生产农机包布带、农机切边带、橡胶同步带、多楔带、特种带、工业V带、汽车同步带、PU同步带等系列产品，目前已达到了年产各种橡胶传动带1000万条生产规模。
description_en: Hexin Drive Systems Co., Ltd., founded in 1995, is a professional manufacturer of high-quality power transmission products in China. Headquartered in Cidong Industrial Development Zone, Cixi City, Zhejiang Province, it operates a 40,000+ m² production base equipped with internationally leading manufacturing and inspection equipment. Its product portfolio includes agricultural machinery wrapped belts, agricultural machinery cut-edge belts, rubber synchronous belts, poly-V belts, specialty belts, industrial V-belts, automotive synchronous belts, and PU synchronous belts—with an annual production capacity of 10 million rubber transmission belts.

description_zh: 深圳升华三维科技（2017年成立）是中国金属·陶瓷间接3D打印技术开拓者。核心团队源自中南大学，提供从打印机、多材料打印、后处理到服务的全工艺链解决方案。公司研发人员占比超50%，已通过ISO9001及CE/ROHS认证，拥有全球商标及30+项专利，获国家高新技术企业认证。产品覆盖10多个国家，服务于航天、医疗、汽车等领域。升华三维坚持技术创新，以高性价比方案推动增材制造高质量发展。
description_en: Shenzhen Upshine 3D Technology Co., Ltd. (founded in 2017) is a pioneer of metal–ceramic indirect 3D printing technology in China. Its core R&D team originates from Central South University, and the company provides end-to-end process-chain solutions—from printers and multi-material printing platforms to post-processing systems and technical services. With over 50% of staff engaged in R&D, Upshine holds global trademarks and more than 30 patents, is certified to ISO 9001 and CE/ROHS, and is recognized as a National High-Tech Enterprise. Its solutions serve customers in aerospace, healthcare, and automotive sectors across 10+ countries, driven by continuous innovation and cost-effective, high-performance AM solutions.

description_zh: 公司创建于2014年2月，注册资本1000万元。公司依托先进三维装备研究所的雄厚实力，从事3D打印产品的研发生产，主要产品有：高性能陶瓷器件3D打印材料和装备，特别是针对氧化锆陶瓷义齿3D打印的成套材料和装备；生物3D打印机；工业级熔丝制造式3D打印机和食品3D打印机。拥有相关中国发明专利和实用新型专利4项，已受理中国发明专利5项，已申请美国专利1项。出版有关3D打印专著14本。
description_en: Established in February 2014 with registered capital of RMB 10 million, Kunshan Bolemai 3D Printing Technology Co., Ltd. leverages the strong R&D foundation of the Advanced 3D Equipment Research Institute. It develops and manufactures 3D printing materials and equipment for high-performance ceramic components—especially turnkey zirconia dental ceramic printing systems—as well as bioprinters, industrial-grade FDM printers, and food 3D printers. The company holds four Chinese invention and utility model patents, has five additional Chinese invention patent applications pending, and has filed one U.S. patent application. It has published 14 specialized monographs on 3D printing.

description_zh: 金发科技股份有限公司成立于1993年，是一家全球领先的高性能化工新材料企业，也是全球规模最大、品类最全的改性塑料生产商。金发科技已构建改性塑料、新材料、绿色石化、医疗健康四大业务板块，具备PP（年产能80万吨）、ABS（年产能60万吨）、PLA（年产能3万吨）、PEEK、TPU及高温尼龙等多种核心材料的自主生产制造能力，形成上下游协同发展的完整产业生态。旗下全资子公司珠海金发生物材料有限公司，专注于生物基及生物降解材料领域，掌握了从合成、改性到应用的全链条核心技术，开发出出料流畅、韧性好、打印性能优异的PLA、PETG、美学、功能性耗材等系列产品，为适应全场景3D打印提供高质量解决方案。
description_en: Founded in 1993, Kingfa Science & Technology Co., Ltd. is a global leader in high-performance chemical新材料 and the world’s largest and most comprehensive producer of modified plastics. Its business spans four pillars: modified plastics, new materials, green petrochemicals, and healthcare. Kingfa independently manufactures PP (800,000 t/yr), ABS (600,000 t/yr), PLA (30,000 t/yr), PEEK, TPU, and high-temperature nylons. Its wholly owned subsidiary, Zhuhai Kingfa Bio-Materials Co., Ltd., focuses on bio-based and biodegradable materials, mastering full-chain core technologies—from synthesis and modification to application—to deliver optimized PLA, PETG, aesthetic, and functional filaments with excellent extrudability, toughness, and printability for comprehensive 3D printing applications.

description_zh: 武汉维码科技有限公司（Vismach Technology Ltd.）是一家于2005年成立的中外合资高科技企业，致力于通过技术创新为客户提供运动健康与医疗领域的领先解决方案。 公司专注于3D扫描建模、2D图像处理、压力传感与智能识别等核心技术的研发，并成功推出了三维足部激光扫描仪、CAD鞋垫设计软件及足底压力检测系统等一系列产品，所有产品均已完成软件著作权登记并取得相关行业认证。 作为三维足部激光扫描领域的先行者，维码科技的产品历经近20年的市场检验，赢得了全球数千家用户的信赖，远销美国、加拿大、德国、法国、西班牙、意大利、巴西、日本、新加坡等多个国家和地区。
description_en: Wuhan Vismach Technology Ltd., a Sino-foreign joint venture established in 2005, delivers leading-edge solutions for sports health and medical applications through technological innovation. The company specializes in core technologies including 3D foot scanning and modeling, 2D image processing, pressure sensing, and intelligent recognition. Its flagship products—laser-based 3D foot scanners, CAD insole design software, and plantar pressure analysis systems—are all registered for software copyright and certified per relevant industry standards. As a pioneer in laser 3D foot scanning, Vismach’s solutions have undergone nearly two decades of market validation, earning trust from thousands of global users across the U.S., Canada, Germany, France, Spain, Italy, Brazil, Japan, and Singapore.

description_zh: 万泰环境是气体输送、空气调节、气体净化及智能环控解决方案的提供者和技术引领者，在地下工程、工业、钢铁、石油化工、商业、医院等专业领域有着丰富的行业经验，具备一流的研发创新能力、生产制造能力和客户服务能力，向客户提供可持续发展的产品和服务。 万泰环境秉持“更洁净的环境，更美好的生活”的愿景，以科技创新为核心，关注新技术的研发，打造高效、减碳、安全、智慧的高端空气系统解决方案。
description_en: Wanta Environment is a provider and technology leader in gas conveying, air conditioning, gas purification, and intelligent environmental control solutions. With extensive industry experience in underground engineering, industrial plants, steel, petrochemicals, commercial facilities, and hospitals, the company possesses world-class R&D innovation, manufacturing, and customer service capabilities. It delivers sustainable products and services aligned with its vision of "a cleaner environment, a better life," emphasizing technological innovation to develop high-end air system solutions that are efficient, low-carbon, safe, and intelligent.

description_zh: 苏州环聚激光科技有限公司坐落于环境优美的苏州工业园区阳澄湖畔。主营业务为激光智能制造系统、关键器件、增材与修复服务等。团队自主研发的环形激光“光内送粉/送丝”熔覆头核心技术与工艺，已取得授权专利80余项，获得2016年中国发明专利奖优秀奖、2022年红光奖、2023年江苏省科技奖、2024年苏州工业园区独墅湖高教区“慧湖领创”人才计划一等奖等奖项。2010年以来，光内送粉/送丝装备及工艺已在国内外100余家军民企业、科研院所得到应用，涵盖航空航天、船舶、能源矿山、汽车模具、科研教学等领域。
description_en: Suzhou Huanju Laser Technology Co., Ltd., located in the Yangcheng Lake area of Suzhou Industrial Park, specializes in laser-based intelligent manufacturing systems, critical components, and additive manufacturing and repair services. Its proprietary annular laser 'internal powder/wire feeding' cladding head technology and process has secured over 80 authorized patents and received multiple awards including the 2016 China Patent Excellence Award, the 2022 Hongguang Award, the 2023 Jiangsu Provincial Science and Technology Award, and the first prize of the 2024 Suzhou Industrial Park Dushu Lake Higher Education Zone 'Huihu Lingchuang' Talent Program. Since 2010, its internal powder/wire feeding equipment and processes have been deployed by more than 100 military, civilian, and research institutions globally across aerospace, shipbuilding, energy & mining, automotive tooling, and scientific education sectors.

name_zh: 新乡市滤清器有限公司
name_en: Xinxiang Filter Co., Ltd.
address_zh: 中国大陆/河南省/新乡市/河南省新乡市红旗区新儒街智能制造产业园新廉路3号
address_en: China/Henan/新乡市/河南省新乡市红旗区新儒街智能制造产业园新廉路3号
description_zh: 新乡市滤清器有限公司是集科研、生产、销售为一体，具有进出口经营自主权的高科技民营企业。公司专业从事油、气、水等过滤产品的研发与生产，已通过ISO9001：2015质量管理体系认证、GJB 9001C-2017武器装备质量管理体系认证。 在3D打印领域，公司从航空航天领域入手，引领了3D打印激光烧结烟雾过滤器的研究与开发。公司生产的3D打印永久过滤系统，具有精度高、寿命长、耐磨损、抗静电等优点，性能可完全媲美国外产品的各项标准和要求 公司拥有一支技术精湛、高效实干、富有合作精神的技术团队。凭借专业的、健全的质量保证体系，完善的售后服务体系，致力于为用户提供优质可靠的产品和满意的服务
description_en: Xinxiang Filter Co., Ltd. is a high-tech private enterprise integrating R&D, manufacturing, and sales, with independent import/export rights. Specializing in oil, gas, and water filtration products, it holds ISO 9001:2015 and GJB 9001C-2017 certifications. In additive manufacturing, the company pioneered the development of laser sintering smoke filters for aerospace applications. Its permanent 3D printing filtration systems offer high precision, extended service life, wear resistance, and anti-static properties—meeting or exceeding international performance standards. Supported by a highly skilled, collaborative technical team and robust quality assurance and after-sales service systems, the company delivers reliable, high-quality products and solutions.

address_en: China/Jiangsu/无锡市/新华路5号创新创意产业园D幢国家增材质检中心
description_zh: 国家增材制造产品质量检验检测中心(江苏)(以下简称"CAMT”)，地处风景秀丽的太湖之滨一-无锡，是增材制造全产业链的国家级第三方检测机构。中心按照1S0/EC17025和卓越绩效准则建立了完善的质量保证体系，为增材制造领域相关企业提供全产业链检测认证。TC161、全国航空器标准化技术委员会航空器数据定义与管理分技术委员会TC435/SC3委员单位,关国材料与试验协会ASTM E42成员,工信部”工业(增材制造)产品质量控制和技术评价实验室”,中国增材制造产业联盟理事单位,国家级博士后科研工作站,江苏省研究生工作站,江苏省三维打印产业技术创新战略联盟成员,江苏省增材制造专业委员会副理事长单位
description_en: The National Center for Additive Manufacturing Product Quality Inspection and Testing (Jiangsu) (CAMT), located on the scenic shores of Taihu Lake in Wuxi, is a national-level third-party testing institution covering the full AM value chain. Accredited to ISO/IEC 17025 and operating under the Excellence Performance Model, CAMT provides comprehensive inspection, testing, and certification services for the AM industry. It serves as a technical committee member of SAC/TC161 and SAC/TC435/SC3, an ASTM E42 member, an MIIT-designated 'Industrial (Additive Manufacturing) Product Quality Control and Technical Evaluation Laboratory', a council member of the China Additive Manufacturing Industry Alliance, a national postdoctoral research workstation, a Jiangsu provincial graduate student workstation, a member of the Jiangsu 3D Printing Industry Technology Innovation Strategic Alliance, and Vice-Chairman of the Jiangsu Additive Manufacturing Professional Committee.

name_en: Inner Mongolia Xuyang New Materials Co., Ltd.
categories_zh: 3D打印金属耗材（各种金属粉末与马氏钢体等）
address_zh: 中国大陆/安徽省/合肥市/双凤开发区金沪路18号
address_en: China/Anhui/合肥市/双凤开发区金沪路18号
description_zh: 内蒙古旭阳新材料股份有限公司成立于2017年12月，注册资本1.189亿元，旗下拥有内蒙古旭阳、合肥旭阳、六安天易、铜陵诚易、铜陵兴易五大生产基地。旭阳新材自主研发生产了一系列合金粉末产品，包括硅铝系列合金粉末、3D打印系列合金粉末、粉末冶金用气雾化合金粉及其他定制类合金粉末等。产品具有颗粒球形度高、流动性好、氧增量小、空心粉率低等优点，适应于激光熔覆、3D打印、粉末冶金、注射成型、冷/热喷涂、钎焊等各类领域的高标准要求，在航空航天、武器装备、汽车工业、医疗设备、模具制造等高端制造行业及新兴智能制造行业得到了广泛的推广应用。
description_en: Founded in December 2017 with registered capital of RMB 118.9 million, Inner Mongolia Xuyang New Materials Co., Ltd. operates five production bases across China. The company independently develops and manufactures a broad portfolio of alloy powders, including Si-Al series alloys, 3D printing-specific alloy powders, gas-atomized powder metallurgy powders, and custom alloy powders. Its powders feature high sphericity, excellent flowability, low oxygen pickup, and minimal hollow particles—meeting stringent requirements for laser cladding, LPBF, powder metallurgy, metal injection molding, cold/hot spraying, and brazing. These materials are widely adopted in high-end manufacturing sectors including aerospace, defense, automotive, medical devices, and mold manufacturing, as well as emerging smart manufacturing applications.

name_zh: 阿科玛（中国）投资有限公司
name_en: Arkema (China) Investment Co., Ltd.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）

address_en: China/Shanghai/上海市/上海市静安区万荣路777弄H座10楼
description_zh: 基于独特的材料科学专识，阿科玛拥有一系列世界一流技术以满足不断增长的新型更可持续材料的需求。阿科玛旨在成为纯特种材料生产商，聚焦三大互补、强韧和高度创新的特种材料业务部门，约占集团2024年销售额的92％，即胶粘剂解决方案、先进材料和涂料解决方案，以及一个良好定位且具竞争力的中间体部门。阿科玛提供尖端技术解决方案，以应对包括新能源、水资源获取、循环利用、城市化和移动出行等方面的挑战，并致力于保持与所有利益相关方的对话。2024年，阿科玛年销售额约95亿欧元，在全球约55个国家开展业务，拥有21,150名员工。
description_en: Leveraging unique expertise in materials science, Arkema delivers world-class technologies to meet growing demand for innovative, sustainable materials. As a pure specialty materials producer, Arkema focuses on three complementary, resilient, and highly innovative business segments—Adhesive Solutions, Advanced Materials, and Coating Solutions—accounting for ~92% of its 2024 sales. Its fourth segment, Intermediates, is competitively positioned. Arkema provides cutting-edge technical solutions addressing global challenges in new energy, water access, recycling, urbanization, and mobility, while maintaining open dialogue with all stakeholders. In 2024, Arkema achieved ~€9.5 billion in annual sales, operating in ~55 countries with 21,150 employees.

address_en: China/Hunan/湘西土家族苗族自治州/中国湖南省泸溪县高新技术产业开发区第三大道1#1号
description_zh: 湖南奥科新材料科技有限公司专注于⾃主研发、⽣产和经营⾼品质⾦属增材制造合⾦粉末（3D打印合⾦粉末）、钎焊粉、热喷涂粉末和其它球形⾦属合⾦粉末及3D打印加⼯服务等。 公司拥有多套国际先进的⽓雾化制粉设备，并配套国内先进的⽓流分级系统，拥有包括粉末粒径分布、化学成分、SEM微观形态分析、粉末流动性等综合性能测试及检测设备，与中南⼤学材料学院联合组建“增材制造⾼性能粉体材料联合创新实验室”，拥有国内顶尖的激光3D打印设备及激光熔覆设备，拥有完整的增材制造⾦属合⾦粉末材料的研发、⽣产、检测、分析及验证等能⼒。
description_en: Hunan Aoke New Materials Technology Co., Ltd. specializes in the independent R&D, production, and sale of high-performance metal AM alloy powders (including 3D printing alloy powders), brazing powders, thermal spray powders, and other spherical metal alloy powders, as well as 3D printing processing services. Equipped with multiple state-of-the-art gas atomization production lines and advanced air-classification systems, the company maintains comprehensive in-house testing capabilities—including particle size distribution, chemical composition, SEM microstructural analysis, and powder flowability. In collaboration with Central South University’s School of Materials Science and Engineering, it established the 'Joint Innovation Laboratory for High-Performance Powder Materials in Additive Manufacturing.' It also operates top-tier domestic laser 3D printing and laser cladding equipment, enabling end-to-end capabilities in R&D, production, testing, analysis, and validation of metal AM powders.

address_en: China/Guangdong/深圳市/粤海街道粤兴五道北理工创新大厦6层6b
description_zh: 深圳鑫博川材料科技有限公司，由启赋资本、君科丹木资本（联想控股旗下）共同投资设立的科技创新型企业，成立于 2024年8月，专注于高性能弹性材料领域，集Peba聚合，下游改性，生产以及销售于一体的综合性科技类公司。鑫博川是中国第一家实现长链尼龙弹性体工业化量产的公司 。 - 全球第一家开发出peba 90A/85A/80A ，Pebu 90A/85A以及对应的foam的耗材厂家，市场占有率遥遥领先 - 拥有300多台打印机，双模头10台，多台多模头（专业针对鞋业），计划于2026年增加至2000台打印机，专注于3D鞋业研发和打印 - 拥有丰富的鞋材开发经验，熟悉FDM设计，提供产品开发
description_en: Shenzhen Xinbochuan Materials Technology Co., Ltd., founded in August 2024 and backed by Qifu Capital and Junke Danmu Capital (a Lenovo Holdings affiliate), is a technology innovator focused on high-performance elastomeric materials. The company integrates PEBA polymerization, downstream modification, manufacturing, and sales. It is China’s first enterprise to achieve industrial-scale production of long-chain nylon elastomers. As the world’s first manufacturer to develop PEBA 90A/85A/80A and Pebu 90A/85A filaments—and their corresponding foams—it holds a leading market share. Operating over 300 FDM printers (including 10 dual-nozzle and multiple multi-nozzle systems optimized for footwear), it plans to scale to 2,000 printers by 2026, focusing exclusively on 3D-printed footwear R&D and production. With deep expertise in footwear material development and FDM design, it offers comprehensive product development support.

description_zh: 济宁祥润仪表有限公司是以产品研发生产制造为主的生产型企业，公司自成立以来专注于智能仪表传感器的研发、生产制造。主要产品为液位物位检测的高端智能传感器，具有抗挂料、耐高/低温、耐油污，可检测高粘稠液体浆料，泡沫液体以及粉体物料。具备单路输出、双路输出、脉冲调制输出等智能型传感器。 产品广泛应用于食品、饲料、医药、化工、轻工、环保，以及各个工业等许多重要产业领域。凭借公司技术研发实力，以及与美国KFControls 团队在传感器领域的专业技术合作，产品销售区域面向全球市场。全面为客户提供特定符合实际需求的正确方案。 公司始终坚持以质量求生存为宗旨，加大品质管理，通过了I
description_en: Jining Xiangrun Instrument Co., Ltd. is a manufacturing enterprise specializing in R&D and production of intelligent instrumentation and sensors. Its core products are high-end intelligent level and interface sensors featuring anti-bridging capability, wide temperature tolerance (high/low), oil resistance, and compatibility with highly viscous slurries, foamed liquids, and bulk solids. Output options include single-channel, dual-channel, and pulse-modulated configurations. Widely deployed across food, feed, pharmaceuticals, chemicals, light industry, environmental protection, and general industrial sectors, the company leverages its R&D strength and technical collaboration with U.S.-based KFControls to serve global markets. Committed to quality-driven growth, it maintains rigorous quality management and holds relevant international certifications.

name_zh: 亚洲新材料（北京）有限公司
name_en: Asia New Materials (Beijing) Co., Ltd.
categories_zh: 金属3D打印与增材制造设备
address_zh: 中国大陆/北京/北京市/经济技术开发区西环南路26号院30号楼5层509B室
address_en: China/Beijing/北京市/经济技术开发区西环南路26号院30号楼5层509B室
description_zh: 亚洲新材是一家专注于球形微、纳米金属粉体材料研发、生产、销售和铜合金增材制造技术服务的高新技术企业。公司以尖端雾化技术为核心，掌握电极感应气雾化、真空感应气雾化、等离子超声雾化、金属气相沉积等多种工艺，可制备铜及铜合金、钛及钛合金、镍钴基高温合金以及特种合金等金属粉末，年产能600吨以上。产品适用于增材制造、激光熔覆、注射成形、喷涂、粉末冶金等先进制造工艺，服务于航空航天、兵器船舶、风电核能、电工电子、铜饰文博等高端应用领域。
description_en: Asia New Materials (Beijing) Co., Ltd. is a high-tech enterprise focused on R&D, production, sales, and copper alloy AM technical services for spherical micro- and nano-scale metal powders. At its core is advanced atomization technology—including electrode induction gas atomization (EIGA), vacuum induction gas atomization (VIGA), plasma ultrasonic atomization (PUSA), and metal vapor deposition—enabling production of copper/copper alloys, titanium/titanium alloys, nickel/cobalt-based superalloys, and specialty alloys. With annual capacity exceeding 600 metric tons, its powders serve AM, laser cladding, metal injection molding, thermal spraying, and powder metallurgy across high-value applications such as aerospace, defense & marine, wind/nuclear energy, electrical/electronics, and decorative arts.

address_zh: 中国大陆/浙江省/杭州市/临安区锦南街道飞翠路88号
address_en: China/Zhejiang/杭州市/临安区锦南街道飞翠路88号
description_zh: 杭州卓普新材料科技有限公司成立于2015年1月，注册资金500万元，坐落于杭州市临安区锦南街道飞翠路88号，是一家专业从事研发、生产、销售塑料高分子材料、3D打印耗材、生物降解材料的国家重点支持的高新技术企业，浙江省专精特新企业、浙江省科技型中小企业、浙江省创新型中小企业、杭州市雏鹰企业，拥有杭州市级研发中心、浙江省企业研究院。 公司现有产品：3D打印耗材、全生物降解材料。 3D打印材料：PLA普通、丝绸、高速、变色、哑光、木塑、MAX耗材，PETG、PETG碳纤维；TPU、尼龙、PC、PP、HIPS、PC、ABS耗材；PLA抗静电及导电、PLA闪光珠光等数十个不同的品种。
description_en: Founded in January 2015 with registered capital of RMB 5 million, Hangzhou Zhuopu New Materials Technology Co., Ltd. is a national high-tech enterprise based in Lin’an District, Hangzhou, specializing in R&D, production, and sales of plastic polymer materials, 3D printing consumables, and fully biodegradable materials. Recognized as a Zhejiang Province 'Specialized, Refined, Distinctive, and Innovative' (Zhuan Jing Te Xin) enterprise, a Zhejiang provincial science & technology SME, an innovative SME, and a Hangzhou 'Chick Eagle' enterprise, it hosts both a municipal-level R&D center and a Zhejiang provincial enterprise research institute. Its product portfolio includes diverse 3D printing filaments—PLA (standard, silk, high-speed, color-changing, matte, wood-filled, MAX), PETG (including carbon-fiber reinforced), TPU, nylon, PC, PP, HIPS, ABS—as well as conductive, antistatic, and pearlescent PLA variants.

name_zh: 普立思生物科技有限公司
name_en: PuliSi Biotechnology Co., Ltd.
categories_zh: 聚合物材料（工程塑料、PLA、光敏树脂，高分子凝胶等）
address_zh: 中国大陆/安徽省/芜湖市/安徽省芜湖市弋江区矶山路68号
address_en: China/Anhui/芜湖市/安徽省芜湖市弋江区矶山路68号
description_zh: 普立思依托中国科学院长春应用化学研究所，突破了丙交酯和聚乳酸合成技术这个卡脖子难题，全面掌握了“淀粉-乳酸发酵-高纯丙交酯制备-聚乳酸-聚乳酸改性”全产业链核心技术，公司成立于2021年，是一家专注于生物降解材料研发、生产和销售的技术型企业。 普立思始终坚持“自然塑造美好生活”的发展理念，致力于科技推动绿色生活产业的发展。
description_en: PuliSi Biotechnology Co., Ltd., established in 2021 and incubated by the Changchun Institute of Applied Chemistry, Chinese Academy of Sciences, has broken through the critical bottleneck in lactide and polylactic acid (PLA) synthesis. The company fully masters the integrated technology chain spanning starch → lactic acid fermentation → high-purity lactide purification → PLA polymerization → PLA modification. As a technology-driven enterprise dedicated to R&D, production, and sales of biodegradable materials, PuliSi adheres to the philosophy of "Nature Shapes a Better Life," advancing green lifestyle industries through scientific innovation.

description_zh: 苏州叁生万物材料科技有限公司是一家高速成长的3D打印领先企业。作为3D打印产业耗材的制造者，公司通过创新的技术和高品质的服务，致力于为3D打印爱好者和专业用户创造更多的设计可能性。 依托自主知识产权的改性材料和色母粒技术、各类树脂基材的色彩数据库、配色软件在线调配色技术，我们可提供广泛的外观选项，包括鲜艳的原色、丰富的调色板以及各类特殊纹理效果。此外，公司为每一个客户设立专项服务团队，提供一对一的技术咨询和支持服务，帮助解决在使用过程中遇到的任何问题。无论您是进行个人创作、或是从事其他专业工作领域，叁生万物都是您值得信赖的3D打印合作伙伴。
description_en: Suzhou Sansheng Wanwu Materials Technology Co., Ltd. is a rapidly growing leader in the 3D printing industry and a premier manufacturer of 3D printing consumables. Through proprietary modified material and masterbatch technologies, an extensive resin color database, and online color-matching software, it delivers broad aesthetic options—including vibrant base colors, rich palettes, and specialized texture effects. Each client receives a dedicated support team providing one-on-one technical consultation and troubleshooting. Whether for personal creation or professional applications, Sansheng Wanwu is a trusted partner enabling greater design freedom and innovation in 3D printing.

description_zh: 唐山威豪是一家专注于增材制造领域的高纯度镁及镁合金粉末生产厂家，拥有26年镁基金属粉末研发与工业化生产经验。公司长期深耕雾化镁及镁合金粉末方向，可稳定提供高纯度（≥99.9%）、低氧含量、粒度分布均匀、球形度高且批间一致性优异的金属粉末，满足多种增材制造工艺对材料安全性、流动性与成形稳定性的严格要求。 威豪主营产品多种镁合金3D打印粉末，并可根据客户需求提供定制化材料解决方案，广泛服务于轻量化结构研究、航空航天、消费电子、生物医用及前沿材料研发等增材制造应用方向。目前，威豪产品已出口至37个国家和地区，持续为全球增材制造研发与工业化应用提供可靠、可复制、可规模化的镁基粉末材料支持。
description_en: Tangshan Weihao Magnesium Powder Co., Ltd. is a specialist producer of high-purity magnesium and magnesium alloy powders for additive manufacturing, with 26 years of industrial R&D and production experience. Its expertise lies in gas-atomized Mg/Mg-alloy powders characterized by ultra-high purity (≥99.9%), low oxygen content, uniform particle size distribution, high sphericity, and exceptional batch-to-batch consistency—meeting stringent AM requirements for safety, flowability, and process stability. Weihao offers a range of Mg-alloy 3D printing powders and customized material solutions serving lightweight structural research, aerospace, consumer electronics, biomedical applications, and frontier materials development. Its products are exported to 37 countries and regions, delivering reliable, scalable, and reproducible Mg-based powder materials for global AM R&D and industrial deployment.

description_zh: 一之数码成立于2021年，现员工120余人，生产面积8000多平方。致力于增材制造装备的研究和生产。在LCD光固化离型技术和成像光学系统取得了重大突破。自研的高速打印树脂、牙科树脂、工程树脂、水洗树脂、弹性体树脂，性能达到行业领先水平。已完成装备生产、树脂材料、品牌营销、打印服务思维一体的全产业链环布局。 公司致力通过工艺改造、降低成本、推出高性能节能环保3D打印机，为全球用户带来全新的体验
description_en: Dongguan Yizhi Digital Co., Ltd., founded in 2021, specializes in R&D and manufacturing of additive manufacturing equipment. It has achieved breakthroughs in LCD-based photopolymerization release technologies and imaging optical systems. Its in-house developed resins—including high-speed, dental, engineering, water-washable, and elastomeric formulations—deliver industry-leading performance. The company has completed vertical integration across equipment manufacturing, resin materials, brand marketing, and print service delivery. Committed to process optimization, cost reduction, and sustainability, it develops high-performance, energy-efficient, and eco-friendly 3D printers to deliver transformative user experiences worldwide.

description_zh: 杭州乐信新材料科技有限公司是一家专注于医疗植入用PEKK材料在中国市场推广的公司。我们致力于提供高质量、创新的PEKK材料，用于医疗器械的增材制造，为医疗行业的发展做出贡献。公司拥有一支经验丰富、技术娴熟的团队，致力于研发和生产符合国际标准的优质PEKK材料，以满足客户的需求。我们注重品质和可靠性，确保我们的产品在医疗领域具有卓越的性能和安全性。杭州乐信新材料科技有限公司秉承着诚信、创新和合作的理念，努力成为医疗器械材料领域的领先企业，为客户提供可靠���解决方案，推动医疗行业的持续发展。
description_en: Hangzhou Lexion New Materials Technology Co., Ltd. is dedicated to promoting medical-grade polyetherketoneketone (PEKK) materials in the Chinese market. The company supplies high-quality, innovative PEKK materials for additive manufacturing of medical implants, supporting advancement in healthcare. Backed by an experienced, technically proficient team, it develops and manufactures PEKK materials compliant with international regulatory and performance standards. Prioritizing quality and reliability, Lexion ensures superior biocompatibility, mechanical performance, and safety for demanding clinical applications. Guided by integrity, innovation, and collaboration, the company aims to become a leading provider of medical device materials, delivering dependable solutions that drive sustained progress in the medical industry.

description_zh: 深圳市翔通光电技术有限公司隶属于中国航空工业集团旗下，国家级高新技术企业，业务涉及金属粉末制品、陶瓷、医疗口腔、智能装备等领域、拥有员工400余人。公司以中国航空工业、知名高校为依托，采用世界一流的气雾化制粉技术，研发、生产和销售金属粉末产品。以市场需求为中心，致力于为客户提供用于增材制造、粉末冶金、喷涂、注射成型、热等静压等多种金属粉末产品。产品涵盖高温合金、铝合金、钴铬合金、铁基合金等多种牌号，可为客户研发并生产定制化产品。
description_en: Shenzhen Xiangtong Optoelectronic Technology Co., Ltd., a national high-tech enterprise under the Aviation Industry Corporation of China (AVIC), operates across metal powder products, ceramics, dental/medical devices, and intelligent equipment. With over 400 employees, it leverages AVIC’s industrial resources and elite university partnerships to deploy world-class gas atomization technologies for R&D, production, and sales of metal powders. Customer-centric and application-driven, it supplies powders for AM, powder metallurgy, thermal spraying, metal injection molding, and hot isostatic pressing. Its portfolio covers high-temperature alloys, aluminum alloys, cobalt-chromium alloys, and iron-based alloys, with full customization capabilities.

description_zh: 武汉三维陶瓷科技有限公司是一家专业的陶瓷增材制造解决方案提供商。基于主创团队在工业陶瓷领域的丰富经验，公司通过持续创新，使用光固化、热熔融挤出等多种增材制造技术为航空航天、生物医疗、节能环保等行业客户提供3D打印设备、零件加工、打印材料、后处理热工设备、合作研发服务。 自2016年成立以来，公司持续研发投入，目前已取得“高新技术企业”认定、“ISO”三体系认证，获批国家发明及实用新型专利近10项、且先后参与国家重点研发计划子课题，中国工程院咨询项目、航空发动机和燃气轮机“两机”科技重大专项。
description_en: Wuhan 3D Ceramic Technology Co., Ltd. is a specialized provider of ceramic additive manufacturing solutions. Drawing on its founding team’s extensive industrial ceramics experience, the company deploys multiple AM technologies—including vat photopolymerization (SLA/DLP) and thermoplastic extrusion—to deliver 3D printing equipment, part manufacturing, printable ceramic materials, post-processing thermal equipment, and collaborative R&D services to clients in aerospace, biomedical, environmental protection, and energy efficiency sectors. Since its founding in 2016, it has earned national high-tech enterprise status, ISO 9001/14001/45001 certifications, nearly 10 granted invention and utility model patents, and active participation in key national R&D programs—including the National Key R&D Program, the Chinese Academy of Engineering consulting projects, and the National Science and Technology Major Project on Aero-Engines and Gas Turbines ('Two Engines').

description_zh: 湖南顶立科技股份有限公司创建于2006年，专注于特种材料及特种热工装备研制、生产和销售。公司是A股主板上市公司（楚江新材002171）的控股子公司。 公司依托装备制造的优势，成功研制出新型超高转速等离子旋转雾化制粉设备(N-PREP)，制备出超纯净高温合金粉体，产品涵盖镍基高温合金、高强钢、钴铬钼合金、钨镍铁高比重合金、高熵合金、钛基合金等多个合金牌号，广泛应用于航空航天、模具、医疗、汽车等领域。 公司建立了金属3D打印全产业链生产线，技术涵盖母合金设计、熔炼、制粉、增材制造、热处理、性能检测等,提供金属3D打印整体解决方案。
description_en: Founded in 2006, Hunan Dingli Science & Technology Co., Ltd. specializes in R&D, manufacturing, and sales of specialty materials and advanced thermal processing equipment. A controlling subsidiary of Chujian New Materials (A-share listed: 002171), it has developed the novel ultra-high-speed plasma rotating electrode process (N-PREP) powder-making system, producing ultra-pure high-temperature alloy powders. Its product range includes nickel-based superalloys, high-strength steels, cobalt-chromium-molybdenum alloys, tungsten-nickel-iron heavy alloys, high-entropy alloys, and titanium alloys—widely applied in aerospace, tooling, medical, and automotive sectors. Dingli has established a full metal 3D printing industrial chain covering master alloy design, melting, powder production, AM processing, heat treatment, and performance testing, offering comprehensive metal AM turnkey solutions.

description_zh: 广州智科自动化技术有限公司是一家由香港科技大学、香港科技大学(广州)及香港科技大学霍英东研究院共同支持培育的新兴企业。公司由长江学者领衔，创始团队包括三名教授和三名博士。目前，公司拥有一支由CAD/CAM算法工程师、感知算法工程师、机械臂算法工程师、机电自动化工程师等组成的精英团队，已成功参与并完成了佛山科大专项校企合作研发项目。 公司致力于金属增减材一体化加工技术的研发，成功搭建了全球最大的钛合金增减材一体化制造机床，并提出了创新的辊刀硬质刀线增减材制造解决方案。
description_en: Guangzhou Zhike Automation Technology Co., Ltd. is an emerging enterprise jointly incubated by the Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (HKUST), HKUST (Guangzhou), and the HKUST Fok Ying Tung Research Institute. Led by a Yangtze River Scholar and co-founded by three professors and three PhDs, the company fields an elite team of CAD/CAM algorithm engineers, perception algorithm engineers, robotic arm control engineers, and mechatronic automation specialists. It has successfully completed collaborative R&D projects with universities and industry partners, including the Foshan-HKUST Joint Special Project. Zhike pioneers hybrid additive-subtractive manufacturing for metals, having built the world’s largest titanium alloy hybrid AM–subtractive machining platform and introducing an innovative roller-cutter hard-tipped tooling solution for integrated AM–subtractive fabrication.

description_zh: 陕西鸿微科技有限公司专注于钛及钛合金材料的产业化应用。公司依托先进的制造技术和严谨的质量管理体系，致力于为千行百业客户提供高标准的钛合金解决方案。凭借稳定的产品品质及高效的交付能力，我司产品陆续在航天航天、科研院所、船舶海洋、增材制造、C端消费等领域取得批量化应用。 目前，公司钛产品分为 钛工业品与钛工艺品两大类。工业品以钛合金材料及其粗加工件为主，工艺品专注于钛金属在C端领域的应用。 热忱欢迎各界朋友莅临我司参观指导！
description_en: Shaanxi Hongwei Technology Co., Ltd. specializes in the industrial application of titanium and titanium alloys. Leveraging advanced manufacturing technologies and a rigorous quality management system, the company delivers high-standard titanium alloy solutions across aerospace, research institutes, marine & shipbuilding, additive manufacturing, and consumer electronics sectors. Its product portfolio comprises two categories: titanium industrial components (including raw titanium alloy materials and semi-finished parts) and titanium consumer goods (focused on end-user applications).

description_zh: 北京正时精控科技有限公司（ PSI），是一家专注于光束扫描控制技术的高科技公司，2017年成立于加拿大温哥华，2018年设立北京总部，实现中加双研发中心布局，致力于提供高精度、高速度、低温漂、高可靠性的扫描控制系统 ，拥有7000余平方米生产车间 ，月产量达2500台以上。 团队汇聚电子、光学、精密机械等多领域高级工程师，研发实力雄厚。拥有光束偏转、扫描控制领域多项核心及专利技术。扫描系统中的核心部件如电机、驱动、传感器、控制卡和软件均由正时精控（PSI）独立研发设计。 经过多年的不懈努力，正时精控（ PSI）在激光扫描控制领域中三项核心指标：高精度，高速度，低温漂上实现重大技术突破。
description_en: Beijing ZS Precision Control Technology Co., Ltd. (PSI), founded in Vancouver, Canada in 2017 and establishing its Beijing headquarters in 2018, is a high-tech enterprise specializing in beam scanning control systems. PSI operates dual R&D centers in China and Canada, developing high-precision, high-speed, low-drift, and highly reliable scanning control systems. With over 7,000 m² of production space and monthly output exceeding 2,500 units, PSI independently designs and manufactures all core subsystems—including motors, drivers, sensors, control cards, and software—leveraging proprietary patented technologies in beam deflection and scanning control. PSI has achieved breakthroughs in the three critical performance metrics for laser scanning: precision, speed, and thermal stability.

description_zh: 北京皓盛科技发展有限公司专注于复合材料3D打印设备、高性能材料及相关技术的推广与应用。致力于为航空航天、汽车制造、船舶工业等领域客户提供从设备选型到量产落地的全链条服务，助力企业实现技术升级与降本增效。
description_en: Beijing Haosheng Technology Development Co., Ltd. focuses on composite-material 3D printing equipment, high-performance materials, and associated technologies. The company provides end-to-end services—from equipment selection and process optimization to volume production—for customers in aerospace, automotive manufacturing, and marine industries, supporting technological upgrading and cost-efficient manufacturing.

description_zh: 开禾科技（宁波）有限公司，是一家集研发、生产、销售及技术服务于一体的专业制造型企业。公司专注于环保型再生钛合金粉末（DH-S®）及钛合金制品整体解决方案，是全球首家获得 GRS 认证的 100% 钛合金循环制造企业。 核心团队在钛合金粉末提取、再生利用及规模化制造领域经验深厚，自主研发 DH-S® 再生粉末工艺，并结合高速成型与增材制造技术，深耕钛合金精密零部件制造，为消费电子、高端装备等行业头部企业提供规模化解决方案，推动 3D 打印从 “样品制造” 迈向 “批量生产”。 开禾科技坚持低能耗、绿色低碳发展，相关工艺通过 LCA 生命周期评估，在成本控制、良率表现及规模化降本方面优势显著。
description_en: Kaihe Technology (Ningbo) Co., Ltd. is an integrated R&D, manufacturing, sales, and service enterprise specializing in eco-friendly recycled titanium alloy powder (DH-S®) and holistic titanium alloy component solutions. As the world’s first GRS-certified 100% titanium alloy circular manufacturing company, Kaihe leverages proprietary DH-S® regeneration technology, high-speed forming, and additive manufacturing to produce precision titanium components at scale for consumer electronics and high-end equipment manufacturers. Its low-energy, green manufacturing processes are validated by Life Cycle Assessment (LCA), delivering significant advantages in cost control, yield, and scalable cost reduction—accelerating the transition of 3D printing from prototyping to mass production.

description_zh: 母公司：上海三井光中真空设备股份有限公司（上海科技进步特等奖获得单位）。三十余年专注于超高真空领域产品及设备的研究、设计、开发与生产。 子公司：信安真空 2018年建设启东生产基地。为致力于中国快速增长的真空需求市场提供全套专业的解决方案，信安真空建立了产品解决方案中心，将发展重点由高能粒子加速器科研领域开始，逐步扩展到真空技术在半导体、新能源、超导、X射线、航天航空材料热处理、核能等工业化领域的高端应用，为其提供系统完整的真空技术解决方案，并囊括专业的技术支持、成套生产设备和产品供应服务。
description_en: Xinan Vacuum Technology (Jiangsu) Co., Ltd., a subsidiary of Shanghai Mitsui Ko-Chu Vacuum Equipment Co., Ltd. (recipient of the Shanghai Science and Technology Progress Special Award), was established in Qidong in 2018. Building upon over 30 years of expertise in ultra-high vacuum (UHV) systems, Xinan provides comprehensive, application-specific vacuum solutions. Initially focused on particle accelerator research, Xinan has expanded into industrial UHV applications including semiconductor manufacturing, new energy, superconductivity, X-ray instrumentation, aerospace material heat treatment, and nuclear energy—offering full-system technical support, turnkey production equipment, and product supply.

description_zh: 深圳市鹏扬三维科技有限公司坐落于深圳水贝国际珠宝交易中心， 始创于2009年。 鹏扬三维作为珠宝领域3D打印综合服务商， 专注于为珠宝企业提供工业4.0智能化整体 解决方案。近年来， 鹏扬三维在研发、 生产 、销售、 售后的领域持续投入 ， 给客户带来更 优质、 更具竞争力的产品， 成为业内优秀的“研产销服”一体化企业。 鹏扬三维， 立足国内放眼全球， 坚持国际化战略， 在多国建立了稳定的多元合作服务体系， 目前我们的工程师团队遍布全球主要的珠宝生产的国家和地区，产品远销40多个国家。
description_en: Shenzhen Pengyang 3D Technology Co., Ltd., founded in 2009 and headquartered at the Shuibei International Jewelry Trading Center in Shenzhen, is a comprehensive 3D printing service provider for the jewelry industry. As an Industry 4.0 intelligent solutions partner, Pengyang offers integrated R&D, manufacturing, sales, and after-sales services. With a globally distributed engineering team covering major jewelry-producing countries and regions, its products are exported to over 40 countries, supporting jewelry manufacturers with competitive, high-quality digital manufacturing solutions.

name_zh: 上海远熙检测技术有限公司
name_en: Shanghai Yuanxi Testing Technology Co., Ltd.
categories_zh: 其他（如后处理工艺服务）

address_en: China/Shanghai/上海市/上海市闵行区剑川路610号38栋
description_zh: 远熙检测2016年成立于上海，是国内最早取得NADCAP认证的第三方商业实验室之一，也是唯一一家取得GE航空认证的中资第三方航空材料实验室，并已获得中航工业、中航发、RR航空、UTC航空等客户的专业材料实验室认证及供应商准入资质。主要服务于国内外航空航天、增材制造、新能源核电、石油化工、高铁交通、医疗等高端制造行业客户。 公司专注于航空航天材料性能测试、试验研发及失效分析等专业技术服务，目前拥有的设备有高温持久蠕变试验机、万能材料试验机、电磁共振疲劳试验机、电液伺服疲劳试验机、材料研究级显微镜等，可开展机械性能测试、化学成分分析、微观结构分析、热处理研究及失效分析等材料测试研究项目。
description_en: Shanghai Yuanxi Testing Technology Co., Ltd., established in 2016, is among China’s earliest third-party commercial laboratories certified to NADCAP standards—and the only Chinese-owned third-party aerospace materials laboratory accredited by GE Aviation. It also holds laboratory certifications and supplier qualifications from AVIC, AECC, Rolls-Royce, and UTC Aerospace. Serving high-end manufacturing sectors—including aerospace, additive manufacturing, new energy & nuclear power, petrochemicals, high-speed rail, and medical devices—the company specializes in aerospace material performance testing, experimental R&D, and failure analysis. Its capabilities include mechanical property testing, chemical composition analysis, microstructural characterization, heat treatment studies, and failure analysis, supported by high-temperature creep-rupture testers, universal material testers, electromagnetic resonance fatigue testers, electro-hydraulic servo fatigue testers, and research-grade metallurgical microscopes.

Committed to source-level innovation across equipment, materials, and software, Zhidie delivers full-process, high-performance 3D printing solutions to help customers address modern manufacturing challenges—positioning itself as a technology-intensive industry leader in additive manufacturing.

description_zh: TEJUFUSE — 福州特聚新材料科技有限公司自研 3D 打印丝材品牌，依托公司 2013 年成立以来在工程塑料应用开发领域的核心优势，秉承 “通过专业技术和服务，使公司成为材料解决方案创新者” 的企业使命，持续研发各类新型高性能材料。 TEJUFUSE 丝材涵盖工程改性材料（ABS、ASA、PA12、PPS、PPA 系列）和常规耗材（PLA、PETG 系列），广泛应用于消费、汽车、电子、工业制造等领域。 诚邀莅临 TCT 亚洲展（展位号：8H118），零距离体验 TEJUFUSE 全系材料解决方案，共探增材制造新未来！
description_en: Fuzhou Teju New Materials Technology Co., Ltd. is the developer of TEJUFUSE—a proprietary brand of 3D printing filaments. Leveraging its core expertise in engineering plastic application development since 2013, the company fulfills its mission to become a material solutions innovator through professional technical services. TEJUFUSE filament portfolio includes engineered modified materials (ABS, ASA, PA12, PPS, PPA series) and standard consumables (PLA, PETG series), widely deployed across consumer electronics, automotive, electronics, and industrial manufacturing. Visit TEJUFUSE at TCT Asia (Booth 8H118) to experience its full range of additive manufacturing material solutions.

description_zh: 普雷茨特于1971年在德国巴登巴登成立，是一家高度创新的激光加工和光学测量传感器的制造商。在增材制造行业，Precitec提供CoaxPrinter，用于焊丝的激光沉积焊接，同时激光焊接监控LWM可实时控制激光焊接过程的质量，祝您实现满意的3D打印成果。
description_en: Precitec, founded in Baden-Baden, Germany in 1971, is a highly innovative manufacturer of laser processing systems and optical measurement sensors. In additive manufacturing, Precitec supplies the CoaxPrinter for laser metal deposition welding using wire feedstock and the Laser Weld Monitor (LWM) for real-time quality control of laser welding processes—enabling reliable, high-quality 3D printing outcomes.

description_zh: 浙江君临电气科技有限公司是开关电源领导品牌制造商之一，致力于为客户提供安全稳定，高效环保的开关电源。 君临品牌开关电源正式销售的标准机型超过2000多种。产品主要包括整机型AC/DC电源，基板型AC/DC电源，多路隔离输出电源，DC/DC电源，AC/DC模块、DC/DC模块、导轨式电源，稳压电源等。广泛用于工业自动化(数控、激光、电控机械等)、通信(交换机、POE、基站等)、LED照明和显示、医疗、安防、电力控制、冶金、水处理、基础建设等各个领域。 经过十几年的快速发展，已初步建立销售服务网点，代理机械等多点结合的销售格局。产品销往全国各地，同时远销欧洲、中东、东南亚及美洲等地
description_en: Zhejiang Junlin Electrical Technology Co., Ltd. is a leading manufacturer of switch-mode power supplies (SMPS), delivering safe, stable, efficient, and eco-friendly power solutions. Its Junlin-branded AC/DC and DC/DC power supplies include over 2,000 standardized models—covering open-frame, PCB-mount, multi-output isolated, modular, DIN-rail, and regulated power supplies—serving industrial automation (CNC, laser, electromechanical systems), telecommunications (switches, PoE, base stations), LED lighting & displays, medical devices, security, power control, metallurgy, water treatment, and infrastructure. With distribution networks across China and export markets in Europe, the Middle East, Southeast Asia, and the Americas, Junlin maintains a robust multi-channel sales and service framework.

description_zh: 航金新材料科技（温州）有限公司是国内“高、精、特”金属材料粉末解决方案提供商，公司秉持“技术驱动、科技创新”发展理念，研发、制造：不锈钢合金、钛合金、铝合金、铜合金、高温合金、模具钢合金、镍钛合金、钴铬合金、贵金属合金的粉末。我们以“科技改变世界、服务创造价值”服务于（3D打印（增材）、注射成型、热等静压、激光溶覆、热喷凃等行业）。公司生产金属合金粉末适用于制造：航空航天、军工、新能源汽车、3C消费电子、医疗器械、船舶工业、石油化工、核电、工业模具、五金等行业领域零部件。
description_en: Hangjin New Materials Technology (Wenzhou) Co., Ltd. is a domestic provider of high-precision, specialized metal powder solutions. Adhering to a technology-driven innovation philosophy, the company develops and manufactures spherical powders of stainless steel, titanium, aluminum, copper, superalloys, tool steels, NiTi, CoCr, and precious metal alloys. These powders serve additive manufacturing (AM), metal injection molding (MIM), hot isostatic pressing (HIP), laser cladding, and thermal spray applications—enabling high-performance part fabrication for aerospace, defense, new-energy vehicles, 3C electronics, medical devices, marine engineering, petrochemicals, nuclear power, industrial tooling, and hardware sectors.

name_zh: 北京迅恒科技有限公司
name_en: Beijing Xunheng Technology Co., Ltd.
address_zh: 中国大陆/北京/北京市/海淀区龙岗路27号1号楼217室
address_en: China/Beijing/北京市/海淀区龙岗路27号1号楼217室
description_zh: 北京迅恒科技有限公司是一家专注于机器视觉和三维图像领域的高科技企业，我们主要从事机器视觉系统、工业检测装置、三维测量设备的研发、生产、销售业务。我们拥有完备的图像实验室和高效率的研发团队，公司研究人员曾多年从事图像处理、模式识别、文本处理、搜索引擎的基础技术研究，在字符识别、宽基线图像匹配、亚象素特征定位、立体视觉、三维重建、智能分类等方面已取得初步成果。自公司成立以来，先后研发了拍照式结构光三维扫描仪、手持式红外彩色三维扫描仪、桌面式三维扫描仪、矩阵式人体三维扫描仪、面部三维扫描仪、齿科三维扫描仪、手持式结构光三维扫描仪等，获得了十多项软件著作权和多项权威认证，解决了许多应用现场难题。
description_en: Beijing Xunheng Technology Co., Ltd. is a high-tech enterprise specializing in machine vision and 3D imaging. The company designs, manufactures, and sells machine vision systems, industrial inspection equipment, and 3D metrology devices. Its R&D team—experienced in image processing, pattern recognition, text analysis, and search engine fundamentals—has achieved results in character recognition, wide-baseline image matching, sub-pixel feature localization, stereo vision, 3D reconstruction, and intelligent classification. Xunheng’s product line includes structured-light 3D scanners (desktop, handheld, matrix-type, facial, dental, and infrared-color variants), backed by multiple software copyrights and authoritative certifications—solving complex field application challenges.

description_zh: 上海硕豪品牌2011年成立于中国上海，是一家专业制造自动化仪表的公司，主营业务为各类物液位开关、物液位计、振动器的研发、生产和销售以及相关配套产业的经营。核心产品有阻旋料位开关、音叉物位开关、射频导纳物位开关、静电容物料位开关、各种规格振动器等，另外还涵盖了温度/压力传感器、阻抗谱电容传感器、流量计等非标定制产品。 我们的产品运用在各行各业不同工况的环境中，并根据客户的实际需求迅速的为客户提供合适的解决方案。凭借多年的发展，累积了相当丰富的经验与技术，未来硕豪进入发展的新征程，成为料位计、液位计及传感器系统解决供应服务商;硕豪携手与您，与时俱进、共赢未来。
description_en: Shanghai Shuohao Sensor Co., Ltd., established in Shanghai in 2011, is a professional manufacturer of automation instrumentation. Core offerings include rotary paddle level switches, tuning fork level switches, RF admittance level switches, capacitive level switches, vibrators, temperature/pressure sensors, impedance spectroscopy capacitive sensors, and flowmeters—many available as non-standard custom solutions. Serving diverse industrial environments, Shuohao rapidly delivers tailored level, liquid level, and sensor system solutions based on client requirements—evolving into a comprehensive supplier of level/liquid level instrumentation and sensor systems.

description_zh: 粉体材料制备中心是中国兵器科学研究院宁波分院为致力于高品质球形金属粉末研发、生产及应用，所设立的独立研发和生产部门。中心拥有进口EIGA制粉、射频感应等离子球化和EOS M290金属打印设备，目前已具有制备各类球形粉末成熟稳定的生产工艺，尤其是钛及钛合金、Ti-Al合金、钨、钼、钽、铌等各类球形金属粉末粉，以及多种球形陶瓷粉末。也可根据客户需求，提供粉体定制和打印服务。 经过10年多的发展，中心拥有一支成熟稳定的技术研发团队，具有年产各类高品质球形粉末200吨以上的能力。同时建立了严格的质量保障体系，能充分保证粉末产品品质的稳定性。
description_en: The Powder Materials Preparation Center, established under the Ningbo Branch of the China Academy of Ordnance Science, is an independent R&D and production unit dedicated to high-quality spherical metal powder development, manufacturing, and application. Equipped with imported EIGA atomization, RF induction plasma spheroidization, and EOS M290 metal 3D printers, the center has mature, stable processes for producing spherical powders—including titanium, Ti-Al alloys, tungsten, molybdenum, tantalum, niobium, and various spherical ceramics. It also offers custom powder formulation and metal additive manufacturing services. With over a decade of operation, the center maintains a seasoned R&D team and an annual production capacity exceeding 200 metric tons of high-purity spherical powders, backed by a stringent quality assurance system.

description_zh: 宝鸡市创信金属材料有限公司（简称创信金属）成立于2005年，注册资金2000万，占地50000平方米。是宝鸡-中国钛谷国家新材料高新技术产业基地钛产业集群优秀骨干企业之一，专业从事钛及钛合金等有色金属材料制品的研发，生产和销售。产品广泛应用于航空，航海，医疗，化工，光学电子，真空镀膜，3D打印制粉行业等多个领域，多种产品深受海内外专业用户的青睐。 本公司成立以来，公司本着“诚信引领发展，细节成就完美，服务打造品牌”的经营理念，坚持以质量第一，用户至上为原则来贯彻“创新发展，信生永远”的企业精神，愿竭诚为广大客户提供高品质产品及服务。
description_en: Baoji Chuangxin Metal Materials Co., Ltd. (Chuangxin Metals), founded in 2005 with registered capital of RMB 20 million and occupying 50,000 m², is a key enterprise within the Baoji National New Materials High-Tech Industrial Base (‘China Titanium Valley’). Specializing in R&D, production, and sales of titanium and other non-ferrous metals, its products serve aerospace, marine, medical, chemical, optical electronics, vacuum coating, and titanium powder production for additive manufacturing—earning broad recognition from domestic and international professionals. Guided by the philosophy ‘Integrity drives development; details ensure excellence; service builds the brand,’ Chuangxin adheres to quality-first and customer-centric principles, embodying its corporate spirit: ‘Innovative development, integrity forever.’

description_zh: 湖南恒基粉末科技有限责任公司是一家专业从事金属粉末研发、生产和销售的高科技企业（认证号：GR201543000176），也是国内首家与中南大学粉末冶金研究院合作的金属粉体生产企业。公司主导产品是微细球形金属粉末，广泛应用于3D打印、金属粉末注射成形、热喷涂、钎焊和过滤器等领域，产品包含不锈钢、铁基、镍基、铜基、铝基以及其他各种金属及合金的粉末制品，并可根据用户需求研制和生产特别要求的粉末，如窄粒度分布、高纯度金属粉末等。
description_en: Hunan Hengji Powder Technology Co., Ltd. (Certification No.: GR201543000176) is a high-tech enterprise specializing in R&D, production, and sales of metal powders—and the first domestic metal powder producer to collaborate with Central South University’s Powder Metallurgy Research Institute. Its flagship products are fine spherical metal powders used in additive manufacturing (AM), metal injection molding (MIM), thermal spraying, brazing, and filtration. Product lines cover stainless steel, iron-based, nickel-based, copper-based, aluminum-based, and other specialty metal and alloy powders. Custom formulations—including narrow particle size distributions and ultra-high-purity grades—are available per client specifications.

description_zh: 宝鸡晨源金属材料有限公司坐落于中国钛谷(陕西省宝鸡市渭滨区钛城路166号),是一家专业生产钛合金原材料产品的生产型企业。公司拥有完整的钛及钛合金加工产线。现有熔炼/锻造/机加/拉丝车间4个,拥有3吨真空自耗电弧炉、2500吨液压快锻机、630吨钛棒剪切机、高线轧机、数控连续减径拉丝机、数控车床、无心车床等生产加工设备。年产各类钛棒、钛丝、钛锻件、3D打印钛合金耗材等钛材料及产品约7000吨，公司生产严格执行ISO9001、ISO13485及GJB9001质量管理体系，产品广泛应用于航空航天、船舶、化工、石油、医疗、精密仪表等多个领域，为各类终端客户提供了高品质的钛及钛合金材料。
description_en: Baoji Chenyuan Metal Materials Co., Ltd., located in Baoji City (Shaanxi Province)—China’s Titanium Valley—specializes in the production of titanium alloy raw materials. The company operates a fully integrated titanium and titanium alloy processing line, including four workshops for melting, forging, machining, and wire drawing. Its equipment includes a 3-ton vacuum arc remelting furnace, a 2500-ton hydraulic fast forging press, a 630-ton titanium bar shear, high-speed rolling mills, CNC continuous reduction wire drawing machines, CNC lathes, and centerless grinders. Annual output exceeds 7,000 tons of titanium bars, wires, forgings, and titanium alloy powders for additive manufacturing. All production complies with ISO 9001, ISO 13485, and GJB9001 quality management systems. Products serve aerospace, marine, chemical, petroleum, medical, and precision instrumentation industries.

description_zh: 拓宝增材作为金属增材制造领域的高新技术企业，由中国科学技术大学研发团队创立，专注金属3D打印技术创新与产业化应用。公司依托70余项核心专利构筑技术壁垒，已形成覆盖精密制造、工业量产及特种材料三大领域的全系设备解决方案，公司已在安徽芜湖设立技术研发中心、江苏淮安建立设备生产和打印服务中心，实现从技术研发到终端服务的全链条闭环。
description_en: Tuobao Additive Manufacturing is a high-tech enterprise in metal additive manufacturing, founded by a research team from the University of Science and Technology of China. The company focuses on innovation and industrial application of metal 3D printing technologies. With over 70 core patents, it delivers comprehensive equipment solutions across precision manufacturing, industrial-scale production, and specialty materials. R&D centers are established in Wuhu (Anhui), and equipment manufacturing and AM service centers in Huai’an (Jiangsu), enabling end-to-end closed-loop operations from R&D to customer support.

description_zh: PanelMate是上海亿耀电子有限公司，国内一家专注工业显示器、工业平板电脑、悬臂电脑、工业PC、按键控制面板、手持单元、工业键盘及自控系统集成的科技型企业。 我司致力于根据客户要求，产品从设计开发到组装，提供关键部件选型、电路设计、外观造型设计，生产、销售、售后的打包式解决方案。 我司具有专业的软硬件开发能力，控制面板能支持EtherCAT、Modbus-TCP、CANBUS、PROFINET、ADS等总线协议。 凭借创始人及团队对各行业集成服务经验的研究和总结，产品广泛应用于印刷包装、纺织机械、检测设备、工程机械、高铁、造币机械、烟草机械、高级数控系统、工业4.0等相关
description_en: PanelMate, a brand of Shanghai Yiyao Electronics Co., Ltd., is a technology enterprise specializing in industrial displays, industrial panel PCs, articulating arm computers, industrial PCs, push-button control panels, handheld units, industrial keyboards, and automation system integration. The company provides turnkey solutions—from design and development to assembly—including component selection, circuit design, industrial styling, manufacturing, sales, and after-sales support. Its hardware and software development capabilities enable support for industrial fieldbus protocols including EtherCAT, Modbus-TCP, CAN bus, PROFINET, and ADS. Applications span printing & packaging, textile machinery, inspection equipment, construction machinery, high-speed rail, currency minting, tobacco machinery, advanced CNC systems, and Industry 4.0.

description_zh: 新东先进陶瓷（前身为博世先进陶瓷）拥有多年陶瓷增材制造经验，提供陶瓷零部件打印服务，以及包括材料选择、设计优化和后道加工在内的全面咨询服务。我们拥有批量生产能力，至今已成功交付数十万件精密陶瓷部件，将为您优选陶瓷3D打印技术和材料加工生产，对于每一款部件，我们将确保质量标准，满足您陶瓷部件的性能需求。
description_en: Xindong Advanced Ceramics—formerly Bosch Advanced Ceramics—possesses extensive expertise in ceramic additive manufacturing. It offers ceramic component printing services and full-cycle consulting, including material selection, design optimization, and post-processing. With proven mass-production capability, the company has delivered hundreds of thousands of precision ceramic components. Xindong selects optimal ceramic AM technologies and materials for each part, ensuring strict adherence to performance and quality requirements.

description_zh: Apiumtec是发轫于德国卡尔斯鲁厄的高分子材料增材制造领军企业，凭全球首创的 PEEK 长丝 3D 打印技术奠定行业标杆。 公司聚焦三大核心业务：其一，研发制造高分子材料 3D 打印机（含医疗级 PEEK 及复合材料专用设备）；其二，提供医疗器械 CDMO 开发服务，赋能个性化植入级器械的精准研发与生产；其三，布局全球 “Point of Care” 医疗器械服务销售模式，同步推进 PEEK、生物复合材料（HAp、BCP 等）等高适配性材料的自主开发与渠道销售。 Apiumtec 携锦廷以高分子科技为支点，链接全球创新生态，助力医疗与高端制造的精准化、柔性化升级。
description_en: Apiumtec, founded in Karlsruhe, Germany, is a global leader in polymer additive manufacturing, pioneering the world’s first PEEK filament 3D printing technology. Its three core business pillars are: (1) R&D and manufacturing of polymer 3D printers—including medical-grade PEEK and composite-material-specific systems; (2) CDMO services for medical devices, supporting precise development and production of patient-specific implants; and (3) a global ‘Point of Care’ medical device service and distribution model, complemented by in-house development and commercialization of high-compatibility materials such as PEEK and biocomposites (e.g., hydroxyapatite HAp, biphasic calcium phosphate BCP). Through its collaboration with Shanghai Jinting, Apiumtec leverages polymer science to advance precision and flexible manufacturing in healthcare and high-end industry.

description_zh: “超群检测”成立于2001年8月，是一家扎根于上海，具有丰富历史底蕴，专注于工业、医疗及特殊应用领域X 射线技术的科技企业，超群检测传承于1956年成立的上海探伤机厂、1972年成立的上海医疗器械九厂及1946年成立的当立 (DUNLEE)美国厂。形成了以X射线关键部件为核心，延伸至X射线实时成像系统(整机)的产品体系，在工业及医疗X射线领域，超群检测处于全球领先地位。超群检测产品包括X射线管，X射线发生器，覆盖2-8MHU热容量传统滚珠轴承球管及液态金属轴承球管，以及适用于航空航天、兵器工业、汽车摩托车、电子等行业的X射线实时成像系统，X光点料机，高分辨率CT，工业CT等整机系统。
description_en: Chaoqun Testing, established in August 2001 and headquartered in Shanghai, is a globally leading technology enterprise in X-ray imaging, with deep heritage tracing back to the Shanghai Radiographic Testing Equipment Factory (1956), Shanghai Medical Instrument No. 9 Factory (1972), and DUNLEE USA (1946). Its product portfolio centers on critical X-ray components—including X-ray tubes and generators—and extends to complete real-time X-ray imaging systems. It manufactures rotating-anode X-ray tubes with 2–8 MHU thermal capacity (both conventional ball-bearing and liquid-metal-bearing variants), and supplies high-resolution CT, industrial CT, X-ray spot-checking machines, and real-time imaging systems for aerospace, defense, automotive, electronics, and medical applications.

description_zh: 吉林中科优锐是一家专注于高性能聚氨酯弹性体材料的国家高新技术企业，核心团队源自中科院长春应化所，拥有近20年行业经验。 我们面向3D打印领域，推出双固化聚氨酯材料，具备约20小时超长可打印窗口，同时赋予制品高回弹与高耐磨的优异性能。 期待在TCT展会与设备商、研发机构及终端应用企业交流合作，共同推动聚氨酯弹性体在3D打印领域的创新应用。
description_en: Jilin Zhongke Yourui is a national high-tech enterprise specializing in high-performance polyurethane elastomers. Its core team originates from the Changchun Institute of Applied Chemistry, Chinese Academy of Sciences, bringing nearly two decades of industry experience. For additive manufacturing, the company has developed dual-cure polyurethane materials featuring an ultra-long printable window (~20 hours) while delivering exceptional resilience and wear resistance. The company welcomes collaboration with equipment manufacturers, R&D institutions, and end-users at TCT to advance polyurethane elastomer applications in 3D printing.

description_zh: 北京普伟龙祥科技发展有限公司成立于2006年，是一家集研发、生产、销售与服务于一体的创新型企业，始终秉持“以客户为中心”的理念。公司拥有ISO 9001、14001、27001、45001等多项管理体系认证，并荣获AAA级信用企业、绿色低碳诚信企业、国家3.15诚信企业、政府采购优秀供应商等称号。2016年创立自有品牌“普伟”，产品涵盖印前印后设备（如3D打印机、写真喷绘机、扫描仪、雕刻机等）及科研仪器（包括生命科学、运动康复、人因工程等领域），构建了完整的办公与科研设备生态链，为客户提供定制化解决方案，助力提升工作效率。
description_en: Beijing Puweilongxiang Technology Development Co., Ltd., founded in 2006, is an innovative enterprise integrating R&D, manufacturing, sales, and service, guided by a customer-centric philosophy. Certified to ISO 9001, 14001, 27001, and 45001, it holds multiple honors including AAA Credit Enterprise, Green Low-Carbon Integrity Enterprise, National March 15 Integrity Enterprise, and Outstanding Government Procurement Supplier. Since launching its proprietary 'Puwei' brand in 2016, the company offers prepress and postpress equipment—including 3D printers, wide-format inkjet plotters, scanners, and engraving machines—as well as scientific instruments for life sciences, sports rehabilitation, and human factors engineering. It delivers customized, end-to-end solutions to enhance workplace and research efficiency.

description_zh: 上海跃绅能源科技有限公司成立于2014年，是上海市高新技术企业和专精特新企业。公司专注于工业气体的制造、生产和尾气回收再利用，拥有多项核心自主专利，为多家跨国公司、国内上市公司、央企以及顶尖科研单位提供气体物料供应服务。 我们的项目遍及全球，包括俄罗斯、土耳其、越南、韩国等多个国家的各行各业。截止到2024年，公司年收入已达到亿级水平。
description_en: Shanghai Yueshen Energy Technology Co., Ltd., founded in 2014, is a Shanghai High-Tech Enterprise and a specialized, refined, distinctive, and innovative ('Zhuan Jing Te Xin') enterprise. The company specializes in industrial gas production, manufacturing, and exhaust gas recovery/reuse. Holding multiple core proprietary patents, it supplies gas materials to multinational corporations, domestic listed companies, central SOEs, and top-tier research institutes. Its projects span Russia, Turkey, Vietnam, South Korea, and beyond. As of 2024, annual revenue has reached the RMB 100-million level.
