description_zh: 中科布拉菲材料技术有限公司是一家高速旋转电极雾化制粉（PREP）技术为核心的高新技术企业，成立于2022年4月，总部位于广东省东莞市松山湖。公司掌握新材料设计-旋转制粉装备-先进制粉工艺等全流程制粉技术，专注旋转电极雾化装备和超纯超低氧粉末材料的研发、制造和销售。目前设有东莞松山湖研发中心和河北粉末生产基地。研发中心建有材料集成设计、3D打印应用验证、材料检测等实验室。生产基地建有等离子旋转电极雾化（PREP）制粉产线3条，年产能1000吨以上。公司与广州大学、广东工业大学等高校共建研究生联合培养基地，拥有多项自主知识产权。
description_en: Zhongke Blaphi Materials Technology Co., Ltd. is a high-tech enterprise founded in April 2022 and headquartered in Songshan Lake, Dongguan, Guangdong Province. Its core technology is plasma rotating electrode process (PREP) powder atomization. The company masters the full spectrum of powder production—from new material design and rotating-electrode equipment development to advanced atomization process engineering—focusing on R&D, manufacturing, and sales of PREP equipment and ultra-pure, ultra-low-oxygen metal powders. It operates an R&D center in Dongguan (featuring integrated material design, AM application validation, and material testing labs) and a powder production base in Hebei (with three PREP production lines, annual capacity >1,000 tons). It collaborates with Guangzhou University and Guangdong University of Technology on joint graduate training and holds multiple self-owned intellectual property rights.

description_zh: MeshInspector 团队致力于将复杂的三维数据处理变得简单而实用。自 2000 年以来，我们不断突破三维技术的可能性边界，从专注于牙科软件的发展，逐步成长为服务各行业的综合性 3D 数据处理软件提供商。 作为拥有 20 多年 3D 软件经验的专家，我们为增材制造 (AM) 行业提供定制开发、白标解决方案以及咨询服务。 我们诚挚邀请您在 TCT Asia 与我们面对面交流，或通过电子邮件 marketing@meshinspector.com 向我们咨询。
description_en: MeshInspector develops practical, user-friendly 3D data processing software. Since 2000, the team has continuously expanded the boundaries of 3D technology—from early dental software specialization to becoming a comprehensive provider serving diverse industries. With over two decades of 3D software expertise, MeshInspector delivers custom development, white-label solutions, and technical consulting tailored for the additive manufacturing (AM) sector. We welcome face-to-face discussions at TCT Asia or inquiries via marketing@meshinspector.com.

description_zh: 光垒智造成立于2017年，是一家提供陶瓷3D打印，陶瓷/多材料复合3D打印整体解决方案的高新技术企业，目前已获得国家级高新技术企业，广东省科技型中小企业，广东省创新型中小企业等称号。 公司主营业务包括DLP型陶瓷3D打印机的研发，生产和销售，陶瓷/多材料合3D打印机的研发，生产和销售，3D打印材料的研发，生产和销售，以及为客户提供陶瓷/多材料复合3D打印整体解决方案。团队自主研发的Matrix DLP大尺寸多光机图像融合技术，能够实现超大幅面的陶瓷3D打印，处于国内领先地位；陶瓷/多材料复合3D打印机为国内首创，能够实现包括陶瓷材料在内的多材料复合3D打印。
description_en: Guanglei Intelligent Manufacturing, founded in 2017, is a high-tech enterprise providing end-to-end ceramic and multi-material composite 3D printing solutions. Recognized as a National High-Tech Enterprise, Guangdong Provincial Technology-based SME, and Guangdong Innovative SME, its core offerings include R&D, manufacturing, and sales of DLP-based ceramic 3D printers; ceramic/multi-material composite 3D printers; and dedicated 3D printing materials. Its self-developed Matrix DLP large-format multi-projector image fusion technology enables ultra-large-area ceramic printing—leading domestically. Its ceramic/multi-material composite 3D printer is the first of its kind in China, supporting true multi-material (including ceramics) printing.

description_zh: 江苏汉迪科技有限公司是一家专注于3D打印材料的企业，公司经过多年的沉淀与积累，现已成功开发出PLA+系列、PETG系列、PVA、ABS、碳纤维材料等各类3D打印耗材。我们拥有多条自主开发的专业生产线，拥有自主知识产权配方。产品韧性好、颜色正、线径准确、熔点稳定。公司追求打造质量可靠、价格合理、供货稳定的打印材料，致力于让打印更高效。
description_en: Jiangsu Handi Technology Co., Ltd. is a 3D printing materials specialist. Through years of R&D and production refinement, it has successfully launched PLA+, PETG, PVA, ABS, carbon-fiber-reinforced, and other 3D printing filaments. The company operates multiple proprietary production lines and holds patented formulations. Its materials feature excellent toughness, accurate color fidelity, consistent filament diameter, and stable melting points. Handi is committed to delivering reliable, cost-effective, and consistently available printing materials to maximize print efficiency.

description_zh: HENGJIA是山东晟玺实业集团有限公司旗下的高性能 3D打印机品牌。枣庄恒嘉智能制造有限公司联合多所高校博士团队拥有多年的3D打印行业从业经验，技术积淀深厚，运营理念成熟。结合本公司软硬件及应用核心技术，可持续提供高质量的全流程服务综合平台。公司专注于工业级增材制造设备的研发，生产与销售提供高分子3D打印设备，并配套材料、软件及工艺，服务产品广泛应用于航空航天、汽车制造、医疗健康、模具制造等领域。
description_en: HENGJIA is a high-performance 3D printer brand under Shandong Shengxi Industrial Group Co., Ltd. Zaozhuang Hengjia Intelligent Manufacturing Co., Ltd. partners with doctoral teams from multiple universities and possesses deep domain expertise and mature operational methodology in 3D printing. Leveraging proprietary hardware, software, and application technologies, the company provides a high-quality, full-lifecycle service platform. It focuses on R&D, manufacturing, and sales of industrial-grade AM systems—including polymer 3D printers—alongside compatible materials, software, and process support. Applications span aerospace, automotive, medical, and mold manufacturing.

description_zh: 青岛光铭新材料科技有限公司是一家专注于 3D 打印材料研发、生产与销售的创新技术企业。公司依托先进的制造技术和创新的材料科学，致力于为工业制造、医疗、教育、文创等领域提供高品质、高性能的3D 打印耗材解决方案。 我们拥有专业的技术团队和严格的质量管控体系，产品涵盖 PLA、ABS、PETG、TPU 等多种材料，并可根据客户需求定制特殊性能的打印耗材。凭借稳定的产品质量和卓越的服务，我司已成为国内外众多知名企业的长期合作伙伴。 未来，我们将继续秉承“创新驱动发展，品质成就未来”的理念，推动 3D 打印技术的普及与应用，助力全球智能制造与数字化变革。
description_en: Qingdao Guangming New Materials Technology Co., Ltd. is an innovative enterprise focused on R&D, manufacturing, and sales of 3D printing materials. Leveraging advanced manufacturing capabilities and cutting-edge materials science, it delivers high-quality, high-performance 3D printing consumables for industrial manufacturing, healthcare, education, and creative industries. Its professional R&D team and rigorous quality control system support a broad material portfolio—including PLA, ABS, PETG, and TPU—and enable custom formulation development per client specifications. With consistent product quality and outstanding service, Guangming serves as a long-term partner to numerous domestic and international enterprises. Guided by 'Innovation-driven development, quality shaping the future,' the company advances AM adoption and supports global smart manufacturing and digital transformation.

description_zh: 络合高新材料（上海）股份有限公司，成立于2014年，是一家集产品定义、研发、生产、销售为一体的生态链创新企业，获评国家级高新技术企业、国家级专精特新“小巨人”企业，专注于环氧新材料领域的技术突破与产业化应用。 公司深耕环氧新材料领域，在环氧树脂合成、环氧树脂改性、固化体系设计、项目方案定制、供应链整合等方面，服务了数千家客户，为近万名环氧领域研发工程师提供了解决方案。凭借多年实践积累的合成与应用数据，为包括新能源、半导体、道路交通、智能制造、航空航天等领域定制开发了近百种特种功能型环氧体系产品，涵盖增韧、高温、低卤、耐候、耐湿、粘接和潜伏型固化体系。
description_en: Luhe Advanced Materials (Shanghai) Co., Ltd., founded in 2014, is an ecosystem-oriented innovation enterprise integrating product definition, R&D, manufacturing, and sales. Recognized as a National High-Tech Enterprise and a national 'Little Giant' enterprise under the 'Specialized, Refined, Distinctive, and Innovative' program, it pioneers breakthroughs and industrialization in epoxy-based new materials. Luhe excels in epoxy resin synthesis, modification, curing system design, project-specific solution development, and supply chain integration—serving thousands of clients and supporting nearly ten thousand epoxy R&D engineers. Drawing on extensive synthetic and application data, it has co-developed nearly one hundred specialty functional epoxy systems—including toughened, high-temperature, low-halogen, weather-resistant, moisture-resistant, adhesive, and latent-curing variants—for sectors such as new energy, semiconductors, transportation infrastructure, smart manufacturing, and aerospace.

description_zh: 安轮光学是一家专注于光学设计,超精密模具开发,高精密透镜定制,注塑成型一体化的厂家。公司拥有专业光学模具实操经验的研发团队,多名高超透镜注塑调机技术人员,拥有20多年实战经验资深的海外留学光学设计教授及专业的光学设计人才,提供多元化光学解决方案。广泛应用于LED照明,舞台灯光,医疗光学,太阳能光学透镜,车灯光学透镜,人工智能,成像光学,为生物医疗,齿科医疗,文创设计,教育科研,手板模具,建筑工程,珠宝设计,鞋模制造,等领域为光固化3D打印设备提供多元化光源解决方案!
description_en: Anlun Optics is a vertically integrated manufacturer specializing in optical design, ultra-precision mold development, high-precision lens customization, and injection molding. Its R&D team comprises experienced optical mold engineers, expert lens injection technicians, and senior overseas-educated professors and optical designers with over 20 years of hands-on expertise. The company delivers diversified optical solutions for LED lighting, stage lighting, medical optics, solar concentrator lenses, automotive lighting lenses, AI vision systems, and imaging optics. It also provides tailored light-source solutions for photopolymerization-based 3D printing equipment—serving biomedical, dental, cultural & creative design, educational research, rapid prototyping, architectural engineering, jewelry design, footwear mold making, and other fields.

description_en: Founded in 2009 (formerly Shanghai Chuanhe Industrial Development Co., Ltd.), Chuanhe Metallographic Testing Equipment (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. — branded as Chuanhe Truer — is a professional manufacturer and service provider specializing in metallographic equipment and consumables. With over a decade of R&D and application experience, the company has built an extensive metallographic sample preparation methodology database and successfully developed stable, intelligent, and durable metallographic equipment and highly compatible consumables that serve as reliable alternatives to imported products. Its comprehensive product portfolio addresses material-specific preparation and analysis requirements across diverse industrial sectors.

description_zh: 我们是一家专注于生物材料及制品的综合解决方案供应商，作为TotalEnergies Corbion 中国区核心代理经销商，我们致力于推动可持续材料在各行业的创新应用。 公司以聚乳酸（PLA）技术为核心，提供全生物降解纯树脂（PLA、PBAT、PHA、PCL等）、3D打印线材、PLA纤维与无纺布、生物降解膜袋及发泡制品等多元产品与方案。我们深耕材料改性，为客户提供从材料选型、配方支持到制品开发的一站式解决方案，广泛应用于包装、纺织、医疗及工业领域。 我们以科技创新践行绿色发展，携手全球伙伴，共同构建可持续的未来。
description_en: Xiamen Xinfuda Environmental Technology Co., Ltd. is a comprehensive solutions provider for bio-based materials and products. As a core authorized distributor of TotalEnergies Corbion in China, the company drives sustainable material innovation across packaging, textiles, healthcare, and industrial applications. Centered on polylactic acid (PLA) technology, it offers a diversified portfolio including fully biodegradable resins (PLA, PBAT, PHA, PCL), 3D printing filaments, PLA fibers and nonwovens, biodegradable films and bags, and foamed products. Leveraging deep expertise in polymer modification, Xinfuda provides end-to-end support—from material selection and formulation development to finished-product engineering—empowering customers with scalable, sustainable manufacturing solutions.

description_zh: 四川华寅智造新材料技术有限公司是一家集科研与生产加工一体的高新技术企业，“华寅”牌粉末致力于打造中高端金属粉末产品。公司总部设在德阳，目前公司有四川德阳和湖南宁乡两个生产基地。公司以华中科技大学国家光电实验中心和中南大学粉末冶金专业团队为技术依托，目前完全自主打造两套全国领先的真空气雾化气冷系统，四套非真空气雾化气冷生产系统，两套水雾化生产系统。公司所有生产系统具有自主知识产权打造，可以根据需求改进装备和生产工艺，达到年综合生产5000吨高性能金属合金粉末功能材料能力！
description_en: Sichuan Huayin Intelligent New Materials Technology Co., Ltd. is a high-tech enterprise integrating R&D and advanced manufacturing. Its 'Huayin' brand metal powders target mid- to high-end applications. Headquartered in Deyang, Sichuan, the company operates two production bases—in Deyang and Ningxiang, Hunan. Technologically backed by the State Key Laboratory of Optoelectronics at Huazhong University of Science and Technology and the Powder Metallurgy Research Group at Central South University, Huayin has independently developed two leading vacuum gas atomization (VGA) systems with gas cooling, four non-vacuum gas atomization systems with gas cooling, and two water atomization systems—all protected by proprietary intellectual property. The company maintains full flexibility to optimize equipment and process parameters, achieving an annual integrated production capacity of 5,000 metric tons of high-performance metal alloy powders.

description_en: Wuhan Huajingkang Optoelectronics Technology Co., Ltd. specializes in infrared thermal imaging temperature measurement, dimensional metrology, and diagnostic systems. Its solutions are widely deployed across industrial applications including temperature monitoring of optical fiber splices and combiners, gain fiber thermal profiling, laser welding and laser cladding melt pool thermography, real-time temperature sensing in metal powder bed fusion (PBF) 3D printing, and arc-based additive manufacturing (WAAM).

description_zh: 圣德科（上海）光通信有限公司 是日本Santec公司在中国的全资子公司。 Santec公司，成立于1979年，总部位于日本爱知县小牧市。2001年，Santec在东京证券交易所成功上市。 Santec在全球范围内拥有广泛的业务布局，其子公司遍布北美、加拿大、英国、澳洲以及中国。公司自成立以来，始终秉承以客户为中心的理念，不断推动技术创新，突破全球前沿技术。近半个世纪的技术沉淀，使得Santec在MEMS技术、LCOS、OCT（光学相干断层扫描）和光学薄膜技术等领域积累了丰富的应用经验，并成功将这些先进技术引入到更广泛的应用领域。
description_en: Santec (Shanghai) Optical Communications Co., Ltd. is the wholly owned Chinese subsidiary of Santec Corporation, Japan—a global leader in optical test and measurement instrumentation founded in 1979 in Komaki, Aichi Prefecture. Listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange since 2001, Santec maintains subsidiaries across North America, Canada, the UK, Australia, and China. With nearly 50 years of technological heritage, Santec holds deep expertise in MEMS, LCOS, OCT (optical coherence tomography), and optical thin-film technologies, consistently delivering customer-centric innovation and deploying these advanced optical platforms into broader industrial, medical, and research applications.

description_zh: L3AD 是一家专注于工业3D打印设计与制造的数字化平台。 我们拥有800多台工业级打印机（FDM、SLA、SLS），并获得Vertex Group —— 这家40多年来为全球品牌提供工程与制造解决方案的行业引领者 —— 的支持，L3AD将可扩展的增材制造技术引入多个行业。 通过一个数字化中心，客户可以管理文件、控制生产、与工厂沟通，并追踪货物配送至其设施或我们仓库的物流情况。 L3AD ——我们的专注，您的成果。
description_en: L3AD is a digital industrial platform dedicated to industrial 3D printing design and manufacturing. Supported by Vertex Group—a global engineering and manufacturing solutions leader serving top-tier brands for over 40 years—L3AD deploys scalable additive manufacturing technologies across multiple industries. Its unified digital hub enables customers to manage design files, control production workflows, communicate directly with manufacturing facilities, and track logistics from factory or L3AD’s warehouse to their site. L3AD: Our focus. Your results.

description_zh: 深圳巨鲸三维科技有限公司（Terathos）是大尺寸工业级3D打印设备制造商，专注于高温双头FDM打印技术和颗粒料3D打印技术的 研发与应用。我们为航空航天、科研医疗、汽车制造、建筑模型等领域提供从研发到量产的全链条3D打印解决方案。作为大尺寸工业 3D打印领域的颠覆者，我们不仅是设备制造商，更是您值得信赖的增材制造战略合作伙伴。

(Terathos) is a manufacturer of large-format industrial 3D printers, specializing in high-temperature dual-extrusion FDM and pellet-fed 3D printing technologies. As a disruptive innovator in large-scale industrial AM, Terathos serves not only as an equipment supplier but also as a trusted strategic AM partner.

description_zh: 四方光电股份有限公司成立于2003年，是一家从事智能气体传感器和高端气体分析仪器的科创板上市企业（股票代码688665.SH）。公司自成立以来始终坚持科技创新，目前已构建了1500人规模的高素质人才团队，其中研发技术人员占比超20%，坚持每年将10%以上的销售收入投入产品的研究与开发。公司建设有国家企业技术中心、省级企业技术中心、湖北省气体分析仪器仪表工程技术研究中心等多个创新平台，并设立博士后科研工作站，形成了“产学研用”深度融合的创新生态体系。公司以“高科技、低成本、规模化”为战略定位，重点布局赋能暖通空调、工业安全、医疗健康、汽车电子、智慧计量、科学仪器、低碳热工7大战略产业。
description_en: Founded in 2003 and listed on the STAR Market (Stock Code: 688665.SH), Sensortek Co., Ltd. is a leading developer and manufacturer of intelligent gas sensors and high-end gas analyzers. The company maintains a 1,500-person talent pool, with over 20% comprising R&D engineers, and invests more than 10% of annual revenue into product innovation. It hosts multiple national and provincial innovation platforms—including the National Enterprise Technology Center, Hubei Province Gas Analyzer Engineering Technology Research Center—and a postdoctoral research workstation, enabling deep integration of industry–academia–research–application. Strategically focused on 'high technology, low cost, scale,' Sensortek serves seven key sectors: HVAC, industrial safety, healthcare, automotive electronics, smart metering, scientific instrumentation, and low-carbon thermal engineering.

description_zh: 公司秉持“推动增材制造普及化，提供专 业增材解决方案”理念，瞄准产业化应用持续开展高质量应用创新，以扎实的应用技术积累作为基石成为增材制造行业头部的应用和技术服务企业。公司主营业务为增材制造应用开发、设备销售、增材加工服务、三维扫描服务。目前拥有国内领先的增材制造“梦工厂”，硬件设备涵盖20台以上不同技术的专业增材设备，检测和后处理设备涵盖三维扫描、抛光、浸染、研磨、超声等。
description_en: Hangzhou Daotian Additive Manufacturing Technology Co., Ltd. advances the industrial adoption of additive manufacturing through high-quality application-driven innovation. Grounded in robust application engineering expertise, the company is a market-leading provider of AM application development, equipment sales, on-demand AM part production, and 3D scanning services. Its domestic 'Additive Manufacturing Dream Factory' features over 20 professional AM systems spanning multiple technologies (SLM, SLS, SLA, FDM, etc.), complemented by a full suite of inspection and post-processing capabilities—including 3D scanning, polishing, dyeing, grinding, and ultrasonic cleaning.

description_zh: 山东世商焊材有限公司厂房占地面积38000平方米，建筑面积26000平方米，总投资1.3亿元。是一家致力于“创新、绿色、环保、节能”的省级科技型企业，专业从事实芯焊丝、铝合金焊丝、不锈钢焊丝及药芯焊丝的研发、生产、销售和服务；年产实芯焊丝4万余吨；铝合金焊丝3000余吨；药芯焊丝1万余吨；不锈钢及特种焊条8000余吨；被广泛应用于新能源汽车制造、桥梁、压力容器、航空、3D打印及高铁等领域。并出口西班牙、波兰、南非、泰国、越南、墨西哥、巴西、俄罗斯等40余个国家。
description_en: Shandong Shishang Welding Materials Co., Ltd. occupies a 38,000 m² plant area (26,000 m² built-up), with a total investment of RMB 130 million. A provincial-level science and technology enterprise committed to innovation, green manufacturing, environmental protection, and energy efficiency, it specializes in R&D, production, sales, and technical service of solid wire, aluminum alloy wire, stainless steel wire, and flux-cored wire. Annual capacities include over 40,000 tons of solid wire, 3,000+ tons of aluminum alloy wire, 10,000+ tons of flux-cored wire, and 8,000+ tons of stainless and specialty electrodes. Its products serve new-energy vehicle manufacturing, bridges, pressure vessels, aerospace, 3D printing, and high-speed rail—and are exported to over 40 countries including Spain, Poland, South Africa, Thailand, Vietnam, Mexico, Brazil, and Russia.

description_zh: 增材制造数智工业平台，平台集成了完全自主知识产权的切片软件CAD、路径规划软件CAM、工艺仿真软件CAE、晶格性能预测仿真软件CAE、全生命周期管理系统PLM等全流程数字化工具，为增材制造行业提供了设计、制造、仿真、服役、数据管理等整体解决方案，将使您能够在实际生产开始之前在数字环境中进行仿真测试和优化工作，实现了降本增效的功能。
description_en: The Additive Manufacturing Digital-Intelligent Industrial Platform, developed by the National Engineering Research Center for Mold CAD at Shanghai Jiao Tong University, integrates a full-stack suite of proprietary digital tools: CAD slicing software, CAM path-planning software, CAE process simulation software, CAE lattice performance prediction software, and PLM lifecycle management software. This end-to-end solution supports AM design, fabrication, simulation, in-service performance evaluation, and data governance—enabling virtual validation, optimization, and de-risking prior to physical production to enhance efficiency and reduce costs.

Authorized distributor for Gates (USA), NITTA (Japan), MEGADYNE (Italy), Continental (Germany), Norres (Germany), VACUFLFX (Germany), and BLACK CLUBS, the company provides application engineering support and tailored recommendations for OEM clients—drawing on nearly 30 years of industry experience. Guided by integrity, stability, professionalism, and innovation, Xingkaichi delivers high-value products and efficient service to global customers.

description_zh: 南京肇启智能科技研究院有限公司是一家专注于电解质等离子体抛光技术及高端智能装备研发的高科技企业，成立于2022年1月，与多所高校、科研院所及企业专家共建研发平台。公司核心科技为电解质等离子体金属表面处理技术，设备广泛应用于3D打印、航空航天、医疗器械、3C电子、汽车零部件等领域的金属后处理。创始人贺赟晖博士作为行业标准《电解质等离子体抛光机》（JBT 14523-2023）的核心起草人，推动了该领域首部行业标准的制定。 随着业务拓展，公司在合肥高新技术产业开发区引进下成立合肥肇启智能科技有限公司，作为战略延伸，公司致力于为高端制造提供创新型表面处理解决方案，赋能产业升级与高质量发展。
description_en: Hefei Zhaoqi Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd. is a high-tech enterprise established in 2022 as a strategic extension of Nanjing Zhaoqi Intelligent Technology Research Institute Co., Ltd.—a pioneer in electrolytic plasma polishing (EPP) technology and intelligent equipment development. Collaborating with universities, research institutes, and industry experts, Zhaoqi focuses on EPP-based metal surface finishing solutions for AM parts, aerospace components, medical devices, 3C electronics, and automotive parts. Its founder, Dr. Yunhui He, served as lead drafter of China’s first industry standard for electrolytic plasma polishing machines (JB/T 14523–2023). Based in Hefei High-Tech Industrial Development Zone, Zhaoqi empowers advanced manufacturing with innovative, high-precision surface treatment technologies.

description_zh: 力姆泰克是一家工业机器人核心部件的制造商，公司成立于 2005 年，主要从事伺服电动缸、六自由度平台、电动推杆、电动升降机、航空飞行模拟器、机器人焊钳、伺服系统集成等产品的研发设计、生产、销售及技术服务。 主要产品包括电动推杆、螺旋升降机、换向齿轮箱、减速电 机及其配套机械、机电产品、电器类产品及零部件等；广泛应用于汽车装备、自动化装备、机器人、冶金行业、航天航空军工、港口机械等各行各业。 力姆泰克凭借着领先的技术优势及技术团队、一对一的定制 化服务、先进的生产加工装备和遍布全国的销售网络，成为国内智能传动细分行业内规模最大的制造商.
description_en: Founded in 2005, Lemtec (Langfang) Transmission Equipment Co., Ltd. is a leading Chinese manufacturer of core industrial robot components. The company designs, manufactures, sells, and provides technical service for servo electric cylinders, six-degree-of-freedom motion platforms, electric actuators, electric lifts, flight simulators, robotic welding tongs, and integrated servo systems. Its product range also includes spiral jacks, right-angle gearboxes, geared motors, and associated electromechanical components. Applications span automotive assembly, automation systems, robotics, metallurgy, aerospace & defense, and port machinery. Leveraging proprietary technology, customized engineering support, advanced manufacturing infrastructure, and a nationwide sales network, Lemtec is the largest domestic manufacturer in the intelligent transmission components segment.

description_zh: 芜湖古戈尔自动化科技有限公司、国家级高新技术企业、位于安徽省芜湖市北航芜湖通航创新园，是一家专门从事工业级3D打印设备（金属3D打印机、尼龙、复合塑料）、精密零件3D打印服务、航空设备金属复杂异形件打印制备（可用于钛合金、铝合金、不锈钢等）、碳纤维机体及零部件快速成型，集研发、生产、销售服务一体化的科技型公司。荣获:“安徽省优秀科技创新产品”、“国家专利密集型产品认证”、本企业已经通过ISO9001国际质量管理体系认证。 公司于2021年12月获得国家级骨干软件企业科大讯飞投资，2022年12月获得芜湖市人民政府投资，是湾沚区政府重点投资支持企业之一。公司成立至今已累计荣获国家专利18项
description_en: Wuhu Gugor Automation Technology Co., Ltd. is a national high-tech enterprise based in the Beihang–Wuhu General Aviation Innovation Park, Anhui Province. Specializing in industrial-grade 3D printing systems—including metal PBF (SLM/DMLS), nylon, and composite plastic printers—the company delivers precision AM part production, rapid prototyping of complex aerospace metallic components (Ti-6Al-4V, Al alloys, stainless steels), and carbon-fiber airframe and structural part fabrication. Integrated R&D, manufacturing, sales, and service capabilities are certified under ISO 9001. Recognized with the 'Anhui Outstanding Scientific & Technological Innovation Product' award and 'National Patent-Intensive Product Certification', Gugor received strategic investments from iFLYTEK (2021) and the Wuhu Municipal Government (2022), and has secured 18 national patents to date.

Its core technologies focus on propulsion systems for medium- to long-range low-altitude vehicles and commercial aerospace vehicles, delivering robust power solutions to the global aerospace industry.

description_en: GigaDevice Semiconductor (Beijing) Inc. (GigaDevice), founded in 2005 and headquartered in Beijing, China, is a leading fabless semiconductor company listed on the Shanghai Stock Exchange (603986.SH) and Hong Kong Stock Exchange (3986.HK). The company develops and supplies memory products, microcontrollers (MCUs), sensors, and analog solutions. With subsidiaries and offices across multiple countries and regions, GigaDevice maintains a global sales and support network delivering localized, high-quality technical services.

description_zh: 江门市兴晟精密制造有限公司，是以微纳打印技术为基础，集设备、材料研发、生产制造和销售为一体，专注于微纳3D打印领域设备制造及技术服务的企业。其中高精度3D打印设备，采用微尺度面扫描技术，为客户提供快速制造复杂三维微纳结构技术解决方案；同时结合不同材料及工艺，实现终端产品高效、低成本批量化生产及销售。作为高精密制造企业，已和众多企业开展业务合作，包括华为、海康威视，微创医疗等，产品广泛应用于连接器、内窥镜、医疗器械、微电子、微针、精密齿轮等行业。已和北京大学、清华大学、浙江大学、上海交通大学、复旦大学、中山大学、香港大学、香港理工等上百所科研院校展开合作，帮助高校和研究所快速开展各项前沿创新研究
description_en: Jiangmen Xingsheng Precision Manufacturing Co., Ltd. is a micro- and nano-scale 3D printing equipment manufacturer and service provider, integrating R&D, production, and sales of equipment and materials. Its high-precision 3D printers utilize micro-scale area-scanning technology to deliver rapid fabrication solutions for complex 3D micro- and nano-structures. By combining diverse materials and process optimization, the company enables efficient, low-cost batch production of end-use parts. Serving clients including Huawei, Hikvision, and MicroPort Medical, its products are widely applied in connectors, endoscopes, medical devices, microelectronics, microneedles, and precision gears. The company collaborates with over 100 research institutions—including Peking University, Tsinghua University, Zhejiang University, Shanghai Jiao Tong University, Fudan University, Sun Yat-sen University, the University of Hong Kong, and The Hong Kong Polytechnic University—to accelerate cutting-edge academic and industrial innovation.

description_zh: 安徽多广新材料科技有限公司成立于2013年(前身为苏州多广)，是一家专注于新材料的研发、生产及销售的高科技企业，公司位于风景秀丽的宣城市宣州经济开发区，公司在全国多地设有业务销售机构。公司技术和研发实力雄厚，通过了三体系认证，并被政府认定为“高新技术企业” 公司自成立以来，始终坚持以人才为本、诚信立业的经营原则，荟萃业界精英、不断努力进取，在塑胶染色，改性，生物降解材料等领域成绩优异、飞速发展。我公司产品广泛应用于食品包装、汽车电子、农业、医疗、家电等各个行业。
description_en: Anhui Duoguang New Materials Technology Co., Ltd., founded in 2013 (formerly Suzhou Duoguang), is a high-tech enterprise engaged in R&D, production, and sales of advanced materials. Located in Xuancheng Economic Development Zone, Anhui Province, the company maintains sales offices nationwide. Certified under ISO 9001, ISO 14001, and ISO 45001, it is officially recognized as a National High-Tech Enterprise. Adhering to a talent- and integrity-driven business philosophy, the company excels in plastic coloring, polymer modification, and biodegradable materials—serving industries including food packaging, automotive electronics, agriculture, healthcare, and home appliances.

The company provides comprehensive services including optical design, electronic design, software development, and turnkey optical solutions—delivering high-accuracy, high-stability optical systems for advanced manufacturing and industrial applications.

description_zh: 上海高传电子科技有限公司是一家以氧气分析仪、CO2分析仪、SF6分析仪、露点分析仪、氢气分析仪为核心，集研发、生产、销售为一体的高新技术企业。我们主要面向OEM厂商提供专业的传感器产品销售和技术支持。在传感和控制产品领域，我们为全球驰名的厂商提供高精度、长寿命、响应快的气体分析仪器和各种复杂的解决方案，也是目前中国大陆地区增长迅速的专业的传感和控制产品供应商。
description_en: Shanghai Gaochuan Electronics Technology Co., Ltd. is a high-tech enterprise specializing in the R&D, manufacturing, and sales of gas analyzers—including oxygen (O₂), carbon dioxide (CO₂), sulfur hexafluoride (SF₆), dew point, and hydrogen (H₂) analyzers. Targeting OEM customers, the company supplies high-precision, long-life, fast-response gas analysis instruments and customized solutions for sensing and control applications. It serves globally renowned manufacturers and ranks among the fastest-growing professional sensor and control product suppliers in mainland China.

description_zh: 惠州科锐智能聚焦桌面级工业标准 3D 打印设备，核心产品F-100SE与 Loopzizo k-100 SLS 打印机，突破性将工业级 SLS 技术小型化、低成本化。产品无需支撑即可打印 PA11/PA12/TPU 等材料，适配全球电压，覆盖创客、设计工作室、高校及中小制造企业需求。公司拟构建 “打印 + 后处理” 生态，未来推出金属 SLM 打印机与五轴 CNC，打造全流程数字制造解决方案。
description_en: Huizhou Kerui Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd. focuses on desktop-grade industrial-standard 3D printers. Its flagship products—the F-100SE and Loopzizo K-100 SLS printers—break new ground by miniaturizing and cost-optimizing industrial-grade Selective Laser Sintering (SLS) technology. These printers support PA11, PA12, and TPU without supports, feature universal voltage compatibility, and serve makers, design studios, universities, and SMEs. The company plans to build a 'printing + post-processing' ecosystem and will launch metal Selective Laser Melting (SLM) printers and 5-axis CNC machines to deliver end-to-end digital manufacturing solutions.

description_zh: 杭州新川新材料有限公司成立于2019年，是一家集研发、生产、销售为一体的高端球形超细金属粉末供应商.公司专业生产50-5000nm球形单质、合金粉末，年产1500吨，主要应用于电子信息、航空航天以及能源医药领域。目前拥有20000平方的研发生产基地，完善的品质检测中心。
description_en: Hangzhou Xinchuan New Materials Co., Ltd., founded in 2019, is a premium supplier of spherical ultrafine metal powders, integrating R&D, production, and sales. The company specializes in producing spherical elemental and alloy powders (50–5000 nm), with an annual capacity of 1,500 metric tons. Its powders serve high-value sectors including electronics, aerospace, energy, and pharmaceuticals. The company operates a 20,000 m² R&D and production base equipped with a comprehensive quality inspection center.

description_zh: 无锡爱迪热工科技有限公司于2017年成立，公司经营范围包括：工业加热设备及配件的研发、生产、销售、维护、安装、技术服务；金属材料、铸造材料的销售、技术服务；工业控制系统开发、销售、技术服务；自营和代理各类商品和技术的进出口业务等。公司主营产品：空气循环炉，管式炉，马弗炉及各类非标产品。各类非标热加工设备、金属熔炼设备及相应的工艺配套方案。
description_en: Wuxi Aidie Thermal Technology Co., Ltd., established in 2017, engages in R&D, manufacturing, sales, maintenance, installation, and technical services for industrial heating equipment and components; sales and technical services for metallic and foundry materials; and development, sales, and technical services for industrial control systems. Core products include air-circulation furnaces, tube furnaces, muffle furnaces, and custom thermal processing equipment—including non-standard heat treatment and metal melting systems—along with tailored process integration solutions.

description_zh: 东莞市顺鑫隆塑胶颜料有限公司，植根于中国广东省珠江三角洲的核心地带——东莞寮步镇，自2018年启航以来，便专注于配色与色粉色母粒的原创制造，并迅速崛起为一家集科研、生产、营销于一体的综合性强企业，占地面积逾2000平方米。公司凭借先进的生产设施与一支精英汇聚的技术团队，致力于为全球塑胶行业提供卓越的颜料解决方案。公司汇聚了一批才华横溢的工程师，他们不仅在塑胶颜料领域拥有深厚的专业知识，更具备丰富的实践经验。此外，我们与国内顶尖研究院所及高等学府建立了紧密的产学研合作关系，共同研发出一系列高端产品线，涵盖3D打印材料配色方案、丝绸母粒、哑光色母、食品级注塑等专用色母粒
description_en: Dongguan Shunxinlong Plastic Pigments Co., Ltd., based in Liaobu Town, Dongguan—the heart of Guangdong’s Pearl River Delta—has specialized since 2018 in original formulation and manufacturing of color masterbatches and pigment concentrates. Operating from a 2,000+ m² facility, the company combines advanced production infrastructure with a team of expert engineers to deliver outstanding pigment solutions for the global plastics industry. Its R&D collaborations with top-tier Chinese research institutes and universities have yielded specialized product lines—including 3D printing material colorants, silk-effect masterbatches, matte masterbatches, and food-grade injection molding masterbatches.

description_zh: 君璟科技公司总部在北京，旗下有广东、宁波两家子公司，企业聚焦光固化陶瓷 / 金属增材制造，以 “装备 + 材料 + 工艺 + AI 赋能” 为核心，填补国内技术空白，打破海外垄断。拥有 28 项技术成果，通过 ISO9001 认证，获多项资质荣誉。其自主研发工艺解决行业痛点，推出多种高性能浆料及耗材，陶瓷滤芯等产品实现高效批量生产，成品率超 95%。 业务覆盖 3C、半导体、医疗等五大领域，出口多国，2025 年工业客户营收占比超 80%，兼具经济与社会效益。
description_en: Junjing Technology, headquartered in Beijing with subsidiaries in Guangdong and Ningbo, focuses on photopolymerization-based ceramic and metal additive manufacturing. Its integrated approach—'Equipment + Materials + Process + AI Enablement'—addresses domestic technological gaps and breaks foreign monopolies. Holding 28 patented technologies and ISO 9001 certification, the company offers proprietary processes, high-performance slurries, and consumables; its ceramic filter products achieve >95% yield in mass production. Applications span 3C electronics, semiconductors, healthcare, and four additional sectors, with exports to multiple countries. Industrial customers accounted for >80% of revenue in 2025, demonstrating strong economic and social impact.

description_zh: 福州巨维达光电技术有限公司创立于2015年，坐落于“全球光电元器件之都”-福州。公司聚集了一批从事光机电行业的专业技术人才，致力于DMD数字微镜技术、精密光路及相关控制技术的研究、开发与应用，“聚焦先进制造数字光电核心模块”，专业从事数字光处理技术DLP光机研发、制造、销售与定制化服务。 公司产品已广泛应用于光固化3D打印、3D扫描检测机器视觉、数字曝光刻印、数字投影显微等相关领域;
description_en: Fuzhou Juweida Optoelectronic Technology Co., Ltd., founded in 2015 in Fuzhou—the 'Global Capital of Optoelectronic Components'—assembles a team of specialists in optomechatronics to advance DMD-based digital micromirror technology, precision optical paths, and associated control systems. Focused on core digital photonics modules for advanced manufacturing, the company designs, manufactures, sells, and customizes DLP optical engines. Its products are widely deployed in SLA 3D printing, 3D scanning and machine vision inspection, digital exposure lithography, and digital projection microscopy.

description_zh: 常州乔润新材料科技有限公司成立于2015年，是一家专业从事辐射固化原材料与技术解决方案供应商，致力于3D打印、光学膜、3C电子和粘合剂等众多行业提供出色的解决方案。 我们的业务遍布全国，始终贯彻以客户为中心，以市场为导向，并且不断地根据市场需求而进行产品升级。我们全面的产品组合（低聚物、单体、引发剂、特种助剂等）使我们更加专业的服务于客户。我们会提供全国范围的技术应用支持、产品开发和定制解决方案。 乔润新材将会在未来不断地持续投入到辐射固化材料行业中，并和所有的客户共同成长。我们100%致力于通过提升研发产品和生产能力，更好地为客户提供优质服务。
description_en: Changzhou Qiaorun New Materials Technology Co., Ltd., established in 2015, is a specialized supplier of radiation-curable raw materials and technical solutions. The company serves diverse sectors including 3D printing, optical films, 3C electronics, and adhesives. With nationwide coverage, it follows a customer-centric, market-driven strategy—continuously upgrading products to meet evolving demands. Its comprehensive portfolio includes oligomers, monomers, photoinitiators, and specialty additives, supported by nationwide technical application assistance, product development, and customized solution engineering. Qiaorun remains fully committed to advancing radiation-curing materials through sustained R&D and production capability enhancement.

Its FDM 3D printing material portfolio includes support materials, flame-retardant grades, PLA, PETG, and TPU—offering a complete, multi-tiered '3D Printing Material Solution' to meet diverse market requirements.

description_en: Anhui Yuguang New Materials Co., Ltd. specializes in the R&D and production of modified 3D printing filaments, including PLA and PETG, as well as masterbatches. Key products include high-gloss silk-finish PETG, matte-finish PETG, high-speed PLA filament, and transparent toughening PLA additives. The company employs senior color-matching engineers to develop application-specific masterbatches for PLA, PETG, TPU, ABS, and PEBA filaments. It maintains filament testing equipment, standard extrusion lines, and partnerships with multiple 3D printer manufacturers for comprehensive product validation.

description_zh: 广州优塑三维科技有限公司是一家专门从事 3D 打印光固化树脂、FDM 3D 打印耗材和 3D 打印笔的研发，生产及销售的国家高新技术企业。公司自 2013 年成立以 FDM 3D 打印耗材、光固化树脂为主导的系列产品并广泛应用于各领域如牙模、铸造、高透明、高强高韧、405nm SLA 等系列树脂。我们拥有专业的实验室、生产线，拥有自主知识产权的配方体系。自己新建甲类化工园区占地 30 亩 2024 投入使用，以 3D 打印材料研发为基础，打通行业上下游深耕材料领域。我们坚持“品质第一”的经营方针，与国内外 3D 打印机生产商、贸易商和用户建立起了良好的合作伙伴关系产品畅销海内外
description_en: Guangzhou Uso 3D Technology Co., Ltd. is a national high-tech enterprise focused on the R&D, manufacturing, and sales of photopolymer resins for SLA/DLP 3D printing, FDM thermoplastic filaments, and 3D printing pens. Since its founding in 2013, it has developed a broad portfolio of resins—including dental, investment casting, ultra-transparent, high-strength/toughness, and 405 nm SLA-optimized formulations. The company operates proprietary laboratories and production lines with self-owned resin formulation IP. A newly built Class-A chemical industrial park (30 mu, ~20,000 m²) in Guangdong commenced operations in 2024, supporting vertically integrated R&D and upstream-downstream material innovation. Adhering to a 'quality-first' philosophy, Uso serves global 3D printer OEMs, distributors, and end users.

description_zh: 西安荷佐里机电科技有限公司于2008年在西安高新区成立，迄今一直专注于激光控制产品的研发、生产、销售、服务。 产品线(荷佐里、HZL品牌)包括二维振镜、3D振镜、焊接模组、手持式焊接头、非标组件等，应用范围涵盖激光打标、精密切割、激光焊接、3D打印、激光开孔及激光清洗等领域。 多年积累的经验、成熟的制造工艺、完善的质量管理体系、持续提升的研发团队，保证了荷佐里能够不断推出新的产品及解决方案，以满足各种激光应用场景。 “精心每一点”，是荷佐里的口号，更是荷佐里的信仰。
description_en: Xi’an Hezuoli Electromechanical Technology Co., Ltd., established in 2008 in Xi’an High-Tech Zone, specializes in laser scanning and control systems. Its HZL-branded product line includes 2D and 3D galvanometer scanners, welding modules, handheld welding heads, and custom optical-mechanical components. Applications span laser marking, precision cutting, laser welding, additive manufacturing (AM), laser drilling, and laser cleaning. Leveraging deep expertise, mature manufacturing processes, ISO-certified quality management, and an expanding R&D team, Hezuoli delivers innovative solutions across diverse laser application domains. Its motto—'Precision in Every Point'—reflects its engineering ethos and commitment to excellence.

description_zh: 东莞市大凡光学科技有限公司创立于2018年，公司位于东莞市茶山镇盈坤产业园，国家级高标准的工业厂房，建筑面积10000多平方米，并在苏州设立分公司，公司现有员工100多人，其中研发工程师团队人员超30%。 公司专注于机器视觉标定领域，主要业务包括高精度视觉标定板、大尺寸标定板、红外标定板等标定产品的研发和推广，以及图像实验室自动驾驶标定间搭建等.公司产品广泛应用于手机3C、智能汽车、医疗、三维扫描、安防监控、显微检测、工业机器人、AR/VR视觉标定、遥感航测等各个领域。
description_en: Dongguan Dafan Optics Technology Co., Ltd., founded in 2018 and headquartered in Cha Shan Town, Dongguan (with a Suzhou branch), is a national-standard high-tech manufacturer specializing in machine vision calibration solutions. Its core offerings include high-precision calibration targets, large-format calibration plates, and infrared calibration boards. The company also designs and constructs turnkey vision calibration labs—including autonomous vehicle testing environments. With over 30% of its 100+ employees in R&D, Dafan serves industries such as smartphone and consumer electronics (3C), intelligent vehicles, medical imaging, 3D scanning, security surveillance, microscopy, industrial robotics, AR/VR, and remote sensing aerial survey.

description_zh: 南京巍舜材料科技有限公司是一家集 3D 金属打印材料研发、生产、加工及销售于一体的综合性企业。公司总部位于南京，并在武汉青山区设立了公司总部， 巍舜新材的主营业务专注于高温合金系列产品，主要包括铸造母合金制粉棒、线材及细线和高温合金粉末（尤其适用于 3D 金属打印领域）。 我们的核心业务来自海外的特种工程项目，主要涉及商业航空航天、核电站、新能源汽车、医疗植入设备以及 3D 金属打印行业。
description_en: Nanjing Weishun Materials Technology Co., Ltd. is an integrated enterprise engaged in the R&D, production, processing, and sales of metal powders for additive manufacturing. Headquartered in Nanjing—with an additional operational headquarters in Wuhan’s Qingshan District—the company focuses on high-performance superalloy powders, including cast master alloy rods/wires, fine wires, and atomized powders optimized for laser powder bed fusion (LPBF) and other metal AM processes. Its core business stems from international specialty engineering projects serving commercial aerospace, nuclear power, new-energy vehicles, medical implants, and metal 3D printing sectors.

Its portfolio includes UV-curable resins, waterborne resins, functional monomers, and performance additives. Bahuo pioneers customer-centric, one-to-one collaborative development—delivering customized radiation-curing material solutions aligned with client-specific applications. Through deep strategic partnerships, it provides highly specialized, value-added product support and technical services to global customers across diverse industrial segments.

description_zh: 依莱克罗德国总部成立于1924年，是一家生产工业用鼓风机的厂家。公司集规划、设计、研发、生产、测试、销售为一体。拥有欧洲先进的机械加工车间和良好的质量管理体系。产品结构紧凑美观, 体积小易于安装，能耗低使用寿命长，并获得DIN EN ISO 9001质量认证证书以及ISO 14001 环境管理体系认证。我们的宗旨就是将德国依莱克罗优质的产品、先进的技术，完善的售后服务提供给广大的中国用户，随时为中国用户提供个性化空气解决方案。
description_en: Elacoro Blowers (Beijing) Co., Ltd. represents Elacoro GmbH—Germany’s premier industrial blower manufacturer, founded in 1924. Integrating planning, design, R&D, manufacturing, testing, and sales, Elacoro operates advanced European machining facilities and maintains rigorous quality and environmental management systems certified to DIN EN ISO 9001 and ISO 14001. Its compact, energy-efficient, long-life blowers deliver tailored air solutions for Chinese industrial users, backed by comprehensive after-sales service and engineering support.

As a Shanghai-listed high-growth tech enterprise, Changai rapidly advanced from high-risk R&D into high-volume, high-efficiency industrialization. Its operations strictly comply with ISO 9001 standards covering design, development, production, installation, and service.

Its product range includes electric heating incubators, CO₂ incubators, biochemical incubators, mold incubators, shaking incubators, plant growth chambers, forced-convection ovens, vacuum drying ovens, water baths, drug stability test chambers, constant temperature/humidity chambers, thermal shock test chambers, muffle furnaces, clean benches, biological safety cabinets, and xenon-UV weathering test chambers.

description_en: Huacai (Shandong) New Materials Co., Ltd., located in Shunxing Road 988, Tianqiao District, Jinan City, Shandong Province, is a national high-tech enterprise, Shandong Provincial Gazelle Enterprise, Shandong 'Specialized, Refined, Distinctive, Innovative' (SRDI) Enterprise, and Innovative SME. The company develops, manufactures, and sells spherical refractory metal powders—including tungsten, molybdenum, tantalum, niobium, rhenium, and vanadium powders—engineered for demanding LPBF and other metal AM applications in aerospace, defense, medical devices, and tooling. Its powder performance meets or exceeds imported equivalents.

description_zh: 宝鸡腾远新金属材料有限公司是一家拥有钛合金熔炼、钛合金轧制、钛合金精密加工的综合性企业。公司位于中国钛谷东区霸王河工业园，占地面积25000平方米。目前公司现拥有一台6TEB炉，五台15T真空自耗炉，两台10T真空自耗炉，两台3T及两台2T真空自耗炉，一台立式真空退火炉、一套穿管机等相关钛合金铸锭、钛合金铸造、钛管坯、钛棒生产加工、钛材精密加工设备。钛材年产量能达到10000吨以上。并且公司通过了国际ISO9001质量体系认证和GJB9001C质量管理体系认证。
description_en: Baoji Tengyuan New Metal Materials Co., Ltd. is an integrated titanium alloy enterprise encompassing smelting, rolling, and precision machining. Located in the East Bawanghe Industrial Park (China Titanium Valley), it operates extensive production infrastructure: one 6-ton electron beam (EB) furnace; five 15-ton and two 10-ton vacuum arc remelting (VAR) furnaces; two 3-ton and two 2-ton VAR furnaces; one vertical vacuum annealing furnace; and tube-piercing equipment. Annual titanium output exceeds 10,000 metric tons. The company holds ISO 9001 and GJB9001C quality management certifications.

description_zh: 得风（Delfin）于1982年成立于意大利都灵。得风从创立之初就一直致力于为客户提供创新和高效的解决方案，从质量到设计，从企业创新到经营决策，得风是一家专业的工业吸尘器制造商。得风拥有9大产品系列，百余款不同型号的产品，应用于32个不同行业（航空、食品加工、包装机械、化学制药、陶瓷工业、水泥行业、金属加工、汽车行业、建筑行业、电子工程、表面处理、3D打印-增材制造等）。得风的专业技术团队可以为不同行业客户提供定制化解决方案，在项目实施的整个过程的各个阶段（从分析到设计、安装和协助）匹配您的项目需求。
description_en: Shanghai Shuiwei Environmental Technology Co., Ltd. distributes Delfin industrial vacuum cleaners—originally founded in Turin, Italy in 1982. Delfin delivers innovative, high-efficiency solutions across quality, design, R&D, and strategic decision-making. Its nine product families and 100+ models serve 32 industries—including aerospace, food processing, packaging machinery, pharmaceuticals, ceramics, cement, metalworking, automotive, construction, electronics, surface treatment, and additive manufacturing. Delfin’s technical specialists provide end-to-end customized solutions—from needs analysis and system design to installation and commissioning support.

description_zh: 苏州华英光电仪器有限公司是一家优秀的综合光学元件制造企业，成立于2007年。生产总部位于苏州历史悠久名古镇甪直镇，共5000平方米，并设有深圳办事处。先后被认定为国家高新技术企业、创新型中小企业、江苏省专精特新中小企业。已建立ISO9001质量管理体系、知识产权合规管理体系，成立苏州市高精密光学镜头工程技术研究中心，主要产品已获得CE认证。 公司集光学产品研发，光机设计，光机生产，检测，组装，产品销售为一体。所经营的激光镜片、镜头等产品主要应用于光伏行业，锂电行业，半导体行业，3D打印行业，3C消费类电子行业等行业。产品在国内的占有率逐年增加，并远销海外。
description_en: Suzhou Huaying Optoelectronics Instrument Co., Ltd., founded in 2007 and headquartered in the historic town of Luzhi, Suzhou, is a comprehensive optical component manufacturer. Recognized as a national high-tech enterprise, SRDI SME, and Jiangsu SRDI SME, it operates under ISO 9001 and intellectual property compliance management systems, and hosts the Suzhou Municipal Engineering Research Center for High-Precision Optical Lenses. Its vertically integrated operations cover optical R&D, optomechanical design, manufacturing, metrology, assembly, and sales. Core products—including laser optics and lenses—serve photovoltaics, lithium-ion batteries, semiconductors, additive manufacturing, and consumer electronics (3C), with growing domestic market share and international exports.

description_zh: 江苏镭创高科光电科技有限公司是专注于基于DLP技术路线的光固化3D打印光机的研发、制造与销售的高科技企业，深耕精密光学与数字光处理领域，以“赋能增材制造，驱动精密智造升级”为愿景，依托自主核心光学技术，推出系列高性能DLP光机产品。产品聚焦3D打印行业对高精度、高效率、高可靠性的核心需求，凭借4K超高清分辨率、灵活多机拼接、超长使用寿命等核心优势，为医疗齿科、工业制造、珠宝定制、生物工程等领域提供核心光学动力解决方案，助力下游企业提升打印精度与生产效率，降低综合制造成本，推动3D打印技术在各行业的深度应用与产业化升级。
description_en: Jiangsu Leichuang High-Tech Optoelectronics Co., Ltd. is a high-tech enterprise focused on R&D, manufacturing, and sales of DLP-based optical engines for vat photopolymerization (SLA/DLP) 3D printers. Committed to 'empowering additive manufacturing and driving precision intelligent manufacturing', the company leverages proprietary optical technologies to deliver high-performance DLP light engines. Featuring 4K ultra-HD resolution, flexible multi-engine tiling, and extended service life, its products address core industry demands for accuracy, speed, and reliability—enabling advanced applications in dental, industrial prototyping, jewelry, and bioengineering while reducing total cost of ownership and accelerating AM adoption.

description_zh: 深圳市安华光电技术股份有限公司成立于2012年8月，是一家集研发、生产和销售为一体的国家高新技术企业和国家工信部专精特新“小巨人”企业，从事行业涉及智能投影、3D扫描、3D打印等多个领域，公司的主要产品是投影光学引擎，光源包括LED和激光， 亮度覆盖几十流明到数千流明，分辨率从WVGA到4K。 安华光电拥有一百多项专利技术并实现了产业化，其批量生产的DLP 投影光机，技术以及出货量均处于世界领先水平，广泛应用于智能投影，3D扫描，3D打印等领域。 安华光电致力于为广大客户提供包括各种光机模组、投影整机解决方案、3D数据获取， 3D机器视觉等不同层次的产品及技术服务。
description_en: Shenzhen Anhua Optoelectronics Technology Co., Ltd., founded in August 2012, is a national high-tech enterprise and a Ministry of Industry and Information Technology (MIIT) 'Little Giant' SRDI enterprise. Specializing in smart projection, 3D scanning, and 3D printing, its core product is the projection optical engine—featuring LED and laser light sources, luminous flux from tens to thousands of lumens, and resolutions from WVGA to 4K. Holding over 100 patents, Anhua mass-produces world-leading DLP optical engines widely deployed in smart projectors, 3D scanners, and 3D printers. It offers tiered solutions—from optical engine modules and complete projector systems to 3D data acquisition and machine vision platforms.

description_zh: 广州锐越贸易有限公司，十几年来秉承“锐意创新、自我超越”的理念，专注于先进化学品和新材料的进口贸易。产品服务应用于3D打印、涂料、油墨、粘合剂、UV喷墨、农业化学、聚酰亚胺等多个领域。至今我们已引进多家国际知名品牌的化工材料，与我们建立了良好合作关系的企业有:日本科巨希、DIC、制纸化学、三菱化学、大阪有机、日本 U-PICA、韩国Green(原KPX)、韩国美源等。为国内生产企业提供更为高附加值、环保与健康的产品服务和可持续发展的解决方案。
description_en: Guangzhou Ruiyue Trading Co., Ltd. has, for over a decade, specialized in importing advanced chemicals and novel materials. Its portfolio supports 3D printing, coatings, inks, adhesives, UV inkjet, agrochemicals, and polyimide applications. Ruiyue partners with globally recognized suppliers—including Japan’s Kojin, DIC, Sekisui Chemical, Mitsubishi Chemical, Osaka Organic, U-PICA; Korea’s Green (formerly KPX); and Mirae Chemical—providing Chinese manufacturers with high-value-added, eco-friendly, health-conscious products and sustainable technical solutions.

description_zh: 新乡市戴克机械制造有限公司成立于2014年，是一家筛分设备研发、制造、销售、服务于一体的综合型现代化企业。 戴克机械坚持以客户为中心，为客户创造价值;倾听每一位客户的需求和意见，打造更具个性化的筛分解决方案，与新乡学院3D打印学院联合成立3D打印后处理研发实验室，为客户提供更适合3D打印粉末的筛分系统。 戴克机械先后与国内多家3D打印主机大厂建立合作，目前开发了DK-4X、DK-5X等多种机型，其中多款设备均拥有自主知识产权，并取得了ATEX、CE等认证，安全的使用环境，超高的分效率，99.7%的筛分精度，获得了广大客户的认可。
description_en: Xinxiang Daik Mechanical Manufacturing Co., Ltd., established in 2014, is a modern integrated enterprise offering R&D, manufacturing, sales, and service of industrial screening equipment. Customer-centric by design, Daik collaborates with the 3D Printing College of Xinxiang University to establish a dedicated post-processing R&D lab for AM powder sieving systems. It supplies proprietary DK-4X and DK-5X series sieving machines—many with independent IP—to leading domestic 3D printer OEMs. Certified to ATEX and CE standards, Daik systems deliver safe operation, exceptional separation efficiency, and 99.7% sieving accuracy.

description_zh: 中锐增材制造(山东)有限公司位于中国自由贸易区烟台片区南昌大街国际科创中心, 由山东省泰山产业领军人才创办,从事功能烯碳陶瓷金属材料、金属碳化钨、高熵/高温合金粉末研发、生产、销售一体高新技术企业。核心技术产品是以微纳米陶瓷、金属等功能材料的本体包覆合成技术为依托，将纳米陶瓷 碳材料因子和金属粉末有机复合，制备的粉体具有高球形度，高抗磨耐腐蚀、磨损自修复作用。 公司主营： 增材粉末制备：激光熔覆用高熵/高温合金粉末，烯碳陶瓷金属功能粉体材料，金属碳化钨粉末，3D打印用镍钴基高温合金粉体 热喷涂及激光熔覆车间：6-12Kw高速激光熔覆，超音速等离子热喷涂，超音速火焰热喷涂HVOF，激光淬火
description_en: Zhongrui Additive Manufacturing (Shandong) Co., Ltd., located in the Yantai Pilot Free Trade Zone International Science & Innovation Center, is a high-tech enterprise founded by a Shandong Provincial Mount Tai Industry Leading Talent. The company specializes in R&D, production, and sales of functional烯carbon ceramic-metal composites, tungsten carbide metal powders, and high-entropy/heat-resistant alloy powders. Its core technology—bulk coating synthesis using micro/nano-ceramic and metallic functional materials—enables organic integration of nano-ceramic carbon factors with metal powders, yielding spherical powders with high wear resistance, corrosion resistance, and self-repairing wear properties. Core offerings include: additive manufacturing powders (high-entropy/heat-resistant alloys for laser cladding;烯carbon ceramic-metal functional powders; tungsten carbide powders; Ni/Co-based superalloy powders for 3D printing); and thermal spray/laser cladding services (6–12 kW high-speed laser cladding; supersonic plasma spraying; HVOF; laser hardening).

The company operates a technical center in Pudong, Shanghai.

description_zh: 钢研昊普科技有限公司（简称钢研昊普）是中国钢研科技集团有限公司的全资子公司，总部位于北京市中关村核心区，在河北涿州、江苏镇江、山东青岛、陕西渭南、江苏苏州设立产业基地，配套系列热等静压加工设备，全面服务高端产品制造。 公司主营热等静压技术相关业务，提供HIP科技服务：致密化处理、扩散连接、粉末冶金近净成形、技术支持；HIP装备服务：成套装备制造、设备维保、智能化升级，致力于成为世界一流的高端热处理装备和一体化服务供应商。
description_en: CISRI-Haopu Technology Co., Ltd. (short for CISRI-Haopu) is a wholly owned subsidiary of China Iron and Steel Research Institute Group Co., Ltd. Headquartered in Beijing’s Zhongguancun core area, it operates industrial bases in Zhuozhou (Hebei), Zhenjiang (Jiangsu), Qingdao (Shandong), Weinan (Shaanxi), and Suzhou (Jiangsu), equipped with comprehensive hot isostatic pressing (HIP) infrastructure. The company provides end-to-end HIP services—including densification, diffusion bonding, near-net-shape powder metallurgy forming, and technical support—as well as HIP equipment solutions covering full-system manufacturing, maintenance, and intelligent upgrades. CISRI-Haopu aims to be a world-class supplier of advanced heat treatment equipment and integrated services.

description_zh: 德国施坦巴赫股份公司专注于高性能工业陶瓷的 3D 打印服务，既能承接单件定制，也可实现批量生产，产品可满足化工、电子、医疗技术、航空航天、半导体、汽车及机械工程等多个行业的严苛应用需求。 公司的材料产品组合涵盖氧化铝（Al₂O₃）、氧化锆（ZrO₂）、硅基陶瓷（SiO₂）、氧化铝增韧氧化锆（ATZ）以及氮化铝（AlN）。各类材料均具备独特性能，可满足高精度、高稳定性与高耐久性的顶级标准要求。 作为一站式服务供应商，施坦巴赫股份公司可覆盖完整的生产流程：从初期的设计方案、材料选型咨询，到 3D 打印成型与热处理加工，最终为客户交付可直接投入使用的陶瓷部件。
description_en: Steinbach AG, Germany, is a specialist provider of 3D printing services for high-performance industrial ceramics. It supports both one-off custom parts and serial production, serving demanding applications across chemical processing, electronics, medical technology, aerospace, semiconductors, automotive, and mechanical engineering. Material portfolio includes alumina (Al₂O₃), zirconia (ZrO₂), silica-based ceramics (SiO₂), alumina-toughened zirconia (ATZ), and aluminum nitride (AlN)—all engineered to meet top-tier standards for precision, stability, and durability. As a one-stop solution provider, Steinbach AG manages the entire production chain: design consultation and material selection; additive manufacturing (ceramic 3D printing); post-processing heat treatment; and delivery of ready-to-use ceramic components.

description_zh: 俐陶智致力于开发和生产用于骨替代材料和高性能陶瓷的3D打印材料和增材制造系统。通过机械工程、工艺工程和化学领域专家之间的跨学科合作，俐陶智已成功开发出适用于工业和医疗应用的陶瓷增材制造制造系统——CeraFab打印系统。公司总部位于奥地利维也纳，于2011年成立，是最早实现3D打印陶瓷产品达到工业级要求的增材制造企业。CeraFab生产的组件能够满足陶瓷工业和陶瓷研究所需的高密度、稳定性和高精度。俐陶智已经取得ISO 9001:2015 认证和ISO13485医疗器械质量管理体系认证。
description_en: Lithoz (Shanghai) Technology Co., Ltd. develops and manufactures 3D printing materials and additive manufacturing systems for bone replacement and high-performance ceramics. Through interdisciplinary collaboration among experts in mechanical engineering, process engineering, and chemistry, Lithoz has successfully commercialized its CeraFab ceramic additive manufacturing system—among the first globally to achieve industrial-grade ceramic 3D printing. Founded in Vienna, Austria in 2011, Lithoz delivers high-density, dimensionally stable, and highly precise ceramic components for industrial and research applications. The company holds ISO 9001:2015 and ISO 13485 medical device quality management system certifications.

description_zh: 鼎盛激光应用科技有限公司位于粤港澳大湾区-江门市高新区，拥有自主的激光增材制造技术应用中心，专为广大客户提供激光增材制造设备（包括激光熔覆设备和3D打印设备）、各类增材制造的专用金属粉末、技术开发、激光设备集成及工艺的解决方案、软件及操作培训和增材制造的生产及产品的劳氏认证、3D打印个性化定制服务以及持续的快捷售后服务。独特的碟片激光熔覆设备及工业化的3D打印设备，可为客户快速实现1：1的量化产品。所供产品应用广泛，可用于航空航天、能源和涡轮、汽车、模具制造、医疗和牙科、珠宝等行业，是客户信赖的长期合作伙伴。
description_en: Weilin (Hong Kong) Trading Co., Ltd. operates an independent laser additive manufacturing application center in Jiangmen Hi-Tech Zone, Guangdong—the Greater Bay Area. The company supplies laser additive manufacturing equipment (laser cladding and 3D printing systems), specialized metal powders, technical development, laser system integration, process solutions, software and operator training, Lloyds-certified production and product validation, personalized 3D printing services, and rapid after-sales support. Its proprietary disk-laser cladding systems and industrial-scale 3D printers enable rapid, 1:1 volume production. Applications span aerospace, energy & turbines, automotive, mold making, medical/dental, and jewelry industries. Weilin is a trusted long-term partner for precision additive manufacturing solutions.

description_zh: 北京翌锋电子科技有限公司是国内首家专注于电子束金属 3D 打印（EBM）专用单晶六硼化镧电子源研发与制造的高新技术企业。 翌锋电子深耕热阴极技术领域，凭借自主研发的精密加工工艺，成功打破了 EBM 核心光源长期依赖进口的局面。公司生产的单晶六硼化镧电子源具有发射亮度高、光束稳定性强及工作寿命长等显著优势，能够显著提升金属 3D 打印的成型精度与工业化生产效率。 作为电子束装备的“心脏”的国产化先驱，翌锋电子致力于以自主创新的电子源技术，赋能金属增材制造产业的崭新变革。
description_en: Beijing Yifeng Electronics Technology Co., Ltd. is China’s first high-tech enterprise dedicated to R&D and manufacturing of single-crystal lanthanum hexaboride (LaB₆) electron sources exclusively for electron beam melting (EBM) metal 3D printing. Specializing in thermionic cathode technologies, Yifeng Electronics has broken long-standing import dependence on EBM light sources through proprietary precision machining processes. Its LaB₆ electron sources deliver superior emission brightness, beam stability, and extended operational lifetime—significantly enhancing part accuracy and industrial production efficiency in metal AM. As a pioneer in domestic 'heart-of-the-machine' electron source innovation, Yifeng Electronics empowers transformative advances in metal additive manufacturing.

description_zh: MKC是一家专注于精密增材制造与智能仪器设备的国家高新技术企业，致力于为全球科研与工业用户提供世界级的多材料一体化制造解决方案。公司自主研发的多材料DLP光固化3D打印机，突破性地实现了软/硬材料、导电/绝缘材料的高精度共融打印，广泛服务于高校前沿科研、先进功能器件开发及小批量定制生产。此外，公司还深耕精密仪器领域，产品线覆盖材料测试、微纳加工等方向，以稳定可靠的性能和专业的定制化服务赢得客户信赖。我们坚持以技术创新驱动产业进步，助力每一位科学家与工程师将奇思妙想变为现实。欢迎莅临TCT亚洲展 [8.1.8B133]，见证多材料打印的无限可能。
description_en: MKC Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd. is a national high-tech enterprise specializing in precision additive manufacturing and intelligent instrumentation. The company delivers world-class, multi-material integrated manufacturing solutions for global research and industrial users. Its proprietary multi-material DLP 3D printer enables breakthrough high-precision co-printing of soft/hard, conductive/insulative materials—serving cutting-edge academic research, advanced functional device prototyping, and small-batch customization. MKC also excels in precision instrumentation, with product lines spanning materials testing and micro/nano fabrication. Renowned for reliability and tailored service, MKC drives industry advancement through innovation—empowering scientists and engineers to realize their visions. Visit us at TCT Asia [Hall 8.1, Booth 8B133] to explore the limitless potential of multi-material 3D printing.

description_zh: 南京丹联科技有限公司成立于2001年3月，是国内最早从事红外辐射器全系列产品和相关配套红外加热模块、温度功率控制系统集研发、制造、销售和技术服务于一体的国家级高新技术企业。 丹联科技自行或与国内重点科研院所联合研制开发了多款新型特种红外辐射加热产品，填补了国内空白，并大幅提高了我国在此行业的整体科研技术水平。另外，我们也是最早参与红外辐射加热产品国家标准的编制单位。同时，我司已通过IS0 9001质量管理体系、IS0 14001环境管理体系认证和系列产品的欧盟CE认证及北美UL认证。拥有现代化的生产基地和成熟的科研团队，专注于为客户提供差异化、专业化、智能化的红外辐射加热整体解决方案。
description_en: Nanjing Danlian Technology Co., Ltd., established in March 2001, is a national high-tech enterprise and one of China’s earliest providers of full-series infrared emitters, matched infrared heating modules, and temperature/power control systems—covering R&D, manufacturing, sales, and technical support. Through independent or collaborative development with leading Chinese research institutes, Danlian has launched multiple novel specialized infrared heating products—filling critical domestic gaps and significantly elevating China’s overall R&D and technical capabilities in this field. Danlian was among the first contributors to national infrared emitter standards. Certified to ISO 9001, ISO 14001, CE (EU), and UL (North America), the company operates a modern production base and experienced R&D team—delivering differentiated, specialized, and intelligent infrared heating system solutions.

description_zh: 梧州市钰淇科技有限公司成立于2014年，是一家专业喷头维修服务的公司，公司拥有一支由业内资深技术专家，优秀的管理，服务人才组成的运营团队，有着数年喷头维修经验，服务好，技术上流，坐落于广西梧州市长洲区狮卧山片区。专注3D打印喷头维修，长期出售寄卖各种二手喷头。

The company maintains an expert operations team comprising seasoned technical specialists, skilled managers, and service professionals with years of hands-on nozzle repair experience. It offers reliable, high-quality repair services and maintains an inventory of second-hand nozzles available for sale or consignment.

name_zh: 绿钥生物科技(广州)有限公司
name_en: GreenKey Biotech (Guangzhou) Co., Ltd.
description_zh: 绿钥生物科技以无接触、超快速、高活性的体积生物打印技术（Volumetric Bioprinting，VBP）为核心的创新型生物科技企业。目前公司拥有千余平研发场地和上千万的研发装备，致力于开发最前沿的生物打印技术以及功能性生物墨水耗材。 绿钥生物科技致力于开发推广体积生物打印技术，目前，公司面向类器官、组织工程和再生医学等研究领域，提供生物3D打印整体解决方案，包括：（1）超快速、无接触体积生物打印机；（2）基于体积生物3D打印开发的功能化生物墨水，涵盖有机高分子、无机和天然生物材料。具有光交联速度快、稳定性高、生物相容性强特点；（3）基于科研服务市场需求，提供生物3D打印服务
description_en: GreenKey Biotech (Guangzhou) Co., Ltd. is an innovative biotechnology enterprise focused on volumetric bioprinting (VBP)—a contactless, ultra-rapid, and highly bioactive 3D biomanufacturing platform. With over 1,000 m² of dedicated R&D space and multi-million-yuan investment in advanced instrumentation, GreenKey develops next-generation bioprinting technologies and functional bioinks. The company provides comprehensive bioprinting solutions for organoid research, tissue engineering, and regenerative medicine—including: (1) ultra-fast, contactless volumetric bioprinters; (2) functionally engineered bioinks developed specifically for VBP, based on organic polymers, inorganic compounds, and natural biomaterials—featuring rapid photocrosslinking, high stability, and excellent biocompatibility; and (3) contract bioprinting services aligned with academic and industrial research needs.

name_zh: 孚森FLSUN
name_en: FLSUN
categories_zh: 聚合物3D打印设备(专业级)
address_zh: 中国大陆/河南省/郑州市
address_en: China/Henan/郑州市
description_zh: 孚森：深耕Delta技术，赋能3D打印农场新生态 在3D打印从原型走向量产的时代，农场主们需要的不仅是设备，更是能够真正转化为生产力的“工具”。孚森作为专注于三角洲技术研发与应用的先锋品牌，致力于通过极致的高速、大尺寸与材料兼容性，为农场运营提供全场景的硬核解决方案。 产品矩阵：精准匹配农场多元需求 孚森将工具化思维贯穿于产品设计，三款核心机型分别对应农场批量生产、高附加值大件、工程材料定制三大核心场景，每一款机型都做到“即买即用，高效产出”，形成完整的生产力拼图。
description_en: FLSUN is a pioneering brand dedicated to Delta architecture technology, empowering the next generation of 3D printing farms. In the era where 3D printing transitions from prototyping to mass production, FLSUN delivers not just hardware—but true productivity tools. Leveraging exceptional speed, large build volumes, and broad material compatibility, FLSUN provides end-to-end, scenario-specific hardware solutions for farm operations. Its product matrix—comprising three core models—addresses key use cases: high-volume production, high-value large-format parts, and engineering-material customization. Each system is designed for immediate deployment and efficient output, completing a holistic productivity ecosystem.

address_en: China/Shandong/青岛市/山东省青岛市城阳区高新区华贯路819号B‑10
description_zh: 青岛瀚海常青科技有限公司成立于2025年，其前身为青岛沃尔德工业设计有限公司。自2016年创立以来，始终深耕于工业设计与制造领域，为海尔、一汽、吉利等国内外知名企业提供专业服务，积累了深厚的技术底蕴与行业经验。 在市场高速发展的背景下，瀚海常青敏锐把握产业机遇，依托自身设计与制造能力，果断加大研发投入。历经三年攻坚，成功研发RMEM打印技术，实现了质的突破，正式完成了从设计服务商到设备与行业解决方案提供商的转型。 未来瀚海常青将持续以研发驱动制造革新，推动3D打印技术的进步与应用，为制造业发展注入新动力。
description_en: Qingdao Haihai Changqing Technology Co., Ltd., established in 2025, evolved from Qingdao World Industrial Design Co., Ltd. (founded in 2016). With deep expertise in industrial design and manufacturing—serving global leaders including Haier, FAW, and Geely—the company built strong technical foundations and industry insights. Seizing emerging opportunities, Haihai Changqing intensified R&D investment and, after three years of intensive development, successfully launched its proprietary RMEM (Rapid Multi-Material Extrusion Manufacturing) printing technology—a fundamental technological leap. This achievement marks its strategic transformation from a design service provider to a full-solution provider of AM equipment and industry-specific systems. Going forward, Haihai Changqing will continue driving manufacturing innovation through R&D-led advancement in additive manufacturing.

name_zh: 惠州志合新材料有限公司
name_en: Huizhou Zhihe New Materials Co., Ltd.
categories_zh: 其他（如后处理工艺服务）
description_zh: 惠州志合新材料有限公司是一家专注于高阻隔薄膜及其相关产品的研发、生产和销售的公司。 公司地址位于广东省惠州市仲恺高新区沥林镇惠州志合厂房，占地面积10000平方米。 产品体系丰富多元，其中针对3D增材的真空包装做了针对性的研发，目前生产的真空袋显著提升了产品性能，大大降低了产品的破损率。 公司主要生产尼龙共挤膜，真空袋、高阻隔，多性能复合袋，紧跟市场变化，更好的满足客户的使用需求。
description_en: Huizhou Zhihe New Materials Co., Ltd. specializes in R&D, manufacturing, and sales of high-barrier films and related packaging products. Located in Liling Town, Huizhou Hi-Tech Zone, Guangdong Province, its facility spans 10,000 m². The company has developed specialized vacuum packaging solutions for 3D additive manufacturing—resulting in vacuum bags with significantly enhanced performance and markedly reduced product damage rates. Core products include nylon co-extruded films, vacuum pouches, high-barrier multilayer composite bags, and other advanced packaging formats—continuously adapted to evolving market requirements and customer needs.

name_zh: 跃启增材制造(抚州)有限公司
name_en: Yueqi Additive Manufacturing (Fuzhou) Co., Ltd.

description_zh: 跃启增材制造（抚州）有限公司成立于2025年7月，是一家从事钛合金及PLA、PETG等聚合物3D打印服务的科技公司。公司拥有大型金属激光3D打印设备及聚合物3D打印机20台，金属打印工件最大尺寸可达800mm*800mm*1200mm。公司拥有各类三轴、五轴加工中心25台，三坐标测量仪等高精密检测设备，公司技术团队拥有多年精密制造领域加工经验，可为客户提供打印-加工一站式服务。
description_en: Yueqi Additive Manufacturing (Fuzhou) Co., Ltd., established in July 2025, is a technology company providing titanium alloy and polymer (PLA, PETG) 3D printing services. Its fleet includes large-format metal laser 3D printers and 20 polymer 3D printers, enabling metal part builds up to 800 mm × 800 mm × 1200 mm. Complementing its AM capabilities, Yueqi operates 25 CNC machining centers (3-axis and 5-axis) and high-precision metrology equipment—including coordinate measuring machines (CMMs). Its engineering team brings extensive experience in precision manufacturing, offering integrated print-and-machine turnkey services.

description_zh: 江阴市华宏化纤有限公司成立于2002年12月，占地面积15万平米，员工人数超过800人。公司专业从事差别化、聚酯切片的生产制造，已达到年产10万吨聚酯切片的生产规模，成为行业内具有一 定影响力的知名企业。公司秉承“拼搏、求实、创新、敬业”的华宏精神，坚持诚信规范经店坚持高标准严要求，生产开发高品质、差别化的产品，因其色泽纯正、性能稳定且质量优异，公司在国内外市场享有较好声誉，产品质量长期稳定在国家A级标准，满足市场和客户的需求。
description_en: Jiangyin Huahong Chemical Fiber Co., Ltd., founded in December 2002, occupies a 150,000 m² site and employs over 800 people. The company specializes in manufacturing differentiated polyester chips, achieving an annual production capacity of 100,000 tons. Recognized for its commitment to excellence—guided by the 'Striving, Pragmatism, Innovation, Dedication' corporate ethos—Huahong maintains strict quality control and produces high-purity, stable, and premium-grade differentiated polyester chips. Its products consistently meet China’s national Grade-A quality standard and enjoy strong reputations in both domestic and international markets.

name_zh: 广州晋原铭科技有限公司
name_en: Guangzhou Jinyuanming Technology Co., Ltd.

description_zh: 1、专注业务：3D打印设备控制系统软件，提供软件研发支持服务。产品涵盖：SLM金属粉末/SLA光固化/SLS尼龙3D多振镜打印设备控制系统软件，集群设备网络管理系统和云监控系统软件。 2、技术储备：18年以上激光应用和控制技术开发积累。 3、研发力量：联合华南理工大学增材制造团队、华南农业大学软件学院研发团队。 4、成熟应用：承担国家级省级增材制造装备及相关课题研发和应用，工业化设备批量装机。 5、自主产权：获得19项专利和著作权，100%自主知识产权。 6、资格认定：高新技术企业，高新技术产品认定。
description_en: Guangzhou Jinyuanming Technology Co., Ltd. specializes in control system software for 3D printing equipment, delivering comprehensive software development and support services. Its product suite covers control software for SLM metal powder, SLA photopolymer, and SLS nylon 3D printers—including multi-galvo systems—as well as cluster-device network management and cloud-based monitoring platforms. With over 18 years of accumulated expertise in laser applications and motion control, the company collaborates with additive manufacturing research teams from South China University of Technology and software engineering teams from South China Agricultural University. It has led national and provincial R&D projects on AM equipment and achieved large-scale industrial deployment. Holding 19 patents and copyrights—all 100% independently owned—the company is certified as a High-Tech Enterprise and recognized for its High-Tech Products.

name_zh: JX金属株式会社
name_en: JX Metals Co., Ltd.

description_zh: JX金属株式会社是一家在全球范围内开展以铜和稀有金属为核心的有色金属一体化经营，业务覆盖从资源开发、金属冶炼，到为物联网与人工智能社会所必需的高端材料制造与研发，乃至废弃电子设备的回收再利用。 我们在日本本土、亚洲及南美洲等地共设立了全球66个基地，业务布局遍布世界。拥有全球市场占据领先份额的产品，例如用于柔性印刷电路板（FPC）的压延铜箔，以及半导体制造不可或缺的溅射靶材等。这些产品融汇了我们深厚的技术积淀。 我们的另一大特点是卓越的生产能力，在铜及其他多种产品领域均拥有高效产能。 本次展出的表面处理铜粉，正是运用我们独有的表面处理技术，在日本国内基地研发并面向市场供应。
description_en: JX Metals Co., Ltd. is a global non-ferrous metals company centered on copper and rare metals, integrating upstream resource development, smelting, advanced materials R&D and manufacturing for IoT and AI society, and recycling of end-of-life electronics. Operating 66 sites worldwide—including Japan, Asia, and South America—it supplies globally leading products such as rolled copper foil for flexible printed circuit boards (FPCs) and sputtering targets essential to semiconductor fabrication—both embodying deep technological expertise. With world-class production capacity across copper and other metals, JX Metals introduces surface-treated copper powder—developed and manufactured at its Japanese facilities using proprietary surface-modification technology.

description_zh: 北京西昊科技有限公司成立于2018年，研发中心位于北京，生产中心位于天津武清京滨工业园。公司主要从事:3D打印后处理加工、以及3D打印清粉设备、3D打印流道水清洗设备等。公司坚持"质量第一、技术创新、诚信服务、持续改进”的质量运行方针，扎实服务于航空、航天、船舶、化工石化、能源、汽车、3D打印、电子等产业。
description_en: Beijing Xihao Technology Co., Ltd., founded in 2018, maintains its R&D center in Beijing and production base in Jingbin Industrial Park, Wuqing District, Tianjin. The company specializes in post-processing for 3D printed parts—including powder removal, support structure removal, and surface finishing—as well as dedicated equipment such as automated powder-removal systems and channel water-cleaning units for complex internal geometries. Guided by its quality policy—'Quality First, Technological Innovation, Integrity Service, Continuous Improvement'—Xihao serves aerospace, defense, marine, petrochemical, energy, automotive, electronics, and general AM sectors with rigorous, application-focused solutions.

description_zh: 杭州云杉增材科技有限公司座落于中国先进制造业高地杭州，是一家集大尺寸工业级 3D 打印设备研发、工艺开发与材料应用于一体的高新技术企业。我们致力于解决传统制造在大尺寸复杂结构件生产中的高成本、长周期难题，为全球客户提供从单件定制到小批量生产的全栈式解决方案。
description_en: Hangzhou Yunsan Additive Manufacturing Technology Co., Ltd., located in Hangzhou—a hub of China’s advanced manufacturing sector—is a high-tech enterprise integrating R&D of large-format industrial 3D printers, process optimization, and materials application. The company addresses key challenges of traditional manufacturing—namely high cost and long lead times—for large, complex structural components. Yunsan delivers end-to-end solutions—from single-part prototyping to small-batch production—for global customers across diverse industries.

(A-share listed, stock code: 605488). Leveraging its parent company’s strengths in funding, R&D, branding, and industrial chain integration, Fuli specializes in the innovative development, large-scale production, and global sales of high-performance polymer film materials—including PETG and BOPP.

description_en: Founded in 2007, this high-tech enterprise specializes in the R&D, manufacturing, and sales of ceramic heating elements. It is one of China’s leading producers of metal-ceramic heaters (MCH), holding over 100 domestic patents and 7 international patents. Its vision is to become China’s leader in ceramic heating elements and the top player in its niche markets, guided by the mission of delivering critical value to customers.

description_zh: 成都奋羽是一家从事微波能量应用方案及设备的研发、生产、销售的高新技术企业，专注于工业微波加热技术和微波等离子研发技术，以专业的微波能量解决方案和微波等离子模块制造商为成长目标。 2020-2025年，为头部3D砂型打印设备企业定制微波干燥方案，较传统方式成本大降、时效提升10倍，优化干燥效果与良品率,0排放无环境污染。 我司的微波等离子火炬在铜、铁、锡等金属球化处理中表现卓越，配合客户的工艺，运行效果稳定优异，现已被多行业头部企业广泛应用，成为金属球化领域的优选解决方案 公司拥有1100平方米的厂房一栋和办公场所一层，先后获得了“科技型中小企业”和“高新技术企业”等资质。
description_en: A high-tech enterprise specializing in R&D, manufacturing, and sales of microwave energy application systems and equipment. The company focuses on industrial microwave heating and microwave plasma technologies, targeting leadership as a provider of professional microwave energy solutions and microwave plasma modules. From 2020–2025, it delivered customized microwave drying solutions for top-tier 3D sand-printing equipment manufacturers—reducing costs significantly and improving throughput tenfold versus conventional methods, while enhancing drying uniformity and yield with zero emissions. Its microwave plasma torches demonstrate exceptional performance in spheroidization of copper, iron, tin, and other metals, and are widely adopted by industry leaders across multiple sectors. Certified as both a ‘Science & Technology SME’ and ‘High-Tech Enterprise’, the company operates from a 1,100 m² production facility and office space.

description_zh: DreamTech（追梦每刻科技）是一家专注于原生 3D 生成大模型的研发与应用的大模型初创公司，团队由来自全球顶尖学院和跨国企业的核心专家团队组成，具备丰富且顶尖的技术积累与产学研，致力于用创新的产品和服务提升全球 AIGC 创作者及消费者的使用体验。 2024年推出全球首个端到端3D AIGC大模型，并成为Meta、微软、腾讯3D 大模型架构基石。2025年推出Neural4D系列模型，将训练成本降至行业1/20，不仅登顶HuggingFace 3D模型排行榜，更被誉为“3D AIGC领域的DeepSeek”。目前已获超千万美元融资，正赋能全球3D打印、游戏影视、工业设计等产业发展。
description_en: A pioneering large-model startup focused on R&D and application of native 3D generative foundation models. Composed of core experts from world-leading universities and multinational corporations, DreamTech combines deep technical expertise and strong industry-academia collaboration to elevate the AIGC creator and consumer experience globally. In 2024, it launched the world’s first end-to-end 3D AIGC foundation model—serving as the architectural cornerstone for Meta, Microsoft, and Tencent’s 3D large models. In 2025, it introduced the Neural4D series, reducing training costs to 1/20 of industry norms; ranked #1 on Hugging Face’s 3D Model Leaderboard and hailed as the ‘DeepSeek of 3D AIGC’. With over USD 10 million in funding, DreamTech empowers global industries including 3D printing, gaming & film, and industrial design.

description_zh: 镭斯特光学仪器公司是中国激光扫描式测量直径的专业制造商，致力于过程测量,过程控制,数据记存,报表分析等过程品质工程。 经过十余年发展，镭斯特自主研发生产的LST系列直径扫描测量仪及过程控制器，远程显示单元，数据处理系统已广泛应用在电线电缆；塑胶硅胶管材；钢线绳；编织类；3D打印耗材；金属拉丝压延； 机械切削加工；精密外圆磨床等对生产制造过程品质高要求的客户群体中。 镭斯特还积极致力于非标产品的扫描测量开发，相继同客户在节距，绞线，编织，辊压类产品外观测量应用中进行密切合作帮助客户解决产品测量问题。 镭斯特源于扫描，致力测量，持续提供多种扫描测量新品与未来尊贵的您共同发展。
description_en: A professional Chinese manufacturer of laser scanning-based diameter measurement systems, specializing in process measurement, real-time process control, data logging, and reporting analytics for quality engineering. Over 10+ years, Laster has developed and deployed its proprietary LST-series diameter scanners, process controllers, remote display units, and data processing systems across high-precision industries—including wire & cable, plastic/silicone tubing, steel wire rope, braided products, 3D printing consumables, metal wire drawing & rolling, mechanical machining, and precision external cylindrical grinding. The company also customizes non-standard scanning solutions for pitch, stranding, braiding, and roller-compacted product surface metrology. Rooted in scanning technology and committed to precision measurement, Laster continuously introduces innovative scanning solutions to grow alongside its valued partners.

description_zh: 宝鸡市恒通泰钛材有限责任公司成立于2016年，位于“中国钛谷”—陕西.宝鸡。 本公司是专业从事钛及钛合金、有色金属加工、生产、销售为一体的综合性源头企业。在行业超过20年的行业经验，公司通过IOS9000质量管理体系认证和国军标质量管理体系认证。公司依托“中国钛谷”强大的综合实力依仛本地、材料、加工、科研优势，为用户提供优质的产品。 公司现有现货大厅1个，加工车间3个。主营原材料有钛棒，钛锭，钛板等合金材料。 宝鸡恒通愿与国内外新老朋友同共成长，共创未来，也欢迎新老朋友来厂参观指导，地址：宝鸡市高新区温泉工业园1号。
description_en: Established in 2016 in Baoji, Shaanxi—the ‘Titanium Valley’ of China—Hengtongtai is an integrated, upstream manufacturer specializing in titanium and titanium alloy processing, production, and sales. With over 20 years of industry experience, the company holds ISO 9000 and GJB (China National Military Standard) quality management system certifications. Leveraging Baoji’s comprehensive advantages in local resources, materials, precision processing, and R&D, it delivers premium titanium products—including titanium ingots, bars, and plates—from its inventory center and three dedicated processing workshops. Located at No. 1, Wenquan Industrial Park, Baoji High-Tech Zone, the company welcomes domestic and international partners for visits and collaboration.

Headquartered in Huizhou, the company places product quality at the core of its operations and upholds meticulous, expert-level customer service as its corporate culture. Its diverse portfolio serves global markets across multiple continents, offering highly competitive quality and customizable solutions to empower customers’ business growth.

description_zh: 科华成立于2002年6月，是专注于精密塑胶模具制作，塑胶制品成型，塑胶齿轮减速箱研发，生产，销售的高科技企业。公司分别在德国，美国开设了销售网点，拥有2家关联企业(东莞欧普利华模具实业有限公司，德国ERBIWA)。 公司产品广泛应用于汽车工业，OA零件，电子，医疗，智能家居，体育用品，个人护理等领域，产品畅销欧洲，美洲，日本，中国，东南亚等全球市场。是许多知名品牌的供应商。
description_en: Founded in June 2002, Kehua is a high-tech enterprise focused on precision plastic mold manufacturing, plastic part injection molding, and R&D, production, and sales of plastic gearmotor reducers. With sales offices in Germany and the U.S., and two affiliated companies—Dongguan Oupulihua Mould Industry Co., Ltd. and ERBIWA (Germany)—its products serve automotive, OA components, electronics, medical devices, smart home appliances, sports equipment, and personal care industries. Kehua’s products are exported worldwide to Europe, the Americas, Japan, China, and Southeast Asia, and it supplies numerous internationally recognized brands.

description_zh: 四川增隆新材料科技有限公司致力为军事工业、航空航天、石油天然气、生物医疗、汽车制造等行业提供增材制造，激光熔覆所需金属粉末材料、金属基复合粉末 材料、陶瓷（空心）粉末材料、非晶粉末材料及其衍生品。是一家集粉材定 制研发，加工生产，检验检测，技术咨询及销售为一体的高科技企业。 公司依托科研机构和高校成立了专业的粉材研发团队，共25人，其中研究员（教授）和教授级高工2名，博士3名，硕士及以上学历10名，可以为客户定制开发抗裂、耐高温的新型合金及金属基复合粉末材料。研发团队发表SCI 论文100余篇，发明专利50余项，承担省部级以上科研项目及企业合作项目20 余项，获得省部级科技奖1项.
description_en: A high-tech enterprise providing metal powders for additive manufacturing (AM) and laser cladding—including elemental and alloy metal powders, metal matrix composites, hollow ceramic powders, and amorphous powders—to defense, aerospace, oil & gas, biomedical, and automotive industries. Integrated across powder customization, production, inspection & testing, technical consulting, and sales, Zenglong collaborates closely with research institutes and universities. Its 25-member R&D team includes 2 researchers/professors, 3 Ph.D.s, and 10+ M.Sc./Ph.D.-level engineers, enabling tailored development of crack-resistant, high-temperature alloys and metal matrix composites. The team has published >100 SCI papers, filed >50 invention patents, completed >20 provincial/ministerial-level or industry-cooperative R&D projects, and received one provincial/ministerial science & technology award.

description_zh: 大连远东高新材料科技有限公司成立于2019年，专业从事热等静压加工。注册资金545万。公司始终坚持以服务为根本，奉行“进取 求实 严谨 团结”的方针；不断开拓创新，以技术为核心，为客户提供全方位的热等静压加工服务。 公司现拥有三台工业级热等静压设备，完整的包套制作生产线以及气体在线分析仪等专业的生产设备及检测设备。一流的设备、先进的技术、完善的工艺和高素质的技术团队，为您提供先进的热等静压工程技术方案。 公司凭借精湛的技术服务、专业的销售团体受到了客户的一致好评，得到了客户的信任和支持，与众多企业、科研单位、高校建立了长期稳定的友好合作关系，客户的满意是我们始终不变的追求。
description_en: Established in 2019, Yuandong specializes in hot isostatic pressing (HIP) services. With registered capital of RMB 5.45 million, the company adheres to the principles of ‘progressiveness, pragmatism, rigor, and teamwork’, prioritizing innovation and technology-driven service delivery. It operates three industrial-grade HIP furnaces, a full canning line, and online gas analyzers. Supported by state-of-the-art equipment, advanced processes, and a highly skilled technical team, Yuandong delivers cutting-edge HIP engineering solutions. Its professional service and sales teams have earned consistent client trust and long-term partnerships with enterprises, research institutions, and universities.

description_zh: 济南托玛科自动化设备有限公司是一家及科研生产贸易为一体的独资企业。 以现代化企业管理制度为蓝本建立了企业管理体系。 实现了企业平稳快速的发展，公司已通过了ISO90001:2015 管理质量体系，欧盟CE认证。 公司生产的不锈钢快装蝶阀、真空蝶阀、气动球阀、气动粉体碟阀，气动对夹蝶阀，气缸、手动球阀、气动角座阀等产品已达到国际领先水平，拥有完整、科学的质量管理体系。 济南托玛科自动化设备有限公司的诚信,实力和产品质量获得业界的认可。欢迎各界朋友莅临参观、指导和业务洽谈。
description_en: A wholly foreign-owned enterprise integrating scientific research, manufacturing, and trade. Built upon modern enterprise management principles, Tomaco has achieved stable, rapid growth and holds ISO 9001:2015 and CE certifications. Its stainless-steel sanitary butterfly valves, vacuum butterfly valves, pneumatic ball valves, pneumatic powder butterfly valves, pneumatic wafer butterfly valves, pneumatic angle seat valves, actuators, and manual ball valves meet international leading standards and are backed by a comprehensive, scientifically managed quality system. Tomaco is widely recognized for its integrity, strength, and product quality across the automation industry.

description_zh: 上海运河材料科技有限公司，作为全球技术领先的特色化学品和特种材料代理服务商，在塑料改性和金属加工行业有超20年的服务经验，在3D打印行业有众多产品配合，FDM工艺下，目前配合PLA耗材的增韧剂（三菱化学，MCC），TPU树脂（亨斯迈，Huntsman），银离子抗菌剂等；SLA光固化工艺，目前配合核壳结构硅橡胶添加剂；金属粉末加工目前配合EBS、二硫化钼等特殊润滑剂；另外也配套各类功能性添加剂。
description_en: A globally recognized distributor of specialty chemicals and advanced materials, with over 20 years of experience serving plastic modification and metalworking industries—and extensive product integration for 3D printing applications. For FDM, it supplies toughening agents for PLA (e.g., Mitsubishi Chemical MCC), TPU resins (Huntsman), and silver-ion antimicrobial additives. For SLA, it offers core-shell silicone rubber additives. For metal powder processing, it provides specialized lubricants including ethylene bis-stearamide (EBS) and molybdenum disulfide. It also supplies a broad range of functional additives for diverse AM requirements.

description_zh: 陕西迪凯机电科技有限公司是一家专业从事高端气源智能装备设计、制造、安装、全方位集成服务的军民融合高新技术企业。 经过多年的发展，迪凯机电在国内同行业内取得了领先地位，获得了军工、航天、航空、船舶、兵器以及中国科学院、清华大学、北京大学等知名院校高端客户的认可， 并建立了长期战略合作关系。 公司拥有以教授、专家为学科带头人的专业技术研发团队，更加完善了公司系统设计能力，尤其在粉末冶金、增材制造、半导体芯片、新能源电池、低温超导、激光成型、硬质合金等领域有众多成功案例。
description_en: A military-civil fusion high-tech enterprise specializing in intelligent, high-end air-source equipment—covering design, manufacturing, installation, and full-system integration. Dikai has established leadership domestically and earned recognition from top-tier clients including defense contractors, aerospace and aviation agencies, shipbuilding enterprises, ordnance manufacturers, the Chinese Academy of Sciences, and Tsinghua and Peking Universities. Its R&D team—led by professors and domain experts—strengthens systemic design capabilities, with proven success in powder metallurgy, additive manufacturing, semiconductor chips, new-energy batteries, cryogenic superconductivity, laser forming, and cemented carbides.
