description_zh: 深圳市金威源科技股份有限公司创立于2001年，是专注于高端定制电源研发、设计与生产的智慧能源解决方案提供商。公司作为中国电源行业领军企业及全球通信能源核心供应商，依托自主研发能力和全流程定制服务，为全球客户提供稳定可靠的电力保障。 金威源深度服务通信、工业、新能源、交通及新兴科技等领域，为5G基础设施、工业自动化、储能系统、电动车及低空无人机等提供高效供电解决方案。公司与中兴、华为、爱立信、诺基亚等国内外知名企业长期合作，持续赋能全球通信与产业发展。 公司以“用电力驱动创新，以能源连接未来”为使命，致力于成为全球智慧能源解决方案的引领者，专注电源设计，用心赋能世界。
description_en: Founded in 2001, Jinweiyuan is a smart energy solutions provider specializing in high-end customized power supply R&D, design, and manufacturing. As a leader in China’s power supply industry and a core global supplier for telecom energy, it delivers stable, reliable power through proprietary R&D and end-to-end customization. Jinweiyuan serves communications, industrial automation, new energy, transportation, and emerging tech sectors—providing efficient power solutions for 5G infrastructure, industrial IoT, energy storage systems, EVs, and low-altitude UAVs. Longstanding partners include ZTE, Huawei, Ericsson, and Nokia. Guided by its mission—‘Powering Innovation with Electricity, Connecting the Future with Energy’—Jinweiyuan strives to be a global leader in intelligent energy solutions.

description_zh: 我们是一家全球性的消费级3D打印耗材供应商，专注于为创作者、教育机构及企业提供高品质的PLA与PEGT材料。我们的产品以出色的打印稳定性、丰富的色彩和可靠的性能，赋能从创意到原型的每一步。 目前，我们的业务已深入巴西、土耳其、印尼、越南等快速增长的市场，通过本地化运营，紧密服务于当地蓬勃发展的创造者生态。我们致力于以创新的材料解决方案和稳定的全球供应链，成为每一位用户实现创想的可靠伙伴。 “以材料赋能想象，以品质成就创造”
description_en: A global supplier of consumer-grade 3D printing filaments, specializing in high-quality PLA and PETG materials for creators, educators, and enterprises. Renowned for outstanding print stability, rich color gamut, and consistent performance, Guyuan empowers users throughout the creative journey—from ideation to prototyping. Its business spans rapidly growing markets including Brazil, Turkey, Indonesia, and Vietnam, supported by localized operations that actively engage dynamic local creator ecosystems. Committed to innovation in material science and resilient global supply chains, Guyuan positions itself as a trusted partner in realizing creative visions—‘Empowering Imagination with Materials, Enabling Creation with Quality’.

description_zh: 辽宁省新京彩塑料新材料有限责任公司，坐落于辽宁.营口.鲅鱼圈，专注色母粒及塑料助剂研发生产二十余年。 “以此为生，精于此道”公司将对塑料功能、颜料性能和工艺标准的深刻理解全面导入3D耗材领域，专业提供PLA、PETG、TPU、ABS等3D耗材的颜色母粒和功能母粒。 精准帮您解决3D耗材配色、增韧、增强的问题。另外公司在水溶支撑，低熔点转印等前沿材料的开发也希望有您的支持和参与。 “财源因诚信而盛，生意由正道大兴”愿我们携手共进，合作共赢，期待您的光临指导。
description_en: Located in Yingkou Bayuquan District, Liaoning Province, Xinjingcai has specialized in masterbatch and plastic additives R&D and manufacturing for over 20 years. Guided by its philosophy—‘Our livelihood, our mastery’—the company applies deep expertise in plastic functionality, pigment performance, and process standards to the 3D printing filament market. It offers color and functional masterbatches for PLA, PETG, TPU, and ABS filaments, precisely solving challenges in coloring, toughening, and reinforcement. It also invites collaboration on next-generation materials including water-soluble support filaments and low-melting-point transfer films. Committed to integrity and ethical business, Xinjingcai looks forward to win-win partnerships and welcomes visits and technical exchange.

description_zh: 智维新材（西安）科技有限公司是西安交大通过科技成果转化成立的科技型企业，成立于2021年11月，注册资本1000万元，位于陕西省西安市国际港务区。主要业务为钛合金型材制造、钛合金零部件机械加工。近三年配合西安交通大学材料学院及机械学院完成了大量学术工作，主要负责科研过程中的小规模加工及工程化应用。 公司目前拥有钛合金丝材全流程生产线，产线大部分设备为自主设计制造，生产效率及自动化程度均属行业一流。主要生产设备包括连续辊模拉拔机、多管在线退火矫直炉及抛光涂覆密排机等共30（台）套。各类钛合金丝材年产可达200t。 增材制造用高品质钛丝材是公司未来业绩增长的重点，可生产各类钛丝材产品规格范围为
description_en: A technology enterprise spun off from Xi’an Jiaotong University via scientific achievement commercialization, founded in November 2021 with registered capital of RMB 10 million and headquartered in Xi’an International Trade & Logistics Park, Shaanxi Province. Core activities include titanium alloy profile extrusion and precision machining of titanium alloy components. Over the past three years, it has collaborated extensively with Xi’an Jiaotong University’s School of Materials Science and School of Mechanical Engineering on academic research and small-batch engineering applications. The company operates a fully integrated titanium wire production line—most equipment self-designed and built—featuring industry-leading efficiency and automation, including continuous roller-die drawing machines, multi-tube inline annealing-straightening furnaces, and polishing-coating-close-packing machines (30 units total). Annual titanium wire capacity reaches 200 tons. High-purity, high-sphericity titanium wire for additive manufacturing represents its key growth focus, supporting a broad range of specifications.

description_zh: 飞象精铝公司成立于2017年，是苏州唐伟德飞象金属材料有限公司旗下品牌，专注于走心机铝材供应。成立8年以来，我们通过不懈努力，将公司设立于交通便利，生活舒适，较强发展潜力的昆山，占地面积12000平方，年销售8200吨；且产能还在持续以每年65%的增幅增长。针对走心机等高精密机床的用料需求，在棒材的倒角、精校、精磨工艺上有成熟的用料需求，并为车床自动化供料提供专业完善的专项方案。本公司生产的“精磨棒”精度处于市场领先地位，致力打造轻量化、自动化对物料的一致性，提高自动化金属轻量化。
description_en: Feixiang Precision Aluminum—a brand under Suzhou Tangweide Feixiang Aluminum Materials Co., Ltd.—was founded in 2017 and specializes in aluminum bar supply for Swiss-type lathes (‘sliding headstock’ CNC lathes). Based in Kunshan—chosen for its transport connectivity, livability, and growth potential—the company occupies 12,000 m² and achieved annual sales of 8,200 tons in 2023, with capacity expanding at ~65% year-on-year. It masters precision corner-chamfering, straightening, and fine-grinding processes tailored to high-precision lathe requirements and provides turnkey automated feeding solutions. Its ‘Precision-Ground Bars’ lead the market in dimensional accuracy, supporting lightweighting and automation goals through superior material consistency.

description_zh: 武汉（德马克）科技有限公司（DMK Laser）成立于2018年，由拥有20余年激光行业经验的核心团队创立。公司专注于激光技术在先进制造领域的应用，致力于为全球制造企业提供高效、智能的激光设备及工艺解决方案。 DMK Laser重点布局激光增材制造技术，并持续推动激光技术与3D打印工艺的融合，助力复杂结构零部件的高效制造与快速迭代。同时，公司产品还涵盖激光焊接、激光清洗及激光打标等领域，为客户提供完整的激光加工应用方案。 公司始终坚持以客户需求为导向，通过稳定可靠的设备和专业技术支持，帮助全球中小制造企业提升生产效率，实现更加灵活与可持续的制造模式。
description_en: Founded in 2018 by a core team with 20+ years of laser industry experience, DMK Laser (Wuhan) focuses on applying laser technology to advanced manufacturing. It delivers high-efficiency, intelligent laser equipment and process solutions globally—especially in laser additive manufacturing (LAM), where it actively advances integration of laser technology with 3D printing to enable rapid iteration and high-fidelity fabrication of complex components. Its portfolio also covers laser welding, laser cleaning, and laser marking, offering complete laser processing solutions. Customer-centric by design, DMK supports SMEs worldwide with robust equipment and expert technical assistance—helping them achieve flexible, efficient, and sustainable manufacturing.

description_zh: 江阴菲美塑业有限公司成立于2014年8月，位于长江三角洲北部的江苏省无锡市，距上海仅150公里。我们是一家集PETG切片和PLA切片研发、生产和全球销售于一体的高新技术企业。 我们的产品在国内和国际上都得到了广泛认可，我们公司拥有多项专利和认证，包括ISO 9001、FDA、REACH和RoHS。我们的PETG和PLA切片已出口到50多个国家和地区，包括东南亚、非洲、印度、南美和欧洲。 凭借高性能PETG和PLA切片，我们为全球包装、收缩膜、3D打印耗材和工业应用提供可持续性发展方案。
description_en: Founded in August 2014 and headquartered in Wuxi, Jiangsu Province—located in the northern Yangtze River Delta just 150 km from Shanghai—Jiangyin Feimei Plastics is a high-tech enterprise specializing in R&D, production, and global sales of PETG and PLA polymer chips. Certified to ISO 9001, FDA, REACH, and RoHS standards, its PETG and PLA chips are exported to over 50 countries and regions across Southeast Asia, Africa, India, South America, and Europe. The company delivers sustainable material solutions for packaging, shrink film, 3D printing filaments, and industrial applications.

description_zh: 无锡达芬奇新材料有限公司成立于 2023 年，正是瞄准3D 金属打印行业中，基板分离环节这一行业 “卡脖子” 难题，以 “用钨丝环切技术全面替代电火花切割” 为核心使命，扎根无锡长三角产业核心区，专注于环线截断机设备、环切线的研发、生产与销售，致力于为 3D 金属打印企业提供 “高精度、高效率、低成本” 的基板分离整体解决方案，助力企业突破产能瓶颈、降低运营成本。
description_en: Established in 2023, Wuxi Da Vinci New Materials focuses on resolving the industry-critical challenge of build plate separation in metal additive manufacturing. Based in the Yangtze River Delta’s industrial core, the company develops, manufactures, and sells tungsten-wire ring-cutting machines and specialized ring-cutting wires—providing high-precision, high-efficiency, low-cost integrated build plate separation solutions to accelerate metal 3D printing throughput and reduce operational costs.

description_zh: 上海展通实业有限公司成立于1999年，公司坐落于宝山区罗店展通科创园，拥有自主厂房2万平方米，年产能达到3.2万吨，测试设备齐全。是国内较早从事抗静电/抗菌材料、中高端色母粒、多功能母粒以及功能改性材料的研发生产销售，并为客户提供产品应用的技术支持。经过二十多年的稳步发展，公司处于行业内领先水平，公司已经全面通过TS16949汽车行业质量管理体系认证。公司是上海塑料行业协会副会长单位，上海塑料行业协会抗菌材料专业委员会主任单位，高新技术企业单位，上海市专精特新中小企业，上海科技型中小企业。
description_en: Founded in 1999 and headquartered in Luodian Science & Technology Park, Baoshan District, Shanghai, Zhantong operates a 20,000 m² self-owned facility with an annual capacity of 32,000 tons and comprehensive testing capabilities. A pioneer in China’s functional polymer additives sector, the company develops and manufactures antistatic/antibacterial materials, mid-to-high-end color masterbatches, multifunctional masterbatches, and functional modified materials—backed by full technical support for end-use applications. Certified to IATF 16949 (formerly TS16949), it serves as Vice-Chairman of the Shanghai Plastics Industry Association and Chair of its Antibacterial Materials Committee; recognized as a High-Tech Enterprise, Shanghai ‘Specialized, Refined, Distinctive, and Innovative’ SME, and Shanghai Science & Technology SME.

description_zh: 福来恩传动科技是专业从事重载伸缩导轨，高速静音滚轮导轨及直线模组生产的制造企业，轨道材料分为：碳钢、铝、不锈钢。还可为客户做“定制化”非标产品 自成立以来，我们已成功生产出多种类型的滑轨，旨在实现各种部件的完美顺畅抽出。这使我们能够根据您的图纸和要求提供标准滑轨以及定制滑轨。这些滑轨经过专门设计和开发，能够在许多特定领域中应用，尤其是在重载和超长货物运输方面： 航空航天、机械臂、火车、船舶、消防车、餐车、工业存储、实验室、银行设备、野营车、商用车、家具、游艇 一支经验丰富的团队不断拓展我们的产品范围，以优质的产品、持续的质量控制和高的性价比满足您的特定需求。
description_en: FLEON is a manufacturer specializing in heavy-duty telescopic rails, high-speed silent roller rails, and linear modules. Its rail systems are fabricated from carbon steel, aluminum, or stainless steel and support full customization to non-standard specifications. Leveraging extensive engineering expertise, FLEON designs and produces precision slide rails optimized for smooth, reliable extension under demanding loads—serving aerospace, robotics, rail transport, marine, fire trucks, catering vehicles, industrial storage, laboratories, banking equipment, RVs, commercial vehicles, furniture, and yachts.

description_zh: 北京航宇星箭检测科技有限公司成立于2022年02月25日，注册地位于北京市房山区德润南路9号院4号楼1层101。公司拥有射线检测、数字射线成像系统、工业CT检测、加速器检测、常规超声波检测、超声C扫描检测、超声相控阵检测、渗透检测、磁粉检测、激光散斑检测、涡流检测、理化试验等各种类检测设备60余台。经CMA、CNAS认可的无损检测能力覆盖金属材料及制品、非金属材料及制品的超声、射线、磁粉、渗透检测。公司主要服务于：航空、航天，核电、兵器、轨道交通、汽车、矿产、医疗、3D打印等高精尖领域。
description_en: Founded on February 25, 2022, and located in Fangshan District, Beijing, Hangyu Xingjian operates over 60 advanced NDT instruments—including X-ray radiography, digital radiography imaging (DR), industrial computed tomography (CT), accelerator-based inspection, conventional ultrasonic testing (UT), ultrasonic C-scan, phased-array UT, liquid penetrant testing (PT), magnetic particle testing (MT), laser speckle interferometry, eddy current testing (ET), and physical-chemical testing. Accredited by CMA and CNAS, its certified NDT capabilities cover metals and nonmetals across UT, RT, MT, and PT. The company serves high-precision sectors including aerospace, nuclear power, defense, rail transit, automotive, mining, medical devices, and additive manufacturing.

description_zh: 秦皇岛秦皇玻璃微珠有限公司，成立于2003年，是专门从事空心玻璃微珠、实心玻璃微珠、和玻璃纤维粉等系列产品的生产、研制开发和销售的专业填料玻璃微珠厂。产品畅销全国二 十多个省、市（包括台湾），还远销欧洲、中东、韩国等十 多个国家和地区，赢得了国内外客户的好评。
description_en: Established in 2003, Qinhuangdao Qinhuang Glass Microspheres is a professional manufacturer of hollow glass microspheres, solid glass microspheres, and glass fiber powders—specializing in research, development, production, and global distribution. Its products are sold across more than 20 provinces and municipalities in China (including Taiwan) and exported to over ten countries and regions in Europe, the Middle East, and South Korea, earning strong recognition from domestic and international customers.

description_zh: 苏州精丝新材料科技有限公司创建于美丽的苏州太湖畔，精丝品牌致力于3D打印材料的研发、生产与销售，促进3D打印行业的深入发展。公司已掌握PLA、PCL、ABS、PETG等多种3D打印材料的生产技术，可以满足不同领域客户对3D打印材料性能要求。精丝3D打印材料种类齐全、性能优异、性价比高、适用面广，被广泛应用于产品设计、工业制造、外科医疗、文化艺术、教育科研等领域。在研发上，精丝拥有多项国际国内专利技术，是PLA 3D打印耗材行业的领先军;在生产上，公司坚持使用一线大厂正牌全新料，创始以来耗材收到国内外一直好评，精丝人必将创优争先，争做行业领先军!
description_en: Based on the shores of Lake Tai in Suzhou, Jingsi New Materials develops, manufactures, and markets high-performance 3D printing materials—including PLA, PCL, ABS, and PETG filaments—tailored to diverse application requirements across product design, industrial manufacturing, surgical medicine, cultural arts, education, and scientific research. Holding multiple domestic and international patents, Jingsi is a leader in PLA filament innovation. All filaments are produced using premium virgin resins from top-tier suppliers, ensuring consistent quality and broad market acclaim both domestically and internationally.

description_zh: 宁波智造数字科技有限公司（简称“MAKEX”）是一家专注于DLP光固化高精度3D打印机研发、生产和销售的创新型企业。公司秉承“智造无形”的理念，产品服务覆盖微纳制造、超材料、生物医学工程等领域，累计服务全球高校实验室、生物医药和医疗机构、尖端工业企业、国家级科研院所等超500家客户，并持续性进行技术聚焦，产学研协同，致力成为全球微纳制造领域的开拓者及合作伙伴。 MAKEX可提供高度可定制化的解决方案，以满足不同领域、不同行业的个性化科研需求。
description_en: Ningbo MAKEX Digital Technology Co., Ltd. (‘MAKEX’) is an innovative enterprise focused on R&D, manufacturing, and sales of high-precision DLP-based stereolithography (SLA) 3D printers. Guided by the philosophy ‘Intelligent Manufacturing Without Form,’ MAKEX serves micro/nano-manufacturing, metamaterials, and biomedical engineering sectors—supporting over 500 clients globally, including university labs, biopharma and clinical institutions, cutting-edge industrial enterprises, and national research institutes. Through sustained technology focus and industry–academia–research collaboration, MAKEX delivers highly customizable solutions for specialized scientific and engineering applications.

description_zh: 江苏金海创科技有限公司位于交通便利的江苏省镇江市，为全球的激光核心部件智造基地，占地53800平米，拥有员工500余人。 公司产品通过欧盟CE、RoHS认证，品质管控符合ISO9001质量体系认证，广泛应用于激光打标、激光焊接、激光清洗和激光精密加工领域，畅销全球100多个国家。
description_en: Located in Zhenjiang, Jiangsu Province—a region renowned for excellent transportation connectivity—Jiangsu Jinhai Chuang is a global manufacturing hub for core laser components, occupying a 53,800 m² facility and employing over 500 staff. Its products comply with EU CE and RoHS directives and are quality-certified to ISO 9001. Widely deployed in laser marking, welding, cleaning, and precision machining, Jinhai Chuang’s components are exported to more than 100 countries worldwide.

description_zh: 朴丽精工科技(上海)有限公司于2019年在上海成立，隶属于英国MRF集团，总部坐落在英国伦敦。MRF集团于1996年建立，是一家欧洲实业公司，主要从事表面处理设备及辅料的研发与制造，主要产品包括磨粒流抛光机(AFM)，热能去毛刺机(TEM)，微粒子表面纳米化处理机(WPS)，微孔抛光机(MF)，电化学去毛刺机(ECM)，液体料抛光机(LFM)，钢珠流去毛刺机(SFM)，平面研磨机(LPM)，机械人去毛刺中心(RDC)等系列产品以及相关研磨介质和耗材。
description_en: Established in Shanghai in 2019 as a subsidiary of UK-based MRF Group (founded 1996), Puli Precision Engineering specializes in surface finishing equipment and consumables. Its portfolio includes abrasive flow machining (AFM) systems, thermal energy deburring (TEM) machines, WPS nano-surface treatment units, micro-hole polishing (MF) systems, electrochemical deburring (ECM) machines, liquid flow polishing (LFM) systems, steel ball flow deburring (SFM) units, lapping and polishing machines (LPM), and robotic deburring centers (RDC), alongside complementary abrasives and process media.

description_zh: 郎溪润祥橡胶新材料有限公司位于安徽宣城市郎溪县，是北京东石联合贸易有限公司子公司，在美国亚拉巴马州设分公司及生产基地，深耕橡胶鞋与橡胶手套领域 30 余年，现有员工 200 名，含 50 人专业技术研发团队，自有品牌 “东石” 业内颇具影响力，产品覆盖安全防护、户外运动、农业、军事等领域，稳固欧美市场的同时近年国内份额稳步增长，经 10 余年研发公司掌握全球领先的橡胶注压一体成型技术并规模化生产，颠覆行业百年劳动密集型模式，大幅提升自动化水平与产品品质稳定性且生产更绿色环保、节能减碳，未来公司将持续深耕技术创新，致力于成为全球橡胶防护用品研发与生产中心，在行业砥砺前行。
description_en: Langxi Runxiang Rubber New Materials—based in Langxi County, Xuancheng City, Anhui Province—is a subsidiary of Beijing Dongshi United Trading Co., Ltd., with a U.S. branch and production base in Alabama. With over 30 years of expertise in rubber footwear and gloves, the company employs 200 people—including a 50-member R&D team—and markets its flagship ‘Dongshi’ brand across safety protection, outdoor sports, agriculture, and defense. It has pioneered globally leading integrated rubber injection-compression molding technology, enabling automated, high-yield, eco-friendly, and energy-efficient production—replacing traditional labor-intensive processes. Runxiang is committed to becoming a world-class R&D and manufacturing center for rubber protective equipment.

description_zh: 德国PRIMES公司主要专注于为材料加工领域的二氧化碳激光器、固体激光器、半导体激光器提供参数测量仪器，主要进行光束光斑分析、功率测量等。从微加工到重工业加工领域，应用范围广泛。 武汉东隆科技有限公司成立于1997年，专注于光谱影像、激光光束诊断、气体传感、单光子计数、光链路测量及超快超强激光系统六大光学领域，代理覆盖科研与工业应用的高端产品。公司秉持“服务创造未来”理念，汇聚光电子技术人才，为客户提供优质产品与专业解决方案，并与欧美日多家厂商深度合作，共建开发与技术服务中心。
description_en: PRIMES GmbH (Germany) develops and supplies precision measurement instrumentation for CO₂, solid-state, and semiconductor lasers used in materials processing—covering beam profiling, power measurement, and diagnostics across microfabrication to heavy-industry applications. Wuhan Donglong Technology Co., Ltd., founded in 1997, is a leading distributor and solutions provider in six core optical domains: spectral imaging, laser beam diagnostics, gas sensing, single-photon counting, optical link measurement, and ultrafast/intense laser systems. Committed to ‘Service Creates the Future,’ Donglong collaborates deeply with top-tier European, American, and Japanese manufacturers to deliver high-end optical technologies and technical support to research and industrial clients.

address_en: China/Hunan/怀化市/靖州县甘太工业园
description_zh: 湖南嘉顺华新材料有限公司位于湖南省怀化市靖州县，是一家集研产销于一体的高科新型、高效节能减排企业。 公司主要产品为莫来石球形陶瓷砂和高强度轻质耐火保温材料。我司生产产品由于人工合成莫来石相高、物相结构稳定，具有耐火度高、热膨胀率低、高温烧结温度点高等优良性能。其热物理及化学稳定性，加之球形度高、表面光洁和优质的耐破杂性，使其成为能让铸造产业提高铸件精确性、改善铸件表面质量、减少铸件缺陷、增加铸件成品率的新型铸造砂。
description_en: Located in Jingzhou County, Huaihua City, Hunan Province, Jiashunhua New Materials is a high-tech enterprise integrating R&D, production, and sales—with core products including spherical mullite ceramic sand and high-strength, lightweight refractory insulation materials. Synthesized mullite exhibits exceptional phase purity and structural stability, delivering superior properties: high refractoriness, low thermal expansion, elevated sintering temperature, excellent thermochemical stability, high sphericity, smooth surface finish, and outstanding resistance to contamination. These attributes make Jiashunhua’s sand ideal for improving casting accuracy, enhancing surface quality, reducing defects, and increasing yield in foundry applications.

description_zh: 浙文（宁波）三维科技有限公司成立于2018年，前身（宁波浩文快速成型科技有限公司成立于2013年）是国内一家专注3D打印透明服务开发、生产及销售的公司，目前拥有150台透明设备。总部及研发基地设立于浙江宁波慈溪市，并在全国设有3家分公司浙文（东莞），浙文（丹阳）以及上海公司。公司生产制造及研发实力雄厚。浙文（宁波）三维科技有限公司，自成立以来，一直专注于透明打印服务十三年之久，在3D打印领域，浙文3D打印凭借其优良的产品品质、精湛的工艺技术以及多年的专注努力，赢得了广大客户及行业人士的高度认可。
description_en: Founded in 2018 (evolving from Ningbo Haowen Rapid Prototyping Technology Co., Ltd., established in 2013), ZheWen (Ningbo) 3D Technology is a China-based specialist in transparent 3D printing services—operating a fleet of 150 transparent-capable printers. Headquartered and R&D-based in Cixi City, Zhejiang Province, the company maintains three regional subsidiaries: ZheWen (Dongguan), ZheWen (Danyang), and ZheWen (Shanghai). With over thirteen years of dedicated expertise in transparent 3D printing, ZheWen is widely recognized for its consistent product quality, advanced processing techniques, and deep domain specialization.

description_zh: 南通强生企业集团1992年成立于上海，是中国第一家生产安全防护手套的企业，至今已有33年，后迁至南通；现在如东县经济开发区建有强生新材料、强生石墨烯、强生光电三个生产企业；三个企业自有工业用地618多亩，厂房面积10万平方，员工860多名，总资产6亿元，自2015年至今十年间，累计交纳税金近10亿元。 强生10年前在美国设立直销公司，安全产品销售进入美国航天、汽车、钢铁等行业。两年前成立的强生欧洲直销公司，业绩也在稳步推进；强生石墨烯“凯瑞纳”品牌在全球安防领域知名度不断上升，为增加高端产品销售创造了条件。
description_en: Nantong Qiangsheng Enterprise Group was founded in Shanghai in 1992 as China’s first safety glove manufacturer. Relocated to Nantong, the group now operates three production subsidiaries in Rugao Economic Development Zone: Qiangsheng New Materials, Qiangsheng Graphene, and Qiangsheng Optoelectronics—occupying over 618 mu (≈103 acres) of land, with 100,000 m² of factory space and 860+ employees. With total assets of ¥600 million, the group has paid nearly ¥1 billion in taxes over the past decade. Its U.S. direct-sales subsidiary (established 10 years ago) supplies safety products to aerospace, automotive, and steel industries; its European subsidiary (launched two years ago) is gaining traction. The ‘Carina’ graphene-enhanced safety brand is rapidly gaining global recognition, strengthening Qiangsheng’s position in premium product markets.

address_en: China/Beijing/北京市/丰台区云岗东王佐北路12号
description_zh: 航天增材科技(北京)有限公司，三院159厂全资子公司，注册资金7000万国家空天结构增材制造技术创新中心、中国航天科工集团增材制造工艺中心挂靠单位公司主营业务包括增材制造应用服务+装备研发。公司瞄准新一代武器装备研制需求.坚持高端装备需求为牵引，应用服务为核心，装备和粉末研发为支撑的全产业链发展模式，形成了完备的增材制造技术体系，在大尺寸高端金属增材制造技术和装备等方面取得了多项关键技术突破，是中国航天领域规模最大、技术最为全面的增材制造专业化研究机构，整体技术水平位居国内领先，通过了包括GJB9001C、ISO9001C、GB/T24001-2016、GB/T45001-2016等体系认证。
description_en: A wholly owned subsidiary of the Third Academy’s No. 159 Factory, Aerospace Additive Manufacturing Technology (Beijing) Co., Ltd. operates the National Aviation & Space Structural Additive Manufacturing Innovation Center and serves as the China Aerospace Science and Industry Corporation (CASIC) Additive Manufacturing Process Center. With registered capital of ¥70 million, the company pursues an integrated business model centered on application-driven service, supported by proprietary equipment and metal powder development. It has achieved breakthroughs in large-format high-end metal additive manufacturing—including SLM/DMLS/LPBF—and maintains China’s largest, most comprehensive AM R&D infrastructure for aerospace applications. Certified to GJB9001C, ISO9001, GB/T24001-2016 (environmental management), and GB/T45001-2016 (occupational health & safety), it ranks among China’s top-tier AM technology providers.

description_zh: 公司成立于2024年7月，注册资本1463万元，项目旨在解决国内高温合金纯净度不足的“卡脖子”问题，实现批产典型K、DZ系列母合金关键杂质O/S/N含量加总小于10ppm，DD系列母合金关键杂质O/S/N 含量加总小于5ppm的目标，整体水平达到美国最优级。主要产品为高温合金母合金棒材，用于航发的典型牌号如K4169、K417G、K465，用于汽车涡轮增压器的K418等多牌号、多规格产品，产品已通过中国航发集团、上市公司图南股份等验证。
description_en: Founded in July 2024 with registered capital of ¥14.63 million, Hangyu Xingrui addresses the critical domestic challenge of insufficient purity in high-temperature alloys. Its mission is to achieve mass production of K- and DZ-series superalloy master alloys with combined O/S/N impurity content <10 ppm, and DD-series alloys with <5 ppm—matching the highest U.S. industry benchmarks. Primary products include high-purity superalloy master alloy billets for aerospace engines (e.g., K4169, K417G, K465) and automotive turbochargers (e.g., K418), validated by AVIC Aero Engine Corporation and publicly listed Tuna Co., Ltd.

description_zh: 上海昱峰科技有限公司成立于2022年，是一家专注于工业级金属3D打印技术研发、应用与创新的高科技企业。以赋能重大工业领域高质量发展为使命，聚焦产品轻量化、高性能、数字化、智能化核心需求，依托自主研发的微铸锻铣复合增材制造技术，为客户提供从技术方案设计、3D打印生产到后续配套服务的一体化综合解决方案。公司始终深耕航空航天、武器装备、水利发电、核电、风电等关键工业领域，全力推进微铸锻复合增材制造核心技术与装备产业化落地。凭借持续的技术创新与研发投入，已实现20余项关键及共性技术突破，累计斩获20余项知识产权 ，技术实力与行业影响力稳步提升，为相关领域打破技术壁垒、提升产品核心竞争力提供了有力支撑。
description_en: Founded in 2022, Shanghai Yufeng Technology Co., Ltd. is a high-tech enterprise specializing in R&D, application, and innovation of industrial-grade metal additive manufacturing technologies. Committed to enabling high-quality development in critical industrial sectors, the company addresses core requirements for lightweighting, high performance, digitalization, and intelligence—leveraging its proprietary micro-casting-forging-milling hybrid additive manufacturing technology. It delivers integrated end-to-end solutions encompassing technical design, LPBF production, and post-processing services. With deep expertise in aerospace, defense equipment, hydroelectric power, nuclear power, and wind power, the company is advancing industrialization of its hybrid AM technology and equipment. It has achieved over 20 key and generic technology breakthroughs and secured more than 20 intellectual property rights, strengthening its technical capabilities and industry influence while supporting clients in overcoming technological barriers and enhancing product competitiveness.

description_zh: 爱司凯（洛阳）3D打印中心暨洛阳易普特智能科技有限公司，成立于2018年10月，由上市公司爱司凯科技、为真投资等共同参股成立，注册资本3500万人民币，厂房建筑面积7300平方米，是爱司凯设备销售直营服务商，生产规模是目前国内领先的3D砂型打印中心。 我们是一家专注于3D打印砂型及铸件制造与服务的科技企业，致力于为企业提供快速、专业的砂型打印和铸件设计研发生产以及设备销售及售后培训等服务，我们拥有专业的3D砂型打印研发团队，可提供从零件图、浇铸工艺设计、3D砂型模拟验证、砂型产品打印到成品铸件的全程服务。
description_en: Luoyang E-Print Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd. (operating as the Aisikai Luoyang 3D Printing Center) was established in October 2018 as a joint venture between Aisikai Technology—a listed company—and Weizhen Investment, with registered capital of RMB 35 million and a facility spanning 7,300 m². As an authorized direct sales and service provider for Aisikai equipment, it operates one of China’s largest-scale 3D sand-printing centers. The company specializes in 3D sand mold printing and castings manufacturing and services, offering rapid, professional solutions including mold design, casting process engineering, 3D sand mold simulation and validation, sand mold printing, and finished casting production. Its dedicated R&D team supports full-cycle service from part drawings through to final cast components.

description_zh: 河南能微新材料科技有限公司成立于2017年6月，研发制造了河南省首套工业级全自动高温粉体加工设备,设备核心温场温度达6000-10000摄氏度。 设备具有能量密度高、加热强度大、核心温区体积大、处理材料工艺简单；无电极，不会因电极蒸发而污染产品。该技术加工粉体成本低、粒度分布均匀、表面光洁，伴生颗粒少、纯度高、含氧量低、流动性好、粒径分布均匀、无空心球、堆积密度显著增大。 公司是高新技术企业、洛阳市科技型中小企业、洛阳市市级科技研发中心；入围科技部创新创业大赛全国总决赛；已获得多项专利、软著。
description_en: Henan Nengwei New Materials Technology Co., Ltd., founded in June 2017, developed Henan Province’s first industrial-grade fully automated high-temperature powder processing system, featuring a core thermal field operating at 6,000–10,000 °C. The system delivers ultra-high energy density, intense heating, a large-volume high-temperature zone, and simplified material processing—without electrodes, eliminating electrode evaporation and associated contamination. It enables low-cost, uniform particle-size distribution, smooth particle surfaces, minimal satellite particles, high purity, low oxygen content, excellent flowability, narrow particle size distribution, absence of hollow spheres, and significantly increased tap density. Certified as a High-Tech Enterprise, Luoyang Municipal Science & Technology SME, and Luoyang Municipal R&D Center, the company has been selected for the National Innovation & Entrepreneurship Competition Finals and holds multiple patents and software copyrights.

description_zh: 浙江昶科陶瓷新材料有限公司，于2022年1月在湖州高新区东源智能产业园注册成立。现有厂房面积7000㎡。公司致力于先进陶瓷材料及精密陶瓷零部件的研发、生产、销售。具有从粉体、成型、烧结、到精细加工、表面处理、检验检测等全道生产线。公司目前拥有光伏陶瓷部件、半导体陶瓷部件、纺织陶瓷部件、陶瓷封装管壳、陶瓷基板、医疗柱塞、阀片、精密轴承等多种类型产品，广泛应用于半导体、光伏、半导体封装、医疗、汽车电子、生活/文化/工业机械等领域。具有从材料到产品的研发能力，为客户提供优质陶瓷部件及解决方案。
description_en: Zhejiang Changke Advanced Ceramics Co., Ltd. was established in January 2022 in the Dongyuan Intelligent Industry Park of Huzhou High-Tech Zone, occupying 7,000 m² of production space. The company specializes in R&D, manufacturing, and sales of advanced ceramic materials and precision ceramic components. Its vertically integrated production line covers powder preparation, shaping, sintering, precision machining, surface treatment, and inspection & testing. Product portfolio includes photovoltaic ceramic parts, semiconductor ceramic components, textile ceramics, ceramic packaging housings, ceramic substrates, medical plungers and valve plates, and precision ceramic bearings—serving semiconductor, PV, semiconductor packaging, medical devices, automotive electronics, and industrial/consumer machinery markets. With full-material-to-component R&D capability, it provides customers with high-performance ceramic components and tailored solutions.

description_zh: 苏州无境新材料科技有限公司是专注于 3D 打印耗材研发、生产与销售的创新型企业，深耕新材料领域，以技术创新为核心打造高品质打印耗材产品。公司产品质量对标行业一线品牌标准，在精度控制、批次稳定性、打印适配性上均达行业优质水平，同时依托规模化生产及系统化流程，实现质优价美的高性价比优势。支持全品类耗材的个性化定制，可根据客户需求定制规格、色彩、性能参数，满足工业制造、文创设计、教育科研等多场景的差异化打印需求。公司兼具新材料技术研发实力与完善的产销体系，为客户提供高适配、高性价比的 3D 打印耗材解决方案。
description_en: Suzhou Wujing New Materials Technology Co., Ltd. is an innovative enterprise focused on R&D, manufacturing, and sales of high-performance 3D printing consumables. Leveraging deep expertise in advanced materials, the company develops premium consumables meeting top-tier industry standards for dimensional accuracy, batch consistency, and print-process compatibility. Through scalable production and systematic quality control, it delivers exceptional value—balancing performance and cost. It offers full-consumable customization—including specifications, colors, and functional parameters—to meet diverse requirements across industrial manufacturing, creative design, and education/research applications. Combining robust materials R&D with a comprehensive production and distribution system, it provides highly adaptable, cost-effective 3D printing consumable solutions.

description_zh: 苏州锐璞科技有限公司（REPOLY TECH）是一家专注于高分子增材制造后处理技术的研创型企业，核心产品为熏蒸抛光设备及配套溶剂耗材，面向 SLS、MJF、FDM 等工艺，实现高端后处理装备的国产替代。公司核心技术已授权两项国家发明专利，并作为国内唯一后处理设备入选“2025 中国增材制造优质产品”。基于真空压差法的常温蒸气流体调控技术及材料功能化后处理技术，有效解决高温蒸汽法导致的变形与性能衰减问题。经处理后零件表面粗糙度 Ra 可低于 2 μm，良品率超过 90%，最小可处理 0.5 mm 薄壁件，耗材成本降低 80%，效率提升 1 倍以上，设备价格不足进口产品的一半，持续服务高端制造领域
description_en: Suzhou Ruipu Technology Co., Ltd. (REPOLY TECH) is an R&D-driven enterprise specializing in post-processing technologies for polymer additive manufacturing. Its flagship products are vapor-smoothing systems and compatible solvent consumables, designed for SLS, MJF, and FDM processes—enabling domestic substitution of high-end post-processing equipment. Core technologies include vacuum-pressure-differential ambient-temperature vapor-flow control and functionalized material surface treatment, which effectively eliminate part deformation and mechanical property degradation caused by conventional high-temperature steam methods. Treated parts achieve surface roughness (Ra) < 2 μm, yield > 90%, and can accommodate thin-walled features down to 0.5 mm. Consumable costs are reduced by 80%, throughput increases by over 100%, and equipment pricing is less than half that of imported equivalents—making REPOLY TECH a trusted partner for advanced manufacturing.

description_en: Founded in 2009, Shenzhen Lexsoft Hose Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sells industrial hoses. Its product range includes PU steel-wire reinforced hoses, abrasion-resistant hoses, antistatic hoses, dust-extraction hoses, high-temperature air ducts, heat-resistant hoses, telescopic hoses, food-grade hoses, sanitary hoses, dental tubing, plastic-reinforced hoses, general-purpose plastic hoses, smooth-bore PU steel-wire hoses, and powder-transfer hoses. Certified to ISO 9001 and ISO 14000, and compliant with EU regulatory standards, all products meet national and international specifications. The company is a National High-Tech Enterprise and a Shenzhen Specialized, Refined, Distinctive, and Innovative (SRDI) enterprise, holding multiple independent intellectual property rights.

description_zh: 合肥费舍罗热工装备有限公司是一家专业从事先进电炉装备研发、生产、销售、售后一体的高新技术企业、科技型中小企业、安徽省商标品牌示范企业、安徽省创新型中小企业、安徽省专精特新企业、合肥市大数据企业、合肥市工业设计中心、肥西县优质小微工业企业、肥西县高成长型企业。我们致力为科研和工业领域提供专业的电炉设备和技术服务。一、基本情况：我们的产品主要服务于电子陶瓷、结构陶瓷、精密陶瓷、电子元器件、新材料、新能源和集成电路半导体行业领域。
description_en: Hefei Fisherro Thermal Equipment Co., Ltd. is a high-tech enterprise and science & technology SME providing integrated R&D, manufacturing, sales, and after-sales service for advanced electric furnace systems. Recognized as an Anhui Provincial Brand Demonstration Enterprise, Anhui Innovative SME, Anhui Specialized, Refined, Distinctive, and Innovative (SRDI) enterprise, Hefei Big Data Enterprise, Hefei Industrial Design Center, Feixi County High-Quality Micro-Enterprise, and Feixi County High-Growth Enterprise, it delivers professional electric furnace equipment and technical services for research and industrial applications—primarily serving electronic ceramics, structural ceramics, precision ceramics, electronic components, new materials, new energy, and IC/semiconductor industries.

categories_en: Glove Boxes, Dust Extraction & Safety Equipment

description_zh: 上海铸越环保科技有限公司成⽴于2013年，公司专业致⼒于粉尘，烟雾，固体和油液⽣产制造强⼒的吸尘和除尘解决⽅案，并将优质的服务和产品应⽤于各种领域。 从建⽴之初起，公司的理念就不是专注做⼤规模化的⽣产制造。相反地，公司更希望专注于为客户找寻完美的解决⽅案，让每个独特的设计都能超越客户的期望。 时⾄今⽇，这个理念仍然引领着我们整个团队，从设计到⽣产阶段，机器的每⼀个细节定制，都确保最终⽤户能够得到理想的解决⽅案。 当谈到吸尘或除尘产品的时候，我们可能⾸先想到的它们是⼀个⼯具，仅仅⽤于保持环境的清洁。⽽事实上，它是⽤来提⾼整个⽣产过程的效率和改善⼯⼈健康安全⼀个强⼤功能的装备。
description_en: Founded in 2013, Shanghai Zhuyue Environmental Technology Co., Ltd. specializes in powerful, application-specific dust, mist, solid particulate, and oil mist collection and filtration solutions for industrial manufacturing environments. Guided by a philosophy of delivering bespoke, high-performance solutions—not mass production—the company ensures every system is meticulously engineered to exceed unique customer expectations. Its engineered solutions enhance production efficiency and safeguard worker health and safety, transforming dust and mist collectors from simple cleaning tools into mission-critical productivity and occupational health assets.

description_zh: 佛山市谱丽美新材料科技有限公司是一家专业从事3D打印耗材 研发与生产的制造商，拥有配套的色母粒工厂和大型的改性塑料工厂。公司在3D打印耗材有着丰富经验的开发人员，研发实力雄厚，可提供各种高分子材料3D打印耗材的配色改性挤出成型，支持小批量开发定制，速度快，效率高，生产周期短。公司在发展过程中，不断设计生产各款新型3D打印耗材，规模不断扩大，公司员工奉行进取、求实、严谨团结的方针，不断的开拓创新，以技术为核心，视质量为生命奉用户为上帝，竭诚为客户提供有品质的3D打印耗材及无微不至的售后服务
description_en: Foshan Pulimei New Materials Technology Co., Ltd. is a manufacturer specializing in R&D and production of 3D printing consumables, supported by in-house masterbatch and large-scale modified plastics facilities. Its experienced R&D team delivers customized coloration, modification, and extrusion of high-performance polymer filaments and powders—including rapid small-batch development with short lead times. Continuously innovating and expanding capacity, the company adheres to principles of progressiveness, practicality, rigor, and teamwork—prioritizing technology, quality, and customer satisfaction to deliver premium 3D printing consumables and responsive after-sales support.

name_en: Shenzhen Xianku Intelligent Co., Ltd.
address_zh: 中国大陆/广东省/深圳市/广东省深圳市龙华区民塘路328号龙华数字创新中心C栋24层

description_zh: 深圳仙库智能有限公司是一家专注于3D精准人体体征数据的采集、分析及应用的国家高新技术企业。公司具备“3D扫描+AI诊断+健康定制”的全栈式服务能力，是全球领先的3D体征数据运营服务商。 仙库自主研发有3D智能体测镜、3D智能足测仪等一系列毫米级精度扫描硬件，结合核心AI算法，实现对体型、脊柱及足部健康的高效、无辐射测量分析。基于“数据-分析-定制”闭环，提供3D打印鞋、3D打印鞋垫、定制护脊枕等个性化产品。产品方案应用于医疗健康、运动康复、鞋服时尚、家居睡眠等领域。 公司持有50余项专利，拥有全球最大的百万级真实3D人体数据库。仙库将持续深化数据价值，致力于成为全球人体数字化服务的标杆。
description_en: Shenzhen Xianku Intelligent Co., Ltd. is a National High-Tech Enterprise specializing in precise acquisition, AI-powered analysis, and application of 3D human biometric data. As a global leader in 3D biometric data operations, it offers an integrated '3D scanning + AI diagnostics + health personalization' stack. Proprietary hardware—including millimeter-precision 3D smart body scanners and foot scanners—combined with core AI algorithms enable radiation-free, high-efficiency assessment of body shape, spinal alignment, and foot biomechanics. Closed-loop 'data–analysis–customization' powers personalized products such as 3D-printed footwear, orthotic insoles, and posture-support pillows—deployed across healthcare, sports rehabilitation, fashion footwear, and home/sleep wellness. Holding 50+ patents and maintaining the world’s largest real-world 3D human database (>1 million scans), Xianku is committed to becoming the global benchmark in human digitalization services.

description_zh: 武汉诺雅光电科技有限公司是一家光电高新技术企业，拥有一流光电技术及控制板卡研发团队，专业研发销售高水准激光器件及控制系统。诺雅光电致力于为客户提供价格合理，性能优良的激光器和激光配件。 我司的主要产品： 振镜系统：德国SCANLAB全系列高速高精度振镜。 3D打印：专业供应金属、粉末、树脂等3D打印光学组件。 激光加工控制系统：诺雅光电NV200飞行打码控制系统，NV5000激光加工控制系统。德国scaps公司USC-1、USC-2打标卡及软件。 激光器：美国SYNRAD全系列CO2激光器、美国Coherent全系列CO2激光器、美国IPG光纤激光器等。
description_en: Wuhan Nuoya Optoelectronics Technology Co., Ltd. is a high-tech optoelectronics enterprise with elite R&D teams in laser optics and motion control boards. It specializes in developing and supplying high-performance, cost-effective laser components and control systems. Key offerings include: SCANLAB (Germany) high-speed, high-precision galvanometer scanning systems; optical components for metal, powder-bed, and resin-based 3D printing; Nuoya NV200 flying-marking and NV5000 laser processing control systems; USC-1/USC-2 marking cards and software from scaps (Germany); and CO₂ lasers from SYNRAD (USA) and Coherent (USA), plus IPG (USA) fiber lasers.

name_zh: 苏州浪声科学仪器有限公司
name_en: Suzhou Langsheng Scientific Instrument Co., Ltd.
address_zh: 中国大陆/江苏省/苏州市/高新区永安路19号
address_en: China/Jiangsu/苏州市/高新区永安路19号
description_zh: 苏州浪声科学仪器有限公司成立于2012年，一直致力于研究分析和工业仪器技术。伴随着数十个重大创新，公司在以下领域愈加专业成熟，其中包括薄膜分析（XRF），X射线荧光光谱学(TXRF、EDXRF)，X射线衍射（XRD），拉曼光谱（RAMAN），扫描电镜（SEM），激光诱导击穿光谱（LIBS），X射线光学器件，实验室自动化，X射线源。 公司充分利用多年积累的专业技术知识，坚持以客户为导向，不断的创新，为客户日益复杂化和多样化的社会课题以及需求提供完全集成的分析解决方案。
description_en: Founded in 2012, Suzhou Langsheng Scientific Instrument Co., Ltd. focuses on analytical and industrial instrumentation R&D. Through decades of innovation, it has achieved domain leadership in thin-film analysis (XRF), total-reflection X-ray fluorescence (TXRF), energy-dispersive XRF (EDXRF), X-ray diffraction (XRD), Raman spectroscopy (RAMAN), scanning electron microscopy (SEM), laser-induced breakdown spectroscopy (LIBS), X-ray optics, laboratory automation, and X-ray sources. Leveraging deep technical expertise and a customer-centric approach, Langsheng delivers fully integrated analytical solutions addressing increasingly complex and diverse scientific and industrial challenges.

description_zh: 常州钢研极光增材制造有限公司成立于2021年4月，是中国钢研的成员企业，专注于航空航天，兵器，船舶以及高端民用装备的金属材料制复杂精密零部件、构件的设计优化和增材制造成型、加工业务，并集集团公司优势资源为客户提供集增材制造产品设计、新材料研发、工艺优化、热等静压与热处理、零件加工、成品检测等一体化的全套解决方案。
description_en: Changzhou CISRI-Jiguang Additive Manufacturing Co., Ltd., established in April 2021, is a subsidiary of China Iron and Steel Research Institute Group (CISRI). It specializes in design optimization and LPBF fabrication of complex, high-precision metal components and structures for aerospace, defense, marine, and high-end civilian equipment. Integrating CISRI’s group-wide resources, it delivers end-to-end solutions covering AM part design, novel alloy development, process optimization, hot isostatic pressing (HIP), heat treatment, precision machining, and final inspection.

description_zh: 钢研纳克检测技术股份有限公司（证券代码：300797），起源于1952年的重工业部钢铁工业试验所，是我国冶金分析测试技术���摇篮，是中央企业中国钢研科技集团有限公司所属分析测试产业平台（二级单位），是国内钢铁行业的权威检测机构，也是国内金属材料检测领域业务门类最齐全、综合实力最强的测试研究机构之一。公司业务涵盖检测服务、认证评价、分析仪器、标准物质、无损装备、能力验证、计量校准、腐蚀防护，为客户提供完善、便捷的一站式综合性解决方案。
description_en: NCS Testing Technology Co., Ltd. (Stock Code: 300797) traces its origins to the Iron and Steel Industrial Testing Institute of the Ministry of Heavy Industry, established in 1952. As China’s cradle of metallurgical analysis and testing technologies, it operates as the analytical testing industrial platform under China Iron and Steel Research Institute Group Co., Ltd. (a central SOE). NCS is a leading national inspection authority for the steel industry and one of China’s most comprehensive and technically capable research-testing institutions in metallic materials. Its services span testing, certification & evaluation, analytical instrumentation, certified reference materials, non-destructive testing equipment, proficiency testing, metrological calibration, and corrosion protection—delivering integrated, end-to-end solutions.

Operating since 2014 with over a decade of industry experience, the company markets its proprietary brands Stronghero3D and RainbowME primarily via Amazon’s North American and European marketplaces. Its core product portfolio features multicolor and rainbow-effect PLA and PETG filaments, delivering vibrant, differentiated 3D printing experiences.

description_zh: 河南省远洋粉体科技股份有限公司成立于2003年1月，位于河南省长垣县产业集��区，公司是以雾化铝粉、雾化铝基合金粉研发、生产及销售为一体的高新技术企业、国家专精特新“重点小巨人”企业；历经20年的发展，现年产能约4.6万吨。产品销往全国三十多个省、市、自治区，并与多家世界500强企业建立了长期稳定的合作关系，对外产品主要销往日本、美国、韩国、德国、俄罗斯等20多个国家和地区。公司先后获得ISO9001, ISO14001, ISO45001管理体系认证。
description_en: Founded in January 2003 and located in Changyuan Industrial Park, Henan Province, Henan Yuanyang Powder Technology Co., Ltd. is a high-tech enterprise specializing in the R&D, production, and sale of atomized aluminum powder and aluminum-based alloy powders. Recognized as a national ‘Specialized, Refined, Distinctive, and Innovative’ (SRDI) key ‘Little Giant’ enterprise, it achieves an annual production capacity of ~46,000 metric tons. Its products serve over 30 provinces/municipalities/autonomous regions across China and are exported to more than 20 countries—including Japan, the U.S., South Korea, Germany, and Russia—and supplied to multiple Fortune 500 companies. The company holds ISO 9001, ISO 14001, and ISO 45001 certifications.

description_zh: 武汉因泰莱激光科技有限公司是一家生产制造高性能陶瓷激光3D打印系统，并提供相应的打印材料及成品的高新技术企业。公司通过ISO9001质量管理体系认证，在陶瓷3D打印领域拥有40余项自主知识产权。产品通过欧盟CE安全认证，已成功运用在航空航天、光伏、半导体、医疗器械以及科研等领域，累计销售陶瓷激光3D打印机超百台。公司是“武汉市科技小巨人企业”、 “光谷瞪羚企业”、“光谷3551人才企业”、陶瓷3D打印产业联盟理事单位、陶瓷材料立体光固化增材制造团体标准及国家标准起草单位之一。
description_en: Wuhan Intellaser Laser Technology Co., Ltd. is a high-tech enterprise manufacturing high-performance ceramic laser 3D printing systems, along with compatible printing materials and finished parts. Certified to ISO 9001 and holding over 40 self-owned intellectual property rights in ceramic 3D printing, its systems comply with EU CE safety standards. Applications span aerospace, photovoltaics, semiconductors, medical devices, and scientific research. Over 100 ceramic laser 3D printers have been deployed globally. The company is recognized as a ‘Wuhan Science & Technology Little Giant Enterprise’, ‘Optics Valley Gazelle Enterprise’, and ‘Optics Valley 3551 Talent Enterprise’; serves as a council member of the Ceramic 3D Printing Industry Alliance; and co-drafts national and group standards for stereolithography (SLA)-based ceramic additive manufacturing.

description_zh: 东莞市松美新材料科技有限公司是一家专业生产熔融沉积(FFF/FDM)3D打印耗材的制造商。我们主要专注于各类3D打印高分子材料的研发、生产、销售和服务。我们致力于为企业、团队、个人提供完美的3D打印应用解决方案。我 厂位于素有“世界工厂”之称的中国广东省大岭山镇,拥有100条自主研发的高精度智能3D打印耗材生产线。我公司能够结合不同的工艺和配方生产多种3D打印材料,包括PLA、PETG、ABS、PA、PC、TPU、PVA、PCL、PEEK、PPSU、PEI以及其他功能性3D打印材料,例如丝绸、彩虹、夜光、木塑、阻燃、温变、光变、碳纤维等。我公司拥有全套大型设备加工中心、实验室、打印机应用中心
description_en: Dongguan Songmei New Materials Technology Co., Ltd. is a professional manufacturer of fused filament fabrication (FFF/FDM) 3D printing consumables. Specializing in R&D, production, sales, and technical support for polymer-based 3D printing materials, it delivers tailored application solutions for enterprises, teams, and individual users. Based in Dalingshan Town, Guangdong Province—renowned as the ‘World Factory’—the company operates 100 proprietary high-precision intelligent filament production lines. Its material portfolio includes PLA, PETG, ABS, PA, PC, TPU, PVA, PCL, PEEK, PPSU, PEI, and functional variants such as silk-finish, rainbow, glow-in-the-dark, wood-filled, flame-retardant, thermochromic, photochromic, and carbon-fiber-reinforced filaments. Full-scale capabilities include large-scale machining centers, laboratories, and application demonstration centers.

As a high-tech enterprise, it holds ISO 9001 certification and owns over 20 national patents and software copyrights.

Renowned for superior sealing performance in metal 3D printing applications, the blower maintains strict isolation between internal nitrogen/argon recirculation systems and ambient air, enabling ultra-low oxygen levels within the build chamber while significantly reducing inert gas consumption.

description_zh: 广东祐辉科技有限公司始于2003年，是一家集研发、生产、销售与服务于一体的专业红外线辐射器供应商。 我司专注于研发生产工业应用领域的红外线辐射器，拥有完善的硬件设备，齐全的研发设备及检测仪器，并通过ISO9001:2015质量管理体系认证，实现产业化生产。 我司红外辐射器远销欧洲、美洲、南美、亚洲、非洲等50多个国家，是国内该领域的先行者。主要产品有短波、中波、长波、单管、双管、三维轮廓红外线辐射器、红外模块、红外系统和陶瓷反射器。红外辐射器与传统陶瓷加热器相比是一种快速响应、无接触、透明、高效、节能的热源，广泛应用于涂料的干燥、固化、成型、压花等。
description_en: Guangdong Youhui Technology Co., Ltd., founded in 2003, is a professional infrared emitter supplier integrating R&D, manufacturing, sales, and service. Focused on industrial infrared emitters, it maintains comprehensive hardware infrastructure, advanced R&D and testing equipment, and is certified to ISO 9001:2015. Its emitters are exported to over 50 countries across Europe, the Americas, Asia, and Africa. Product lines include short-, medium-, and long-wave emitters; single- and dual-tube configurations; 3D-profile emitters; IR modules and systems; and ceramic reflectors. Compared to conventional ceramic heaters, these emitters offer rapid response, non-contact heating, transparency, high efficiency, and energy savings—widely applied in coating drying, curing, forming, and embossing.

description_zh: 思锐增材公司基于先进的金属冷整形再生制粉技术，将制粉流程中的副产品以及加工环节的废料进行高效利用，转化为可用于先进制造领域的高价值原料，从而进一步提高钛金属的利用率并大幅降低原料成本，同时，思锐增材还将配套提供对应材料的全流程低成本增材制造方案，帮助钛金属增材制造迈入广泛民用领域。思锐增材目前服务超过50余家大小企业，产品广泛应用于增材制造、金属注射成型等中游生产行业，并面向3C电子、军工、医疗、海洋工程高端工艺品、首饰、精密配件、无人机、机器人等终端领域。我们倡导提高金属材料再生利用效率，减少过渡开采，共享绿色生活!
description_en: SIRUI Additive Manufacturing leverages proprietary cold-worked titanium powder recycling technology to convert process by-products and scrap into high-value feedstock for advanced manufacturing—significantly improving titanium utilization and lowering raw material costs. It further offers turnkey, low-cost additive manufacturing solutions optimized for recycled titanium alloys, accelerating adoption of titanium AM in broad civilian sectors. Serving 50+ clients across sizes, SIRUI supports midstream industries including additive manufacturing and metal injection molding, with end-use applications spanning 3C electronics, defense, medical devices, marine engineering, premium crafts/jewelry, precision components, UAVs, and robotics. Committed to sustainable metal resource utilization, SIRUI advocates reduced primary mining and shared green development.

description_zh: 上海巨哥科技股份有限公司是专精特新和高新技术企业，自主研发光电仪器及核心芯片、智能算法和软件，获上海市科技进步一等奖。团队来自普林斯顿、清华、中科大、浙大、中科院等，获海外高层次人才、上海市优秀技术带头人等称号。诚邀具有事业激情的年轻优秀人才加盟，公司提供优厚的待遇和广阔的发展空间。 巨哥科技提供全波段红外光电产品:用于电力、轨交、冶金、汽车等行业设备状态和过程监控的热像仪，用于石化等行业的气体泄漏成像仪，用于激光、半导体等先进制造领域的短波相机，用于石化、粮油、制药等领域成分分析的光谱仪等，并为材料、工程、生命科学等前沿研究提供科学级光电仪器。
description_en: Shanghai Meggie Technology Co., Ltd. is a ‘Specialized, Refined, Distinctive, and Innovative’ (SRDI) and high-tech enterprise developing proprietary optoelectronic instruments, core chips, intelligent algorithms, and software—recipient of the Shanghai Science and Technology Progress Award (First Prize). Its team comprises experts from Princeton University, Tsinghua University, USTC, Zhejiang University, and CAS. Meggie provides full-spectrum infrared optoelectronic products: thermal imagers for equipment condition and process monitoring in power, rail transit, metallurgy, and automotive sectors; gas leak imaging systems for petrochemical applications; short-wave cameras for laser and semiconductor manufacturing; spectrometers for composition analysis in petrochemical, grain/oil, and pharmaceutical industries; and scientific-grade optoelectronic instruments for materials science, engineering, and life sciences research.

With an annual output of 80 million sets of needle roller bearings and 10 billion individual rollers, its products serve global OEMs in automotive, motorcycle, garden machinery, outboard motors, industrial sewing machines, industrial robots, electrical switches, fitness equipment, printing machinery, and textile machinery—exported to Germany, the U.S., the UK, Canada, and Taiwan. Guided by the principle of ‘quality first, service first,’ the company delivers customer-satisfying solutions.

description_en: Shanghai Yinghuachenrui New Materials Co., Ltd. focuses on modification, R&D, production, and sales of biomaterials. As a high-tech enterprise, it delivers specialized solutions for 3D printing, fibers, extrusion coating, and injection molding. Through continuous innovation, it has launched high-performance FDM 3D printing materials featuring high-speed printing, high toughness, transparent toughening, matte finish, glass-fiber reinforcement, and carbon-fiber reinforcement—available in PLA, PETG, PA, and other polymer systems. These materials address diverse application requirements, enabling superior print quality and enhanced productivity for customers’ 3D printing projects.

description_zh: 扬明光学为全球光学集成设计制造先驱企业之一，提供各式优质光学产品，主要包括光学组件、光机引擎与光学模块等。另外，我们也致力于模具加工、金属加工及单眼HMD系统制造。致力为协助客户探寻新颖产品的蓝海。 扬明光学在公元2002年于新竹科学工业园区成立，并在公元2007年于台湾证券交易所挂牌买卖(股票代号为3504)。我们于台湾新竹、日本、中国昆山、苏州及孟加拉国等地均有重要生产与营运据点，形成一条扎实的光学整合产业链。渴望与您一起感知可见光和不可见光的世界，体验波动光学、几何光学、人类视觉和视觉感知等光学魔术，甚而改变人类生活、颠覆社会样貌的科技创新。
description_en: Kunshan Yangming Optics Co., Ltd. is a pioneer in global optical integrated design and manufacturing, supplying high-quality optical components, optomechanical engines, and optical modules. It also provides mold machining, metal fabrication, and monocular HMD system manufacturing. Founded in 2002 in Hsinchu Science Park, Taiwan, and listed on the Taiwan Stock Exchange (Ticker: 3504), Yangming Optics maintains strategic production and operational hubs in Hsinchu (Taiwan), Japan, Kunshan and Suzhou (China), and Bangladesh—establishing a robust, vertically integrated optical supply chain. It invites partners to explore the frontiers of visible and invisible light, leveraging wave optics, geometric optics, human vision, and visual perception to drive transformative innovations.

description_zh: 唐纳森公司成立于1915年，致力于解决全球客户复杂的过滤需求。我们在40多个国家和地区有工厂或办事处，全球有100多个实验室，每年投入数亿元用于技术研发。作为一家百年企业，我们帮助全球生产制造企业高效应对粉尘、焊烟和油雾挑战，我们提供先进的除尘设备及其相关备件，并且配有专业的技术指导以及优质的售后服务和支持，同时我们可以根据需求和实际工况进行定制。
description_en: Donaldson Company, founded in 1915, solves complex global filtration challenges. With manufacturing facilities or offices in over 40 countries and more than 100 laboratories worldwide, it invests hundreds of millions annually in R&D. As a century-old enterprise, Donaldson delivers advanced dust, weld fume, and oil mist collection systems—including related spare parts—supported by expert technical guidance and responsive after-sales service. Solutions are fully customizable to meet site-specific conditions and operational requirements.

Its products serve diverse industries including pharmaceuticals, research institutes, additive manufacturing, laboratories, food processing, electronics, semiconductors, chemicals, and steel manufacturing.

description_zh: 潍坊凯华碳化硅微粉有限公司主要从事陶瓷级微粉的生产研发与销售.公司成立于2002年，公司占地40亩，标准厂房19000平方，办公楼、研发中心2000平方，年生产能力3万吨。所生产的微粉具有纯度高、粒形圆润、流动性好、稳定性强等特点，主要用于反应烧结、无压烧结、硅碳棒新工艺、重结晶烧结、蜂窝陶瓷、机车制动装置、研磨抛光、金属防腐表面喷涂、纳米隔热保温材料、3D打印和半导体切割等领域。
description_en: Weifang Kaihua Silicon Carbide Micropowder Co., Ltd., established in 2002, specializes in the R&D, production, and sales of ceramic-grade silicon carbide micropowder. Covering 40 mu (≈26,667 m²) with 19,000 m² of standard production facilities and a 2,000 m² office and R&D center, the company has an annual production capacity of 30,000 tons. Its micropowder features high purity, spherical particle morphology, excellent flowability, and strong stability, and is widely used in reaction bonding, pressureless sintering, novel silicon-carbon rod manufacturing, recrystallization sintering, honeycomb ceramics, railway braking systems, grinding and polishing, metal corrosion-resistant thermal spray coatings, nano-scale thermal insulation materials, additive manufacturing (e.g., binder jetting, SLM), and semiconductor wafer dicing.

description_zh: 绍兴四玖科技有限公司是一家专业生产激光测径仪厂家，公司拥有一批专业研发团队，获得一系列知识产品证书，荣获国家高新技术称号。产品主要应用于3D打印耗材丝，塑料管材、金属管材、塑胶件等产品在线检测。产品型号齐全，测量范围在0.02-200mm，测量精度在0.001mm.扫描速度快。其次，还配备相关监测软件，欢迎新老客户选购。
description_en: Shaoxing Sijiu Technology Co., Ltd. is a professional manufacturer of laser-based diameter measurement systems. The company maintains an experienced R&D team, holds multiple intellectual property certifications, and is recognized as a National High-Tech Enterprise. Its metrology instruments are widely deployed for in-line inspection of 3D printing filaments, plastic and metal tubing, and plastic components. Available models support measurement ranges from 0.02 mm to 200 mm with ±0.001 mm accuracy and high-speed scanning. Complementary monitoring software is provided to support real-time quality control and data analysis.

description_zh: 奥伦科技在光固化产品生产研发领域已经深耕20余年，着重专注于高精度、高速度、高性能光固化材料的研发和应用，已成为具有全国影响力的光固化材料科技创新企业，并以推动高精度、高速度、低成本、易实施的光固化技术的普及应用为己任。 奥伦科技母公司位于美丽的泉城济南，是“中国紫外光固化协会”资深理事单位和国家高新技术企业。于1999年3月注册成立，专业生产光固化材料和产品。拥有研发中心、生产车间、内、外贸销售等团队。已获国家专利、软著28项。与华中科技大、西安交大、济南大学、山东省科学院、齐鲁工大等多所大学及科研机构合作，不断推出新品，优化既往产品的升级。
description_en: Aolun Technology, founded in March 1999 and headquartered in Jinan—China’s ‘Spring City’—is a nationally recognized innovator in UV-curable materials, with over two decades of expertise in developing high-precision, high-speed, high-performance photopolymer formulations. As a senior council member of the China UV Curing Association and a National High-Tech Enterprise, Aolun operates integrated R&D, production, and domestic/international sales divisions. It holds 28 patents and software copyrights, and collaborates closely with leading research institutions including Huazhong University of Science and Technology, Xi’an Jiaotong University, University of Jinan, Shandong Academy of Sciences, and Qilu University of Technology to continuously advance material innovation and product optimization for SLA, DLP, and other vat photopolymerization 3D printing technologies.

description_zh: Telsonic是工业超声技术领域的国际公司，也是全球市场领导者之一。 瑞士的 Telsonic 集团一直代表着欧洲、美洲和亚洲的工业超声波解决方案。不断创新的精神使得 Telsonic 已经在许多应用领域中开发出能为客户带来附加价值的优势。由公司所有人领导的企业拥有超过 300 名高素质员工，专门从事塑料和金属焊接以及利用超声波进行清洁和筛分。
description_en: Telsonic is a global leader in industrial ultrasonic technology, headquartered in Switzerland and operating across Europe, the Americas, and Asia. With over 300 highly skilled professionals, Telsonic develops and delivers advanced ultrasonic solutions for plastic and metal welding, ultrasonic cleaning, and ultrasonic sieving—enabling measurable added value across diverse industrial applications. The company’s owner-led structure emphasizes continuous innovation and application-specific engineering excellence.

description_zh: 成立于2010年10月， 深圳市晶格子光学科技有限公司专业生产用于各类激光系统的光学元件，为各类激光系统制造商和最终用户提供各种优质激光光学元件和解决方案。 我们位于深圳市宝安区，占地9500平米， 是一家集合光学设计，研发，打样，生产，销售于一体的光学镜头及镜片生产制造商。我们的生产能力覆盖切割、研磨、抛光、镀膜、检测、装配，测试整套工艺流程。
description_en: Founded in October 2010 and located in Bao’an District, Shenzhen, Shenzhen Jinggezi Optics Technology Co., Ltd. is a vertically integrated manufacturer of high-precision optical components for laser systems. Spanning 9,500 m², the company provides end-to-end capabilities—from optical design, prototyping, and precision manufacturing to coating, metrology, assembly, and performance testing. It supplies premium laser optics—including lenses, mirrors, windows, and custom assemblies—to OEMs and end-users across industrial, medical, scientific, and additive manufacturing (e.g., laser powder bed fusion, directed energy deposition) sectors.

address_en: China/Jiangsu/苏州市
description_zh: 开物智能科技（苏州）有限公司是一家聚焦高性能增材制造装备与智能复合材料技术的科技创新型企业。公司依托国内一流高校与科研团队的长期技术积累，面向先进制造领域的真实需求，致力于构建从装备、材料到工艺与软件协同优化的一体化技术体系。 公司核心业务涵盖连续纤维增强增材制造设备、复杂曲面与多轴功能材料打印装备、配套复合材料耗材及工艺软件平台，重点解决传统复合材料制造在结构复杂度、功能集成度和工程适应性方面的瓶颈问题。通过将材料设计、成形路径规划与装备控制深度融合，开物将持续推动增材制造从“结构成形”向“性能可设计、功能可集成”的工程化阶段演进。
description_en: Kaiwu Intelligent Technology (Suzhou) Co., Ltd. is a high-tech enterprise focused on high-performance additive manufacturing equipment and intelligent composite materials. Leveraging long-term technical expertise from top-tier Chinese universities and research institutes, Kaiwu develops integrated, co-optimized solutions spanning hardware, materials, process algorithms, and software. Core offerings include continuous fiber-reinforced AM systems, multi-axis and complex-curved surface functional material printers, proprietary composite feedstocks, and dedicated process planning software. By tightly coupling material design, toolpath generation, and machine control, Kaiwu advances AM beyond structural fabrication toward engineered performance and functional integration—addressing critical bottlenecks in complexity, multifunctionality, and field deployability of traditional composites.

description_zh: 无锡优倍特新材料科技有限公司主营PETG改性聚酯切片、低熔点PET、和3D打印高性能原料，年产能80000吨。 优倍特提供多种高性能PETG/PLA原材料，例如哑光、碳纤维、高速、高强度和丝绸母粒等。 作为专业的3D打印原材料供应商，我们积极研发各种原材料，以满足客户的不同需求。
description_en: Wuxi Ubert New Materials Technology Co., Ltd. specializes in high-performance thermoplastic materials for additive manufacturing, with an annual production capacity of 80,000 tons. Key products include PETG-modified polyester chips, low-melting-point PET, and advanced 3D printing raw materials. Ubert offers a broad portfolio of engineered PETG and PLA grades—including matte-finish, carbon-fiber-reinforced, high-speed printing, high-strength, and silk-effect masterbatches—tailored to diverse application requirements. As a dedicated supplier to the AM industry, Ubert actively invests in R&D to expand its material library and enhance printability, mechanical properties, and process robustness for FDM and other extrusion-based systems.
